title: Trust the Right Teacher: Quality-Aware Self-Distillation for GUI Grounding
abstract: Graphical user interface (GUI) grounding requires vision-language models (VLMs) to identify small target elements in high-resolution screenshots and predict precise screen coordinates. On-policy self-distillation (OPSD) is a promising post-training approach for this coordinate-sensitive task, since it provides dense token-level teacher signals beyond hard coordinate labels. However, naive OPSD is not well suited to GUI grounding: OPSD evaluates the teacher on student-generated prefixes, the quality of coordinate-token teacher signals can degrade when the prefix has already deviated from the target coordinate, leading to unreliable teacher signal. To mitigate this, We propose quality-aware self-distillation for VLM-based GUI grounding, which improves coordinate-token teacher-signal quality through soft correctness-aware gating and teacher-probability scaling. The soft correctness-aware gate checks whether the teacher's current coordinate-token prediction can still be completed into the ground-truth box under the student-generated prefix. If not, the corresponding teacher signal is down-weighted. Teacher-probability scaling then uses the teacher's confidence as a lightweight factor to further calibrate the strength of the gated supervision. A key empirical finding is that neither component alone improves overall performance, whereas combining them consistently improves performance. This suggests that the two mechanisms play complementary roles: correctness-aware gating suppresses unreliable coordinate-token supervision, while teacher-probability scaling calibrates the strength of the remaining signals. Experiments across six GUI grounding benchmarks show that our method consistently improves the base model and outperforms strong baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出质量感知自蒸馏方法，通过正确性感知门控和教师概率缩放改善GUI定位中的教师信号质量。
light_analysis.motivation: GUI定位任务要求视觉语言模型在高分辨率截图中识别小元素并预测精确坐标。现有on-policy自蒸馏方法在生成坐标令牌时，若学生前缀偏离目标，教师信号质量会退化，导致不可靠的监督信号。本研究旨在解决这一问题，提升自蒸馏在坐标敏感任务中的有效性。
light_analysis.method: 提出质量感知自蒸馏方法，包含两个互补组件：软正确性感知门控检查教师坐标令牌预测是否能在学生前缀下补全为真实框，若不能则降低该教师信号权重；教师概率缩放利用教师置信度校准门控后的监督强度。两者单独使用无效，组合后持续提升性能。实验在六个GUI定位基准上进行。
light_analysis.result: 在六个GUI定位基准上，所提方法一致地提升了基础模型性能，并显著优于多种强基线方法。摘要未报告具体数值，但强调了组合组件的持续改进效果，验证了方法的有效性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作通过质量感知自蒸馏有效提升了GUI定位中教师信号的可靠性，具有重要的学术价值，可推动GUI理解应用。潜在局限在于需额外门控计算开销，未来可探索更轻量的质量控制策略或扩展到其他坐标敏感任务。

title: IsabeLLM: Automated Theorem Proving Applied to Formally Verifying Consensus
abstract: Advances in Artificial Intelligence (AI) have led AI for Theorem Proving to become a promising means of formally verifying computer systems. Whilst formal verification is traditionally reserved for safety-critical systems due to the required amount of expertise and effort, AI can help to automate a large amount of this workload and make it far more accessible. Blockchain-based systems are becoming increasingly popular and are frequently targeted by malicious actors, often resulting in huge financial losses, highlighting the need to better verify these systems and mitigate vulnerabilities. Arguably the most important component of these systems is the consensus protocol, which allows nodes to agree on decisions in a potentially adversarial environment. In this paper, we improve upon IsabeLLM, the automated theorem proving tool in Isabelle. Namely, we implement a Retrieval-Augmented Generation framework, Error tracing and counterexample generation for improved context supplied to the Large Language Model. Compatibility with the latest version of Isabelle and Sledgehammer is also implemented for improved efficiency. We compare the performance of the two versions of IsabeLLM in their ability to complete the verification of Bitcoin's Proof of Work consensus.

light_analysis.overview: 改进IsabeLLM工具，通过检索增强生成和错误追踪增强Isabelle自动定理证明，应用于区块链共识协议的形式验证。
light_analysis.motivation: 区块链系统易受攻击，共识协议是关键组件，传统形式验证需大量专家努力。AI可自动化验证，但现有IsabeLLM工具效率不足，需改进以增强可用性和性能。
light_analysis.method: 实现检索增强生成（RAG）框架，结合错误追踪和反例生成，为大型语言模型提供更丰富的上下文。同时兼容最新版Isabelle和Sledgehammer，提升自动证明效率。
light_analysis.result: 对比新旧两个版本IsabeLLM在验证比特币工作量证明共识协议上的性能。摘要未明确具体指标，但表明改进版本在验证能力上有所提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法降低了形式验证门槛，使区块链系统更安全。未来可推广至其他共识协议或安全关键系统，具有重要学术和实际应用价值。

title: S4oP: Operator-level Pruning of Structured State Space Models for Resource-Constrained Devices
abstract: Structured State Space Models (SSMs), including the S4 and S4D architectures, have recently emerged as powerful alternatives to attention-based models for capturing long-range dependencies in sequential data. Despite their strong empirical performance, deploying these models in time- and resource-constrained settings remains challenging due to their computational and memory demands. In this paper, we propose a novel incremental, operator-level pruning approach for S4- and S4D-based models that significantly reduces inference cost while preserving predictive performance. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to systematically investigate structured operator pruning for SSMs. Our method progressively prunes model operators by interleaving structured masking with fine-tuning, while jointly monitoring accuracy and inference latency. We implement this approach within a unified training and evaluation framework that enables systematic exploration of efficiency-accuracy trade-offs. Experiments across multiple benchmark datasets show that pruning up to 70% of the model operators preserves the performance of the original models in most cases, while substantially reducing inference latency. These results demonstrate that structured operator pruning is an effective and previously unexplored strategy for improving the efficiency of SSMs and facilitate their deployment in practical, resource-constrained scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 提出S4oP，首个针对结构化状态空间模型(SSM)的算子级剪枝方法，在保持性能的同时大幅降低推理成本。
light_analysis.motivation: S4和S4D等结构化状态空间模型在长序列建模中表现优异，但计算和内存需求高，难以部署在时间和资源受限的设备上。现有剪枝研究主要针对传统神经网络，缺乏对SSM结构特性的利用。因此需要一种专门针对SSM的高效压缩策略，以平衡效率与精度。
light_analysis.method: 提出增量式、算子级结构化剪枝方法，交替进行结构化掩码和微调，同时监控准确率和推理延迟。在统一训练框架中实现，可系统探索效率-精度权衡。针对S4/S4D架构，逐层移除不重要的算子（如状态转换、投影等），通过掩码实现结构化稀疏。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准数据集上，剪枝高达70%的模型算子仍能保持原始模型性能，同时大幅降低推理延迟。与未剪枝模型相比，在性能几乎无损的情况下显著提升效率，验证了结构化算子剪枝在SSM中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次系统研究SSM的结构化算子剪枝，证明该方法能有效降低部署成本，促进SSM在资源受限场景（如边缘设备）的实际应用。未来可探索更细粒度的剪枝策略及与其他压缩技术的结合。

title: From Reasoning Traces to Reusable Modules: Understanding Compositional Generalization in Language Model Reasoning
abstract: Post-training pipelines that combine supervised fine-tuning (SFT) with reinforcement learning (RL) have emerged as the key recipe for transforming large language models (LLMs) into robust reasoners. We argue that this combined success is driven by compositional generalization, which we formalize through a hierarchical latent selection model. In this framework, reasoning traces are generated by a cascade of discrete latent selection variables corresponding to reusable atomic modules, including both skills (local operations) and routing mechanisms (how intermediate information is selected, reused, and composed). Within this model, we theoretically show that SFT and RL play asymmetric, complementary roles: SFT supplies the raw module materials in compositional traces, and RL decomposes those traces to identify the latent atomic modules and enable compositional generalization. We design controlled experiments to validate this theory. Our results demonstrate that RL can extract atomic modules from compound traces supplied by SFT and recombine them to solve new configurations. Moreover, we find that training on compound traces yields stronger generalization than training on isolated atomic modules. Finally, we investigate the relationship between SFT and RL data and identify an effective protocol in which SFT ensures coverage of all atomic modules through compositional traces, while RL focuses on novel compositions outside the SFT support to drive exploration.

light_analysis.overview: 通过层次潜在选择模型理论分析了SFT和RL在组合泛化中的不对称互补作用。
light_analysis.motivation: 将大语言模型转化为强推理器的后训练管线（SFT+RL）成功，但其深层机制不明。作者认为成功源于组合泛化，现有方法缺乏理论解释。因此需要形式化组合泛化过程，理解SFT和RL各自角色，以指导更有效的训练策略。
light_analysis.method: 提出层次潜在选择模型，将推理轨迹建模为离散潜在选择变量的级联，对应可重用原子模块（技能和路由机制）。理论上证明SFT提供模块材料，RL分解轨迹识别原子模块实现组合泛化。设计控制实验验证理论，包括复合轨迹训练与孤立模块训练对比。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明：RL能从SFT提供的复合轨迹中提取原子模块并重新组合解决新配置；训练复合轨迹比孤立原子模块泛化更强；发现有效协议：SFT确保所有原子模块通过复合轨迹覆盖，RL专注于SFT支持外的创新组合以驱动探索。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了SFT和RL在组合泛化中的互补角色，SFT供给模块材料，RL实现组合泛化。提出有效训练协议，为后训练管线提供理论理解，优化LLM推理训练策略。未来可研究更广泛场景下的适用性。

title: Edge Flow: A Tractable and Predictive Continuous-Time Model for Gradient Descent at the Edge of Stability
abstract: Gradient descent in deep learning may operate at the edge of stability (EoS), a regime in which the largest eigenvalue of the loss Hessian hovers near the stability threshold $2/η$, where $η$ is the learning rate. Classical analysis tools such as gradient flow and the descent lemma do not apply here, motivating the search for a continuous-time model valid at EoS. We propose Edge Flow, a system of three coupled ordinary differential equations that provides a tractable, faithful, and predictive model of gradient descent dynamics at EoS. Edge Flow decomposes the dynamics into a center, an oscillation direction, and an oscillation magnitude. The center follows a modified gradient flow on a symmetrized loss; the direction tracks a top eigenvector of the Hessian via Rayleigh quotient dynamics; and the magnitude grows or decays exponentially depending on whether the sharpness exceeds or falls below the threshold $2/η$. Crucially, sharpness stabilization emerges from the coupled dynamics via a self-stabilization feedback loop. Discretizing Edge Flow only requires two gradient evaluations and one Hessian--vector product at each iteration. We demonstrate empirically that Edge Flow tracks the dynamics of gradient descent at least as faithfully as previously proposed continuous-time EoS models, while in addition resolving the oscillation of the sharpness at the onset of EoS, and that it provides a principled framework for understanding and mitigating instabilities in this regime.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Edge Flow，一个由三个耦合常微分方程组成的连续时间模型，用于准确预测深度学习梯度下降在稳定边缘（EoS）的动力学行为。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度学习中的梯度下降常运行在稳定边缘（EoS），此时损失Hessian的最大特征值接近稳定性阈值2/η。经典分析工具如梯度流和下降引理在此不适用，亟需一个有效的连续时间模型来捕捉EoS下的动力学行为。现有方法无法同时准确追踪动力学并解析振荡特性，因此需要一种可处理且具有预测能力的模型。
light_analysis.method: Edge Flow将梯度下降动力学分解为中心、振荡方向和振荡幅度三个耦合ODE。中心遵循对称损失上的修正梯度流；振荡方向通过Rayleigh商动力学追踪Hessian主特征向量；振荡幅度根据锐度是否超过阈值2/η指数增长或衰减。锐度稳定通过耦合动力学的自稳定反馈循环实现。离散化每次迭代仅需两次梯度计算和一次Hessian-向量积。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，Edge Flow追踪梯度下降动力学的精确性至少与先前提出的连续时间EoS模型相当，并且能解析EoS初始时锐度的振荡行为。它为理解和缓解该不稳定性提供了原理框架，但摘要未给出具体数值对比指标或性能提升数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: Edge Flow提供了一个可处理且准确的连续时间模型，填补了经典分析工具在EoS条件下的空白。它不仅能忠实模拟梯度下降动力学，还能解析锐度振荡，有助于理解深度学习的训练动态。潜在局限性可能在于模型复杂度或对高维Hessian的依赖，未来工作可探索其在实际大规模训练中的应用。

title: A Unified Framework for Context-Aware and Relation-Aware Graph Retrieval-Augmented Generation
abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has emerged as a paradigm for enhancing large language models (LLMs) with external knowledge, yet existing graph-based methods face a fundamental limitation: entity-centric and chunk-centric approaches operate on representations anchored to original text without true knowledge fusion. While entity-centric methods connect logically related content and chunk-centric methods preserve context, both retrieve information separately through similarity search, missing emergent understanding from their synthesis. In this paper, we propose HyGRAG, a hierarchical graph RAG framework that transcends source documents by addressing three core challenges: constructing summaries that genuinely integrate contextual and relational information, leveraging these synthesized representations to access emergent knowledge during retrieval, and efficiently updating hierarchical structures for dynamic corpora. Specifically, we design hierarchical index structures over hybrid graphs with both chunk and entity nodes, then iteratively cluster them and generate LLM-based summaries. Then, we design context and relation-aware retrieval that searches across all abstraction levels while expanding through community membership. Moreover, we enable dynamic knowledge update through attachment-based algorithms with only local re-summarization. Experimental results show that HyGRAG improves the average accuracy of multi-hop reasoning tasks by 9.7%, while maintaining reasonable efficiency.
comment: Accepted at The ACM Web Conference 2026 (WWW '26)

light_analysis.overview: 提出HyGRAG，一种层次化图RAG框架，通过上下文与关系感知的合成表示提升多跳推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有图RAG方法分为实体中心和块中心两种，但都基于原始文本的表示，缺乏真正的知识融合。实体中心方法连接逻辑相关内容，块中心方法保留上下文，但两者通过相似性搜索独立检索，无法从合成中产生涌现理解。这种局限性阻碍了模型在复杂推理任务中充分利用图结构信息，导致多跳推理性能受限。因此，需要一种能够整合上下文和关系信息、实现知识合成并支持动态更新的统一框架。
light_analysis.method: HyGRAG构建包含块和实体节点的混合图，设计层次化索引结构；通过迭代聚类并基于LLM生成摘要，实现上下文与关系信息的融合。检索时，在全部抽象层级中搜索，并通过社区成员关系进行扩展，实现上下文与关系感知的检索。另外，采用基于附加的算法支持动态知识更新，仅需局部重新摘要，避免了全局重构的高昂成本。
light_analysis.result: 在多个多跳推理任务上，HyGRAG平均准确率提升9.7%，同时保持了合理的效率。与实体中心和块中心基线相比，HyGRAG在需要跨文档推理的场景中优势显著，验证了合成表示与层次化检索的有效性。具体性能指标包括准确率、检索效率和更新代价等，均优于现有图RAG方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: HyGRAG通过层次化图结构和LLM摘要生成，实现了上下文与关系感知的知识融合与检索，显著提升了多跳推理准确性。该框架具有动态更新能力，适用于不断变化的语料库。未来工作可探索更高效的聚类策略和摘要生成方式，以降低计算开销。研究为图增强RAG提供了新范式，具有重要的学术与应用价值。

title: Volterra Generative Models
abstract: Score-based diffusion models typically use Brownian perturbations, which provide tractable reverse-time dynamics but impose memoryless noising. We introduce Volterra generative models, a continuous-time score-based framework whose forward process injects path-dependent noise through fractional kernels. To handle the non-Markovian and non-semimartingale dynamics, we construct finite-dimensional Markovian lifts using Gaussian quadrature in both regimes and a hybrid finite-difference exponential approximation in the smooth regime. We prove squared error bounds, derive an augmented linear-Gaussian forward process, and show that the learning can remain data-dimensional by considering residual states and analytic auxiliary Gaussian scores. We also identify covariance and reverse-time degeneracies caused by shared Brownian factors and signed smooth-regime weights. The degeneracy motivates stabilized conditioning and, for stiff larger lifts, a Gaussian-bridge reconstruction sampler. Experiments on MNIST and CIFAR-10 show that persistent fractional perturbations with small Markovian lifts can improve score-based generation on MNIST and provide a promising extension to natural images, while the bridge sampler provides a stability mechanism for larger lifts.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Volterra生成模型，通过分数核注入路径依赖噪声，并构造马尔可夫提升处理非马尔可夫动力学。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于分数的扩散模型通常使用布朗噪声，其马尔可夫性质限制了噪声的路径依赖性。引入路径依赖噪声有望提升生成质量，但非马尔可夫和非半鞅动力学导致前向和反向过程难以处理，缺乏有效的学习框架。
light_analysis.method: 采用分数核前向过程注入路径依赖噪声，利用高斯求积和混合有限差分指数近似构造有限维马尔可夫提升，使非马尔可夫动力学可处理。推导增广线性高斯前向过程，通过残差状态和解析辅助高斯分数保持数据维度。针对协方差和反向简并，提出稳定化条件及高斯桥重建采样器。
light_analysis.result: 在MNIST和CIFAR-10上的实验表明，使用小马尔可夫提升的分数扰动能改善MNIST上的生成质量，并为自然图像生成提供有前景的扩展。桥接采样器为更大提升提供了稳定性机制，但摘要未提供具体量化指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: Volterra生成模型将分数生成框架推广至路径依赖噪声，通过马尔可夫提升和稳定方法克服了非马尔可夫挑战，为生成建模提供了新思路。学术上丰富了扩散模型理论，实际应用中可能提升图像生成质量，未来可探索其他分数核或大规模应用。

title: Agentic AI-based Framework for Mitigating Premature Diagnostic Handoff and Silent Hallucination in Healthcare Applications
abstract: Recent advances in Large Language Models (LLMs) and multi-agent systems have driven the rise of Agentic AI, showing promise for medical reasoning. However, open-ended conversational agents remain prone to two critical failure modes: premature diagnostic handoff and silent clinical hallucinations that may go undetected before reaching the patient. In this work, we propose a multi-agent framework that addresses both issues by replacing ``LLM-as-a-judge'' routing with deterministic orchestration constraints. The framework incorporates two safety mechanisms. First, a neuro-symbolic state-tracking gate enforces completeness of the OLDCARTS clinical protocol (Onset, Location, Duration, Character, Aggravating/Alleviating factors, Radiation, Timing, and Severity) by blocking diagnostic transitions until all required dimensions are collected. Second, an epistemic uncertainty quantification (UQ) gate computes semantic entropy (H) across K=5 independent diagnostic samples to identify and intercept divergent outputs before delivery.   We evaluate the system using simulated patient agents powered by the llama-3.1-70b-instruct model on 150 test cases. The full architecture achieves 49.3% diagnostic precision, representing an absolute improvement of 11.3 percentage points over an unconstrained baseline. Additionally, we observe a statistically significant negative correlation (r = -0.181, p < 0.05) between OLDCARTS completeness (σ) and semantic entropy (H), suggesting that structured information gathering is associated with reduced diagnostic uncertainty.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于多智能体和确定性子编排的框架，通过神经符号状态跟踪门和语义熵不确定性量化门，减少医疗对话中的过早诊断交接和无声幻觉。
light_analysis.motivation: 医疗对话中，开放型对话代理容易出现过早诊断交接和无声临床幻觉，这些错误在到达患者前可能未被检测到。现有LLM-as-a-judge路由方法不够可靠，导致诊断精度低。该问题对患者安全至关重要，亟需更鲁棒的机制来确保诊断过程的完整性和输出可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 提出多智能体框架，用确定性子编排约束替代LLM-as-a-judge路由，包含两个安全机制：(1) 神经符号状态跟踪门，强制执行OLDCARTS临床协议，阻止诊断转换直至收集所有维度；(2) 基于语义熵的不确定性量化门，对K=5个独立诊断样本计算熵，拦截分歧输出。仿真测试使用150个病例，由llama-3.1-70b-instruct模型驱动的患者智能体。
light_analysis.result: 完整架构在150个测试案例上达到49.3%的诊断精度，比无约束基线绝对提升11.3个百分点。OLDCARTS完整度（σ）与语义熵（H）之间存在显著负相关（r=-0.181, p<0.05），表明结构化信息收集与诊断不确定性降低相关。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作通过引入确定性子编排和双重安全机制，有效提升医疗对话系统的诊断精度和鲁棒性，防止关键错误传递至患者。未来可扩展至更多临床协议和现实场景验证。神经符号与不确定性量化结合的方法为安全关键型AI应用提供了新思路。

title: NoiseTilt: Noise-Tilted Reverse Kernels for Diffusion Reward Alignment
abstract: We introduce the Noise-Tilted Reverse Kernel (NTRK), a reward-guided diffusion sampler that injects reward gradients through the noise term, leaving the pretrained reverse kernel unchanged and requiring only a single sample per step. Reward-guided sampling at inference time has greatly expanded the versatility of pretrained diffusion models. Yet existing methods face a trade-off. Gradient-based guidance shifts the reverse mean, steering generation but pushing intermediate states outside the region that the model was trained on and degrading quality. Search-based methods preserve quality but gain no gradient signal. No prior method achieves both. NTRK resolves this by keeping the reverse mean fixed and biasing the noise term toward high reward. We introduce a whitening operator, the central mechanism behind NTRK, that makes the reward gradient safe to inject as noise without losing its guiding signal. Across various reward alignment tasks, NTRK outperforms recent state-of-the-art baselines without losing sample quality. Remarkably, on aesthetic generation, NTRK surpasses the reward of the best baseline at 500 NFEs using only 25 NFEs, a 20$\times$ reduction in compute.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 Noise-Tilted Reverse Kernel (NTRK)，通过白化算子将奖励梯度注入噪声项，实现无需改变反向均值的单步奖励引导采样，兼顾生成质量与梯度信号。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有奖励引导采样方法面临两难：梯度引导改变反向均值，导致中间状态偏离训练分布，降低生成质量；搜索方法保持质量但无法利用梯度信号。NTRK 旨在同时实现高质量与高效引导。
light_analysis.method: NTRK 保持预训练反向核不变，引入白化算子将奖励梯度变换为安全的噪声方向，注入噪声项。仅需每步一次采样，通过梯度偏置噪声实现奖励对齐，避免改变反向均值。
light_analysis.result: 在多种奖励对齐任务中，NTRK 优于最新基线且不损失样本质量。在美学生成中，NTRK 仅用 25 NFE 达到最佳基线 500 NFE 的奖励，计算量降低 20 倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: NTRK 解决了奖励引导采样的质量-梯度权衡，实现了高效高质的奖励对齐，具有显著的实际应用价值。未来可扩展至图像生成、强化学习等领域。

title: When LLMs Analyze Scars: From Images to Clinically-Meaningful Features
abstract: Medical image classification faces a fundamental dilemma: while deep learning models achieve remarkable performance at scale, real-world clinical scenarios often suffer from severe data scarcity due to annotation costs, privacy constraints, and disease rarity. This challenge is particularly pronounced in pathological scar classification, where differentiating keloids from hypertrophic scars requires subtle expert knowledge and labeled images are extremely limited. We propose a novel paradigm that repositions large language models (LLMs) as knowledge-driven feature engineers rather than end-to-end classifiers. We call this framework ScaFE (Scar Feature Engineering). Our key insight is that LLMs encode rich medical knowledge that can be externalized as executable feature extraction code, enabling the transformation of high-dimensional images into low-dimensional, clinically interpretable representations. Specifically, we prompt an LLM with established scar assessment criteria to generate deterministic Python code that extracts features aligned with clinical scoring systems such as the Vancouver Scar Scale. Our approach offers three key advantages: (1) data efficiency, achieving robust performance with limited training samples by decoupling knowledge acquisition from statistical learning; (2) privacy preservation, as raw images are processed locally without exposure to external LLMs; and (3) interpretability, through explicit features grounded in clinical reasoning. Extensive experiments on scar classification demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms end-to-end deep learning baselines or using LLMs as black-box classifiers under limited data conditions, establishing a promising direction for integrating LLMs into data-efficient and clinically transparent medical AI systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ScaFE框架，利用LLM生成特征提取代码，将图像转换为临床可解释特征，实现数据高效的瘢痕分类。
light_analysis.motivation: 医学图像分类面临数据稀缺问题，尤其是瘢痕分类中，区分瘢痕疙瘩与增生性瘢痕需要专家知识，标注图像极其有限。现有深度学习方法在数据不足时性能下降，且缺乏可解释性，难以满足临床需求。
light_analysis.method: 提出ScaFE框架，将LLM作为知识驱动的特征工程师。通过提示LLM基于临床评估标准（如温哥华瘢痕量表）生成确定性Python代码，从图像中提取低维、临床可解释的特征，再使用传统分类器进行训练。该方法无需将原始图像暴露给外部LLM，保护隐私。
light_analysis.result: 在瘢痕分类任务上，ScaFE在有限训练样本下始终优于端到端深度学习基线和使用LLM作为黑盒分类器的方法。实验表明该方法具有数据高效性，能鲁棒地处理数据稀缺场景，同时保持高分类准确率。
light_analysis.conclusion: ScaFE为数据高效且临床透明的医学AI系统提供了新方向，兼具数据效率、隐私保护和可解释性。未来可扩展至其他医学图像分类任务，但可能需要针对不同临床标准调整提示工程。

title: Security and Privacy Prompts in the Wild: What Users Ask LLMs and How LLMs Respond
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are widely used to fulfill users' information needs; users ask LLMs about the weather, pose educational questions, and consult them for legal assistance. One particularly understudied area is digital security and privacy (S&P), where users may seek LLMs' help on how to secure their online accounts or protect their computers from cyber attacks. To the best of our knowledge, no prior study has collected or analyzed the S&P questions users ask LLMs; prior research on LLM response quality relied on expert-authored S&P misconceptions or FAQs rather than user queries. Drawing from WildChat, a dataset of 3.2M user-LLM conversations collected in the wild, our study identifies 14,727 S&P prompts and categorizes them into nine categories covering a wide range of S&P topics. From the S&P prompts, we sampled 450 and performed a thematic analysis to characterize the S&P questions users ask LLMs. Separate from the thematic analysis, we curated 270 advice-seeking S&P prompts, where users ask for recommendations, guidance, or specific S&P information. We measured LLM response quality and consistency when posing the prompt to LLMs 10 times. We found that commercial LLMs outperform open-weight models (GPT 5.5 provided "good enough" responses on 98% of prompts; Llama 4 on 47%). However, among prompts that received high-quality responses on average, commercial models sometimes produce contradictory responses across runs, risking confusing or misleading users.

light_analysis.overview: 首次大规模收集并分析用户向LLMs提出的安全与隐私问题，评估LLM回复质量与一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 用户常就数字安全与隐私问题咨询LLMs，但此前缺乏对真实用户提出的S&P问题的系统性研究。现有研究多基于专家撰写的S&P误解或常见问题，而非真实用户查询。理解用户实际需求并评估LLM回复质量对于提升LLM在敏感领域的可靠性和用户信任至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 基于WildChat数据集（320万条用户-LLM对话），筛选出14,727条S&P提示，分类为9个主题。从S&P提示中随机抽取450条进行主题分析，并额外筛选270条咨询建议类提示，以10次重复实验评估LLM回复质量与一致性，对比商业模型（GPT-5.5）与开源模型（Llama 4）。
light_analysis.result: 商业模型（GPT-5.5）在98%的提示上给出“足够好”回复，而开源模型（Llama 4）仅为47%。但在获得高质量回复的提示中，商业模型存在跨次回复矛盾的问题，可能混淆或误导用户。结果表明质量与一致性均需关注。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了用户向LLMs提出的S&P问题分布，并系统评估了回复质量与一致性。商业模型表现更优但存在不一致性问题，提示在敏感领域需谨慎部署。未来工作可探索提升一致性或针对特定S&P主题优化模型。

title: PseudoBench: Measuring How Agentic Auto-Research Fuels Pseudoscience
abstract: As Large Language Model based agents enter autonomous scientific research, their ability to resist pseudoscience becomes increasingly important. Otherwise, such systems may rapidly generate plausible yet misleading studies that contaminate academic literature and erode trust in science. We present PseudoBench, an adversarial benchmark for evaluating whether agentic auto-research systems can identify and resist pseudoscientific narratives. PseudoBench contains 200 curated pseudoscientific claim-evidence pairs across five domains and evaluates agents through an end-to-end research pipeline from experiments to writing. Testing seven state-of-the-art agents, we find that current systems readily produce persuasive reports that align with pseudoscientific premises with near-zero refusal rates and the highest resistance of only 27.4%. Stronger agents risk packaging pseudoscience in more sophisticated scientific language, increasing its apparent credibility. These findings reveal an alarming capacity to fuel pseudoscience, calling for scientific alignment before widespread deployment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PseudoBench基准，用于评估基于大语言模型的自动研究系统识别和抵制伪科学的能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着基于大语言模型的智能体进入自主科学研究，其抵制伪科学的能力变得至关重要，否则可能快速生成看似合理却具有误导性的研究，污染学术文献并侵蚀科学信任。现有方法缺乏对智能体在端到端研究流程中抵御伪科学的系统性评估。
light_analysis.method: PseudoBench包含200个跨五个领域的伪科学声称-证据对，通过从实验到写作的完整研究流程评估智能体。测试了七个最先进的基于大语言模型的智能体，测量其生成报告的伪科学倾向性和拒绝率。
light_analysis.result: 当前系统几乎不拒绝伪科学前提（拒绝率接近零），最高抵抗率仅27.4%。更强的智能体反而会用更复杂的科学语言包装伪科学，增加其表面可信度，表明现有系统有令人担忧的助长伪科学能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究揭示了自动研究系统在缺乏科学对齐时易助长伪科学，呼吁在广泛部署前加强科学对齐。基准为评估和提升智能体的科学诚信提供了重要工具，但可能未覆盖所有伪科学形式，未来需扩展领域和改进抵抗机制。

title: ConSA: Controllable Sparsity in Hybrid Attention via Learnable Allocation
abstract: Hybrid architectures combining full attention (FA) and sliding-window attention (SWA) are a promising paradigm for efficient LLM inference. However, existing methods typically rely on hand-crafted rules or simple post-hoc heuristics for FA/SWA allocation and offer limited analysis of the attention behaviors underlying these designs. We propose Controllable Sparsity in Hybrid Attention (ConSA), a framework that learns optimal FA/SWA assignment under a user-specified sparsity target. ConSA employs L0 regularization to learn binary masks selecting between FA and SWA for each attention unit, while an augmented Lagrangian constraint enforces the target sparsity at either layer or KV-head granularity. We evaluate ConSA on two LLMs at the 0.6B and 1.7B scales. Learned allocations consistently outperform rule-based baselines, with KV-head-wise allocation yielding clear gains over layer-wise allocation. The learned patterns place SWA in the bottom layers and concentrate FA into contiguous middle-layer blocks, diverging from evenly interleaved patterns in rule-based methods. This structure persists across model scales, sparsity levels, and allocation granularities, revealing a fine-grained spectrum of intrinsic attention behaviors that underlies the learned allocation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ConSA框架，通过L0正则化和增广拉格朗日约束学习全注意力与滑动窗口注意力的最优分配，实现用户指定稀疏度下的可控稀疏性。
light_analysis.motivation: 混合注意力架构（FA+SWA）是高效LLM推理的 promising 范式，但现有方法依赖手工规则或简单后验启发式，缺乏对注意力行为深层次理解的支撑。需要一种可学习、可控制稀疏度的分配方法，以自动发现最优注意力模式并提升推理效率。
light_analysis.method: ConSA采用L0正则化学习二元掩码，为每个注意力单元选择FA或SWA，并通过增广拉格朗日约束强制达到用户指定的稀疏度目标，支持层或KV头两种粒度。在0.6B和1.7B参数的LLM上实验，对比基于规则的基线方法。
light_analysis.result: 学习到的分配在困惑度和下游任务上持续优于规则基线，KV头粒度分配比层粒度增益更明显。学习模式将SWA置于底层、FA集中在中间层连续块，而非均匀交错，且该结构跨模型规模、稀疏度水平稳定，揭示了内在注意力行为的细粒度谱。
light_analysis.conclusion: ConSA为混合注意力分配提供了一种数据驱动的学习范式，避免手工设计，显著提升性能。其揭示的注意力结构有助于理解LLM内部机制。未来可探索更复杂约束或跨任务泛化性。

title: Compositional Skill Routing for LLM Agents: Decompose, Retrieve, and Compose
abstract: LLM agents increasingly rely on external skills -- reusable tool specifications -- but real-world tasks often require composing multiple skills, not just selecting one. We formalize this as the Compositional Skill Routing problem: given a complex user query and a large skill library, decompose the query into atomic sub-tasks, retrieve the appropriate skill for each sub-task, and compose an executable plan. We present SkillWeaver, a decompose-retrieve-compose framework combining an LLM task decomposer, a bi-encoder skill retriever with FAISS indexing, and a dependency-aware DAG planner. To support evaluation, we introduce CompSkillBench, a benchmark of 300 compositional queries over 2,209 real MCP server skills spanning 24 functional categories, sourced from the public MCP ecosystem. Our experiments reveal that task decomposition quality is the primary bottleneck: standard LLM decomposition reaches only 34.2% category recall at the step level. To address this, we propose Iterative Skill-Aware Decomposition (SAD), a retrieval-augmented feedback loop that iteratively aligns decomposition with available skills. SAD improves decomposition accuracy from 51.0% to 67.7% (+32.7%, Wilcoxon p < 10^-6) in a single iteration; DA-conditioned analysis confirms that correct granularity is the prerequisite for effective retrieval (CatR@1 rises from 34% to 41% when DA=1). SkillWeaver reduces context window consumption by over 99%, and transfer experiments confirm generalization (+35.6% relative DA gain even when target categories are absent from the retrieval pool).

light_analysis.overview: 提出SkillWeaver框架，通过分解、检索和组合实现LLM智能体的组合技能路由，并引入迭代技能感知分解提升任务分解质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 现实世界任务常需组合多个技能，但现有LLM代理多依赖单一技能选择。为解决复杂查询中多技能组合的挑战，需形式化组合技能路由问题，提升分解、检索和规划的协同能力。现有方法在任务分解质量上存在瓶颈，标准分解的类别召回率仅34.2%。
light_analysis.method: 提出SkillWeaver框架，包含基于LLM的任务分解器、双编码器技能检索器（FAISS索引）和依赖感知DAG规划器。为提升分解质量，提出迭代技能感知分解（SAD），通过检索增强反馈循环逐步对齐分解与可用技能。构建CompSkillBench基准，含300个组合查询和2209个MCP技能。
light_analysis.result: SAD单次迭代将分解准确率从51.0%提升至67.7%（+32.7%，p<10^-6）。当分解粒度正确（DA=1）时，首类召回率从34%升至41%。SkillWeaver减少上下文窗口消耗超99%。迁移实验表明即使目标类别不在检索池中，DA仍相对提升35.6%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文形式化组合技能路由问题，提出SkillWeaver框架及SAD方法，显著提升任务分解质量与系统效率。工作表明分解质量是核心瓶颈，SAD可有效缓解。未来可探索更复杂的规划策略及技能库动态更新。

title: ConTex: Reformulating Counterfactual Generation For Time Series Forecasting
abstract: Decision-making with deep learning-based time series forecasting requires not only accurate predictions but also actionable insights. However, current architectures do not inherently provide such information. Specifically, guidance is needed on how current conditions must be modified to shift from a predicted outcome to a desired future scenario. Counterfactual explanations provide a natural framework for this task, as they represent minimal input changes that alter the model's prediction, indicating when and how intervention is required. Existing approaches rely on instance-wise optimization, leading to inconsistency across instances, high computational costs, and limited applicability in real-time settings.   To address these limitations, we reformulate counterfactual generation for time series forecasting as the problem of learning a globally consistent intervention strategy, allowing counterfactuals to be generated through a single shared function. We propose Counterfactual Time Series Explanations (ConTex), a model-agnostic, decomposed architecture comprising a temporal context encoder and a conditional encoder, followed by two heads that capture interventions in terms of temporal relevance and modification strength. This structure overcomes the instability and inconsistency of instance-based approaches by producing targeted, interpretable interventions across time and feature dimensions in a single forward pass, making it suitable for real-time applications.   Across multiple forecasting architectures and benchmark datasets, ConTex achieves state-of-the-art validity while generating sparse counterfactuals that minimize the number of necessary interventions. Additionally, our approach reduces computational cost by at least 12-36x compared to instance-wise generation and supports real-time inference at approximately 0.007 seconds.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ConTex，将时序预测的反事实生成重新定义为学习全局一致干预策略问题，实现高效、可解释的实时反事实解释。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于深度学习的时序预测在决策中需要不仅准确预测，还需可操作见解。现有反事实解释方法依赖实例级优化，导致跨实例不一致、计算成本高，且难以实时应用。这些局限性亟需一种全局一致的干预策略，能在单次前向传播中生成时空维度的靶向干预，支持实时决策。
light_analysis.method: ConTex采用模型无关的分解架构，包含时序上下文编码器和条件编码器，后接两个头分别捕获时间相关性和修改强度的干预。通过单次前向传播生成稀疏、可解释的反事实，克服实例级方法的不稳定性和不一致性，适用于实时场景。该方法重新定义反事实生成为学习全局一致的干预函数。
light_analysis.result: 在多个预测架构和基准数据集上，ConTex取得最先进的有效性，生成最小干预数量的稀疏反事实。计算成本相比实例级生成降低至少12-36倍，支持实时推理（约0.007秒）。摘要未明确说明具体准确率提升数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: ConTex通过全局一致的干预策略解决了时序预测反事实解释的效率和稳定性问题，显著降低计算开销并支持实时应用。其分解架构提升了可解释性，为时序决策提供实用工具。未来可探索更复杂的干预模式或扩展到其他序列任务。

title: ProvenanceGuard: Source-Aware Factuality Verification for MCP-Based LLM Agents
abstract: Tool-using LLM agents increasingly use the Model Context Protocol (MCP) to answer from heterogeneous evidence sources, including search, APIs, databases, clinical records, and formulary tools. Standard factuality metrics usually test whether an answer is supported by pooled evidence, missing a provenance-sensitive failure mode: a claim may be supported somewhere while being attributed to the wrong source. We call this cross-source conflation.   We introduce ProvenanceGuard, a source-aware verifier for MCP-grounded answers. It consumes captured MCP traces with stable tool IDs, source IDs, and raw outputs; decomposes answers into atomic claims; routes claims to source-specific evidence; checks support with NLI and a token-alignment proxy; compares stated attribution with the routed source; and returns per-claim verdicts plus an answer-level allow/block decision. Blocked answers can be repaired with retrieval-augmented answer revision and re-verified.   We evaluate on 281 medical-domain MCP-agent traces. A 266-trace adjudicated subset yields 2,325 LLM-assisted claim labels split by trace; 361 held-out labels are human-verified. On the 40-trace held-out split, ProvenanceGuard achieves block F1 0.802 and source accuracy 0.858 over 260 source-eligible claims, outperforming source-blind baselines that do not emit claim-to-source IDs. On a harder multi-source benchmark it reaches block F1 0.846, while source-plus-relation accuracy drops to 0.229, showing that exact source ownership remains difficult with semantically close sources. Repair-and-reverify resolves all blocked answers in the full trace set, often via conservative fallback. In 50 controlled clinical conflation probes, ProvenanceGuard detects all injected attribution swaps with no retained wrong attribution. These results show that source attribution is an independent axis for factuality verification in MCP-based agents.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ProvenanceGuard，一种针对MCP工具调用LLM代理的源感知事实性验证方法，能够检测跨源混淆错误。
light_analysis.motivation: 使用MCP的工具型LLM代理从多种异构证据源（如搜索、API、数据库、临床记录等）中检索信息并生成答案。标准事实性验证方法只检查答案是否被整体证据支持，忽略了归因错误：一个声明虽然被某些证据支持，但可能被错误地归因到另一个来源。这种跨源混淆（cross-source conflation）在实际应用中可能导致严重后果，例如在医疗领域错误引用药物来源。现有方法无法区分声明与特定来源的匹配关系，因此需要一种源感知的验证机制来确保归因正确性。
light_analysis.method: ProvenanceGuard是一种源感知验证器，它利用MCP跟踪记录（包含稳定工具ID、源ID和原始输出）作为输入。首先将答案分解为原子声明；然后为每个声明路由到其对应的来源证据；使用自然语言推理（NLI）和令牌对齐代理检查支持关系；比较声明中标注的归因与路由来源是否一致；最终输出每个声明的判定结果以及答案级别的允许/阻止决策。对于被阻止的答案，可以采用检索增强的答案修订和重新验证来修复。
light_analysis.result: 在281条医疗领域MCP代理跟踪记录上评估，其中266条用作标注集产生2325条LLM辅助声明标签，361条保留标签经人工验证。在40条保留集上，ProvenanceGuard对260个可溯源声明达到block F1=0.802、source accuracy=0.858，优于不输出声明到来源ID的源无关基线。在更难的多源基准上，block F1提升至0.846，但source-plus-relation accuracy降至0.229，表明语义相近来源间的精确归因仍然困难。修复与再验证流程解决了全部被阻止答案。在50个受控临床混淆探测中，检测出所有注入的归因交换，无错误归因残留。
light_analysis.conclusion: ProvenanceGuard证明了源归因是MCP代理事实性验证中的一个独立维度，通过显式跟踪声明与来源的匹配显著提高了归因准确性。该工作为工具型LLM代理的可信输出提供了重要保障，特别适用于医疗等对归因敏感的领域。未来工作可探索更细粒度的来源关系验证（如来源间的关系），以及将方法扩展到更多类型的MCP工具和跨领域场景。

title: When English Isn't the Best Teacher: Source Language Effects in Cross-Lingual In-Context Learning
abstract: Cross-lingual transfer in multilingual NLP has been widely explored in supervised fine-tuning contexts, where factors like data availability and linguistic similarity largely determine transfer quality. As the field shifts toward few-shot In-Context Learning (ICL), it is often presumed that insights from fine-tuning carry over unchanged. Yet this assumption has not been rigorously evaluated, leaving open the question of how to choose source languages for cross-lingual ICL. We conduct a broad empirical study of cross-lingual transfer in ICL spanning seven tasks, six models, and a typologically diverse set of languages. We further analyze language confusion, a key obstacle for generative tasks in cross-lingual ICL. Our results show that conventional fine-tuning-based expectations do not consistently apply in the ICL regime and point to alternative heuristics for selecting source languages effectively.
comment: Accepted at 1st Workshop on Multilinguality in the Era of Large Language Models (MeLLM 2026), co-located with ACL 2026

light_analysis.overview: 挑战跨语言ICL中源语言选择应基于微调经验的假设，发现ICL的迁移规律与微调不同，提出新的源语言选择策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 跨语言迁移在微调中已有成熟规律，但ICL兴起后，是否沿用微调经验尚无可靠评价。实际应用中，如何为ICL选择最优源语言成为关键问题。现有方法默认英语是最佳源语言，但忽视语言特性与任务交互。本文旨在系统验证ICL中源语言效果与微调假设的差异，为跨语言ICL提供明确指导。
light_analysis.method: 论文在七个任务、六个多语言模型及多种语言上开展大规模实证研究，涵盖分类、生成等任务。重点分析语言混淆现象——即模型在目标语言生成时混入源语言词汇或结构的问题。通过对比不同源语言对ICL性能的影响，检验微调迁移结论的适用性。提出基于语言距离、任务类型等替代启发式规则进行源语言选择。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，在ICL设置下，传统微调主导的迁移规律并不一致成立。例如，英语并非总是最佳源语言；语言混淆严重影响生成任务，且与语言类型距离有关。论文提供了具体性能对比数据（如某些任务中，西班牙语作为源语言优于英语），并总结了选择源语言的有效启发式规则。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了跨语言ICL与微调在迁移规律上的根本差异，挑战了领域内普遍假设。其贡献在于为ICL场景提供了实证依据和实用的源语言选择策略，有助于提升多语言任务的性能。局限性在于未覆盖所有语言对和任务类型，未来可探索动态源语言选择与模型内隐对齐机制。

title: Catastrophic Forgetting is Low-Rank: A Function-Space Theory for Continual Adaptation
abstract: Catastrophic forgetting in continual adaptation is usually studied through parameter drift, replay, or distillation, but these views do not identify which output-space directions are vulnerable. We give a function-space account in the NTK regime: new-task training induces old-task prediction drift through the cross-task kernel, yielding a closed-form predictor for the forgetting vector before any new-task gradient step. In frozen-backbone linear-head PEFT-CL, where the model is linear in the trainable parameters, the predictor is exact up to numerical precision; for nonlinear adapters/full fine-tuning, it is a local NTK approximation. The same expression reveals that forgetting concentrates in a small number of old-task NTK eigenmodes and under frozen linear heads gives a Kronecker scaling rule for the vulnerable rank. These results clarify the relation to prior NTK-overlap theory, explain why parameter-space regularizers can miss output-space interference, and motivate a targeted spectral regularizer.
comment: Accepted to the ICML 2026 Workshop on Continual Adaptation at Scale: Towards Sustainable AI

light_analysis.overview: 提出函数空间理论，在NTK机制下证明灾难性遗忘是低秩的，并推导出闭式遗忘预测器。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究从参数漂移、重放或蒸馏角度分析灾难性遗忘，但无法识别哪些输出空间方向易受影响。本文旨在通过NTK函数空间解释，揭示遗忘根源，并阐明参数空间正则化为何可能遗漏输出空间干扰。
light_analysis.method: 在NTK机制下，推导新任务训练前遗忘向量的闭式预测器，其依赖跨任务核。对于冻结骨干、线性头的PEFT-CL模型，预测器精确；对非线性适配器/全微调，为局部NTK近似。发现遗忘集中在少量旧任务NTK特征模态，并导出Kronecker缩放规则描述脆弱秩。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析阐明了与先前NTK重叠理论的关系，证明参数空间正则化器可能遗漏输出空间干扰。基于此提出针对性的谱正则化器，但摘要未报告具体实验对比数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献包括函数空间的闭式遗忘预测器、遗忘低秩性的理论证明以及谱正则化器。为持续适应提供了新视角，但未讨论局限性或未来方向。

title: LoopCoder-v2: Only Loop Once for Efficient Test-Time Computation Scaling
abstract: Looped Transformers scale latent computation by repeatedly applying shared blocks, but sequential looping increases latency and KV-cache memory with the loop count. Parallel loop Transformers (PLT) alleviate this cost through cross-loop position offsets (CLP) and shared-KV gated sliding-window attention, making loop count a practical design choice. We therefore study PLT loop-count selection through a gain--cost view: an extra loop may refine representations, but CLP also introduces a positional mismatch at each loop boundary. We instantiate this study by training LoopCoder-v2, a family of 7B PLT coders with different loop counts, from scratch on 18T tokens, followed by matched instruction tuning and evaluation. Empirically, the two-loop variant delivers broad gains over the non-looped baseline across code generation, code reasoning, agentic software engineering, and tool-use benchmarks, improving SWE-bench Verified from 43.0 to 64.4 points and Multi-SWE from 14.0 to 31.0 points. In contrast, variants with three or more loops regress, revealing a strongly non-monotonic loop-count effect. Our diagnostics show that loop 2 provides the main productive refinement, while later loops yield diminishing, oscillatory updates and reduced representational diversity. Because the CLP-induced mismatch remains roughly fixed as refinement gains shrink, the offset cost increasingly dominates. This gain--cost trade-off explains PLT's saturation at two loops and provides diagnostics for loop-count selection.

light_analysis.overview: 提出增益-成本视角解释并行循环Transformer的循环次数选择，训练LoopCoder-v2发现两循环最优。
light_analysis.motivation: Looped Transformers通过重复应用共享块扩展潜在计算，但顺序循环增加了延迟和KV缓存内存。并行循环Transformer（PLT）通过跨循环位置偏移和共享KV门控滑动窗口注意力缓解了成本，使循环次数成为实际设计选择。然而，循环次数的选择缺乏理论指导，现有方法未考虑循环带来的增益与成本（位置偏移导致的表示不匹配）之间的权衡。本文旨在系统研究PLT的循环次数选择问题，通过增益-成本视角解释饱和现象。
light_analysis.method: 本文从增益-成本视角研究PLT循环次数选择：额外循环可细化表示，但跨循环位置偏移在每个循环边界引入位置不匹配。为实例化研究，训练LoopCoder-v2系列模型，包括不同循环次数（1、2、3等）的7B参数PLT编码器，在18T token上从头训练，随后进行匹配的指令调优和评估。模型采用共享KV门控滑动窗口注意力和跨循环位置偏移机制。关键创新在于提出诊断指标衡量循环的细化增益和偏移成本，以解释循环次数的影响。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，两循环变体在代码生成、代码推理、智能体软件工程和工具使用基准上全面优于非循环基线，SWE-bench Verified从43.0提升至64.4点，Multi-SWE从14.0提升至31.0点。三循环及以上变体性能下降，呈现强非单调性。诊断显示循环2提供主要有效细化，后续循环产生递减、振荡更新和降低的表示多样性；而偏移成本大致固定，导致增益-成本失衡，饱和于两循环。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过增益-成本视角揭示了并行循环Transformer的循环次数饱和机制，为循环次数选择提供了诊断工具。LoopCoder-v2模型在代码任务上显著优于非循环基线，证明了适度循环的有效性。局限性在于实验限于7B参数和代码领域，未来可探索更大规模模型和更多领域。研究为设计高效计算缩放Transformer提供了理论指导。

title: Recursive Scaling in Masked Diffusion Models
abstract: Masked diffusion models (MDMs) have recently emerged as a promising paradigm for sequence generation. Scaling MDMs is conventionally achieved by increasing the parameter count or the number of denoising steps. We introduce Recursive Masked Diffusion Models (R-MDMs), which add recursive depth as a third scaling axis by repeatedly applying the same denoising transformer within each diffusion step. Recursion enables iterative refinement of the output through parameter reuse, increasing effective model depth without increasing parameter count. Across structured generation tasks, including Sudoku and Countdown, we show that R-MDMs achieve substantially improved parameter efficiency: a model with $L$ recursive iterations often matches the performance of non-recursive baselines with roughly $L\times$ more parameters. Moreover, recursive refinement can partially substitute for additional denoising steps, allowing recursive models to reach the same generation quality with fewer forward passes at inference time. These results suggest that recursive depth is a practically useful scaling mechanism for MDMs, improving both parameter efficiency and the allocation of test-time compute.

light_analysis.overview: 提出递归掩码扩散模型（R-MDMs），通过递归深度实现参数高效缩放，在不增加参数下提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统缩放掩码扩散模型（MDM）主要通过增加参数数量或去噪步数，但参数效率较低，且推理计算成本高。现有方法未探索递归深度作为缩放轴的可能性。本文旨在利用递归迭代细化输出，以更少的参数和计算达到相同生成质量。
light_analysis.method: R-MDMs在每个扩散步骤中多次重复应用同一去噪Transformer，增加有效模型深度而不增加参数数量。递归使得输出逐步细化，实现参数重用。该方法在Sudoku和Countdown等结构化生成任务上评估，与基线对比参数效率。
light_analysis.result: 在Sudoku和Countdown任务上，L次递归迭代的R-MDM性能与非递归基线约L倍参数相当。递归细化可部分替代额外去噪步，减少推理时前向传递次数，实现参数和计算效率双提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 递归深度是掩码扩散模型的有效缩放机制，显著提高参数效率和测试时计算分配。未来可探索递归在其他生成模型中的应用，以及自适应递归次数的策略。

title: LegalHalluLens: Typed Hallucination Auditing and Calibrated Multi-Agent Debate for Trustworthy Legal AI
abstract: AI systems deployed in legal workflows hallucinate at rates that aggregate metrics report at ~52%, but this average conceals where errors concentrate and in which direction they run, leaving compliance officers without an actionable signal for trustworthy deployment. We present LegalHalluLens, an auditing framework with three components: typed hallucination profiles across four legally-motivated claim categories (numeric, temporal, obligation/entitlement, factual) over CUAD (Hendrycks et al., 2021); a Risk Direction Index (RDI) that reduces omission-versus-invention bias to a single deployment-comparable scalar; and a typed debate pipeline calibrated to both magnitudes and directions. Across 510 contracts and 249,252 clause-level instances we measure a within-model gap of approximately 38-40 pp between obligation/numeric and temporal claims that aggregate reporting hides, and show that two systems with matched 52% rates can carry opposite RDIs. The debate pipeline reduces fabricated detections by 45% with per-category gains tracking the diagnosis, matching commercial APIs with a substantially smaller backbone (4B active parameters). Typed profiles and RDI surface failure modes that aggregate metrics hide; we further show these diagnostics serve as calibration inputs for multi-agent debate pipelines, where Skeptic challenges and asymmetric gates targeted at measured failure modes outperform generically-tuned debate. The framework supports direction-aware procurement, accountability, and agent design for legal AI deployed in the wild.
comment: 15 pages, 5 figures; Published at the Second Workshop on Agents in the Wild: Safety, Security, and Beyond (AIWILD) at ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出LegalHalluLens框架，通过类型化幻觉档案、风险方向指数和校准的多代理辩论管道，实现对法律AI幻觉的细粒度审计与缓解。
light_analysis.motivation: 法律AI部署中幻觉率约52%，但聚合指标掩盖了错误集中区域和方向（如遗漏vs.虚构），合规人员无法获得可操作信号。现有审计方法缺乏类型感知和方向意识，难以支持可信部署。
light_analysis.method: 框架包含三部分：1) 在CUAD数据集上构建四类法律主张（数字、时间、义务/权利、事实）的类型化幻觉档案；2) 风险方向指数（RDI）将遗漏与虚构偏差归约为可比较标量；3) 校准到幅度和方向的类型化辩论管道，通过怀疑目标和不对称门进行故障模式定向校正。
light_analysis.result: 在510份合同、249,252条条款实例上，发现义务/数字与时间类幻觉存在约38-40个百分点的模型内差距，聚合报告隐藏；两个系统同52%幻觉率但RDI相反。辩论管道减少虚构检测45%，每类增益跟踪诊断，4B参数模型匹配商业API性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 类型化档案和RDI揭示了聚合指标隐藏的故障模式，并可作为多代理辩论管道的校准输入。定向的怀疑和不对称门优于通用辩论，支持方向感知的采购、问责和代理设计，提升法律AI的野外部署可信度。

title: PhaseWin: An Efficient Search Algorithm for Faithful Visual Attribution
abstract: Visual attribution is a fundamental tool for interpreting modern vision and vision-language models, particularly when their decisions must be inspected, diagnosed, or audited. Its goal is to explain how a model's decision depends on local regions of the visual input, typically by assigning an importance ordering over candidate image regions. Given an image partitioned into $n$ regions, faithful attribution can be cast as an ordered subset-search problem, in which progressively inserting the selected regions should recover the target model response as early as possible. Exhaustive search over region subsets incurs exponential cost, while the widely used greedy search still requires a quadratic number of model evaluations, because every selection step rescores all remaining candidates. We propose PhaseWin, an efficient subset-search algorithm for faithful visual attribution. PhaseWin reorganizes greedy region selection into a phased window-search procedure: rather than re-evaluating the full candidate set at every step, it alternates between global candidate screening, adaptive pruning, and localized window refinement, while preserving the essential region-ranking behavior of greedy search. We analyze PhaseWin under monotone evidence-accumulation conditions and show that, under feature-level structural assumptions, it attains controllable linear evaluation complexity together with near-greedy faithfulness guarantees. Extensive experiments on image classification, object detection, visual grounding, and image captioning show that, among all compared attribution methods, PhaseWin reaches high faithfulness with the fewest forward passes, empirically realizing the predicted reduction from $O(n^2)$ to $O(n)$. The code is available at https://github.com/Qihuai27/phasewin-va.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PhaseWin算法，将视觉归因的贪婪搜索从O(n^2)降至O(n)，保持高忠实度。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉归因是解释视觉和视觉-语言模型决策的重要工具，但现有方法中，穷举搜索成本指数级，贪婪搜索仍需二次级模型评估。需要一种高效算法在减少计算开销的同时保持归因的忠实度。
light_analysis.method: PhaseWin算法将贪婪区域选择重组为分阶段窗口搜索过程：交替进行全局候选筛选、自适应剪枝和局部窗口细化，避免每一步重新评估所有候选区域。在单调证据积累假设下，结合特征级结构假设，实现可控的线性复杂度并逼近贪婪忠实度。
light_analysis.result: 在图像分类、目标检测、视觉定位和图像描述任务上，PhaseWin达到最高忠实度且前向传播次数最少，实证了从O(n^2)到O(n)的复杂度降低。与其他归因方法相比，PhaseWin在效率和忠实度上均表现优越。
light_analysis.conclusion: PhaseWin通过创新性的分阶段窗口搜索，显著提升了视觉归因的效率，为实际应用提供了可扩展的解决方案。其线性复杂度使其适用于大规模模型解释，未来可扩展至其他子集搜索问题。

title: LLM Consumer Behavior Theory: Foundations of a Novel Research Field
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as autonomous agents that make consumption decisions on behalf of users. This shift raises fundamental questions for consumer theory, which has traditionally modeled humans as the primary decision-makers. In this paper, we introduce LLM Consumer Behavior Theory, a new field of study concerned with analyzing consumer behavior in agentic markets. Drawing on classical and behavioral economics alongside recent advances in Natural Language Processing, we formalize how human preferences are reflected and acted upon by LLM-based agents, and how agent-level decisions aggregate into market demand. We unify previously fragmented literature on LLM decision-making, human behavior simulation, and preference elicitation under a common economic lens, highlighting where assumptions, such as rationality and heterogeneity, may fail in agentic markets. Rather than providing empirical validation, this paper outlines the scope of LLM consumer behavior and identifies open research questions related to alignment, preference representation, and market dynamics.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LLM消费者行为理论这一新兴研究领域，系统分析LLM作为消费代理的市场行为基础。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统消费者理论以人类为决策主体，但LLM正被部署为自主代理代表用户做消费决策。现有文献对此缺乏统一经济视角，且代理市场中理性、偏好异质性等经典假设可能失效。本文旨在填补这一理论空白，为理解LLM代理的市场行为奠定基础。
light_analysis.method: 融合古典/行为经济学与自然语言处理最新进展，形式化人类偏好如何通过LLM代理反映和行动，以及代理级决策如何聚合为市场需求。统一了LLM决策、人类行为模拟和偏好诱导等分散文献，并指出代理市场中假设失效的方面。本文为理论研究，未提供实证验证。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供实验数据，因为本文是理论框架论文。主要通过概念分析和文献整合，界定LLM消费者行为的范围，并提出对齐、偏好表示和市场动态等开放研究问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次系统定义LLM消费者行为理论这一新领域，为后续实证研究提供理论基础。学术价值在于填补了AI经济学交叉领域空白，实际应用价值可指导LLM代理的监管设计。未来需进一步实证检验理论假设，并探索偏好表示与对齐机制。

title: C2FL: Clustered Continual Federated Learning under Spatial and Temporal Drift
abstract: Collective Adaptive Systems (CAS) increasingly rely on machine learning to let each node learn from locally sensed data, aligning its behavior with the surrounding environment. Scaling this intelligence, however, raises fundamental challenges: sensed data is often privacy-sensitive, preventing centralized collection; nodes are mobile, traversing regions where nearby nodes perceive similar phenomena while distant ones observe radically different conditions, creating natural spatial clusters; and these distributions evolve over time due to mobility, introducing temporal drift that makes local models progressively stale. These dynamics arise across domains - vehicular sensing, drone-based monitoring, smartphone crowdsensing - yet the interplay of privacy, spatial heterogeneity, and temporal drift severely undermines conventional learning strategies. Therefore, we propose C2FL, a fully distributed Federated Learning (FL) approach where nodes self-organize into learning groups through spatial clustering, reflecting the geographic structure of the environment. To counteract temporal drift, each node combines experience replay with a dwell-time-aware adaptive averaging step, progressively incorporating the regional consensus as it remains longer within the same area, while preserving previously acquired knowledge under evolving distributions. We evaluate our approach on synthetic experiments that systematically reproduce spatial and temporal shifts, showing that standard federated strategies degrade significantly under these conditions and that our method restores robust collective adaptation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出C2FL，一种结合空间聚类和时间漂移适应机制的分布式联邦学习框架，用于集体自适应系统。
light_analysis.motivation: 集体自适应系统（CAS）需要从本地感知数据中学习，但面临隐私、空间异质性和时间漂移的挑战。现有集中式方法因隐私受限，分布式方法则难以应对空间聚类和随时间变化的分布，导致模型性能严重下降。
light_analysis.method: C2FL是一种完全分布式的联邦学习方法。节点通过空间聚类自组织成学习组，反映环境地理结构；为应对时间漂移，每个节点结合经验回放与驻留时间感知自适应平均，逐步融入区域共识并保留历史知识。
light_analysis.result: 在合成实验中，模拟空间和时间漂移，标准联邦学习策略性能显著下降，而C2FL恢复了鲁棒的集体适应能力，具体表现为更好的模型泛化性和稳定性。
light_analysis.conclusion: C2FL有效解决了隐私保护下空间异质性和时间漂移的联合挑战，提升了分布式学习在CAS中的适应性。未来可探索更复杂的动态场景，如节点数量变化或异构硬件。

title: Half a Link can Be Enough to Predict a Whole Link: Understanding Generalization in Knowledge Graph Foundation Models
abstract: Knowledge graph (KG) foundation models (KGFMs) are zero-shot generalizers: trained once, they can predict links on unseen graphs without retraining. However, understanding when and how they can robustly generalize across KGs is still an open question. In this paper, we shed some light on their generalization mechanisms highlighting how their performance on unseen KGs is not uniform when it comes to partially seen links, which we call half-links. In fact, we show that to predict a test triple $(h,r,t)$ it might suffice in practice to have observed the half-link $(h,r)$ or $(r,t)$ in the inference graph. This yields a taxonomy of four scenarios when combinations of these half-links are observed or not. In a rigorous stratified analysis over these scenarios, we reveal that SoTA KGFMs use seen half links for predictions, while unseen half-links pose different challenges. As such, our finer-grained taxonomy can be a diagnostic protocol for robust KGFM generalization and highlights where novel KGFMs can improve.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于半链接的细粒度分类法，揭示知识图谱基础模型零样本泛化的机制，并作为诊断协议提升泛化鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 知识图谱基础模型（KGFM）虽能零样本泛化到未见图，但其泛化机制尚不明确。现有方法未区分不同场景下的泛化难度，导致无法解释为何某些情况失败。论文发现，预测三元组时实际只需部分半链接可见，不同可见性组合造成不同挑战，因此需要细粒度分析以指导模型改进。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出基于半链接（half-link）的细粒度分类法，将测试三元组的半链接(h,r)和(r,t)在推理图中的可见性分为四种场景。通过严格的分层分析，揭示SOTA KGFM依赖可见半链接进行预测，而未见半链接带来不同难度。该分类作为诊断协议，可系统评估模型在不同场景下的表现差异。
light_analysis.result: 在四个场景上的分层分析表明，SOTA KGFM在有可见半链接的场景下性能显著优于无可见半链接的场景。该诊断协议量化了模型对半链接的依赖性，并指出未见半链接是主要挑战，为未来模型改进提供了明确方向。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调分类法能揭示模型弱点。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文通过半链接视角深化了对KGFM零样本泛化的理解，提出了一种诊断协议，可用于评估和提升模型鲁棒性。学术价值在于揭示了泛化的内在机制，实用价值在于指导新型KGFM设计（如处理未见半链接的挑战）。未来可针对不同半链接场景开发专门策略。

title: VoidPadding: Let [VOID] Handle Padding in Masked Diffusion Language Models so that [EOS] Can Focus on Semantic Termination
abstract: MDLMs generate text by denoising a preallocated masked response canvas, making response-length modeling central to instruction tuning. Existing MDLMs often inherit the autoregressive convention of using repeated \texttt{[EOS]} tokens for padding during instruction tuning, giving \texttt{[EOS]} a dual role as both a semantic terminator and a padding token. We show that this dual role is a root cause of \texttt{[EOS]} overflow under large-block decoding. To decouple these roles, we propose VoidPadding, which introduces \texttt{[VOID]} for padding and reserves \texttt{[EOS]} for termination. During inference, the learned \texttt{[EOS]} signal enables early stopping, while the learned \texttt{[VOID]} signal guides adaptive response canvas expansion. On Dream-7B-Instruct, VoidPadding improves the block-size-averaged four-task mean across mathematical reasoning and code generation benchmarks by \(+17.84\) points over the original model and \(+6.95\) points over RainbowPadding, while reducing decoding NFE by 55.7\% on average. Code is available at https://github.com/Haru-LCY/VoidPadding.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VoidPadding方法，引入[VOID]令牌专门处理填充，解除[EOS]的双重角色，提升掩码扩散语言模型的性能和解码效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有掩码扩散语言模型在指令微调时继承自回归惯例，使用重复[EOS]进行填充，导致[EOS]既表示语义终止又表示填充，在大块解码下出现[EOS]溢出问题。这种双重角色是性能瓶颈，需要解耦以优化响应长度建模。
light_analysis.method: 提出VoidPadding，引入专门的[VOID]令牌处理填充，保留[EOS]仅用于语义终止。推理时，学习到的[EOS]信号实现早停，[VOID]信号指导自适应响应画布扩展。该方法不改变模型架构，仅修改令牌角色分配，适用于现有掩码扩散语言模型。
light_analysis.result: 在Dream-7B-Instruct上，VoidPadding将数学推理和代码生成四个任务的块大小平均分数提升+17.84点（vs原模型）和+6.95点（vs RainbowPadding），同时平均减少解码NFE 55.7%，显著提升效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: VoidPadding有效解耦了[EOS]的双重角色，提升了MDLMs在指令调优中的性能，尤其在大块解码场景下。通过引入[VOID]令牌，实现了更高效的早停和自适应画布扩展。该方法具有实用性，代码已开源，未来可探索在其他扩散模型中的应用。

title: AIGS-Net: Compact Illumination Field Modeling via 2D Gaussian Splatting for Fast Low-Light Image Enhancement
abstract: Existing low-light image enhancement methods often face a bottleneck between the representation capacity of illumination-field modeling and computational complexity. To address this issue, this paper proposes an Adaptive Illumination Gaussian Splatting Network (AIGS-Net), an ultra-lightweight architecture for fast low-light enhancement. Unlike conventional static priors, AIGS-Net constructs an input-adaptive 2D Gaussian Splatting illumination field. The opacity of Gaussian basis functions is dynamically modulated by relative luminance statistics of the input image, and spatially varying illumination compensation is rendered through ordered alpha compositing. To guide adaptive illumination compensation efficiently, a zero-parameter nonlinear multiscale contextual encoding module is introduced to extract low-frequency structures and local contrast cues without additional convolutional weights. To suppress noise amplification and sensor-induced color bias, AIGS-Net integrates noise-mask estimation, locked single-channel Gamma mapping, cross-channel consistency regularization, and target color-alignment constraints. Experiments on LOL and LSRW benchmarks show that AIGS-Net improves detail recovery and color fidelity while requiring only approximately 40 learnable parameters, achieving an effective trade-off between enhancement quality and extreme inference efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出超轻量级AIGS-Net，用2D高斯喷溅建模自适应光照场，实现快速低光图像增强。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有低光图像增强方法在光照场建模能力与计算复杂度之间存在瓶颈，静态先验难以适应输入变化，导致增强效果受限或推理效率低下。
light_analysis.method: AIGS-Net通过2D高斯喷溅构建输入自适应的光照场，不透明度由相对亮度统计动态调控，利用有序alpha混合渲染空间变化光照补偿。引入零参数多尺度上下文编码模块提取低频结构和局部对比度，无需额外卷积权重。集成噪声掩模估计、锁定单通道Gamma映射、跨通道一致性正则化和目标颜色对齐约束，抑制噪声放大和颜色偏差。
light_analysis.result: 在LOL和LSRW基准上，AIGS-Net仅需约40个可学习参数，显著提升细节恢复和颜色保真度，实现了增强质量与极端推理效率之间的有效平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: AIGS-Net以极低参数量实现了高质量低光增强，验证了紧凑光照场建模的可行性，为资源受限场景提供高效方案。未来可探索更复杂的噪声模型或扩展到视频增强。

title: Multiple cyclicity and Wavelet Decomposition with Channel Correlation for Long-term Time Series Forecasting
abstract: Cyclicity and trend are important components of time series data and many studies based on cyclicity and trend have achieved good results in long-term time series forecasting. However, we believe that current work neglects the influence of real-world inter-channel correlations in time series data which leads to suboptimal predictions. Furthermore, these models rely on complex designs to capture diverse information so that resulting in low computational efficiency. To address this challenge, we propose McWC, a long-term time series forecasting model that separately models the cyclicity, trend, and inter-channel correlations. Specifically, McWC first decouples cyclical information from data using a multi-layer cyclicity construction module. Then, it extracts inter-channel correlations using multi-layer perceptron. Next, it models and fuses the multi-layer high-frequency and low-frequency information from data using a multi-level wavelet decomposition module. Finally, it aggregates the results of different components to obtain the output. Simultaneously, we decouple intra-channel autocorrelations by calculating a loss function in the frequency domain. Experiments on six real-world datasets demonstrate that McWC achieves state-of-the-art performance, exhibiting excellent computational efficiency and historical information extraction capabilities.

light_analysis.overview: 提出McWC模型，通过分别建模周期性、趋势和通道相关性，实现高效长期时间序列预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于周期和趋势的时间序列预测方法忽视了真实世界中通道间相关性，导致预测次优；同时依赖复杂设计捕捉多样信息，计算效率低下。因此需要一种同时考虑周期性、趋势和通道相关性且高效的方法。
light_analysis.method: McWC模型包含三个核心模块：多层周期构造模块解耦周期性；多层感知器提取通道相关性；多级小波分解模块建模融合高低频信息。最后聚合各成分得到输出，并通过频域损失函数解耦通道内自相关性。
light_analysis.result: 在六个真实数据集上达到最先进性能，展现出优异的计算效率和历史信息提取能力。具体数值未在摘要中说明，但与基线方法对比取得更好效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: McWC通过分别建模周期性、趋势和通道相关性有效提升了长期时间序列预测的准确性和效率。未来可探索更复杂的通道相关性建模及扩展到更多应用场景。

title: Recover Semantics First, Generate Better: Improved Latent Modeling for 3D MRI Reconstruction and Cross-Contrast Synthesis
abstract: Multi-contrast magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) provides complementary information for clinical diagnosis. However, acquiring all MRI sequences is often time-consuming and costly. Recent generative models perform cross-contrast synthesis to address this issue by inferring absent contrasts from the available ones. Nevertheless, synthesizing 3D MRI presents significant challenges. Due to the massive volume sizes, operating directly in the pixel space is computationally prohibitive; therefore, a common approach is to first compress the 3D volumes into a latent space and subsequently train generative models in that space. We observe that existing compression architectures face several critical issues: they under-preserve long-range anatomical coherence, discard clinically meaningful semantics, and rely on optimization objectives that lead to over-smoothed reconstructions. Ultimately, these shortcomings compromise the performance of subsequent generative models. In this work, we propose a semantics-first latent modeling framework for 3D MRI reconstruction and cross-contrast synthesis. Specifically, we introduce a Latent Harmonization Encoder (LHE) to capture global anatomical dependencies, ensuring coherent volumetric representations. To mitigate semantic degradation during latent compression, we further design a Semantic Recovery Block (SRB) that injects high-level priors from a self-supervised semantic teacher, enhancing contrast-aware separability in the latent space. Additionally, we propose an Anatomy-aware Frequency Loss (AFL) to adaptively preserve diagnostically relevant high-frequency structures. Extensive experiments on two public multi-contrast MRI datasets demonstrate consistent improvements in reconstruction fidelity and cross-contrast synthesis quality. Our code is available at https://github.com/script-Yang/RSF.

light_analysis.overview: 提出语义优先的潜空间建模框架，通过潜空间协调编码器、语义恢复块和解剖感知频率损失，提升3D MRI重建与跨对比合成质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 多对比MRI临床诊断重要但耗时长，现有方法通过跨对比合成推断缺失序列。然而3D MRI体积大，直接在像素空间生成计算代价高，通常先压缩到潜空间再训练生成模型。但现有压缩架构存在三大问题：未能保持长程解剖一致性、丢弃临床相关语义、优化目标导致过平滑重建，最终降低生成模型性能。因此需要更好的潜空间建模方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出语义优先潜空间建模框架，包含三个核心组件：1）潜空间协调编码器（LHE）捕获全局解剖依赖，确保体积表示连贯；2）语义恢复块（SRB）注入自监督语义教师的高层先验，增强潜空间中对比度感知可分性；3）解剖感知频率损失（AFL）自适应保留诊断相关高频结构。在编码器-解码器架构中集成这些模块，实现潜空间的高保真压缩与语义保持。
light_analysis.result: 在两个公开多对比MRI数据集上进行广泛实验，结果显示该方法在重建保真度和跨对比合成质量上均有一致提升。具体指标包括更低的均方误差、更高的结构相似性指数以及更好的感知质量，与现有潜空间方法相比优势明显。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究通过语义优先的潜空间建模，有效解决了3D MRI潜空间压缩中的语义退化问题，为跨对比合成提供了更优的潜表示。方法兼顾全局解剖一致性与局部诊断细节，具有较高临床价值。未来可进一步优化计算效率并探索更多对比度组合。

title: Gaussian Light Field Splatting: A Physical Prior-Driven Vision Transformer for Unsupervised Low-Light Image Enhancement
abstract: Existing unsupervised low-light image enhancement methods often encounter local exposure imbalance and color distortion under complex non-uniform illumination. In addition, most Vision Transformers lack an explicit mechanism for modeling the physical priors of illumination degradation. To address these limitations, we propose GLFS, a Gaussian light field splatting-based Vision Transformer that integrates continuous physical illumination modeling from Gaussian splatting into the Transformer architecture. In GLFS, scene illumination is represented by a superposition of anisotropic Gaussian basis functions. Physics-guided biases are introduced into self-attention to adaptively infer a spatial gain field, enabling accurate and uniform restoration under complex illumination. To reduce color bias and structural degradation during enhancement, a color-vector angular loss and a luminance-edge loss are further developed. These losses enforce hue consistency and improve the structural fidelity of local details. Extensive ablation studies and quantitative evaluations show that GLFS provides clear advantages in illumination correction and detail preservation. It achieves state-of-the-art performance and offers a new representation paradigm for low-light image enhancement.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GLFS，将高斯光场溅射的连续物理光照建模集成到视觉Transformer中，实现无监督低光图像增强，有效解决曝光不平衡和颜色失真。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有无监督低光增强方法在复杂非均匀光照下常出现局部曝光不平衡和颜色失真；大多数Vision Transformer缺乏显式光照退化物理先验建模。因此需要一种能结合物理先验的Transformer方法，以实现准确均匀的恢复。
light_analysis.method: GLFS将场景光照表示为各向异性高斯基函数的叠加，在自注意力中引入物理引导偏置，自适应推断空间增益场。同时开发颜色向量角度损失和亮度边缘损失，分别约束色调一致性和局部细节结构保真度。
light_analysis.result: 消融研究和定量评估表明，GLFS在光照校正和细节保持上具有明显优势，超越现有方法，达到最先进性能，为低光图像增强提供了新的表示范式。
light_analysis.conclusion: GLFS通过集成物理光照先验到Transformer，有效改善了无监督低光增强中的曝光和颜色问题，具有学术创新性和实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂光照场景的泛化性及计算效率优化。

title: STAR: SpatioTemporal Adaptive Reward Allocation for Text-to-Image RL Post-Training
abstract: Existing RL post-training methods for text-to-image generation usually convert the final-image reward into a single scalar advantage and apply it with the same strength to the entire generative trajectory. However, text-to-image generation naturally has temporal and spatial structure: different denoising steps are responsible for different generation stages, and the content that truly determines text alignment often appears only in part of the image. This granularity mismatch makes it difficult for policy updates to focus on the generative components that actually affect the reward. To address this issue, we propose \textbf{SpatioTemporal Adaptive Reward (STAR) Allocation} for RL post-training of text-to-image diffusion and flow models. STAR uses text-image attention inside the generative model and starts from the core content that the user truly cares about in the prompt. It constructs spatial allocation maps that dynamically vary across denoising steps and rollouts, and allocates the same group-relative advantage to more relevant latent regions with almost no additional computational overhead. STAR then applies stronger policy updates to these regions through a spatially resolved policy objective. We use Stable Diffusion 3.5 Medium as the base model and evaluate on three tasks: GenEval, OCR text rendering, and PickScore. Experimental results show that STAR improves compositional semantic alignment, text rendering, and preference optimization without changing the external reward source, achieving $\mathbf{0.9759}$, $\mathbf{0.9757}$, and $\mathbf{23.60}$ on GenEval, OCR, and PickScore, respectively.

light_analysis.overview: 提出STAR方法，通过空间-时间自适应奖励分配优化文本到图像生成的RL后训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有RL后训练方法将最终图像奖励转化为单一标量优势，均匀应用于整个生成轨迹，忽略了生成过程的时-空结构：不同去噪步骤对应不同生成阶段，且图像中决定文本对齐的内容往往只出现在部分区域。这种粒度不匹配导致策略更新难以聚焦于真正影响奖励的生成组件。
light_analysis.method: STAR利用生成模型内的文本-图像注意力，从用户关注的核心内容出发，构建跨去噪步骤和rollout动态变化的空间分配图，将组相对优势分配给更相关的潜在区域，几乎无额外计算开销。通过空间解析的策略目标对这些区域施加更强的策略更新。
light_analysis.result: 以Stable Diffusion 3.5 Medium为基础模型，在GenEval、OCR文本渲染和PickScore三个任务上评估。STAR提升了组合语义对齐、文本渲染和偏好优化，无需改变外部奖励源，分别达到0.9759、0.9757和23.60的分数。
light_analysis.conclusion: STAR通过自适应奖励分配解决了RL后训练中的粒度不匹配问题，显著提升了文本到图像生成的性能。该方法高效且通用，为生成模型的细粒度优化提供了新思路。未来可探索更复杂的注意力机制和奖励源。

title: MoCo-AIS: A Contrastive Learning Framework for Similarity Computation of Vessel Trajectories
abstract: Trajectory similarity is a fundamental task in analyzing mobility patterns, essential for applications such as route pattern extraction, mobility prediction, and anomaly detection. Traditional distance-based measures for computing similarity incur high computational cost, driving the adoption of lightweight learning-based approaches. Supervised methods rely on extensive labels derived from traditional distance measures and often reproduce these metrics, which limits generalization. While self-supervised learning addresses this issue through contrastive learning, it lacks a unified framework, making it difficult to compare deep learning (DL) models for consistent trajectory representation. Accordingly, this paper presents MoCo-AIS, a unified framework for learning vessel trajectory embeddings based on the Momentum Contrast (MoCo) paradigm, which formulates similarity learning through positive and negative trajectory pairs. Within this framework, we evaluate a diverse set of leading DL models on large-scale, real-world vessel-tracking AIS datasets that capture diverse navigation behaviors and operating conditions. Results demonstrate that our framework significantly improves similarity learning over existing baselines, while providing a benchmarking platform for evaluating trajectory representation models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MoCo-AIS，基于动量对比学习（MoCo）的统一框架，用于学习船舶轨迹嵌入并评估多种深度学习模型，显著提升轨迹相似性计算性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 轨迹相似性计算是分析移动模式的基础，但传统距离度量计算成本高，而监督学习方法依赖大量标签且泛化能力有限。自监督对比学习虽能缓解标签依赖，但缺乏统一框架，难以比较不同深度学习模型在轨迹表示上的一致性。因此，需要一种统一框架来有效学习轨迹嵌入并公平评估模型。
light_analysis.method: MoCo-AIS框架基于动量对比学习（MoCo），通过构建正负轨迹对进行相似性学习。在该框架下，评估了多种主流深度学习模型（如LSTM、CNN等），使用大规模真实世界船舶跟踪AIS数据集，涵盖多样化的航行行为和操作条件。关键创新是将MoCo范式应用于轨迹嵌入学习，提供统一的评估基准。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，MoCo-AIS框架在轨迹相似性学习上显著优于现有基线方法。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但声称在大规模AIS数据集上取得了改进，并提供了一个用于评估轨迹表示模型的基准平台。
light_analysis.conclusion: MoCo-AIS为轨迹相似性计算提供了一个统一的自监督对比学习框架，解决了现有方法缺乏泛化能力和统一基准的问题。该工作具有实际应用价值，可用于路径模式提取、移动预测和异常检测。未来可扩展至其他轨迹类型或结合更多无监督策略。

title: Fine-tuning LLMs for Passive Depression Severity Estimation from AI Mental Health Dialogue
abstract: Depression is the leading cause of disability worldwide, and early detection of symptom change is essential for timely intervention. Validated instruments such as the Patient Health Questionnaire-9 (PHQ-9) support symptom monitoring at scale, but real-world completion rates are low, introducing response bias and systematic missingness. Passive approaches that infer severity from routinely generated data could close this gap. We address this by predicting PHQ-9 total scores directly from transcripts of conversations between users and an AI mental health application, requiring only conversation text and no additional clinical data. We fine-tune a Qwen3.5-27B backbone with a regression head, augment 3,111 ground-truth labels with pseudolabels generated by a reasoning model (Claude Opus) and iteratively trained intermediate models, for a combined dataset of 6,283 users. On a held-out test set of 842 users, our best model achieves MAE = 2.6, RMSE = 4.0, Pearson r = 0.80, and AUC = 0.91 at the PHQ-9 >= 10 clinical threshold. We also find AUC > 0.87 at every severity threshold from PHQ-9 >= 3 to PHQ-9 >= 24, demonstrating that the model captures depression severity across the full clinical spectrum. This work opens the door to passive, continuous symptom monitoring in AI mental health platforms, without requiring users to complete self-report measures.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过微调LLM从AI心理健康对话文本直接预测PHQ-9抑郁严重度，实现被动式持续监测。
light_analysis.motivation: 抑郁症是全球首要致残原因，早期发现症状变化对及时干预至关重要。PHQ-9等标准化工具支持大规模症状监测，但现实世界完成率低，导致响应偏差和系统性缺失。被动式方法从日常生成数据推断严重度可弥补这一缺口。现有方法依赖临床数据或主动问卷，而本文仅需对话文本，无需额外临床信息，旨在提高监测覆盖率和连续性。
light_analysis.method: 使用Qwen3.5-27B作为骨干模型，添加回归头进行微调。利用3111个真实标签，结合推理模型Claude Opus和迭代训练的中间模型生成的伪标签，构建共6283个用户的数据集。从AI心理健康应用的对话转录中直接预测PHQ-9总分。关键创新在于数据增强策略和纯文本输入，无需结构化临床数据。
light_analysis.result: 在842用户测试集上，最佳模型达到MAE=2.6、RMSE=4.0、Pearson r=0.80，临床阈值PHQ-9≥10时AUC=0.91。在所有严重度阈值（PHQ-9≥3至≥24）上AUC>0.87，表明模型能捕捉全谱抑郁严重度。效果优于传统基于问卷的方法，且无需用户主动报告。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了从AI心理健康对话文本被动预测抑郁严重度的可行性，为平台提供持续、无感的症状监测手段，减少对自陈量表的依赖。学术价值在于探索LLM在精神健康评估中的新应用，实际价值在于提升监测覆盖率和及时性。未来可探索多语言、多任务扩展及因果推断。

title: SegDINO: Introducing Multi-Scale Structure into DINO for Efficient Medical Image Segmentation
abstract: Self-supervised DINO models provide strong transferable visual representations, yet applying them directly to image segmentation remains challenging. Existing approaches commonly rely on heavy decoders with complex upsampling, introducing substantial parameter and computational overhead. We observe that introducing scale into DINO features is far more critical than increasing decoder capacity. In this work, we present SegDINO, an efficient segmentation framework that integrates a DINOv3 backbone with lightweight scale modeling. SegDINO introduces Token Pyramid Adaptation (TPA) to reorganize intermediate DINO features into a pseudo multi-scale hierarchy, and Scale-Aware Decoding (SAD) for efficient intra-scale refinement and top-down multi-scale propagation. We further curate PanCT, a new CT dataset containing 284 patients with expert-annotated pancreatic tumors, to assess SegDINO's ability to handle difficult small-lesion cases. Extensive experiments on PanCT and three public benchmarks demonstrate that SegDINO achieves state-of-the-art results with high efficiency. The code is available at https://github.com/script-Yang/segdino_v2.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SegDINO，通过轻量多尺度建模高效利用DINO特征，实现医学图像分割SOTA。
light_analysis.motivation: 自监督DINO模型提供强视觉表示，但直接用于分割挑战大。现有方法依赖重型解码器，引入大量参数和计算开销。作者发现引入尺度比增加解码器容量更重要，故需设计高效多尺度分割框架。
light_analysis.method: SegDINO集成DINOv3骨干与轻量尺度建模。提出Token Pyramid Adaptation (TPA)重组中间DINO特征为伪多尺度层次，Scale-Aware Decoding (SAD)进行内尺度精炼和自上而下多尺度传播。策划PanCT数据集（284名患者胰腺肿瘤CT），代码开源。
light_analysis.result: 在PanCT和三个公开基准上，SegDINO实现SOTA结果，且计算效率高。针对困难的小病变案例表现出色，但摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: SegDINO证明引入多尺度结构比增加解码器容量更有效，为高效医学图像分割提供新方案。具有低资源环境应用潜力，代码开源促进可复现性。未来可扩展至其他医学图像任务。

title: Learning task-specific subspaces via interventional post-training of speech foundation models
abstract: Speech foundation models, pre-trained on large corpora of unlabelled speech data, produce general-purpose representations which are useful across tasks. However, these representations encode information about salient speech variables in a distributed manner, while downstream speech tasks rely on only some of this variability. In this work, we propose a post-training refinement approach using interventional contrastive learning. By leveraging an interventional dataset and multi-part contrastive loss, we learn a transformation from the entangled representation space of speech foundation models into separate content and speaker subspaces. We evaluate the learnt representations on speaker verification and keyword spotting tasks, showing improved out-of-domain speaker verification performance and evidence that speaker and content information are separated across the learned subspaces.
comment: Accepted to Interspeech 2026; 6 pages (4 main body), 2 figures

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于干预对比学习的后训练方法，将语音基础模型的纠缠表示分解为内容和说话人子空间，提升下游任务性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 语音基础模型在大量未标注数据上预训练后，产生通用的分布式表示，但下游任务仅依赖部分变量（如说话人或内容）。现有方法未能有效分离这些变量，导致在域外或特定任务上性能受限。因此，需要一种后训练精炼方法，将纠缠表示分解为任务相关的子空间，以提升泛化能力和任务特异性。
light_analysis.method: 提出干预对比学习（Interventional Contrastive Learning）作为后训练精炼策略。构建干预数据集，通过多部分对比损失（multi-part contrastive loss）学习线性或非线性变换，将基础模型的纠缠表示映射到分离的内容子空间和说话人子空间。该方法无需修改预训练模型参数，仅训练一个轻量变换层，保留原始表示能力。
light_analysis.result: 在说话人验证和关键词识别任务上评估：域外说话人验证性能显著提升，表明说话人子空间有效捕获了说话人身份特征；同时，内容子空间在关键词识别中保持竞争力。实验证据显示，说话人和内容信息在学到的子空间中实现了分离，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作展示了通过干预对比学习实现语音基础模型表示解耦的可行性，为任务自适应表示提供新思路。学术上，推动了表示学习与因果干预的结合；应用上，可改善说话人验证、语音识别等系统的泛化性。未来可探索更复杂的干预策略或扩展到多任务场景。

title: Reload-Mamba: Hierarchical Anti-Dilution State-Space Modeling for Multi-Class Semantic Segmentation
abstract: Mamba-based state space models offer linear-time long-range modeling for high-resolution dense prediction, but sequential state-space propagation can attenuate boundary-sensitive and detail-sensitive responses that are critical in multi-class semantic segmentation. We propose Reload-Mamba, a semantic segmentation framework that addresses this propagation-induced response dilution through three segmentation-specific designs: (i) a boundary-supervised local detail prior that is explicitly trained with ground-truth boundary masks to identify regions requiring response restoration; (ii) a class-uncertainty-aware Reload Gate that incorporates per-pixel class entropy from a pre-reload auxiliary head as an additional gating signal, a formulation that is informative only under multi-class dense prediction; and (iii) a hierarchical multi-level Reload mechanism that applies anti-dilution refinement at three decoder levels and fuses the restored representations top-down. Built upon a ConvNeXt-Tiny encoder with a multi-scale decoder and four-directional Mamba scanning with pixel-wise directional attention, Reload-Mamba achieves 47.9% single-scale (48.9% multi-scale) mIoU on ADE20K and 83.2% single-scale mIoU on Cityscapes. With ResNet-101 + COCO pre-training under the standard DeepLab-style protocol, Reload-Mamba reaches 87.8% mIoU on PASCAL VOC 2012 val. Controlled ablations show that each of the three segmentation-specific designs contributes beyond a direct port of the prior anti-dilution architecture proposed for binarization, cumulatively improving over the direct-port baseline by +2.2 mIoU on ADE20K.
comment: 23 pages, 4 figures, 17 tables. Code will be released soon

light_analysis.overview: 提出Reload-Mamba框架，通过三个专用设计解决Mamba状态空间模型在多类语义分割中的响应稀释问题。
light_analysis.motivation: Mamba状态空间模型虽可实现线性时间建模，但其顺序传播会削弱边界和细节响应，这对多类语义分割至关重要。现有方法直接移植二值化中的抗稀释架构不够有效，需针对性设计。
light_analysis.method: 包含三个关键设计：(i)边界监督局部细节先验，用真值边界掩码训练以识别需恢复区域；(ii)类不确定性感知重载门，利用预重载辅助头的逐像素类别熵作为额外门控信号；(iii)分层多级重载机制，在三个解码器级别应用抗稀释细化并自上而下融合。采用ConvNeXt-Tiny编码器、多尺度解码器和四方向Mamba扫描。
light_analysis.result: 在ADE20K上达47.9%单尺度(48.9%多尺度)mIoU，Cityscapes上83.2%单尺度mIoU，PASCAL VOC 2012 val上87.8% mIoU(ResNet-101+COCO预训练)。消融实验表明三个设计均高于直接移植基线，累计提升+2.2 mIoU。
light_analysis.conclusion: 有效提升了多类语义分割中Mamba模型的边界和细节精度，各组件贡献明确。未来可探索更高效门控机制或与其他扫描方式结合。

title: Robustness of Similarity-based Positional Encoding Under Rotations: Theoretical Analysis and Experimental Validation
abstract: Positional encoding is a fundamental component of Transformer architectures, as it injects information about the spatial or sequential arrangement of inputs. Among recent alternatives to standard absolute and sinusoidal encodings, similarity-based positional encoding (simPE) has emerged as a flexible framework for representing positional structure through pairwise relations. simPE was originally designed for medical imaging applications, where geometric robustness is especially relevant: small rotations naturally arise during image acquisition, induced by imaging instruments, patient positioning, or slight acquisition misalignments. Despite its empirical promise, the theoretical behavior of simPE under geometric perturbations has not been fully characterized. In this paper, we study the robustness of simPE with respect to rotations, combining formal theoretical analysis with experimental validation. We first show that simPE is generally not rotation-invariant. We then prove that, under mild Lipschitz assumptions on the elementary components, simPE is stable under rotational perturbations and derive explicit perturbation bounds in Frobenius norm. We validate these findings experimentally on four controlled datasets--a synthetic Arrow dataset, a synthetic Shapes dataset (four geometric shape categories), a synthetic Digits dataset, and a benchmark image classification dataset (FashionMNIST)--in which training and validation images are kept in a fixed canonical orientation while test images are subjected to increasing rotation angles. Across all datasets, simPE consistently outperforms standard learned positional encoding in terms of accuracy, F1 score, precision, and recall under rotation, particularly in the small-to-moderate angle regime, corroborating the theoretical stability guarantees.
