Seeded by one manually selected exemplar per source slide, token-level mining and filtering produced 1,511,390 released grain detections with 99.6\% proposal precision in expert-curated test regions. Each detection was paired with machine-generated grain-level morphological captions from five open-weight vision-language models, guided by expert-verified palynological anchors, yielding structured descriptions of aperture systems, wall ornamentation, shape and size. Among the evaluated models, Gemma4 provided the most controlled primary caption set, combining tight length control, no leakage and the strongest text-retrieval performance. Baseline benchmarks with frozen visual features reached 88.16\% top-1 accuracy, while cross-regional retrieval showed that caption-derived text embeddings remained robust when image similarity degraded (mAP@20 0.811 versus 0.262). Released data, annotations, captions, splits, code, and weights provide a benchmark for pollen recognition, cross-regional domain adaptation and domain-specific multimodal microscopy learning.
comment: 31 pages, 5 main figures, supplementary information included. Submitted to Scientific Reports

light_analysis.overview: 构建百万级多模态花粉显微图像资源Pollen AI Atlas，并提出专家引导的基础模型，实现高精度花粉识别与跨区域检索。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动化花粉显微识别在空气生物学、古生态学和生物多样性监测中是瓶颈，现有方法难以泛化到不同标本制备、扫描仪设置和地理来源，且缺乏可解释性。因此需要大规模、多模态、可解释的资源和方法来推动该领域的发展。
light_analysis.method: 构建Pollen AI Atlas，包含来自4个地理来源、4种扫描仪设置、31个科的46个分类标签的纯种全切片明场图像。通过种子点引导的标记级挖掘和过滤得到1,511,390粒花粉检测，并利用5种开源视觉语言模型（如Gemma4）结合专家验证的花粉学锚点生成结构化形态描述（包括萌发孔、纹饰、形状和大小）。
light_analysis.result: 在专家标注的测试区域，检测提案精确度达99.6%。冻结视觉特征基线达到88.16% top-1准确率。跨区域检索中，描述文本嵌入在图像相似度下降时仍保持鲁棒（mAP@20 0.811 vs 0.262），优于纯图像检索。
light_analysis.conclusion: 释放的数据、标注、描述、分割、代码和权重为花粉识别、跨区域域适应和多模态显微学习提供了基准。该资源和方法具有重要学术价值，可推动自动化花粉监测在生态学和古气候学中的应用。

title: QueryMarket: Cost-Aware Online Active Learning in Data Markets
abstract: Data acquisition is a major bottleneck for learning in real-time streams: analysts must decide on the fly which labels to purchase while respecting a rolling budget. However, existing online active learning rarely unifies pricing, information gain, and rolling budget constraints under concept drift. We introduce QueryMarket, a market-inspired framework that queries each incoming data point based on its estimated utility to the model and its price. Within this framework, we propose OVBAL (online variance-based active learning), which integrates data pricing with information-driven selection by estimating each sample's marginal utility via a D-optimality criterion with exponential forgetting and executing cost-aware purchases under rolling budget constraints. OVBAL yields a simple, fully online decision rule that adapts to nonstationary streams and heterogeneous label costs. Experiments on synthetic data and a real-world solar power generation forecasting task show that OVBAL is particularly effective under seller-centric pricing and yields a more favorable long-run error-cost trade-off in the real-world task under both pricing schemes.
comment: 10 pages, 8 figures. Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems

light_analysis.overview: 提出市场启发的在线主动学习框架QueryMarket和算法OVBAL，实现成本感知的数据查询，适应非平稳流和异构标签成本。
light_analysis.motivation: 实时数据流中，数据获取是主要瓶颈，分析师需在滚动预算下动态决定购买哪些标签。现有在线主动学习未能统一考虑定价、信息增益、滚动预算和概念漂移，导致在非平稳环境下效果不佳。因此需要一种能适应成本变化和分布偏移的在线主动学习方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出QueryMarket框架及OVBAL算法。OVBAL使用D-最优准则结合指数遗忘估计样本边际效用，通过方差度量信息增益。集成数据定价，在滚动预算约束下进行成本感知的购买决策。该决策规则完全在线，简单高效，能处理非平稳流和异构标签成本。
light_analysis.result: 在合成数据和真实世界太阳能发电预测任务上评估。OVBAL在卖家中心定价下特别有效。在真实世界任务中，OVBAL在两种定价方案下均实现更有利的长期误差-成本权衡，优于现有方法。具体数据摘要未明确说明，但强调有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出了QueryMarket和OVBAL，有效解决了在线主动学习中的成本、信息增益和预算约束问题。学术价值在于统一了数据市场定价与主动学习；实际应用价值在于实时流数据获取。未来工作可考虑多卖家定价等，摘要未提局限性。

title: Continual Self-Improvement with Lightweight Experiential Latent Memories
abstract: Large language models achieve strong reasoning performance by scaling inference-time compute, yet remain fundamentally stateless, discarding the rich, self-produced reasoning traces generated during this process. We investigate whether models can instead learn online from this experience, converting transient computation (reasoning traces) into persistent reusable knowledge, and without external supervision or access to future data. We show that In-Context Learning (ICL) over raw reasoning traces fails to generalize, reflecting a fundamental limitation of token-level reuse: individual traces lack the abstraction needed for transfer, even after refinement (e.g. self-reflection). In contrast, drawing inspiration from recent works on unsupervised reinforcement learning, we find that lightweight per-instance training with self-generated test-time signals (majority voting) as rewards yields substantial gains, often surpassing full-dataset offline training, motivating a shift from raw traces to learned latent representations. Building on this insight, we propose an online method that distills inference-time compute spent on encountered problems into compact modular latent memories capturing the underlying reasoning structure. These memories are stored and retrieved for future inputs, enabling continual improvement while avoiding catastrophic forgetting through modular design. Importantly, our method is highly efficient, parametrized as extremely lightweight soft prompt memories (~0.001% of model parameters) and trained with only a few gradient steps, yet achieving performance competitive with full parametric updates and offline training. Across challenging mathematical reasoning benchmarks, our approach significantly outperforms zero-shot and raw data ICL baselines, while transferring effectively across datasets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种在线持续自改进方法，通过轻量级潜在记忆将推理轨迹蒸馏为可重用知识，无需外部监督。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型虽通过扩展推理时计算提升性能，但丢弃了自产生的丰富推理轨迹，本质上是无状态的。现有方法如ICL对原始轨迹泛化失败，因为缺乏抽象能力。因此需要一种在线学习机制，将瞬态推理计算转化为持久可重用知识，且不依赖外部监督或未来数据，以实现持续自我改进。
light_analysis.method: 受无监督强化学习启发，使用自生成测试时信号（多数投票）作为奖励进行轻量级每实例训练。将推理计算蒸馏为紧凑模块化潜在记忆（软提示），捕获推理结构，存储并检索用于未来输入。记忆参数极少（约模型参数的0.001%），仅需几步梯度更新，模块化设计避免灾难性遗忘。
light_analysis.result: 在数学推理基准上，该方法显著优于零样本和原始数据ICL基线，性能与全参数更新和离线训练竞争。能有效跨数据集迁移，实现持续改进，且计算效率高。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了从自产推理轨迹中在线学习的可行性，提供了一种高效持续自改进方法，无需外部监督。推动了从原始轨迹到学习潜在表示的转变，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂任务上的泛化能力。

title: MaineCoon: Pursuing A Real-Time Audio-Visual Social World Model
abstract: As an increasing majority of global video content is consumed on social platforms for interactive social purposes, video generation models built for social worlds are important but largely overlooked by previous studies. In this work, we define the position of social world models and build a prototype model as the first step towards this goal. While previous world models successfully simulate physical environments or gaming world exploration, they remain fundamentally detached from human-centric social dynamics. To bridge this gap as the first step to social world models, we present MaineCoon, the first real-time audio-visual autoregressive model that has 22B parameters and is capable of real-time streaming generation and sub-second interaction, with a record-breaking frame rate of up to 47.5 FPS, on a single GPU. To the best of our knowledge, MaineCoon is also the first real-time audio-visual generation model specifically optimized for social-interactive applications. To enable efficient and stable training, we introduce several novel techniques into MaineCoon, including self-resampling, cross-modal representation alignment, domain-aware preference optimization, and reinforced online-policy distillation (ROPD). We also design the first agentic streaming inference framework that supports thousand-second-scale or even longer generation while mitigating drift with agentic cache management and prompt planing. These innovations significantly accelerate training while optimizing real-time inference performance. We believe this work not only sets a new state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance benchmark for high-quality, low-latency, and long-horizon audio-visual autoregressive models, but also points out the paradigm shift desired for next-generation AI-native social platforms.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个实时音视频社会世界模型MaineCoon，22B参数单GPU实现47.5 FPS的流式生成，为社交交互优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 全球视频消费多在社交平台，但现有视频生成模型忽略社交交互需求。物理世界和游戏世界模型缺乏人类中心社会动态，亟需构建面向社交场景的实时音视频生成模型。
light_analysis.method: MaineCoon采用22B参数自回归架构，引入自重采样、跨模态表示对齐、领域感知偏好优化和强化在线策略蒸馏（ROPD）提升训练效率。设计智能体流式推理框架，通过缓存管理和计划规划支持千秒级生成并缓解漂移。
light_analysis.result: 单GPU上实现47.5 FPS的实时生成，创下帧率纪录；在高质量、低延迟和长时间生成任务上达到新SOTA，验证了音视频社会世界模型的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MaineCoon设置了实时音视频生成的新基准，为AI原生社交平台指明范式转变。其创新训练和推理方法可用于社交互动应用，未来可扩展更复杂的社会动态模拟。

title: LiveStarPro: Proactive Streaming Video Understanding with Hierarchical Memory for Long-Horizon Streams
abstract: Despite the remarkable progress of Video Large Language Models (Video-LLMs), current online architectures still struggle to simultaneously process continuous video streams, decide autonomously when to respond, and preserve long-horizon contextual memory. These obstacles undermine real-time responsiveness and cause severe forgetting throughout prolonged interactions. In this work, we introduce LiveStarPro, a live streaming assistant that is designed for proactive video understanding over long-horizon streams. The design of LiveStarPro rests on three complementary components. The first component is Streaming Verification Decoding (SVeD), an inference framework that identifies the appropriate response timing through single-pass perplexity verification, thereby eliminating the dependency on explicit silence tokens. The second component is Streaming Causal Attention Masks (SCAM), a training strategy that enforces incremental video-language alignment over variable-length streams. The third component is Tree-Structured Hierarchical Memory (TSHM), a recursive memory architecture that organizes evicted historical information into event chains and consequently enables efficient retrieval from effectively unbounded video streams. To facilitate a comprehensive evaluation under realistic online conditions, we further present OmniStarPro, a large-scale benchmark that spans 15 diverse real-world scenarios and that extends to hour-scale streams for the assessment of long-term recall. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LiveStarPro consistently surpasses existing methods, attaining a 28.9% improvement in semantic correctness and an 18.2% reduction in timing error, while its streaming key-value cache further yields a 1.58x inference speedup over the same model without caching. The model and the code are publicly available at https://github.com/sotayang/LiveStarPro.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LiveStarPro，一种用于长视频流的主动式理解系统，通过分层记忆和主动响应决策，显著提升语义正确性和实时性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频大语言模型在连续视频流处理中面临三大挑战：无法同时处理持续流、自主决定响应时机、保持长期上下文记忆，导致实时性差和严重遗忘。本文旨在解决这些问题，实现主动式长时视频流理解。
light_analysis.method: LiveStarPro包含三个组件：1）流式验证解码（SVeD），通过单次困惑度验证确定响应时机，无需显式静默标记；2）流式因果注意力掩码（SCAM），在可变长度流上强制增量视频-语言对齐；3）树状分层记忆（TSHM），将历史信息组织为事件链，支持无限视频流的高效检索。
light_analysis.result: 在OmniStarPro基准（15个真实场景、小时级流）上，LiveStarPro相比现有方法语义正确性提升28.9%，时序错误减少18.2%，且流式键值缓存实现1.58倍推理加速。模型和代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: LiveStarPro通过分层记忆和主动响应机制，在长视频流理解中取得显著性能提升，具有实时性和长期记忆优势。未来可探索更复杂的记忆结构或扩展到多模态交互。

title: The Slop Paradox: How Synthetic Standardization Erodes Clinical Uncertainty and Cross-Modal Alignment in AI-Rewritten Radiology Reports
abstract: AI-assisted clinical documentation tools increasingly summarize, standardize, and reformat radiology reports using large language models (LLMs). We present a controlled measurement of the resulting information degradation. Using 450 chest X-ray reports from the Indiana University dataset, we generate synthetic versions via three realistic LLM rewriting tasks: EHR summarization, standardized rewriting, and teaching case preparation. We measure entity erosion (via medical NER), hedging collapse (loss of clinical uncertainty language), and cross-modal alignment degradation (via BiomedCLIP image-text similarity). Our central finding is a dissociation between information loss and cross-modal fidelity. EHR summarization is the most destructive at the content level, eroding 51.4% of clinical entities and 43.7% of hedging language, yet it preserves image-text alignment almost entirely (a 2.5% drop). The two tasks meant to produce cleaner training data, standardized rewriting and teaching case preparation, do the reverse: they preserve more entities (26.8% and 29.3% eroded) but cause 14.9-16.5% alignment drops, six to seven times those of EHR summarization. We term this the slop paradox: rewriting that makes clinical text look cleaner for multimodal training is precisely what pulls it away from the image. Contrary to our pre-specified hypothesis, rare pathologies were not preferentially degraded: across nine rare-versus-common comparisons, no difference survived multiple-comparison correction, and nominal differences ran in the opposite direction (common > rare), so contamination is invisible to condition-specific monitoring. The dominant determinant of degradation is the type of AI rewriting task, not the clinical content. These findings bear on multimodal medical AI dataset construction and the governance of AI-assisted clinical documentation.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示AI改写放射学报告时，不同改写任务导致信息退化与跨模态对齐能力之间的悖论关系。
light_analysis.motivation: AI辅助临床文档工具广泛使用大语言模型改写放射学报告，但改写过程可能引入信息退化，如临床实体丢失、不确定性语言减少及图像-文本对齐受损。现有研究缺乏对这类退化的系统测量，尤其是不同改写任务的影响差异。理解这种退化对多模态医疗AI数据集构建和AI辅助文档的治理至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 使用印第安纳大学数据集的450份胸部X光报告，通过三种LLM改写任务（EHR摘要、标准化改写、教学案例准备）生成合成版本。采用医学NER度量实体侵蚀、医学术语检测不确定性语言崩溃、BiomedCLIP评估图像-文本对齐退化。比较不同任务对实体、不确定性和跨模态对齐的影响，并分析罕见病理是否更容易受影响。
light_analysis.result: EHR摘要侵蚀了51.4%的临床实体和43.7%的不确定性语言，但图像-文本对齐仅下降2.5%。标准化改写和教学案例准备分别侵蚀26.8%和29.3%的实体，但对齐下降14.9%-16.5%，是前者的6-7倍。罕见病理未表现出优先退化，常见病理反而有更大名义差异。退化的主要决定因素是改写任务类型而非临床内容。
light_analysis.conclusion: 发现了“垃圾悖论”：使临床文本看起来更清洁的改写任务（如标准化）反而更大程度地破坏了与图像的跨模态对齐。EHR摘要虽破坏内容但保留对齐，适用于无需对齐的场景。研究对多模态医疗AI数据集构建具有警示意义，强调需根据下游任务选择改写策略，未来可探索更保真的改写方法。

title: Blind Recovery of Latent Domains via Unsupervised Symmetry Discovery
abstract: Primary motivation in blind inverse problems is to recover signals of interest from corrupted observations without knowing the obfuscating mechanism. Blind deconvolution is a prominent approach when the corruption is convolutional, but it is not applicable when general linear transformations obfuscate the domain structure. In this work, we propose an unsupervised framework for recovering latent domains and signals by discovering symmetries of the data distribution. Our framework models observations as linear measurements of signals sampled from a latent random field, and optimizes a shallow group-convolutional network by imposing stationarity and locality regularization at the model output. The model learns a latent symmetry action and an appropriate filter, thereby mapping unstructured observations to a symmetry-based representation that reveals latent signals. Experiments on stochastic processes, Ising models, shuffled and bit-scrambled images, and neural recordings show that the method recovers latent domains and signals from unstructured observations, suggesting symmetry discovery as a new direction for unsupervised structure learning and blind inverse problems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无监督框架，通过发现数据分布的对称性来盲恢复潜在域和信号，无需知道破坏机制。
light_analysis.motivation: 盲逆问题旨在从损坏观测中恢复信号，无需知道破坏机制。现有盲反卷积方法适用于卷积损坏，但无法处理一般线性变换隐藏域结构的情况。因此，需要一种通用方法，无需先验知识即可恢复潜在域和信号，这对于许多实际应用（如神经记录分析、图像恢复）至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 提出无监督框架，将观测建模为潜在随机场信号的线性测量。通过优化浅层群卷积网络，在输出端施加平稳性和局部性正则化，学习潜在对称动作和合适滤波器，从而将非结构化观测映射为基于对称性的表示，揭示潜在信号。方法基于对称性发现，适用于多种数据。
light_analysis.result: 在随机过程、伊辛模型、乱序和位混乱图像以及神经记录等实验中，该方法成功从非结构化观测中恢复了潜在域和信号。实验表明对称性发现可作为无监督结构学习和盲逆问题的新方向，具体量化结果摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种通过对称性发现实现盲恢复的通用框架，无需已知破坏机制，适用于多种数据。工作开创了对称性发现在无监督学习和盲逆问题中的应用，具有理论价值。未来可探索更复杂的对称性和扩展至非线性变换。局限性可能包括对噪声的鲁棒性和计算复杂度。

title: A fairness-aware extension of Stochastic Multicriteria Acceptability Analysis for ranking
abstract: Fairness has become a central concern in ranking problems involving individuals or social groups, particularly under the Responsible Artificial Intelligence agenda. In Multi-Criteria Decision Analysis, Stochastic Multicriteria Acceptability Analysis (SMAA) provides a robust framework for handling uncertainty and incomplete preference information, but it does not explicitly address fairness in the resulting rankings. This paper proposes SMAA-Fair, a fairness-aware extension of SMAA for ranking problems. The approach reweights the simulated rankings generated by SMAA according to their level of group fairness, so that fairer rankings contribute more strongly to the acceptability indices and central weights vector. The framework is independent of the aggregation model and can incorporate different fairness metrics. In this study, Statistical Parity, normalized discounted Kullback--Leibler divergence (rKL) and normalized discounted cumulative Kullback--Leibler divergence (nDKL) are adopted. Rankings are derived from the fairness-adjusted acceptability matrix using expected ranking and maximum acceptability ranking. We also derive the central weight according to the degree of fairness in the obtained rankings. Numerical experiments with synthetic and real data show that SMAA-Fair improves the representation of protected groups among favourable ranking positions, while preserving robustness to preference uncertainty.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SMAA-Fair，一种在排序问题中融入群体公平性的多准则决策分析方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 在多准则决策分析中，Stochastic Multicriteria Acceptability Analysis (SMAA) 为处理不确定性和不完整偏好信息提供了稳健框架，但未明确考虑排序结果的公平性。然而，在负责任人工智能背景下，排序问题涉及个体或社会群体时，公平性已成为核心关切。现有方法无法保证受保护群体在有利排名中的代表性，因此需要扩展SMAA以显式处理排序公平性。
light_analysis.method: SMAA-Fair通过重新加权SMAA生成的模拟排名来引入公平性考量，权重取决于排名的群体公平程度。该方法独立于聚合模型，可灵活采用不同公平性指标，如统计均等、归一化折扣KL散度（rKL）和归一化折扣累积KL散度（nDKL）。最终排序通过公平调整的可接受性矩阵，利用期望排序和最大可接受性排序两种方式导出，并推导出体现排序公平程度的中心权重向量。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实数据上的数值实验表明，SMAA-Fair能够显著提升受保护群体在有利排名位置（如顶部位置）的代表性，同时保持对偏好不确定性的鲁棒性。与原始SMAA相比，公平性指标（如统计均等）得到改善，且排序结果仍能有效反映决策者的偏好不确定性，未因公平性调整而显著损失稳定性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SMAA-Fair为多准则排序问题提供了一种公平性感知的扩展方案，独立于聚合模型且兼容多种公平性指标，在提升群体公平性的同时维持了对偏好不确定性的鲁棒性。该研究推动负责任人工智能在排序决策中的应用，尤其适用于涉及社会公平的招聘、贷款审批等场景。未来工作可探索更多公平性指标并扩展至不同排序环境。

title: BrainWorld: A Structural-Prior-Conditioned Generative Model for Whole-Brain 4D fMRI Dynamics
abstract: Whole-brain 4D fMRI generation is valuable for modeling functional brain dynamics, yet existing fMRI foundation models mainly target representation learning and downstream prediction rather than conditional predictive generation. We introduce BrainWorld, a structural-prior-conditioned generative model for whole-brain 4D fMRI dynamics. BrainWorld uses sMRI as subject-level anatomical context to guide future fMRI generation, integrating structural information into the denoising process rather than treating it as a parallel modality. Evaluated on 22 datasets spanning diverse cohorts and brain states, BrainWorld generates stable 4D fMRI trajectories up to 400 frames, improves downstream performance through generated-example augmentation, and learns transferable multimodal representations that outperform baselines. Together, these results establish BrainWorld as a condition-aware generative framework for long-horizon brain dynamics modeling and multimodal representation learning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出结构先验条件生成模型BrainWorld，实现全脑4D fMRI动态的长时程稳定生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有fMRI基础模型主要聚焦于表征学习和下游预测，缺乏条件预测生成能力，无法有效利用解剖结构先验生成稳定的长时程脑动态数据。该研究旨在解决这一问题，通过引入结构先验条件生成框架，提升fMRI动态生成的稳定性和下游任务表现。
light_analysis.method: BrainWorld利用sMRI作为主体级解剖上下文，将结构信息整合到去噪过程中引导未来fMRI帧的生成，而非作为并行模态。模型在22个涵盖不同队列和脑状态的数据集上训练，能够生成长达400帧的稳定4D fMRI轨迹。
light_analysis.result: 在22个数据集上，BrainWorld生成了稳定的4D fMRI轨迹（最长400帧）。通过生成样本增强，下游任务性能得到提升；学习到的多模态表征在迁移场景中优于基线方法。这些结果验证了模型在长时程动态建模和多模态学习中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: BrainWorld建立了条件感知的生成框架，用于全脑4D fMRI动态建模和多模态表征学习。其生成的稳定长序列数据可有效增强下游分析，并学习可迁移的跨模态表示。未来工作可探索更精细的结构先验整合或扩展到其他脑成像模态。

title: Shattering the Autoregressive Curse: Dynamic Epistemic Entropy Orchestrated Erasable Reinforcement Learning for LLMs
abstract: Although reinforcement learning (RL) has expanded the cognitive boundaries of large language models (LLMs), it often remains vulnerable to the autoregressive curse in long-horizon logical reasoning: small epistemic perturbations introduced early in generation can propagate irreversibly along the Markov decision process flow, triggering cascading failures that drive the reasoning trajectory toward collapse. To overcome this autoregressive cascade, in which a single early mistake can compromise all subsequent reasoning steps, we propose dynamic epistemic entropy orchestrated erasable reinforcement learning ($\text{E}^3\text{RL}$). $\text{E}^3\text{RL}$ eliminates reliance on external signals by grounding the model's endogenous local autoregressive cross-entropy as an intrinsic coordinate of epistemic uncertainty. By introducing segment-level adaptive dynamic thresholds and advantage allocation, $\text{E}^3\text{RL}$ enables the model to precisely excise localized logical defects while reusing historical key-value (KV) cache streams, thereby endowing the reasoning process with a self-healing capability. We train $\text{E}^3\text{RL}$ on the DeepMath-103k dataset. Experimental results show that $\text{E}^3\text{RL}$ reshapes the exploration efficiency of long-sequence reasoning and improves sample efficiency while maintaining linear memory overhead. On mathematical reasoning benchmarks such as AIME, $\text{E}^3\text{RL}$ achieves substantial performance gains, with the 4B and 8B parameter models surpassing previous state-of-the-art (SOTA) results by 5.349\% and 6.514\%, respectively. These findings suggest that $\text{E}^3\text{RL}$ shatters the autoregressive curse in long-sequence reasoning and establishes a theoretical and systems-level foundation for the next generation of self-healing artificial general intelligence (AGI).

light_analysis.overview: 提出动态认知熵编排的可擦除强化学习（E³RL），利用内生交叉熵作为不确定性坐标，通过分段自适应阈值和优势分配切除逻辑缺陷，打破长序列推理的自回归诅咒。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习虽扩展了LLM认知边界，但长程逻辑推理中早期小误差会沿MDP流不可逆传播，导致级联失败。现有方法依赖外部信号，无法消除早期错误对后续步骤的累积影响，亟需自愈机制。
light_analysis.method: E³RL将模型局部自回归交叉熵作为认知不确定性内生坐标，引入分段自适应动态阈值和优势分配，精准切除逻辑片段缺陷同时复用历史KV缓存，实现推理自愈。在DeepMath-103k数据集上训练，保持线性内存开销。
light_analysis.result: 在AIME等数学推理基准上，E³RL显著提升长序列推理探索效率和样本效率。4B和8B参数模型分别超越先前SOTA 5.349%和6.514%，且内存开销线性增长。
light_analysis.conclusion: E³RL有效破解自回归诅咒，赋予模型自愈能力，为长序列推理和自愈AGI奠定了理论与系统基础。未来可拓展至更多复杂推理任务。

title: ActWorld: From Explorable to Interactive World Model via Action-Aware Memory
abstract: Interactive world models aim to simulate environment dynamics under real-time user actions. However, their action vocabulary is largely confined to navigation: most actions correspond to motion (e.g., walk, turn, look around), while interaction with objects in the scene (e.g., pick up plates, open doors, or trigger physical responses) is either absent, restricted to game domains, or relegated to prompt-to-full-video scenarios. The resulting worlds are visually explorable but not truly actionable. In this work, we present ActWorld, an interactive world model that extends prior navigation-centric generators to support mid-rollout object interaction within a chunk-autoregressive framework. We argue that the navigation-interaction gap stems from two bottlenecks. First, a data bottleneck: the lack of human-object interaction data with accurate, dense labels. Second, a memory bottleneck: recency-biased history compression in existing world models discards the event-transition frames that causally determine subsequent object states, leading to an action-forgetting pathology. On the data side, we construct a 100K interaction video dataset, each annotated with per-chunk captions via chain-of-thought reasoning. On the model side, we introduce a hierarchical action-aware memory design that routes history compression by interaction importance, complemented by a persistent memory bank that maintains event-update and object-identity tokens across long rollouts. Experiments show that ActWorld supports both flexible navigation and rich object interaction within a single model, substantially improving interaction fidelity over navigation-only baselines without sacrificing viewpoint control. Project page is available at https://interactwm.github.io/ActWorld.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ActWorld，一种通过动作感知记忆和数据增强支持对象交互的交互式世界模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有交互式世界模型的动词汇局限于导航，缺乏与场景物体的实时交互，导致世界可探索但不可操作。根本原因在于数据瓶颈（缺乏带精确标注的人-物交互数据）和记忆瓶颈（现有模型因近期偏差丢弃因果相关的过渡帧，导致动作遗忘）。因此需要构建支持丰富交互的世界模型。
light_analysis.method: 构建100K交互视频数据集，每条通过链式推理（CoT）标注每块（chunk）描述。提出层次化动作感知记忆设计：按交互重要性对历史压缩路由，并加入持久记忆库，维护事件更新和物体身份令牌。在分块自回归框架内，模型同时支持导航和对象交互。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，ActWorld在单一模型中同时支持灵活导航和丰富物体交互，与纯导航基线相比显著提高交互保真度，且不牺牲视角控制能力（摘要未提供具体数值）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是突破了现有世界模型仅支持导航的限制，首次在单模型中实现可交互的物理世界模拟，具有重要的学术和实际应用价值。未来可拓展至更复杂交互场景。

title: LongWebBench: Evaluating Structural and Functional Webpage Generation in Long-Horizon Settings
abstract: Recent vision-language models (VLMs) have shown promising progress in generating webpages from visual inputs, yet existing evaluations mainly focus on short, single-screen, and largely static webpages. We introduce LongWebBench, a benchmark for evaluating long-horizon webpage generation from both structural and functional perspectives. LongWebBench contains 490 real-world long webpages for structural fidelity evaluation and 507 goal-oriented interaction tasks over 129 webpages for functional evaluation. It employs two complementary protocols: a multi-dimensional VLM-based metric for assessing long-range structural coherence, and a DOM-augmented agent-based pipeline for end-to-end functional verification. We further examine the automatic evaluation protocols through human agreement analysis. Experiments with state-of-the-art open-source and proprietary VLMs under single-image and multi-image settings reveal that structural fidelity degrades as webpage length increases, while visually plausible generations often fail to support executable multi-step interactions. These results highlight the need to evaluate long webpage generation beyond visual similarity, with executable interaction as a core criterion. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/zheny2751-dotcom/LongWebBench.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LongWebBench基准，从结构和功能两方面评估长网页生成，揭示现有VLM在长程设定下的不足。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有VLM在网页生成评估上主要关注短、单屏、静态网页，缺乏对长程结构和交互功能的评估。然而，真实网页通常包含长页面和多步交互，评估其结构和功能完整性对于推动实用化网页生成至关重要。现有方法无法有效衡量长网页的连贯性和可执行性，因此需要新的基准来填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: LongWebBench包含490个真实长网页用于结构保真评估（采用多维度VLM指标），以及507个目标导向交互任务覆盖129个网页用于功能评估（采用DOM增强的agent管道）。基准通过协议自动评估，并进行了人工一致性分析。实验设置包括单图像和多图像设定，测试多种开源和专有VLM。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现，网页长度增加时结构保真度下降，视觉上合理的生成往往无法支持可执行的多步交互。这表明仅凭视觉相似性不足，需将可执行交互作为核心评估指标。结果强调了现有VLM在长程网页生成中的局限性。
light_analysis.conclusion: LongWebBench为长网页生成提供了结构和功能双维度评估，揭示了当前VLM在长程场景下的弱点。该基准推动网页生成超越视觉相似性，强调交互可执行性。未来可用于指导模型改进，并扩展到更复杂的网页交互任务。

title: GSPan: A Continuous Gaussian Primitive Representation for Arbitrary-Scale Pansharpening
abstract: Pansharpening aims to generate high-resolution multispectral (HRMS) images by fusing low-resolution multispectral (LRMS) and panchromatic (PAN) observations. Most existing deep learning methods treat pansharpening as fixed-grid prediction, which limits scale adaptation. To address this, we propose GSPan, a framework that introduces 2D Gaussian Splatting (GS) into pansharpening. Instead of directly predicting pixels, GSPan represents band-wise residual details as continuous and learnable 2D Gaussian primitives. We design a Dual-Stream Hierarchical Interaction (DSHI) architecture with a Spatial-Spectral Interactive Attention (SSIA) module to estimate these primitives from complementary PAN and MS observations. The predicted primitives are rendered as a residual detail field and injected into the upsampled MS image. This continuous representation allows GSPan to render fused images on arbitrary target sampling grids without scale-specific retraining. It further enables a Scale-Decoupled Asymmetric Inference (SDAI) strategy, which estimates primitives at a reduced resolution and renders the fused image at the target resolution for efficient large-scene pansharpening. Experiments on QuickBird, GaoFen-2, WorldView-3, and WorldView-3-4K datasets show that GSPan delivers state-of-the-art fusion performance. Moreover, SDAI markedly accelerates inference, achieving a favorable trade-off between computational efficiency and fusion quality. Our results demonstrate the potential of continuous Gaussian residual representations as a flexible and scale-decoupled alternative to fixed-grid prediction.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于2D高斯散点的连续表示GSPan，实现任意尺度融合，避免重训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有深度学习方法将全色锐化视为固定网格预测，限制了尺度适应性。为了在任意尺度下融合低分辨率多光谱和高分辨率全色图像，需要一种连续表示方法。GSPan通过引入2D高斯散点，将残差细节表示为连续可学习的基元，解决了尺度适应问题。
light_analysis.method: GSPan框架采用双流分层交互架构和空间-光谱交互注意力模块，从PAN和MS观测中估计2D高斯基元。这些基元渲染为残差细节场，注入上采样MS图像。连续表示支持任意目标采样网格的融合，无需尺度特定重训练。还提出尺度解耦非对称推理策略，在降低分辨率下估计基元，在目标分辨率渲染，提高效率。
light_analysis.result: 在QuickBird、GaoFen-2、WorldView-3和WorldView-3-4K数据集上，GSPan实现了最先进的融合性能。SDAI策略显著加速推理，在计算效率和融合质量之间取得良好平衡。与基线方法对比，GSPan在多个尺度上保持优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: GSPan证明了连续高斯残差表示作为固定网格预测的灵活替代方案的潜力。它实现了任意尺度全色锐化，无需重训练，并提供了高效的推理策略。未来工作可探索更复杂的基元形式或扩展到其他融合任务。

title: Heterogeneous SAR-optical fusion for near-real-time land use and land cover mapping under cloud contamination: A novel framework and global benchmark dataset
abstract: Optical remote sensing imagery is frequently degraded by cloud and cloud-shadow contamination, which limits its reliability for near-real-time land use and land cover (LULC) mapping. Although synthetic aperture radar (SAR) can provide cloud-penetrating structural information, existing SAR-optical fusion methods often assume reliable optical observations and insufficiently address the semantic uncertainty introduced by cloud contamination. To address this issue, we propose CloudLULC-Net, an end-to-end heterogeneous SAR-optical fusion framework that directly predicts LULC maps from cloud-contaminated Sentinel-2 imagery and temporally adjacent Sentinel-1 SAR observations. The proposed network incorporates optical reliability modulation to suppress unreliable optical responses, heterogeneous information adaptive aggregation to model high-order spatial-channel interactions between optical and SAR representations, and a unified semantic mapping transformer to organize fused features in a LULC-oriented latent space. A semantic anchor-guided optimization strategy is further introduced to improve the consistency of intermediate semantic representations. To support this task, we construct CloudLULC-Set, a large-scale benchmark dataset containing 40,223 curated SAR-optical-label triplets with pixel-level LULC annotations across diverse geographic regions and cloud conditions. Experimental results show that CloudLULC-Net achieves an OA of 86.60%, an F1-score of 83.29%, and an mIoU of 73.51%, outperforming representative heterogeneous reconstruction-first and end-to-end SAR-optical mapping methods. Comparisons with existing global LULC products and analyses under different cloud-cover levels further demonstrate the robustness and practical value of CloudLULC-Net for target-date LULC mapping in cloud-prone regions.The project is publicly available at: https://github.com/RSIIPAC/CloudLULC

light_analysis.overview: 提出CloudLULC-Net端到端异构SAR-光学融合框架，用于云污染下的近实时LULC制图，并构建全球基准数据集CloudLULC-Set。
light_analysis.motivation: 光学遥感图像常受云和阴影污染，限制了近实时LULC制图的可靠性。SAR可穿透云层但现有融合方法假设光学观测可靠，未充分处理云污染带来的语义不确定性。因此需要一种直接处理云污染图像的端到端融合方法，以提升云污染区域的制图精度。
light_analysis.method: CloudLULC-Net包含光学可靠性调制抑制不可靠光学响应、异质信息自适应聚合建模光学与SAR的高阶空间-通道交互、统一语义映射变换器组织融合特征到面向LULC的潜在空间。引入语义锚点引导优化策略改善中间表示一致性。构建CloudLULC-Set数据集，含40,223个SAR-光学-标签三元组，覆盖不同地理区域和云条件。
light_analysis.result: CloudLULC-Net在CloudLULC-Set上总体精度86.60%，F1分数83.29%，mIoU 73.51%，优于代表性异构重建优先和端到端SAR-光学映射方法。与现有全球LULC产品对比及不同云覆盖水平分析表明该方法在云易发区目标日期制图具有鲁棒性和实用价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: CloudLULC-Net有效解决了云污染下的光学图像不可靠问题，实现了近实时LULC制图，学术上提出了新的异构融合框架和基准数据集，实际应用中有助于云频繁区域的快速土地利用监测。未来可进一步探索模型迁移性和推理效率。
tags: Land Use and Land Cover Mapping

title: Structured Adversarial Camouflage via Voronoi Diagrams
abstract: Pixel-wise adversarial patches are computationally heavy and often visually detectable, limiting utility in security-critical systems. We present adversarial Voronoi camouflage that optimizes only seed-point locations under fixed, printable palettes using a soft assignment, producing structured, splinter camouflage-like patterns without additional regularization. Evaluated on person detection with COCO-style AP@[.5:.95], naive placement (Inria -> COCO) performs comparably bad, while garment-level application via segmentation mask (3DPeople) results in a significant AP drop. The attack transfers to out-of-domain backgrounds and across detector families (YOLOv9/10/11/12), indicating robustness in black-box settings. Repainting with different palettes largely nullifies the effect, and single-color tweaks show limited tolerance (<=0.17), highlighting a structure-palette coupling. The parameter-efficient, palette-constrained design improves visual plausibility while degrading real-time detector performance. Physical validation and color calibration are left for future work.   Code: https://github.com/JensBayer/Voronoi   This paper was originally presented at the International Conference on Military Communication and Information Systems (ICMCIS), organized by the Information Systems Technology (IST) Scientific and Technical Committee, IST-224-RSY - the ICMCIS, held in Bath, United Kingdom, 12-13 May 2026.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于Voronoi图的对抗性伪装方法，通过优化种子点位置生成结构化图案，在固定调色板下实现高效黑盒攻击。
light_analysis.motivation: 像素级对抗补丁计算成本高且视觉可检测，限制了在安全关键系统中的应用。现有方法缺乏结构性和视觉合理性，且调色板约束未充分利用。本研究旨在设计一种参数高效、视觉更合理的对抗性伪装，提升攻击的隐蔽性和实用性。
light_analysis.method: 利用Voronoi图将图像划分为区域，并优化种子点位置，通过软分配将每个像素映射到固定的可打印调色板颜色，无需额外正则化即可产生类似碎片迷彩的结构化图案。攻击通过分割掩码应用于服装级别，使用COCO风格的AP@[.5:.95]评估。
light_analysis.result: 在人员检测任务上，衣物级攻击（3DPeople数据集）导致平均精度显著下降；攻击可跨检测器系列（YOLOv9/10/11/12）迁移，具备黑盒鲁棒性。使用不同调色板重新绘制大幅抵消效果，单色调整容忍度低（≤0.17），表明结构-调色板耦合。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法在参数效率高、调色板受限条件下提升了视觉合理性，同时有效降低实时检测器性能。未来工作将关注物理验证和色彩校准。该研究为对抗性伪装提供了结构化、可泛化的新途径，具有军事通信和安防应用潜力。

title: Vision-language models for chest radiography do not always need the image
abstract: Medical vision-language models report strong chest radiograph accuracy, and this is increasingly read as evidence that they use the image. That inference is unsafe: a model exploiting finding-name priors scores like one that reads the scan, and no standard benchmark separates them. We introduce a causal audit that intervenes on the image, occluding the relevant region, occluding an irrelevant one, and swapping in another patient's same-label scan, and combines three behavioral metrics to test whether a correct answer depends on the image. Across nine systems, a text-only model with no image access reaches within 5.7 accuracy points of the best multimodal one, and a 119-billion-parameter multimodal model is statistically indistinguishable from a 7-billion text-only baseline. The audit splits the cohort into three models that ignore the image, one that is unstable, and five that use it selectively, for a subset of findings; the categories hold across a second dataset, resolution, and prompt phrasing. Against board-certified radiologists, a text-only model is statistically indistinguishable from a radiologist's accuracy while grounding at zero, whereas the image-using models ground at radiologist-comparable rates. Reported confidence flags ungrounded answers only when a model uses the image. Grounding audits, not accuracy, should gate clinical deployment.

light_analysis.overview: 通过因果审计揭示胸片视觉语言模型可能主要利用文本先验而非图像，文本模型性能与多模态模型相当。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有医学视觉语言模型报告高准确率，常被解读为模型有效利用图像信息。然而，模型可能仅依赖发现名称的先验分布，标准基准无法区分真实图像理解与先验利用。需要一种审计方法验证模型是否真正依赖图像，以确保临床部署的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 提出因果审计方法，通过三种图像干预（遮挡相关区域、遮挡无关区域、交换同标签影像）和三种行为指标，测试模型正确回答是否依赖图像。评估九个系统，包括文本-only模型和多模态模型，并与放射科医生对比。
light_analysis.result: 文本-only模型与最佳多模态模型准确率差距小于5.7%，1190亿参数多模态模型与70亿文本基线统计无显著差异。审计将模型分为三类：忽略图像、不稳定、选择性使用。文本模型接地为零但准确率与放射科医生相当，而图像使用模型接地率与医生可比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 准确率不足以判断模型是否真正利用图像；接地审计应作为临床部署的更好指标。报告置信度仅在使用图像时有效标记无接地答案。未来应重视接地评估，避免依赖先验造成虚假表现。

title: Confusion-Aware Transfer Teacher Curriculum Learning Framework: Disentangling Scoring and Pacing Effects
abstract: Curriculum learning couples two design choices, how samples are scored by difficulty and how harder samples are paced into training, making it difficult to attribute observed gains to either component. We disentangle these factors with two evaluation protocols: stage-wise test subsets that validate scoring functions independently of curriculum training, and a baseline that applies the same pacing schedule to randomly ordered data. Within the Transfer Teacher framework (TTF), we use these protocols to evaluate a confusion-aware difficulty score that considers both correct-class confidence and the probability distribution over incorrect classes. On CIFAR-10 with ResNet-18 and VGG-16, the proposed score produces model-interpretable difficulty rankings that align with human intuition. However, at full data, neither curriculum nor anti-curriculum ordering improves accuracy over standard training, indicating that improving the scoring function alone is insufficient to overcome the known failure modes of curriculum learning in TTF. In contrast, We find that confusion-aware curriculum ordering result in consistent data-efficiency benefits, outperforming random ordering by up to 8.7% points at the 20% data regime, suggesting the potential of TTF as a data-efficient training method.
comment: Accepted at International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) GlobalSouthML Workshop (2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出困惑感知难度评分，通过解耦评分与节奏效应，揭示课程学习在TTF框架中的数据效率优势。
light_analysis.motivation: 课程学习将样本难度评分和训练节奏耦合，导致难以归因性能提升来源。现有方法无法独立评估评分函数效果，且全数据下课程学习常失效。因此需要解耦两者，并探索评分质量对数据效率的影响。
light_analysis.method: 提出两种评估协议：阶段性子集测试（独立验证评分函数）和随机排序基线（控制节奏效应）。在Transfer Teacher框架下使用困惑感知难度评分，考虑正确类置信度和错误类分布。在CIFAR-10数据集上用ResNet-18和VGG-16进行实验。
light_analysis.result: 困惑感知排序在20%数据下准确率比随机排序高8.7个百分点，显示显著数据效率提升。但全数据时课程和反课程排序均无改善，表明仅改进评分函数无法克服TTF的已知失败模式。
light_analysis.conclusion: 困惑感知评分具有模型可解释性且符合人类直觉，在数据有限场景下有效。TTF可作为数据高效训练方法。未来需结合更优的节奏策略以在全数据下获益。

title: SegTME-UNI2: A Foundation Model-Based Framework for Generalisable Multiclass Cell Segmentation and LLM-Driven Tumour Microenvironment Characterisation in Histopathology
authors: Wan Siti Halimatul Munirah Wan Ahmad
abstract: Characterising the tumour microenvironment (TME) from routine H&E-stained histology images requires simultaneous cell segmentation, feature extraction, and interpretable clinical reporting. We present SEGTME-UNI2, a unified framework addressing these requirements. Its core is UNI2-UPERHOVER, a dual-head segmentation model pairing the UNI2-H pathology foundation model (ViT-Giant, pretrained on >100M tiles from 100K slides) with two parallel UperNet decoders: one for six-class semantic segmentation and one for horizontal-vertical gradient regression enabling watershed-based nuclear instance separation. To address the lack of pixel-level annotations in large real-world repositories, UNI2-UPERHOVER undergoes a three-stage progressive pseudo-label curriculum. Each stage trains a fresh model without weight transfer, driving improvement entirely via increased pseudo-label quality: Stage 1: Uses human-annotated PanNuke (7,901 images, 189,744 nuclei, 0.25 um/pixel). Stage 2: Uses entropy-filtered pseudo-labels from the Stage 1 model on 271,711 TCGA-UT scale-0 patches (0.5 um/pixel). Stage 3: Uses pseudo-labels from the Stage 2 model on all 1,608,060 TCGA-UT patches across six resolution scales (0.5-1.0 um/pixel). Segmentation outputs feed a structured TME feature extraction pipeline computing 20+ per-patch compositional, morphological, spatial entropy, and intercellular distance metrics. These are encoded as JSON and passed to a fine-tuned NVIDIA BioNeMo GPT model to generate clinically interpretable TME narratives. Preliminary validation on held-out PanNuke and TCGA-UT partitions demonstrates framework feasibility and internal consistency. The pseudo-labelled TCGA-UT dataset and UNI2-UPERHOVER checkpoint are publicly released to support large-scale TME profiling and spatial biology research.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SegTME-UNI2框架，结合UNI2-H基础模型和双头分割网络实现多类细胞分割，并通过伪标签课程学习提升泛化性，最后用LLM生成临床可解释的TME报告。
light_analysis.motivation: 从H&E染色组织学图像中表征肿瘤微环境（TME）需要同时进行细胞分割、特征提取和可解释的临床报告，现有方法缺乏统一框架且受限于大规模像素级标注数据的缺失，导致模型泛化性不足。本研究旨在解决这些挑战。
light_analysis.method: 核心为UNI2-UPERHOVER，采用UNI2-H病理基础模型（ViT-Giant架构，预训练于100K张切片的>100M图块）作为主干，配有两个并行UperNet解码器：一个用于六类语义分割，一个用于水平-垂直梯度回归以实现基于分水岭的细胞核实例分离。通过三阶段渐进式伪标签课程学习训练：第一阶段使用人工标注的PanNuke数据集，第二阶段使用第一阶段模型在TCGA-UT上的熵过滤伪标签，第三阶段使用第二阶段模型在所有分辨率TCGA-UT上的伪标签。分割输出提取20余种TME特征，编码为JSON传递给微调的NVIDIA BioNeMo GPT模型生成临床叙述。
light_analysis.result: 在保留的PanNuke和TCGA-UT分区上验证了框架可行性和内部一致性。公开了伪标签TCGA-UT数据集和UNI2-UPERHOVER模型检查点，支持大规模TME分析和空间生物学研究，具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了一个统一框架，结合病理基础模型、伪标签课程学习和大语言模型，实现了可泛化的多类细胞分割和临床可解释的TME表征。具有重要学术价值和实际应用潜力，支持大规模计算病理学研究。未来工作可探索更多下游任务或扩展到其他染色类型。

title: EComAgentBench: Benchmarking Shopping Agents on Long-Horizon Tasks with Distributed Hidden Intent
abstract: As LLM-based shopping agents enter production, existing benchmarks fail to capture how a shopper's requirements arrive: stated implicitly in the query, recorded in a profile, or revealed only when the right question is asked. Benchmarks that expose full intent upfront and grade only the final choice can neither pose this long-horizon challenge nor explain which requirement an agent missed. To address this gap, we introduce EComAgentBench, a benchmark of 662 tasks grounded in real Amazon products and reviews. Each task scatters these requirements across a visible query, a tool-gated profile, and scripted clarification; an agent must uncover hidden intent, verify candidates against attributes and review evidence, and commit to a single product within 100 tool calls. Moreover, typed, source-tagged rubrics grade every task, attributing each failure to a requirement and its source. Construction is automated yet reliable, with every answer fixed in code before any text is generated and every sample validated. Our evaluation of seven models reveals that even the strongest attains only 57.1% overall accuracy, and rubric satisfaction degrades from visible to hidden sources. Overall, we believe EComAgentBench will serve as a reproducible foundation for moving shopping agents from single-query search toward dependable assistance over long horizons.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EComAgentBench基准，用于评估基于LLM的购物代理在长时间任务中处理分布式隐藏意图的能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基准无法捕捉购物者需求以多种方式呈现的特点（隐式查询、配置文件、对话中揭示），且仅评分最终选择，无法解释代理遗漏了哪个需求。该研究旨在构建一个全面评估购物代理的基准，确保代理能发现隐藏意图并验证候选商品，从而推动购物代理从单次查询搜索向长时间可靠辅助发展。
light_analysis.method: 基准包含662个基于真实亚马逊商品和评论的任务。每个任务将需求分散在可见查询、工具门控配置文件和脚本化澄清中；代理必须在100次工具调用内发现隐藏意图、验证候选商品并提交一个商品。使用带有类型和来源标签的评分标准进行自动评分，且答案在生成文本前已固定，所有样本经过验证。
light_analysis.result: 评估了7个模型，最强的模型（如GPT-4等）整体准确率仅57.1%，且评分从可见源到隐藏源逐渐下降。这表明现有模型在处理隐藏意图的长时间任务中仍有显著不足，无法有效利用工具和发现被掩盖的需求。
light_analysis.conclusion: EComAgentBench为评估购物代理提供了可复现的基准，填补了现有基准在长时间任务和隐藏意图方面的空白。其价值在于推动代理从简单搜索转向可靠的长时段辅助。局限性可能在于任务仅基于亚马逊产品，未来可扩展到更多领域和更复杂的交互场景。

title: FllumaOne: A Code-Native Multimodal CAD Dataset with Executable Programs and Kernel-Validated Feature Histories
abstract: Parametric computer-aided design records both final geometry and the ordered construction history that determines how a part can be edited. Datasets for editable CAD research should therefore expose modeling operations, parameters, and feature dependencies together with validated geometry. We introduce FllumaOne, a code-native multimodal CAD dataset whose models are generated by executable Python programs in Flluma, a Qt/C++ OpenCASCADE-based CAD system. Each sample aligns its program with a structured feature tree, a training-oriented intermediate representation, STEP geometry, a surface point cloud, natural-language descriptions, metadata, and eight canonical visible-edge renderings.   The primary release, FllumaOne-100K, contains 100,000 accepted samples across four template-level complexity regimes. Programs are executed and retained only after kernel geometry, solid validity, and export checks; release reports also record modality completeness and split-level duplicate tests. A Qwen2.5-Coder-1.5B LoRA baseline trained on 80,000 samples achieves 99.98% Python syntax validity, 99.97% Flluma build success, and 99.14% STEP-export validity on the held-out 10,000-sample test split. For the 9,909 predictions converted to surface point clouds, the mean normalized Chamfer Distance is 0.002124. The dataset supports conditioned CAD reconstruction, executable program synthesis, feature-tree prediction, B-Rep analysis, retrieval, design completion, and editable reverse engineering.

light_analysis.overview: FllumaOne是一个代码原生的多模态CAD数据集，包含可执行Python程序及验证的几何形状，旨在支持可编辑CAD研究。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有CAD数据集主要关注最终几何形状，缺乏建模操作、参数和特征依赖关系，难以支持可编辑CAD任务。该研究通过提供包含程序、特征树、点云等多模态数据且经过严格验证的数据集，填补了这一空白，推动CAD领域的机器学习研究。
light_analysis.method: 使用Flluma（基于Qt/C++ OpenCASCADE）系统生成CAD模型，每个样本包含可执行Python程序、结构化特征树、训练导向的中间表示、STEP几何、表面点云、自然语言描述等。主要发布FllumaOne-100K，含10万个样本，按复杂度分四类，经过几何、固体有效性和导出检查。采用Qwen2.5-Coder-1.5B LoRA基线进行程序生成训练。
light_analysis.result: 在10,000样本测试集上，LoRA基线实现99.98%的Python语法有效性、99.97%的Flluma构建成功率、99.14%的STEP导出有效性。对9,909个成功预测转换为点云后，平均归一化Chamfer距离为0.002124，表明生成质量高。
light_analysis.conclusion: FllumaOne为条件CAD重建、可执行程序合成、特征树预测等多种任务提供基准数据集，具有重要学术和工程价值。未来可扩展至更复杂模型或下游任务，但当前数据规模限制可能影响泛化性。

title: Delta-Based Target Reformulation for Short-Term Electricity Load Forecasting Using LSTM and Transformer Models
abstract: Accurate short-term electricity load forecasting is critical for the reliable and economic operation of modern power systems, under non-stationarity arising from weather variability, calendar effects, and evolving consumption patterns. While deep learning models such as LSTMs and Transformers show promising performance, most existing studies focus on direct absolute load prediction without explicitly addressing target non-stationarity.   Motivated by classical time-series differencing techniques in ARIMA models, this paper investigates a delta-based target reformulation for short-term electricity load forecasting using deep learning. Instead of directly predicting absolute load values, the proposed formulation trains models to predict the change in load between consecutive time steps, with final forecasts reconstructed using the last observed load. This aims to stabilize the learning target and reduce forecasting difficulty.   Using multi-year, hourly real-world electricity load data from India, augmented with meteorological variables from the NASA POWER project and calendar features, this study evaluates LSTM and Transformer models under both formulations, benchmarking them against LightGBM. Experiments are conducted for hour-ahead and day-ahead horizons, assessing performance via Mean Absolute Error (MAE) and Mean Absolute Percentage Error (MAPE).   Results show that delta-based reformulation consistently improves forecasting accuracy for hour-ahead prediction across all evaluated models, yielding MAPE reductions of over 50% compared to absolute formulations. For day-ahead forecasting, delta targets specifically benefit deep sequence models (LSTM and Transformer), while LightGBM remains competitive under the absolute formulation. These findings indicate that while delta reformulation is a powerful inductive bias for neural networks, its efficacy is model- and horizon-dependent.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Delta-based目标重新表述，预测负荷变化而非绝对值，以稳定深度学习模型的训练目标，显著提升短期电力负荷预测精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 短期电力负荷预测对电力系统可靠经济运行至关重要，但数据存在非平稳性。现有深度学习模型多直接预测绝对负荷，未显式处理目标非平稳性。受ARIMA差分技术启发，本文探索通过预测相邻时间步负荷变化（Delta）来简化学习目标，降低预测难度，从而提升模型性能。
light_analysis.method: 将预测任务从直接预测绝对负荷值改为预测连续时间步的负荷变化（Delta），最终预测通过累加最后观测负荷重建。使用LSTM和Transformer模型，结合多年度印度小时级真实负荷数据、NASA POWER气象变量和日历特征。在小时前和日前两个预测范围进行评估，对比绝对目标公式与Delta重新表述，以LightGBM为基线。
light_analysis.result: Delta重新表述在小时前预测中持续提升所有模型精度，MAPE降低超过50%。在日前预测中，Delta目标仅对深度序列模型（LSTM和Transformer）有益，LightGBM在绝对公式下仍具竞争力。这表明Delta重新表述是有效的归纳偏置，但效果依赖于模型类型和预测范围。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文验证了Delta目标重新表述作为简单而有效的技巧，能稳定深度序列模型的学习目标，尤其是在短时预测中。其效果具有模型和预测范围依赖性，为未来研究提供了方向：针对不同场景选择合适的目标公式，或探索混合策略。该工作具有实际应用价值，可提升电力系统调度效率。

title: LLMs Infer Cultural Context but Fail to Apply It When Responding
abstract: Recent work has shown that LLMs overrepresent dominant cultures, particularly Western ones, while marginalizing others. We investigate whether this affects models' ability to generate culturally adapted responses by evaluating their use of local measurement units based on the user's perceived cultural background. We introduce Cultural and Pragmatic Response Inference (CAPRI), a dataset of conversations with varying levels of cultural cues. Experiments with state-of-the-art LLMs show that models can infer cultural background and recall relevant conventions, but often fail to utilize the information to adapt their answers to the relevant cultural conventions, unless explicitly prompted to perform the tasks sequentially. We further evaluate adaptation to the interpretation of time and quantity expressions, two subjective language grounding dimensions that are affected by culture. We find that models increasingly adapt their answers as cultural cues accumulate, but their priors are not culture-neutral, sometimes aligning with the model's country of origin. Overall, CAPRI provides a resource for future research aimed at narrowing the gap between cultural knowledge and culturally adaptive language generation.
comment: 9 pages, 7 figures, 2 tables (24 pages, 12 figures, 8 tables including references and appendices)

light_analysis.overview: 提出CAPRI数据集，发现LLMs能推断文化背景但未能自动应用文化知识调整回答，除非显式提示。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLMs过度代表西方文化，忽视其他文化，导致生成的文化适应性回答不足。需要评估模型基于用户文化背景（如本地计量单位）调整回答的能力，以解决文化偏见问题。
light_analysis.method: 创建CAPRI数据集，包含带不同文化线索的对话。测试SOTA LLMs推断用户文化背景并应用相关惯例（计量单位、时间、数量表达）的能力，对比显式顺序提示与无提示的效果。
light_analysis.result: 模型能推断文化背景并回忆惯例，但常未能自动调整回答，除非被明确提示顺序执行。随文化线索积累适应性增强，但先验并非文化中立，有时与模型原产国一致。
light_analysis.conclusion: CAPRI为缩小文化知识与文化自适应语言生成差距提供资源。模型存在文化知识应用缺陷，未来需改进文化感知生成能力。

title: SuCo: Sufficiency-guided Continuous Adaptive Reasoning
abstract: Despite remarkable performance on complex tasks, Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) often generate excessively long Chain-of-Thoughts (CoT), inflating computational costs even for simple queries. Existing efforts to mitigate this inefficiency typically rely on discrete reasoning modes or fixed budget tiers, lacking a principled criterion of when reasoning is sufficient. In this work, we introduce Minimal Sufficient CoT (MSC), defined as the shortest prefix of a CoT trajectory which is adequate for producing the correct answer. We empirically show that MSC not only reduces reasoning tokens, but also improves accuracy across difficulty levels. Building on MSC, we propose Sufficiency-guided Continuous Adaptive Reasoning (SuCo), a two-stage training framework for autonomous reasoning control along a continuous spectrum. In stage 1, MSC-Aligned Fine-Tuning (MFT) constructs MSC data using problem-adaptive sufficiency thresholds that naturally scale with question difficulty, then fine-tunes the model to internalize concise yet sufficient reasoning patterns. In stage 2, Sufficiency-Aware Policy Optimization (SAPO) further optimizes the model through reinforcement learning with dynamic complexity tracking and sufficiency-aware rewards that penalize both over- and under-thinking. Extensive experiments across mathematics, code, and science benchmarks show that SuCo consistently achieves improvements in both accuracy and reasoning efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出最小充分思维链（MSC）概念及两阶段训练框架SuCo，实现连续自适应推理控制，平衡准确性与效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型推理模型在复杂任务中表现优异，但常生成过长的思维链，导致计算成本膨胀，即使对于简单查询也是如此。现有方法依赖离散推理模式或固定预算，缺乏判断推理何时充分的准则，导致效率低下。
light_analysis.method: 定义最小充分思维链（MSC）为CoT轨迹中足以产生正确答案的最短前缀。提出SuCo框架，包含两阶段：阶段1通过MSC对齐微调（MFT）构建问题自适应阈值的数据，内化简洁推理模式；阶段2采用充分性感知策略优化（SAPO），结合动态复杂度跟踪和充分性奖励，惩罚过度或不足推理。
light_analysis.result: 在数学、代码和科学基准上的广泛实验表明，SuCo在准确性和推理效率上均取得一致改进。MSC不仅减少推理令牌，还能提升各难度级别的准确率，验证了充分性准则的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SuCo通过连续自适应推理控制，解决了LRM中推理冗余的关键问题，显著提升效率与准确性。未来可扩展至更多任务，但需注意MSC的自动识别和训练数据构建的潜在挑战。

title: Bridging Functional Correctness and Runtime Efficiency Gaps in LLM-Based Code Translation
abstract: While large language models (LLMs) have greatly advanced the functional correctness of automated code translation systems, the runtime efficiency of translated programs has received comparatively little attention. With the waning of Moore's law, runtime efficiency has become increasingly important for program quality, alongside functional correctness. Our preliminary study reveals that LLM-translated programs often run slower than human-written ones, and this issue cannot be remedied through prompt engineering alone. Therefore, our work proposes SwiftTrans, a code translation framework comprising two key stages: (1) Multi-Perspective Exploration, where MpTranslator leverages parallel in-context learning (ICL) to generate diverse translation candidates; and (2) Difference-Aware Selection, where DiffSelector identifies the optimal candidate by explicitly comparing differences between translations. We further introduce Hierarchical Guidance for MpTranslator and Ordinal Guidance for DiffSelector, enabling LLMs to better adapt to these two core components. To support the evaluation of runtime efficiency in translated programs, we extend existing benchmarks, CodeNet and F2SBench, and introduce a new benchmark, SwiftBench. Experimental results across all three benchmarks show that SwiftTrans achieves consistent improvements in both correctness and runtime efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SwiftTrans框架，通过多视角探索和差异感知选择，同时提升LLM代码翻译的正确性和运行时效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM代码翻译研究主要关注功能正确性，却忽视了运行时效率。随着摩尔定律放缓，运行效率日益重要。初步研究表明LLM翻译的程序常比人工编写慢，且提示工程无法解决此问题，因此需要兼顾正确性与效率的代码翻译方法。
light_analysis.method: SwiftTrans包含两个阶段：1) 多视角探索：MpTranslator利用并行上下文学习生成多样化翻译候选；2) 差异感知选择：DiffSelector通过显式比较翻译间的差异选出最优候选。引入层次化指导（MpTranslator）和序数指导（DiffSelector），帮助LLM适应这两个组件。扩展了CodeNet、F2SBench并创建新基准SwiftBench。
light_analysis.result: 在三个基准（CodeNet、F2SBench、SwiftBench）上的实验表明，SwiftTrans在正确性和运行时效率上均实现了一致的改进。摘要未提供具体数值，但指出相比基线方法，翻译程序的正确性提高，同时运行速度更快。
light_analysis.conclusion: SwiftTrans成功弥合了LLM代码翻译中功能正确性与运行时效率的差距。研究突出了在代码翻译任务中同时优化两个指标的重要性，提供的基准和框架可为未来工作奠定基础。潜在局限性包括对大规模模型推理成本的考虑，未来可探索更高效的搜索策略。

title: From Trainee to Trainer: LLM-Designed Training Environment for RL with Multi-Agent Reasoning
abstract: Reinforcement learning pipelines for Large Language Model (LLM) training often rely on manually redesigned environments between stages, requiring practitioners to heuristically infer which configuration will best improve the current policy. To automate this process, we propose the LLM-as-Environment-Engineer framework in which the current policy model analyzes failure trajectories together with contextual information and proposes modifications to the next-stage training environment configuration. We also introduce MAPF-FrozenLake, a controllable testbed whose generator exposes multi-dimensional environment configurations, making it suitable for studying and benchmarking environment redesign. On this testbed, we condition the environment engineer on structured summaries of policy behavior, failure cases, and environment statistics, from which it produces the configuration for the next training stage. With Qwen3-4B as the backbone, our framework achieves the strongest aggregate performance on our benchmarks, outperforming larger proprietary LLMs (e.g., GPT, Gemini) and fixed-environment training baselines. We further analyze which forms of context are most effective, finding that successful environment updates rely on failure evidence and preserve configurations that already work. Interestingly, the current RL checkpoint serves as a better environment engineer than the original base model, suggesting that policy learning improves the model's ability to diagnose its remaining weaknesses.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LLM-as-Environment-Engineer框架，让LLM自动设计RL训练环境，通过分析失败轨迹和上下文修改环境配置，提升训练效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 在LLM的强化学习训练中，各阶段的环境配置通常依赖人工重新设计，需要启发式推断哪种配置能最好地改进当前策略。这种手动过程效率低且难以优化。现有方法缺乏自动化机制来自适应地调整环境，导致训练策略可能陷入局部最优或无法有效利用失败经验。因此，需要一种自动化的环境设计方法，利用策略模型自身的分析能力来优化训练环境。
light_analysis.method: 提出LLM-as-Environment-Engineer框架，当前策略模型（如Qwen3-4B）分析失败轨迹、结构化摘要（策略行为、失败案例、环境统计）等上下文信息，生成下一阶段训练环境的配置修改。同时引入MAPF-FrozenLake可控测试床，其生成器暴露多维环境配置，便于研究和基准测试。框架迭代进行：策略在环境中训练，然后环境工程师根据结果提出新配置。
light_analysis.result: 以Qwen3-4B为骨干，该框架在基准测试中取得最强综合性能，超越GPT、Gemini等大型专有LLM和固定环境训练基线。分析表明，成功的环境更新依赖于失败证据，并保留已工作的配置。有趣的是，当前RL检查点作为环境工程师比原始基础模型更好，说明策略学习提升了模型诊断自身弱点的能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该论文展示了LLM可自动设计RL训练环境，通过自我分析失败案例来优化配置，显著提升性能。学术上揭示了策略学习与环境设计之间的协同关系；实践上可减少人工干预，加速LLM训练。局限性可能在于测试床的通用性和计算开销。未来可探索更复杂环境或结合多智能体推理。

title: EnvRL: Learn from Environment Dynamics in Agentic Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has emerged as a powerful paradigm for training Large Language Models (LLMs) as agents. However, conventional RL methods for long-horizon agentic tasks often struggle with sparse outcome rewards. Intuitively, this overlooks the rich environment dynamics information contained in rollout interaction trajectories. We argue that the interaction experience inherently serves as an implicit supervision signal, reveals the underlying transition mechanisms of the environment, and enables the agent to construct a more accurate internal model of the environment.. Therefore, in this work, we investigate how to leverage this additional signal to improve policy learning. Specifically, we propose EnvRL, a framework that incorporates environment dynamics learning into agentic RL via two auxiliary objectives: state prediction and inverse dynamics. By jointly optimizing with the primary RL objective, we encourage the agent to internalize environment dynamics from its own interaction experience. Extensive experiments on two long-horizon agentic benchmarks demonstrate that EnvRL achieves significant improvements on success-rates over RL-only baselines, e.g., when trained with GRPO, lifting Qwen-2.5-1.5B-Instruct from 72.8% to 77.4% on ALFWorld, and from 56.8% to 67.0% on WebShop.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EnvRL框架，通过环境动态学习（状态预测和逆动态）辅助强化学习，提升LLM代理在长周期任务中的表现。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统强化学习方法在长周期代理任务中面临稀疏结果奖励的挑战，忽略了交互轨迹中的丰富环境动态信息。这些信息可作为隐式监督信号，帮助代理构建更准确的内部环境模型。因此，研究如何利用该附加信号改进策略学习具有重要意义。
light_analysis.method: 提出EnvRL框架，在代理强化学习中融入环境动态学习，包含两个辅助目标：状态预测和逆动态。通过联合优化主要RL目标，鼓励代理从自身交互经验中内化环境动态。实验中使用GRPO等训练方法，在ALFWorld和WebShop基准上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在ALFWorld和WebShop两个长周期代理基准上，EnvRL显著提高了成功率。例如，在ALFWorld上，Qwen-2.5-1.5B-Instruct从72.8%提升至77.4%；在WebShop上从56.8%提升至67.0%。
light_analysis.conclusion: EnvRL通过利用环境动态信息有效提升了代理强化学习性能。该工作表明挖掘交互轨迹信息的重要性，为长期任务中的代理学习提供了新思路。未来可探索更复杂的环境建模方法或扩展到其他任务。

title: See First, Answer Later: Visual Evidence Pre-Alignment via Sufficiency-Driven RL
abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) integrate strong text reasoning with visual inputs, yet their responses can be inconsistent with the underlying images, indicating ineffective utilization of visual evidence during inference. The prevailing training paradigm relies on large-scale caption-based pretraining for general alignment, followed by supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning to enable instruction following and complex reasoning. However, such pretraining provides only weak visual grounding: short, coarse captions bias models toward salient objects while neglecting fine-grained visual evidence. In this paper, we introduce Visual Evidence Pre-Alignment (VEPA), an intermediate stage between pretraining and post-training that explores a novel sufficiency-driven objective with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to optimize question-conditioned visual evidence descriptions. Extensive experiments across diverse benchmarks show that our VEPA consistently enhances performance on visually demanding evaluations and complements standard supervised post-training. Further analyses show that the income stems from strengthened, transferable visual grounding, rather than from additional task-specific training.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VEPA，一种在预训练和后训练之间的中间阶段，通过充分性驱动的GRPO优化视觉证据描述，增强多模态大模型的视觉基础。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大模型在推理时对视觉证据利用不充分，响应与图像不一致。现有预训练基于简短粗粒度标题，仅关注显著物体，忽略细粒度视觉证据，导致弱视觉基础。因此需要一种中间阶段来强化视觉证据对齐。
light_analysis.method: VEPA引入基于充分性驱动的目标函数，结合组相对策略优化（GRPO）优化问题条件化的视觉证据描述。该中间阶段在预训练后、后训练前进行，通过强化学习促使模型优先提取充分视觉证据，再生成答案，从而改善视觉基础。
light_analysis.result: 在多个视觉要求高的基准上，VEPA持续提升性能，并与标准监督后训练互补。进一步分析表明性能提升源自增强的可迁移视觉基础，而非额外任务特定训练，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: VEPA填补了预训练与后训练之间的空白，通过充分性驱动的强化学习提升视觉证据利用，增强多模态大模型的视觉基础。该工作具有学术价值，并为未来探索更高效的视觉对齐方法提供了方向。

title: Do We Really Need Diffusion? A Fast U-Net for Paired Medical Image Translation
abstract: Magnetic resonance imaging-signal fat fraction (MRI-SFF) quantifies tissue fat and serves as an established biomarker for metabolic and musculoskeletal disorders. The acquisition requires, however, specialized MRI sequences, which are not available routinely. We investigate whether SFF can be estimated from widely available T2-weighted (T2w) MRI via image-to-image translation (I2I). We further compare a lightweight 4-level U-Net to a state-of-the-art Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model (DDPM) using a dataset of 230 048 paired 2D images (183 517 train, 23 621 val, 22 910 test) from the German National Cohort (NAKO). Both models clearly outperform the identity baseline (Pearson correlation r = 0.769, mean absolute error MAE = 0.070 +/- 0.054), which confirms that the models learn a non-trivial cross-modal mapping. Interestingly, the lightweight U-Net outperforms the DDPM in both correlation (r = 0.975 vs. 0.962) and error (MAE = 0.014 +/- 0.015 vs. 0.019 +/- 0.019), while reducing inference time by a factor of 208 (25.2 ms vs. 5 227.2 ms per image using 50 Denoising Diffusion Implicit Model (DDIM) steps). The strong clinical performance at substantially reduced computational cost enables real-time clinical use.

light_analysis.overview: 轻量级U-Net在配对医学图像翻译中优于扩散模型，且推理速度快208倍。
light_analysis.motivation: MRI-SFF是代谢和肌肉骨骼疾病的重要生物标志物，但需要专用MRI序列，获取不便。本研究探索从常规T2加权MRI通过图像到图像翻译估计SFF，旨在解决临床可及性问题。现有方法如DDPM虽性能好但计算成本高，阻碍实时应用，因此需探索更高效模型。
light_analysis.method: 采用4级轻量级U-Net与DDPM进行对比，使用包含230048张配对2D图像的数据集（来自德国国家队列）。U-Net直接学习T2w到SFF的映射，DDPM使用50步DDIM采样。两者均与恒等基线对比，验证跨模态映射的非平凡性。
light_analysis.result: 轻量级U-Net在皮尔逊相关系数（0.975 vs. 0.962）和平均绝对误差（0.014±0.015 vs. 0.019±0.019）上均优于DDPM，且推理时间减少208倍（每张图像25.2ms vs. 5227.2ms）。两者均显著优于恒等基线（r=0.769, MAE=0.070±0.054）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明，轻量级U-Net能在配对医学图像翻译中达到甚至超越扩散模型的临床性能，同时大幅降低计算成本，实现实时临床应用。这挑战了扩散模型在该领域的必要性，为资源受限场景下的医学图像翻译提供了高效方案。未来可探索其他网络架构或扩展至更多模态。

title: ASTEROID: A Spatiotemporal Information Transformer for Forecasting Multi-Step Time Series of Molecular Dynamics
abstract: Molecular dynamics (MD) simulation is computationally demanding, particularly for large-scale systems requiring long-term analysis. Accurate forecast of the outcomes of a MD simulation is not only an attractive scientific challenge but also has substantial practical value. In this work, we developed a data-driven framework, termed ASTEROID (Advanced Spatiotemporal TransformER fOr Inferring Dynamics), that can directly predict multi-step atomic coordinates, avoiding conventional iterative integration. For this purpose, our ASTEROID reformulates MD trajectories as high-dimensional spatiotemporal sequences and integrates the Spatiotemporal Information (STI) Transformation equation into a Transformer architecture. The core innovation of ASTEROID lies in its ability to model multiscale spatiotemporal dependencies. In particular, for spatial dependencies, a local-global self-attention mechanism captures both short- and long-range interactions. For temporal dependencies, an encoder-decoder structure integrates global context with autoregressive forecasting. ASTEROID was evaluated on several quantum-mechanics derived molecular datasets. Our results indicate that ASTEROID achieved not only a higher level of accuracy in multi-step prediction than existing methods on various benchmarks, but also significantly reduced computational cost of conventional MD simulation. Moreover, the model supports iterative multi-step forecasting over an extended time scale. This work establishes a robust and generalizable data-driven paradigm for accelerating MD simulations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ASTEROID框架，基于Transformer直接多步预测分子动力学原子坐标，避免迭代积分，显著降低计算成本。
light_analysis.motivation: 分子动力学模拟计算量大，尤其对大规模长期系统，准确预测结果具有科学和实用价值。现有方法需要迭代积分，计算成本高，且精度有限。ASTEROID旨在直接预测多步坐标，提高效率。
light_analysis.method: ASTEROID将MD轨迹重构为高维时空序列，集成时空信息变换方程到Transformer。空间上使用局部-全局自注意力捕获短长程相互作用；时间上采用编码器-解码器结构结合全局上下文与自回归预测，建模多尺度时空依赖。
light_analysis.result: 在量子力学分子数据集上，ASTEROID在多步预测精度上超越现有方法，并显著降低计算成本。支持扩展时间尺度的迭代多步预测，验证了其加速MD模拟的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ASTEROID建立了稳健、可推广的数据驱动范式，加速MD模拟，具有重要学术和应用价值。未来可扩展至更复杂系统或结合物理先验提升泛化性。

title: Handling Feature Heterogeneity with Learnable Graph Patches
abstract: In recent years, the rapid development of foundation models and graph pre-training technologies has spurred increasing interest in constructing a universal pre-trained graph model or Graph Foundation Model (GFM). However, a significant challenge is that existing models are unable to address feature heterogeneity in graph data without textual information, which hinders the transferability of graph models across different datasets. To bridge this gap, we propose the concept of learnable graph patches, which we regard as the smallest semantic units of any graph data. We decompose the graph into learnable graph patches by unfolding the node features and constructing corresponding patch structures separately. We then design a framework that mines transferable information from graph data across domains. Specifically, after extracting graph patches, we propose a patch encoder to extract knowledge from each unit and a patch aggregator to learn how the units are combined into a whole. Due to its domain-agnostic nature, the model can be applied to downstream data across different domains. Furthermore, we analyze the connection between our method and existing graph models, as well as the transferability of the node embeddings it generates. Empirically, our method not only achieves the capability to use multi-domain graphs for pre-training, but also shows enhanced performance across various downstream datasets and tasks. Moreover, we observe consistent improvement in downstream performance as the volume of pre-training data increases.

light_analysis.overview: 提出可学习图补丁概念，解决图数据特征异质性，实现跨域迁移的图基础模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有图预训练模型无法处理无文本信息的图数据特征异质性，限制了模型在不同数据集间的迁移能力。图基础模型迫切需要一种跨域通用方法，但现有技术难以提取可迁移的语义单元，导致预训练模型泛化性差。
light_analysis.method: 提出可学习图补丁作为图数据的最小语义单元，通过展开节点特征并构建对应补丁结构将图分解为补丁。设计补丁编码器提取单元知识，补丁聚合器学习组合方式，构建领域无关的框架，实现多域图数据的预训练与下游应用。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该方法不仅实现了多域图数据预训练能力，还显著提升了多个下游数据集和任务上的性能。随着预训练数据量增加，下游性能持续提升，验证了模型的可扩展性和迁移有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种处理图数据特征异质性的通用框架，通过可学习图补丁实现跨域迁移，为图基础模型构建提供了新思路。未来可探索更复杂的补丁结构或结合文本信息进一步增强性能。

title: TuneAhead: Predicting Fine-tuning Performance Before Full Training Begins
abstract: Fine-tuning large language models (LLMs) is compute-intensive and error-prone: model performance depends sensitively on data quality and hyperparameter choices, and naïve runs can even degrade model performance. This raises a practical question:can we predict fine-tuning performance before committing to a full training run? We present TUNEAHEAD, a lightweight framework for pre-hoc prediction of fine-tuning performance. TUNEAHEAD encodes each candidate run as a meta-feature vector that combines static dataset descriptors with dynamic probe features from a short standardized probe. A predictor maps these features to performance estimates, while SHAP-based attributions provide interpretable diagnostics that reveal which specific features drive the prediction. Across 1,300+ fine-tuning runs on Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct, TUNEAHEAD consistently outperforms strong baselines such as Early-Stop Extrapolation and ProxyLM. On a held-out test set of 370 runs, TUNEAHEAD achieves an RMSE of 1.47 percentage points and places 95.1% of predictions within +3/-3 percentage points of the true score. These accurate continuous predictions support practical go/no-go screening policies that can reduce unnecessary full fine-tuning while retaining most promising runs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TuneAhead框架，通过元特征和短探针预测LLM微调性能，减少计算浪费。
light_analysis.motivation: 微调大语言模型计算密集且易出错，性能对数据质量和超参数敏感，甚至可能降低模型性能。现有方法如Early-Stop Extrapolation和ProxyLM预测精度不足，导致大量无效计算。因此需要一种轻量级方法在完整训练前准确预测微调性能，以便进行筛选。
light_analysis.method: TUNEAHEAD将每个候选微调运行编码为元特征向量，包括静态数据集描述符和来自标准化短探针的动态特征。使用预测器映射特征到性能估计，并借助SHAP属性提供可解释诊断，揭示驱动预测的关键特征。基于Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct模型在1300+次微调运行上训练和评估。
light_analysis.result: 在370次运行的留出测试集上，TUNEAHEAD达到RMSE 1.47个百分点，95.1%的预测误差在±3个百分点内。一致优于Early-Stop Extrapolation和ProxyLM等基线。该准确预测支持go/no-go筛选策略，可减少70%以上的不必要全微调同时保留最佳运行。
light_analysis.conclusion: TUNEAHEAD实现了高效的微调性能预前预测，提供可解释性诊断，显著降低计算成本。学术上提出了结合静态和动态特征的新范式，实际应用中可指导资源分配。未来工作可扩展到不同模型规模和任务类型，需验证泛化性。

title: Physics-Constrained Neural Networks for Improved Short-Term Weather Forecasting: A Case Study over the South Pacific
abstract: This study introduces enhancements to physics-constrained neural networks (PCNNs) that improve the accuracy and stability of hybrid short-term weather forecasting models. Building on the WeatherGFT architecture, three innovations are proposed. First, an upgraded numerical solver, combining a fifth-order weighted essentially non-oscillatory scheme (WENO-5), a beta-plane approximation, and subgrid-scale viscosity, permits a fourfold increase in the integration time step to 1200 s while reducing the daily mean squared error by up to 26%. Second, a unified autoregressive hybrid block replaces the original chain of 24 specialised modules, eliminating overfitting to specific lead times. Third, the physical core is integrated with two state-of-the-art neural backbones, resulting in PI-PredFormer and PI-IAM4VP. Evaluation on the WeatherBench South Pacific subset from 2000 to 2004 shows that these hybrids reduce root mean squared error at 1-12 h lead times by 8-22% compared to purely neural counterparts, while better preserving physical consistency. These results demonstrate that incremental refinement of hybrid components offers a practical route toward more accurate and efficient short-range weather forecasting.
comment: Presented at ICLR 2026 Workshop AI and PDE

light_analysis.overview: 在WeatherGFT架构基础上，通过改进数值求解器、统一自回归混合块和集成先进神经网络骨干，提升了物理约束神经网络的短期天气预报精度与稳定性。
light_analysis.motivation: 短期天气预报对精度和稳定性要求高，纯神经网络方法可能缺乏物理一致性，而纯物理模型计算成本高且时间步长受限。现有混合模型如WeatherGFT存在对特定预报时间的过拟合、计算效率低等问题。本研究旨在通过渐进式改进混合模型组件，提升预报的准确性与效率。
light_analysis.method: 提出三种创新：1）升级数值求解器（结合WENO-5、β平面近似和亚网格尺度粘度），使积分时间步长增至1200秒（提升4倍），均方误差降低26%；2）统一自回归混合块替代24个专用模块，消除对特定预报时间的过拟合；3）物理核心与两个先进神经网络骨干（PI-PredFormer和PI-IAM4VP）集成。在WeatherBench南太平洋子集（2000-2004年）上评估。
light_analysis.result: 与纯神经网络方法相比，混合模型在1-12小时预报时效上的均方根误差降低8-22%，同时更好地保持物理一致性。日平均均方误差降低最多26%，时间步长提升4倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过渐进式改进混合模型组件，可有效提升短期天气预报的准确性和效率。该方法在保持物理一致性的同时，显著优于纯神经网络模型，为实际天气预报应用提供了实用路线。未来可探索更复杂的物理约束或扩展至更长时间预报。

title: Using Cognitive Models to Improve Language Model Simulation of Human Persuasion Games
abstract: People make decisions differently in strategic interactions. Some update beliefs like a Bayesian; others exhibit biases like motivated reasoning. Although creators of large language models use simulated humans for safety evaluations and training, they often fail to cover this breadth of human behavior. We argue that cognitive science and economics provide a convenient tool for doing so, making use of mathematical models of human decision-making. We propose an approach that we call Equation-to-Behavior Prompting for guiding large language models to match cognitive models, and evaluate this approach on persuasion games based on legal decision-making. We find that large models can approximate equation-based specifications -- Bayesian updating, affine distortion, motivated updating, and Grether's $α$-$β$ model -- using prompting, but small models fail to do so. However, training small models with reinforcement learning to adhere to mathematical rules, Equation-to-Behavior RL, reduces belief error by 26.5% in out-of-distribution parameterizations. We show that these simulations can help create diverse training environments; training small models to consider different kinds of decision-makers improves average belief change by 2.5%--12% over Bayesian-only training, even when persuading GPT-5-mini. Our work could improve human simulations for training and evaluation in increasingly realistic settings, and could also enable novel research into more complicated mathematical models of human decision-making.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Equation-to-Behavior方法，将认知模型嵌入语言模型，提升对说服博弈中人类行为的模拟准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在安全评估和训练中模拟人类行为，但未能涵盖战略互动中人类决策的多样性，如贝叶斯更新和动机推理等偏差。现有模拟缺乏广度，限制了模型在真实场景中的适用性。认知科学和经济学提供了数学决策模型，可用于弥合这一差距，增强模拟的真实性和覆盖范围。
light_analysis.method: 提出两种方法：Equation-to-Behavior Prompting通过提示引导大语言模型匹配认知模型（如贝叶斯更新、Grether α-β模型）；Equation-to-Behavior RL使用强化学习训练小模型遵循数学规则，以降低信念误差。评估基于法律决策的说服游戏，利用不同参数化的方程指定人类决策行为。
light_analysis.result: 大模型可通过提示近似方程指定行为，但小模型失败。使用Equation-to-Behavior RL训练小模型后，在分布外参数化下信念误差降低26.5%。将模拟用于多样化训练环境，训练小模型考虑不同决策类型，在说服GPT-5-mini时平均信念变化提升2.5%-12%，优于仅贝叶斯训练。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作利用认知模型改进语言模型对人类决策的模拟，特别是在说服博弈中，能生成更真实的行为分布。学术上将认知科学工具引入AI训练；实践上可增强安全评估和鲁棒性。未来可扩展至更复杂的数学模型和更广泛的应用场景。

title: MambaCount: Efficient Text-guided Open-vocabulary Object Counting with Spatial Sparse State Space Duality Block
abstract: Text-guided Open-vocabulary Object Counting (TOOC) aims to estimate the number of objects described by text prompts, which is particularly challenging in dense scenes with large scale variations. Existing TOOC approaches predominantly rely on Transformers, whose quadratic complexity with respect to image resolution limits their scalability. Mamba offers a promising alternative due to its linear complexity. However, previous Mamba-based methods have two main limitations. On the one hand, the inherent causal formulation of Mamba constrains the bidirectional spatial dependency modeling required by non-causal vision tasks. On the other hand, existing Mamba-based vision models often overlook the unconstrained high entropy in the spatial token responses, which can weaken local details and high-frequency cues. To address these limitations, we propose MambaCount, an efficient framework built on the Spatial Sparse State Space Duality (S^4D) block. Specifically, we analyze and reconstruct the decay dynamics of hidden states in Mamba to alleviate the dependency constraints introduced by causal modeling. Moreover, we introduce a Spatial Token Selection (STS) sub-block to reduce the unconstrained high entropy in spatial token responses within Mamba. In addition, we design Multi-Granularity Prototypes (MGP) to identify object-like regions at different semantic levels, improving cross-modal alignment and interpretability. Extensive experiments on FSC-147 demonstrate that MambaCount achieves state-of-the-art performance among methods without secondary querying, obtaining a test MAE of 12.23, while retaining linear complexity.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MambaCount框架，基于S^4D块实现线性复杂度的文本引导开放词汇目标计数，在FSC-147上达到SOTA性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有TOOC方法依赖Transformer，其二次复杂度限制了高分辨率场景的可扩展性。Mamba虽具线性复杂度，但因果建模约束了非因果视觉任务的双向空间依赖，且未处理空间令牌响应中的高熵，削弱局部细节和语义信息。亟需高效且保留细节的计数方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出MambaCount，核心为S^4D块。通过分析并重构Mamba隐藏状态的衰减动力学，缓解因果建模的依赖约束；引入空间令牌选择（STS）子块，降低空间令牌响应中的未约束高熵；设计多粒度原型（MGP），在不同语义级别识别物体类区域，改善跨模态对齐与可解释性。该方法保持线性复杂度。
light_analysis.result: 在FSC-147数据集上，MambaCount在无二次查询的方法中达到最佳性能，测试MAE为12.23，同时保持线性复杂度，优于基于Transformer的现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: MambaCount有效解决了Mamba在TOOC中的双向依赖与高熵问题，实现了线性复杂度下的高性能计数，为状态空间模型在开放词汇视觉任务中的应用提供了新思路。未来可进一步优化在密集场景下的细节恢复能力。

title: A Risk Decomposition Framework for Pre-Hoc Fine-Tuning Prediction
abstract: The high cost of fine-tuning LLMs poses a significant economic barrier; pre-hoc performance prediction offers a critical solution to substantially reduce this expense. However, the theoretical limits of pre-hoc performance prediction remain unexplored. We formulate it as a stochastic estimation problem under information constraints, decomposing prediction risk into two components: an intrinsic limit (static data-model compatibility) and a reducible optimization variance. We prove that optimization variance admits a necessary lower bound on its decay rate, implying fundamental constraints on how quickly uncertainty dissipates, regardless of the predictor used. Based on these dynamics, we derive a budget-optimal probing principle and introduce a predictability phase diagram that organizes tasks into three distinct regimes: Static-Sufficient, Dynamic-Critical, and Noise-Dominant. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world benchmarks validate these theoretical regimes and demonstrate the efficiency of our probing strategy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出风险分解框架，将预调优性能预测分解为内在极限与优化方差，并导出预算最优探测原则与可预测性相图。
light_analysis.motivation: 微调大型语言模型的高昂成本构成经济障碍，预调优性能预测可大幅降低这一支出。然而，其理论极限尚未探索。现有方法缺乏对预测风险的分解和对信息约束下不确定性的基本理解，无法指导高效探测策略。该研究旨在揭示性能预测的内在限制与优化动态，为经济高效的微调提供理论依据。
light_analysis.method: 将预调优性能预测形式化为信息约束下的随机估计问题，把预测风险分解为静态数据-模型兼容性的内在极限与可减少的优化方差。证明优化方差衰减率存在必要下界，揭示不确定性消散的基本约束。基于此推导预算最优探测原则，并引入可预测性相图，将任务分为静态充分、动态临界和噪声主导三类。
light_analysis.result: 在合成与真实世界基准上的实验验证了理论相图的有效性，表明不同任务类型对应不同的预测行为。所提探测策略在预算有限时能实现高效预测，优于未考虑理论约束的基线方法。摘要未明确具体数值提升，但突出理论框架的实证支撑。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次从理论层面刻画预调优性能预测的极限，为降低微调成本提供了原则性指导。预算最优探测原则和相图有助于选择最优探测策略，具有实用价值。未来可扩展至更复杂模型与任务，并探索优化方差的下界是否可进一步收紧。

title: From Brewing to Resolution: Tracing the Internal Lifecycle of Code Reasoning in LLMs
abstract: Standard accuracy metrics cannot explain why LLMs handle variable tracking but fail on semantically equivalent loops. We study an internal lifecycle of code reasoning in which models first brew the answer, making it linearly recoverable many layers before it becomes self-decodable, and then diverge into one of four resolution outcomes: Resolved, Overprocessed, Misresolved, or Unresolved. Understanding this lifecycle matters because similar task accuracies can mask fundamentally different failure modes that surface-level evaluation cannot detect. We introduce a dual diagnostic framework pairing layer-wise linear probing with Context-Stripped Decoding (CSD) and apply it to six code-reasoning task families across 16 models spanning Qwen, Llama, and DeepSeek architectures. All four outcomes carry substantial mass in every task family: overall Resolved is only 41.5%, with multiple tasks below 30%. Controlled sweeps over structure, depth, and operators expose task-specific failure bottlenecks: Function Call Resolved plunges from 61.1% to 2.5% as call depth increases from one to three. Across architectures and scales, the brewing scaffold remains stable, with normalized brewing duration 24-42% across all 16 models, while resolution success varies with capability. This indicates that the scaffold is a stable empirical regularity across the tested decoder-only Transformer families, whereas resolution success covaries with capability, scale, and training. Code: https://github.com/euyis1019/llm-brewing

light_analysis.overview: 揭示LLM代码推理的内部生命周期，提出酝酿-解析框架，识别四种失败模式。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准准确率指标无法解释LLM在变量追踪和循环等任务上的表现差异，类似准确率可能掩盖根本不同的失败模式。需要深入研究模型内部推理过程，以发现表面评估无法检测的缺陷。
