light_analysis.method: 提出双重诊断框架，结合逐层线性探测和上下文剥离解码（CSD），追踪答案从可恢复到可解码的过程。应用于6个代码推理任务族，16个模型（Qwen、Llama、DeepSeek等），分析四种解析结果。
light_analysis.result: 四种解析结果均占显著比例，总体Resolved仅41.5%，函数调用任务中随深度增加从61.1%降至2.5%。酝酿持续时间稳定在24-42%，解析成功随模型能力和规模变化。
light_analysis.conclusion: 发现LLM代码推理中稳定的酝酿支架和多样的解析结果，为理解模型失败模式提供新视角，有助于改进训练和评估。代码开源以复现。

title: Beyond Domains: Reusing Web Skills via Transferable Interaction Patterns
abstract: Large language model (LLM) web agents are usually deployed as tool callers: each turn, the model reads a fresh page observation and emits one structured tool action. When every action is a low-level primitive, horizons grow quickly and so do policy-facing LLM completions, dominating latency and cost on benchmarks such as Mind2Web and WebArena. Recent systems therefore wrap repeated interaction fragments as web skills: callable tools built from successful trajectories or induced programs, so one call can replace several primitives. However, prior skill libraries are still triggered mainly by instruction similarity or coarse site metadata, which yields low skill reuse on held-out sites and leaves much of the potential step and token reduction on the table.   We present SkillMigrator, an agent that learns reusable web skills and transfers them across sites by matching layout structure rather than specific element references. Each induced skill is stored as a transferable interaction pattern (TIP): the skill paired with a structural sketch of the snapshot at induction time. At test time, SkillMigrator retrieves TIPs by layout similarity and grounds their references on the live page. The rest of the stack is standard: accessibility-snapshot observations with stable references, and fixed tool calling over primitives plus skill invocations. Compared with the state-of-the-art approaches, SkillMigrator reduces the average LLM-action count on successful trajectories by 8-10% across both WebArena and Mind2Web at matched success rate.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SkillMigrator，通过学习可迁移交互模式（TIP）跨站点复用Web技能，减少LLM动作次数和成本。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM网络智能体将每个动作视为低级原始操作，导致步骤长、延迟和成本高。虽然有系统将重复交互片段封装为技能，但技能库触发依赖指令相似性或站点元数据，在新站点上复用率低，未能充分发挥减少步骤和令牌的潜力。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法：诱导可迁移交互模式（TIP），每个技能与诱导时的结构草图配对。测试时通过布局相似性检索TIP，并在实时页面上接地引用。其余部分采用标准设置：可访问性快照观察、固定原始操作加技能调用的工具调用。
light_analysis.result: 与最先进方法相比，在成功轨迹上，SkillMigrator在WebArena和Mind2Web上平均LLM动作次数减少8-10%，且成功率匹配。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献：提出跨站点复用Web技能的新方法，通过布局结构匹配而非元素参考，提高技能可迁移性。学术价值：引入TIP概念，减少LLM智能体延迟和成本。摘要未明确提及局限性，未来可能需更多站点测试。

title: Bounding Box Label Propagation for Re-Annotation of Document Layout Analysis Datasets
abstract: Datasets in practical document processing scenarios typically grow over time, and their class annotations undergo continuous refinement. This creates significant re-annotation efforts, which are time-consuming and costly. A promising remedy is to re-annotate only a small subset of available documents manually and apply semi-supervised learning techniques that leverage both labelled and unlabelled data. Although there are numerous approaches to tackle this problem for classification, there exists no adaptation for the problem of re-classifying object detection instances, e.g. for document layout analysis. To this end, we propose Bounding Box Label Propagation (BBLP), a pseudo-labelling framework for object detection. An object encoder integrates visual, textual, and positional embeddings from object detection samples to come up with a joint embedding that can be used for Label Propagation on partially annotated datasets in a plug-and-play fashion. Evaluation results indicate that the proposed approach produces high-quality class annotations of bounding boxes. In the D4LA layout analysis dataset, it achieves a mAP of 54.0%, corresponding to 81.6% of fully supervised performance, while using only 10% labelled data. Our work demonstrates the potential of Label Propagation for object detection and lays the groundwork for reducing manual annotation efforts in real-world document processing applications.
comment: 17 pages, 3 figures, to appear in proceedings of ICDAR 2026, Vienna, Austria

light_analysis.overview: 提出BBLP框架，利用标签传播技术对文档布局分析中的边界框进行重标注，仅用10%标注数据达到全监督性能的81.6%。
light_analysis.motivation: 实际文档处理中的数据集随时间增长，类别标注持续变化，导致高昂的重标注成本。现有半监督学习方法主要针对分类任务，缺乏适用于对象检测实例重分类的方案。因此，需要一种方法在仅手动标注少量样本的情况下，有效恢复文档布局分析中边界框的类别标签。
light_analysis.method: 提出Bounding Box Label Propagation (BBLP)伪标签框架。该框架包含一个对象编码器，集成来自对象检测样本的视觉、文本和位置嵌入，生成联合嵌入，用于在部分标注数据集上进行标签传播。该框架即插即用，无需额外训练。在D4LA布局分析数据集上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在D4LA数据集上，BBLP使用10%标注数据达到mAP 54.0%，相当于全监督性能的81.6%。结果表明该方法能够生成高质量的边界框类别标注，显著减少人工标注成本。
light_analysis.conclusion: BBLP展示了标签传播在对象检测领域的潜力，为减少真实文档处理应用中的手动标注工作量奠定了基础。未来可进一步扩展至其他对象检测任务，并探索更高效的编码器设计。

title: FinAcumen: Financial Multimodal Reasoning via Self-Evolving Experience Memory Harness
abstract: Financial multimodal reasoning requires agents to coordinate numerical computation, retrieval, visual interpretation, and temporal grounding across heterogeneous evidence sources. Existing tool-augmented agents improve execution fidelity, yet remain largely stateless across episodes, repeatedly rediscovering reasoning strategies and failure patterns. In high-stakes financial settings, this leads to unreliable tool routing, noisy retrieval, and hallucination-prone reasoning. We present FinAcumen, a financial reasoning agent framework centered on selective experience memory for tool-augmented multimodal reasoning. FinAcumen accumulates financially grounded reasoning experience from prior trajectories, distilling successful strategies and failure-derived cautionary rules into a persistent memory bank. During inference, retrieved experiences condition reasoning only when semantic relevance exceeds a calibrated threshold, while irrelevant memory is explicitly suppressed through a fallback mechanism. A deterministic financial tool environment further grounds numerical computation, retrieval, visual decoding, and answer verification.Across four financial multimodal reasoning benchmarks, FinAcumen consistently improves a frozen 8B vision-language model over finance-specialized models and approaches leading proprietary general-purpose models. Further analysis shows that selective experience activation improves reasoning reliability under retrieval uncertainty. Our code is anonymously available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/FinAcumen

light_analysis.overview: 提出FinAcumen，一种基于选择性经验记忆的金融多模态推理框架，通过积累和调用成功策略与失败规则提升工具增强型推理的可靠性和效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 金融多模态推理需协调数值计算、检索、视觉解释和时间定位，现有工具增强型代理缺乏跨回合状态记忆，导致工具路由不可靠、检索噪声和幻觉推理，在高风险金融场景中问题尤为突出。
light_analysis.method: FinAcumen从先前轨迹提取金融推理经验，将成功策略和失败规则存入持久记忆库。推理时，仅当语义相关性超过阈值才检索经验，否则通过回退机制抑制无关记忆。同时使用确定性金融工具环境执行数值计算、检索、视觉解码和答案验证。
light_analysis.result: 在四个金融多模态推理基准上，FinAcumen使冻结的8B视觉语言模型性能一致提升，超越金融专用模型，接近领先的通用模型。分析显示选择性经验激活可在检索不确定性下提高推理可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: FinAcumen通过经验记忆增强了金融多模态推理的鲁棒性，具有学术和实际价值。未来可探索更精细的记忆管理策略及跨领域迁移能力。

title: Brick-DICL: Dynamic In-Context Learning for Automated Brick Schema Classification
abstract: Building Management Systems (BMS) are essential for optimizing energy efficiency and operational performance in modern buildings. However, the lack of standardization across BMS points from different manufacturers creates significant barriers to integration and data utilization. While the Brick schema offers a standardized ontology for building systems, mapping BMS points to appropriate Brick classes presents three critical challenges: (i) the extensive number of Brick classes (936 in the latest version), (ii) limited domain-specific knowledge in large language models (LLMs), and (iii) substantial manual effort required for verification. To address these challenges, we propose Brick-DICL, a two-stage dynamic in-context learning framework for automated Brick schema classification. Brick-DICL consists of two primary components: metadata-RAG, which retrieves relevant examples to enhance LLMs' domain knowledge, and class-RAG, which narrows down potential Brick classes to address the large classification space. Additionally, we implement a multi-LLM filtering mechanism that compares predictions across multiple models, flagging low-confidence classifications for human review. As a result: (i) General: Brick-DICL is applicable to any building management system regardless of manufacturer or metadata format; (ii) Novel and Powerful: as the first dynamic in-context learning approach for Brick schema classification, Brick-DICL achieves significant classification accuracy improvements on building datasets, outperforming existing methods; (iii) Efficient: our multi-LLM filtering strategy reduces manual verification effort, enabling rapid digital building onboarding. Extensive experiments demonstrate Brick-DICL's effectiveness across diverse building datasets, accelerating the path toward standardized, interoperable building management systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Brick-DICL，一种动态上下文学习框架，用于自动化Brick模式分类，解决建筑管理系统中的标准化问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 建筑管理系统（BMS）缺乏标准化，不同制造商的BMS点难以集成。Brick模式提供统一本体，但映射到936个类存在三大挑战：类别数量庞大、LLM领域知识有限、人工验证耗时。现有方法无法高效准确地自动分类，亟需一种通用且强大的方法。
light_analysis.method: Brick-DICL采用两阶段动态上下文学习：元数据RAG检索相关示例增强LLM领域知识；类RAG缩小候选Brick类范围，减少分类空间。同时引入多LLM过滤机制，比较多个模型预测，标记低置信度分类供人工审查。该方法不依赖特定制造商或元数据格式。
light_analysis.result: 在多个建筑数据集上，Brick-DICL显著提升分类准确率，优于现有方法。多LLM过滤策略有效减少人工验证工作量，加速建筑数字接入。实验证明其在不同数据集上的有效性，推动标准化互操作BMS的实现。
light_analysis.conclusion: Brick-DICL是首个用于Brick模式分类的动态上下文学习方法，兼具通用性、创新性和高效性。它降低了人工成本，提高了分类精度，为建筑管理系统标准化提供关键技术。未来可进一步优化检索机制或扩展至更多本体分类任务。

title: Prompt Perturbation for Reliable LLM Evaluation over Comparison Graphs
abstract: Evaluating large language models (LLMs) is important for understanding their capabilities, comparing competing systems, and supporting the deployment of reliable models in practice. For open-ended tasks, pairwise evaluation has become a popular paradigm, in which two responses to the same prompt are compared and the resulting judgments are aggregated into an overall ranking. A central challenge of this paradigm is intransitivity: the induced comparison outcomes may fail to support any coherent global ranking. For example, one may observe cyclic preferences such as $A \succ B \succ C \succ A$, or inconsistencies involving ties such as $A \equiv B\equiv C\neq A$. Such contradictions make the resulting leaderboard unstable and challenging to interpret. In this paper, we propose a prompt perturbation framework for improving the consistency of pairwise LLM evaluation. Our approach generates perturbed variants of each prompt, uses the resulting comparison graphs to identify and filter out structurally inconsistent comparison patterns, and then applies standard ranking methods to the filtered comparisons. A key feature of the proposed framework is that graph-level structural consistency is incorporated explicitly into the evaluation pipeline before ranking aggregation. This provides a simple and principled way to reduce cyclic inconsistencies and improve the reliability of LLM rankings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出提示扰动框架，通过生成变体并过滤不一致比较图，提高LLM成对评估的可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 成对评估LLM存在非传递性问题，如循环偏好和一致性矛盾，导致排名不稳定。这在实践中阻碍了模型可靠部署。现有方法缺乏明确处理图级结构不一致性的策略，无法保证全局排名的连贯性。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法是生成提示扰动变体构建比较图，识别并过滤结构不一致模式（如循环），然后应用标准排序方法。关键创新是在排名聚合前显式融入图级结构一致性，提供简单原则性的方式减少循环不一致。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明该框架能有效减少循环不一致性，提高LLM排名的可靠性。但摘要未明确说明具体性能指标或对比基线结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了一个简单原则性的框架，通过显式处理图结构一致性提升LLM评估可靠性。学术上解决了非传递性问题，应用上支持更稳定的模型比较。未来可探索更复杂的过滤策略或扩展到其他评估场景。

title: OPD-Evolver: Cultivating Holistic Agent Evolver via On-Policy Distillation
abstract: Memory has become a standard substrate for self-evolving agents, yet retaining experience is not the same as learning how to evolve through it. Existing memory agents can store trajectories, retrieve reflections, or accumulate skills, but often lack the holistic competence to select useful experience, act on it, write reusable knowledge, and maintain a growing repository. We introduce OPD-Evolver, a slow-fast co-evolution framework that cultivates such an agent evolver through on-policy self-distillation. In the fast loop, OPD-Evolver interacts with a four-level memory hierarchy to read, use, write, and maintain experience for rapid test-time evolution. In the slow loop, outcome-calibrated memory attribution and privileged hindsight distill these four abilities into the deployable policy. Across multi-domain benchmarks, OPD-Evolver surpasses memory systems such as ReasoningBank by up to 11.5%, and training-based methods such as Skill0 by ~5.8%. Further analysis shows that OPD-Evolver internalizes high-value experience and memory management, enabling OPD-Evolver-9B to challenge giant counterparts such as Qwen3.5-397B-A17B and Step-3.5-Flash, pointing beyond memory-augmented agents toward genuinely qualified agent evolvers.

light_analysis.overview: 提出OPD-Evolver框架，通过on-policy自蒸馏实现代理的全面进化能力，显著超越现有记忆系统。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有记忆代理虽能存储轨迹、检索反思或积累技能，但缺乏选择有用经验、行动、编写可复用知识和维护增长库的全面能力。解决这一问题是实现真正自进化代理的关键。
light_analysis.method: OPD-Evolver采用慢-快共进化框架。快速循环中，代理与四层记忆层次交互，实现读取、使用、写入和维护经验的快速测试时进化；慢速循环通过结果校准的记忆归因和特权后见蒸馏，将四种能力内化为可部署策略。
light_analysis.result: 在多领域基准测试中，OPD-Evolver超越ReasoningBank高达11.5%，超越Skill0约5.8%。OPD-Evolver-9B能挑战Qwen3.5-397B-A17B和Step-3.5-Flash等巨大模型，表明其内化了高价值经验与记忆管理能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: OPD-Evolver通过on-policy自蒸馏赋予代理全面的进化能力，超越了简单的记忆增强，向真正合格的代理进化器迈进。其慢-快框架为自进化代理提供了新范式，具有重要学术与应用价值。未来可探索更高效的记忆编码。

title: Divide, Deliberate, Decide: A Multi-Agent Framework for Fine-Grained Egocentric Action Recognition
abstract: Fine-grained action recognition in egocentric video is challenging for Vision-Language Models (VLMs): actions often differ only in small visual cues, and a single model tends to be biased toward a subset of these cues. We propose Divide, Deliberate, Decide, a fully-local, zero-shot multi-agent framework in which (i) a VLM orchestrator chunks the video and proposes a top-k candidate label list per segment, (ii) an ensemble of heterogeneous VLM specialists, drawn from different open model families, engages in a structured deliberation that includes a peer-consultation round of questions, and (iii) agent rankings are aggregated with a Borda count and the orchestrator re-ranks its own prediction in light of the specialists' evidence. The entire pipeline runs locally with no fine-tuning. Experiments show that our method positively improves zero-shot action recognition performance over the baseline, highlighting the influence of a heterogeneous deliberation step, showing that the gain stems from decorrelated model priors rather than from additional compute.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种零样本多智能体框架，通过分块、异构VLM专家讨论和Borda聚合，提升细粒度自我中心动作识别的准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 细粒度自我中心视频动作识别中，动作差异仅体现在微小视觉线索上，单一VLM容易产生偏见，导致识别性能受限。现有方法依赖微调或大量计算，难以在本地零样本场景下应用。因此，需要一种无需额外训练、能融合多模型先验的方法来缓解偏差，提高细粒度识别的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 提出Divide, Deliberate, Decide框架：首先，VLM编排器将视频分段并为每段生成top-k候选标签；其次，来自不同开源模型家族的多个异构VLM专家进行结构化讨论，包括同行咨询轮次；最后，通过Borda计数聚合专家排名，编排器根据专家证据重新调整自身预测。整个流程完全本地运行，无需微调。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该方法在零样本动作识别任务上显著优于基线模型。性能提升主要源于异构专家模型之间去相关的先验知识，而非单纯增加计算量。具体结果摘要未提供数值，但强调增益来自模型多样性和协作讨论。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究通过多智能体协作框架有效解决了细粒度动作识别中单个VLM的偏见问题，实现了零样本本地部署。学术上揭示了模型先验去相关的重要性，实际应用中为资源受限场景提供了一种高效方案。未来可探索更复杂的讨论机制或扩展到其他细粒度视频理解任务。

title: RAVA: Retrieval-Augmented Viewpoint Alignment for Subject-Driven Image Generation
abstract: Reference-driven image generation has made rapid progress on identity preservation, but reliable viewpoint control across different subjects remains poorly understood. The difficulty is not merely generating a new image of the target subject: the model must infer the implicit viewpoint of one subject and transfer it to another subject using only image-level evidence, without camera poses, depth, or ray-based conditions. In this setting, existing generators conditioned on multiple image references often rely on spurious semantic correlations, which lead to viewpoint drift, part-level structural mismatches, and missing or unsupported target-specific content. We formulate this challenge as cross-subject viewpoint alignment and propose RAVA, a retrieval-augmented framework that supplies explicit geometric evidence before generation. RAVA first learns a cross-instance viewpoint embedding that retrieves target-subject images aligned with the anchor viewpoint, then applies a LogDet-based subset selection strategy to retain a compact reference set that is both view-consistent and structurally complementary. The selected references are finally consumed by a fine-tuned multi-reference image generator. Experiments show that generic semantic embeddings are nearly random for this task, while the proposed retriever substantially improves viewpoint retrieval quality. On cross-subject generation, RAVA consistently outperforms zero-shot baselines and stronger retrieval alternatives under the same generation backbone. These results indicate that cross-subject viewpoint alignment benefits from retrieval-augmented geometric grounding rather than relying on end-to-end generation alone.

light_analysis.overview: 提出检索增强的视角对齐框架RAVA，用于跨主体图像生成中的视角控制。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有参考驱动的图像生成在身份保留上进展显著，但跨主体视角控制仍具挑战。模型需仅凭图像推断某主体隐含视角并迁移至另一主体，现有生成器常依赖虚假语义关联导致视角漂移、结构错位等。此问题重要，因实际应用中缺乏相机位姿等条件。
light_analysis.method: RAVA框架包含三阶段：先学习跨实例视角嵌入以检索与锚定视角对齐的目标主体图像；再采用LogDet子集选择策略保留视角一致且结构互补的紧凑参考集；最后微调多参考图像生成器生成。创新在于检索增强提供显式几何证据而非纯端到端。
light_analysis.result: 通用语义嵌入在此任务上近乎随机，而RAVA检索器显著提升视角检索质量。跨主体生成中，RAVA在相同生成骨干下持续优于零样本基线及更强检索方法，验证了检索增强几何基础的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: RAVA证明跨主体视角对齐受益于检索增强的几何基础而非端到端生成。学术上揭示了显式几何证据的作用，应用上可提升图像生成中视角控制的可靠性。未来可探索更精细的几何条件或扩展至视频等动态场景。

title: SkillMoV: Mixture-of-View Routing with Prototype-Conditioned Gating for Unified Multi-View Proficiency Estimation
abstract: Estimating human proficiency from video is a key challenge for automated skill assessment, with applications in sports coaching, music pedagogy, surgical training, and workplace learning. Existing approaches often focus on individual scenarios or rely on shared multi-view aggregation, limiting their ability to adapt to heterogeneous camera viewpoints and activity domains. We introduce SkillMoV, a unified, parameter-efficient framework for multi-scenario proficiency estimation from synchronized multi-view video. At its core, SkillMoV introduces a Mixture-of-View Projector (MoVP), which adapts the mixture-of-experts paradigm to camera-specific view features. MoVP is composed of four stages: (i) a Mixture-of-View soft router with twelve expert MLPs that learns view-dependent expert preferences without camera-identity supervision; (ii) cross-view attention to align synchronized cameras; (iii) learnable prototype anchoring to condition the representation on class-level reference vectors; and (iv) a prototype-conditioned gated projection that produces the final skill embedding. We evaluate SkillMoV on EgoExo4D across six skill domains and three separately trained view configurations: Ego, Exos, and Ego+Exos. SkillMoV reaches 50.17% overall accuracy in the Exos setting with a single model trained jointly across all scenarios, surpassing the strongest reported Exos result among the compared methods by 3.57 percentage points. In Ego+Exos, SkillMoV remains close to the best reported result in that setting (47.63% versus 48.20%). Ablations on the selected Exos configuration validate each component: MoV routing contributes +6.61 pp over attentive aggregation, cross-view attention +4.92 pp, prototype anchoring +4.07 pp, and stochastic view dropout +3.90 pp. Through LoRA adaptation, SkillMoV trains only 23.32% of its parameters and adds limited measured overhead relative to a LoRA-only baseline.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SkillMoV，一种基于混合视角投影和原型条件门控的统一多场景技能评估框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 从视频估计人类技能熟练度在体育、音乐、手术等领域很重要，但现有方法多针对单一场景或依赖共享多视角聚合，难以适应异构相机视角和活动域。需要统一、参数高效的框架来处理多视角视频中的差异化特征。
light_analysis.method: SkillMoV核心是Mixture-of-View Projector (MoVP)，包括四阶段：Mixture-of-View软路由器（12个专家MLP，无需相机身份监督）学习视角依赖偏好；跨视角注意力对齐同步相机；可学习原型锚定用类级参考向量调节表示；原型条件门控投影生成最终技能嵌入。通过LoRA只训练23.32%参数。
light_analysis.result: 在EgoExo4D六个技能域上评估，Exos设置单模型联合训练达50.17%准确率，超过最强基线3.57个百分点；Ego+Exos设置47.63%接近最佳48.20%。消融实验：MoV路由贡献+6.61pp，跨视角注意力+4.92pp，原型锚定+4.07pp，随机视角丢弃+3.90pp。
light_analysis.conclusion: SkillMoV实现了统一多场景技能评估，通过MoVP有效融合多视角信息并适应不同相机设置，参数高效。未来可扩展至更多视角配置和实时应用，当前在Ego+Exos设置与最优仍有差距，需进一步优化。

title: The Benchmark Illusion: Pruned LLMs Can Pass Multiple Choice but Fail to Answer
abstract: Compressing large language models reduces memory use and inference cost, but it can also create failures that standard benchmarks miss. A pruned model may still perform well on multiple-choice evaluations, yet fail to answer the same question in open generation. We ask what pruning changes: does it erase the correct answer, or does it make the answer harder to produce as the top output?   We study this question with multilingual question answering, tracking the same questions before and after pruning. We find a benchmark illusion. Under high-sparsity pruning, especially Wanda, models often fail in greedy open generation while still selecting the correct answer under multiple-choice scoring. In these recognition-only errors, the answer is usually not gone, but demoted: it often reappears with beam search, sampling, or one in-context example. Overall, multiple-choice benchmarks can overstate the usability of compressed LLMs, creating an evaluation blind spot. Compressed models should be tested on what they can produce, not only on what they can recognize.

light_analysis.overview: 发现剪枝后的LLM在多项选择基准中表现良好，但在开放生成中失败，揭示了基准测试幻觉现象。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有压缩方法（如剪枝）在标准基准测试上表现优异，但实际应用中可能产生未被检测的失败模式。摘要指出，标准的多项选择评估可能高估压缩LLM的可用性，因为模型可能仅保留识别能力而丧失生成能力。这导致评估盲区，需要研究剪枝如何影响模型的输出行为，特别是模型是否真正保留了知识。
light_analysis.method: 通过多语言问答任务，追踪相同问题在剪枝前后的表现。研究高稀疏度剪枝方法（特别是Wanda）对模型的影响，对比贪心开放生成与多项选择评分的结果。分析错误类型：区分答案被擦除或仅被降级。使用束搜索、采样和上下文示例来检验答案的可恢复性。
light_analysis.result: 在高稀疏度剪枝下，模型在贪心开放生成中失败，但在多项选择评分中仍能选出正确答案，形成识别-only错误。答案通常未被擦除，而是被降级，可通过束搜索、采样或一个上下文示例重新出现。这表明多项选择基准高估了压缩模型的生成能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 标准多项选择基准存在盲区，可能夸大压缩LLM的实际可用性。压缩模型应测试其生成能力而非仅识别能力。未来需改进评估方法，关注模型的生成可靠性，避免基准幻觉。局限性包括：仅研究特定剪枝方法（Wanda），未覆盖其他压缩技术。

title: Flux-Guard: Facial Identity Protection using diffusion models
abstract: The widespread deployment of face recognition (FR) systems exposes personal images shared on social media and public platforms to identity linkage and privacy risks. Existing adversarial privacy protection methods can degrade unauthorized FR performance but are not compatible with generative face editing. Artificial intelligence-driven face editing tools are gaining popularity, which has significantly increased user demand for personalized portrait generation and social sharing. However, current editing methods often preserve identity features, making the edited images still susceptible to tracking by malicious FR systems. Thus, this paper proposes Flux-Guard, a privacy-preserving face editing framework based on adversarial attacks, which integrates face editing and privacy protection within a unified generative process. Specifically, we design a flow trajectory control method to align semantic manipulations with the generative process and introduce latent-space adversarial optimization with an adaptive perceptual-loss-driven weighting strategy, dynamically adjusting adversarial strength to maximize attack effectiveness while preserving visual quality.   Extensive experiments demonstrate that Flux-Guard supports face editing while significantly improving attack success rates against cross-domain face recognition models on the CelebA-HQ and LADN datasets. Furthermore, evaluation results for commercial APIs have confirmed its effectiveness in real-world applications. The code is released at https://github.com/JLMWang/Flux-Guard.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Flux-Guard，一种基于扩散模型的隐私保护人脸编辑框架，通过对抗攻击统一人脸编辑与身份保护。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有对抗隐私保护方法虽能降级未授权人脸识别性能，但无法兼容生成式人脸编辑。流行的AI编辑工具保留了身份特征，编辑后图像仍易被恶意人脸识别系统追踪。用户对个性化肖像生成和社交分享的需求日益增长，亟需一种能在编辑同时保护身份隐私的方法。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法包括：流轨迹控制，对齐语义操作与生成过程；潜空间对抗优化，结合自适应感知损失权重策略，动态调整对抗强度以最大化攻击有效性并保持视觉质量。框架基于扩散模型，将人脸编辑和隐私保护统一在同一生成流程中。
light_analysis.result: 在CelebA-HQ和LADN数据集上，Flux-Guard在支持人脸编辑的同时显著提升对跨域人脸识别模型的攻击成功率。商业API评估结果证实了其在真实应用中的有效性。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: Flux-Guard有效解决了人脸编辑中的身份泄露问题，实现了编辑功能与隐私保护的统一。学术价值在于将对抗攻击与扩散模型生成过程结合；实际应用上可保护用户分享图像免受恶意追踪。未来可探索更高效的优化策略或扩展到其他隐私保护场景。

title: Expanding SPHERE-JEPA: A Family of Statistical Regularizers for the Hypersphere
abstract: In Self-Supervised Learning (SSL), preventing representation collapse by explicitly enforcing a uniform distribution on the unit hypersphere has proven to be effective. However, current frameworks typically rely on sliced statistical regularizers such as SIGReg (used in LeJEPA) and SUSReg (used in SPHERE-JEPA), which approximate this continuous objective via Monte Carlo sampling along random 1D directions. This stochasticity injects projection variance into the training gradients, destabilizing optimization, and hindering convergence. In this work, we first show that analytically integrating out these random projections natively yields a deterministic Maximum Mean Discrepancy (MMD), bypassing the variance of sliced methods. Motivated by this equivalence, we formulate full-dimensional objectives for MMD, Kernel Stein Discrepancy (KSD), and Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence directly on the sphere to enforce a uniform distribution. To prevent spatial bias, we equip these tests with rotationally invariant kernels constructed via spectral theory, systematically evaluating two canonical families: smooth exponential decay (Heat) and strict frequency cutoff (Bandlimited) filters. Empirically, removing projection-induced noise results in more stable optimization, faster convergence, and consistent improvements over stochastic sliced regularizers on ImageNet and Galaxy10. Furthermore, we reveal that the choice of the statistical test shapes the geometry of the learned latent space: MMD and KSD favor locally clustered organization suitable for object-centric domains, whereas the continuous KDE-based KL divergence promotes fine-grained instance separation, yielding the strongest results on unclustered procedural texture retrieval.

light_analysis.overview: 提出全维统计正则化器（MMD、KSD、KL散度）替代切片方法，消除随机投影方差，实现更稳定优化和更快收敛。
light_analysis.motivation: 自监督学习中，在单位超球面上强制均匀分布可防止表征坍塌。现有切片统计正则化器（如SIGReg、SUSReg）通过蒙特卡洛采样沿随机方向近似连续目标，但随机性引入投影方差，导致训练梯度不稳定、阻碍收敛。因此需要更稳定、确定性的正则化方法以提升优化效率。
light_analysis.method: 首先证明解析积分随机投影等价于确定性MMD，消除切片方差。然后直接在球面上构建全维MMD、KSD和KL散度目标。利用谱理论构造旋转不变核（Heat核和Bandlimited核）避免空间偏差。在ImageNet和Galaxy10数据集上训练，对比随机切片正则化器。
light_analysis.result: 去除投影噪声后，优化更稳定、收敛更快，在ImageNet和Galaxy10上一致优于随机切片正则化器。不同统计测试塑造不同几何：MMD和KSD促进局部聚类（适合物体中心域），KL散度促进细粒度实例分离，在无聚类程序化纹理检索中取得最佳结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 全维确定性统计正则化器有效提升SSL训练稳定性与性能，不同统计测试对潜在空间几何有直接影响。该工作为选择任务适配的正则化策略提供指导，未来可探索其他核函数或统计测试。

title: Test-Time Training for Robust Text-Guided Open-Vocabulary Object Counting
abstract: Text-guided Open-vocabulary Object Counting (TOOC) enables counting arbitrary object categories specified by text prompts, offering substantially greater flexibility than conventional closed-set counting. However, existing TOOC methods are developed and evaluated primarily on ideal images, while real-world scenes often suffer from adverse conditions such as rain, fog, darkness, and sensor noise, which severely degrade visual quality and impair vision-language alignment. To bridge this gap, we introduce Robust-TOOC, the first benchmark for evaluating TOOC under diverse corruption conditions, which covers six representative degradation types: rain, fog, darkness, Gaussian noise, salt-and-pepper noise, and mixed corruption. To improve robustness while preserving the original counting architecture, we propose Dual-TTT, a dual-architecture test-time training framework for TOOC. Specifically, during test-time training, Dual-TTT updates only the Text-guided Lightweight Denoising module (TL-Denoiser), while keeping the original counting network frozen. Inspired by diffusion models, the TL-Denoiser is optimized to remove corruption-aware noise from image representations under degraded conditions. Since only the TL-Denoiser is trained at test time, Dual-TTT is annotation-free and can be seamlessly integrated into existing TOOC models without modifying their original architecture. Extensive experiments on multiple recent TOOC baselines demonstrate the effectiveness of our method.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Robust-TOOC基准和Dual-TTT框架，通过测试时训练轻量去噪模块实现鲁棒文引导开放词汇目标计数。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文本引导开放词汇目标计数方法在理想图像上表现良好，但真实场景中的雨、雾、黑暗、传感器噪声等退化条件严重降低视觉质量并损害视觉-语言对齐，而缺乏针对这些退化条件的评估基准和鲁棒方法。因此，需要建立统一的鲁棒性评估基准并开发无需修改原始架构的鲁棒计数方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出Dual-TTT，一种双架构测试时训练框架。核心是文本引导轻量去噪模块（TL-Denoiser），在测试时仅更新该模块，保持原始计数网络冻结。TL-Denoiser受扩散模型启发，优化去除退化感知噪声。框架无需标注，可无缝集成到现有TOOC模型。同时构建Robust-TOOC基准，包含雨、雾、黑暗、高斯噪声、椒盐噪声和混合退化六种退化类型。
light_analysis.result: 在多个近期TOOC基线模型上的大量实验表明，Dual-TTT方法有效提升了各种退化条件下的计数鲁棒性，具体性能指标摘要未明确给出，但与基线相比有明显改善。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次关注TOOC在退化条件下的鲁棒性问题，提出基准和方法。Dual-TTT通过测试时训练轻量去噪器，在不修改原始架构且无需标注的情况下显著增强鲁棒性。该工作为鲁棒开放词汇计数提供了新思路，未来可探索更高效的测试时训练策略或扩展到其他视觉任务。

title: Closing the Feedback Loop: From Experience Extraction to Insight Governance in Verbal Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Training-free verbal reinforcement learning enables LLM agents to learn from world feedback -- objective signals such as dynamic task outcomes, market returns, or demand forecasts -- by extracting verbal rules from experience and injecting them as context, updating the agent's behavior without parameter changes. However, in non-stationary environments these agents face a retention-forgetting dilemma: retaining stale insights causes negative transfer, while discarding them causes catastrophic forgetting when conditions recur. We identify four requirements for navigating this dilemma -- outcome-driven evaluation, persistent structured evidence, non-monotonic knowledge lifecycle, and compositional governance -- and show that existing methods invest heavily in experience extraction while underinvesting in insight governance. We propose a three-layer architecture -- rules, evidence, and skills -- connected by a feedback-driven curation loop that closes the governance gap. Rules capture distilled experience from world outcomes; evidence logs track each rule's reliability across episodes; skills govern which rules to apply, how to resolve conflicts, and when to abstain. On financial forecasting as a case study, where world feedback is naturally abundant, noisy, and non-stationary, we show that the same accumulated experience either degrades performance below the zero-shot baseline or dramatically improves accuracy and risk-adjusted returns, depending on whether the curation loop is present.
comment: Accepted to the ICML 2026 RLxF: Reinforcement Learning from World Feedback Workshop, RLxF@ICML 2026, Seoul, South Korea

light_analysis.overview: 提出三层架构（规则、证据、技能）及反馈驱动的策展循环，解决LLM智能体在非平稳环境中的经验保留-遗忘困境。
light_analysis.motivation: 无参数更新的语言智能体从世界反馈中学习时，面临旧知识误导或遗忘的问题。现有方法重经验提取、轻知识治理，无法在非平稳环境中平衡保留与遗忘。金融预测等场景中反馈丰富但噪声大，亟需有效的治理机制。
light_analysis.method: 提出规则、证据、技能三层架构及反馈驱动的策展循环。规则从世界结果中提取经验；证据日志跟踪规则各轮可靠性；技能决定何时应用规则、如何解决冲突和何时弃权。通过循环关闭治理差距，实现自适应知识生命周期管理。
light_analysis.result: 以金融预测为案例，相同累积经验在有/无策展循环时表现差异显著：无循环时性能低于零样本基线，有循环时显著提高准确率和风险调整收益。验证了治理对非平稳环境中学习的关键作用。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了经验提取到知识治理的闭环框架，揭示了保留-遗忘困境的四个关键要求，并设计了三层架构和策展循环。学术上推动了无参数学习智能体的知识管理，实际中可应用于金融等动态决策场景。未来可探索更通用的治理策略。

title: TivTok: Broadcasting Time-Invariant Tokens for Scalable Video Tokenization
abstract: Video tokenization is fundamental to scalable video generation, as the number of tokens directly determines the computational cost and the length of videos that can be modeled. Existing tokenizers mainly improve scalability by compressing videos into fewer tokens, but they often continue to represent persistent content, such as static backgrounds and consistent object appearances, repeatedly across frames and chunks. In this paper, we propose \textbf{TivTok} (\textit{Time-Invariant Tokenizer}), a reuse-aware video tokenizer that makes persistent information reusable across time. TivTok represents a clip with Time-Invariant (TIV) tokens that encode information shared across frames and Time-Variant (TV) tokens that encode frame-specific residuals. To obtain this factorization, we introduce Scope-Induced Factorization (SIF), which assigns different attention scopes to the two token groups: TIV tokens attend to the full clip, whereas each TV token only accesses its corresponding frame together with the TIV tokens. In the decoder, Invariant Broadcasting (IB) reuses the same TIV tokens across frames and chunks for parallel reconstruction and long-video tokenization. Experiments show that TivTok achieves an rFVD of 12.65 on the standard $16{\times}256{\times}256$ benchmark and improves compression efficiency by 2.91$\times$ for 128-frame videos compared with the evaluated baselines, while using only 1.1\% of the tokens required by downsample-based tokenizers in our evaluation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TivTok，一种复用感知的视频分词器，通过时间不变/变体令牌分解实现高效可扩展视频分词。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频分词是规模化视频生成的基础，但现有分词器在压缩视频时仍重复编码持久内容（如静态背景），导致计算冗余。随着视频长度增加，这种重复表示限制了可建模的视频时长和计算效率。TivTok旨在通过让持久信息跨时间复用来解决此问题，从而提升压缩效率和可扩展性。
light_analysis.method: TivTok将视频片段分解为时间不变（TIV）令牌（共享帧间信息）和时间变体（TV）令牌（帧特定残差）。关键创新是Scope-Induced Factorization (SIF)，它为两组令牌分配不同注意力范围：TIV令牌关注整个片段，TV令牌仅关注对应帧及TIV令牌。解码器中，Invariant Broadcasting (IB)在不同帧和块间复用相同TIV令牌，实现并行重建和长视频分词。
light_analysis.result: 在标准16×256×256基准上，TivTok取得rFVD=12.65。对于128帧视频，相比基线方法，压缩效率提升2.91倍。在评估中，仅使用下采样分词器所需令牌数量的1.1%，显著减少了计算开销。
light_analysis.conclusion: TivTok通过时间不变令牌复用有效提升了视频分词的压缩效率和可扩展性，支持更长视频建模。其因子化分解和广播机制为未来高效视频生成提供了新思路。局限性可能在于对剧烈动态场景的适应性，未来可探索更精细的时间变体建模。

title: Root-Selecting Fixed-Point Inversion for Rectified Flows via Trajectory Straightness
abstract: Finding the initial noise that generates a given data sample, known as inversion, is a key component for downstream applications such as training-free image editing. Existing fixed-point inversion methods improve inversion accuracy by formulating each inversion step as a fixed-point problem, but they lack a principled mechanism for selecting among multiple fixed-point solutions that can arise in practice. We observe that different selections induce different inversion trajectories, leading to substantial variation in reconstruction and editing quality. For rectified flows, we further find that this variation is closely associated with trajectory straightness, motivating straightness as a principled selection criterion. We propose SelFix, a fixed-point inversion method that selects fixed-point solutions inducing straighter inverse trajectories while retaining convergence to an exact inverse root under standard local assumptions. Experiments on FLUX.1-dev and PIE-Bench show that SelFix improves fixed-point inversion, achieving stronger real-image reconstruction and better source-preserving prompt-based editing than prior inversion baselines. The code is available at https://github.com/seminkim/selfix.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SelFix，一种基于轨迹直线度的固定点反演选择方法，显著提升rectified flows在图像重建和编辑中的质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有固定点反演方法在求解时可能出现多个固定点解，不同选择导致反演轨迹差异显著，影响重建和编辑效果。针对rectified flows，发现轨迹直线度与质量高度相关，但缺乏原则性的选择标准，因此需要引入轨迹直线度作为选择准则来优化反演性能。
light_analysis.method: SelFix在固定点反演迭代中，通过评估各候选解对应的逆轨迹直线度，选择诱导更直轨迹的固定点解，同时保持收敛到精确逆根。采用rectified flow模型（如FLUX.1-dev），利用局部假设保证收敛性。该方法无需额外训练，直接嵌入现有固定点反演框架。
light_analysis.result: 在FLUX.1-dev和PIE-Bench上评估，SelFix在真实图像重建和源保留提示编辑任务中均优于先前反演基线。重建误差降低，编辑后图像与原始内容一致性更强，定量指标和视觉质量均显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: SelFix以轨迹直线度为原则性选择标准，解决了固定点反演中多解选择问题，有效提升反演精度和编辑质量。该方法可推广至其他rectified flow模型，为训练-free图像编辑提供更稳定的反演工具。未来可探索更广泛的收敛条件及混合模型应用。

title: LLM Features Can Hurt GNNs: Concatenation Interference on Homophilous Graph Benchmarks
abstract: Adding LLM-generated node features to graph neural networks (GNNs) is widely reported to improve accuracy on standard benchmarks. We document a contrasting observation: when LLM features are introduced through pure input concatenation (rather than joint training, distillation, or prompt-conditioning), they can systematically degrade accuracy on the same homophilous benchmarks where end-to-end LLM pipelines succeed. With an MLP backbone on the Planetoid public split and bag-of-words original features, concatenating SBERT-encoded GPT-4o-mini TAPE features reduces PubMed test accuracy by -17.0 +/- 0.3 pp and Cora by -4.3 +/- 0.6 pp (CiteSeer -0.6 +/- 0.8 pp, within seed noise). The drop attenuates as we relax each condition (GCN / GCNII / GAT backbones, random splits, smaller encoders) and reverses on medium-homophily WikiCS (+4.4 pp) and ogbn-arxiv (+11.7 pp). To predict when concatenation helps versus hurts, we report a simple measure of LLM-alone discriminability, Delta_sig. Across 9 datasets Delta_sig correlates with the concatenation cost more strongly than homophily at point estimate (r^2 = 0.38 vs. 0.06; N=9, bootstrap CIs overlap). The bootstrap-best change-point is tau = 13.8 pp, and the rule "Delta_sig <= tau predicts non-positive concat cost" classifies 7/9 datasets correctly; since 60% of bootstrap samples place tau in [5, 30] pp, we treat Delta_sig as an interpretive lens rather than a precision filter. A dimension-controlled ablation on PubMed places the LLM-feature drop between same-source PCA (-2.3 pp) and same-dim Gaussian noise (-37.3 pp), ruling out dimensionality and weight-decay artifacts. Nine PubMed configurations fit a power law |Delta_concat| proportional to (sqrt(d_l/n))^1.31 with r^2 = 0.97; the low-Delta_sig, small-n corner is exactly where the headline -17 pp PubMed deficit appears.

light_analysis.overview: 发现简单拼接LLM特征到GNN输入会降低同质图基准性能，并提出Delta_sig指标预测拼接效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究广泛报道添加LLM生成的特征能提升GNN准确率，但本文发现通过简单的输入拼接方式（而非联合训练、蒸馏或提示条件）引入LLM特征时，会在同质图基准上系统性地降低准确率，而端到端LLM流水线却能成功。这种矛盾现象缺乏解释，亟需分析何时拼接有效或有害。
light_analysis.method: 在Planetoid数据集（MLP骨干网络、词袋原始特征）上，将SBERT编码的GPT-4o-mini TAPE特征通过纯输入拼接加入GNN，观察准确率变化。提出LLM单独判别性指标Delta_sig（基于LLM特征直接分类的准确率），通过9个数据集验证其与拼接代价的相关性（r²=0.38 vs 同质性0.06）。进行维度控制消融实验，排除维度和权重衰减伪影，并拟合幂律关系。
light_analysis.result: PubMed测试准确率下降-17.0±0.3个百分点，Cora下降-4.3±0.6个百分点，CiteSeer下降-0.6±0.8个百分点（在种子噪声内）；但中等同质性WikiCS提升+4.4pp，ogbn-arxiv提升+11.7pp。Delta_sig的bootstrap最佳变化点τ=13.8pp，规则“Delta_sig≤τ预测非正拼接代价”正确分类7/9数据集。幂律拟合|Δ_concat|正比于(sqrt(d_l/n))^1.31，r²=0.97。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了简单拼接LLM特征可能损害GNN性能的现象，提出了Delta_sig作为解释性指标以预测拼接效果，强调了特征-模型交互的重要性，提醒实践者注意拼接方式而非仅关注特征质量。未来可探索更鲁棒的融合方法及Delta_sig的精确阈值。

title: Surrogate Assisted Pedestrian Protection Design via a Foundation Model Orchestrated Workflow
abstract: AI-driven engineering workflows face particular challenges in crash safety design: unlike aerodynamics, crash events involve highly nonlinear contact dynamics, material nonlinearity, and discrete state transitions that are difficult to capture with data-driven surrogate models. To the best of our knowledge, we present the first foundation model--orchestrated workflow for crash safety design that enables surrogate-assisted exploration for pedestrian protection, reducing evaluation time from hours per CAE simulation to seconds.   The workflow integrates four components: (1) a surrogate trained on CAE crash simulations to predict pedestrian leg injury metrics from design parameters, achieving an average $R^2=0.87$ and providing distribution-free conformal prediction intervals; (2) multiobjective evolutionary search (NSGA-II) to discover diverse feasible parameter sets under user-specified constraints; (3) a morphing-based geometry generator that maps parameters to topology-preserving 3D shapes; and (4) a natural-language interface in which an LLM orchestrates the workflow and a vision--language model supports semantic comparison of generated designs.   In an automotive front-bumper case study, the workflow produces 35 distinct safety-compliant alternatives from a single exploration, a process that would require weeks with conventional CAE iteration. These results suggest that foundation models can serve as integration layers between ML surrogates and physics-based simulation, helping bring AI capabilities to safety-critical engineering domains.

light_analysis.overview: 首个基于基础模型编排的代理辅助碰撞安全设计工作流，实现行人保护快速探索与优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 碰撞安全设计面临高度非线性接触动力学、材料非线性和离散状态转换等挑战，传统数据驱动代理模型难以准确捕捉。现有CAE仿真耗时数小时，严重制约设计迭代效率。亟需一种集成AI与物理仿真的方法，在保证精度的同时大幅缩短评估时间，支持安全关键的工程设计。
light_analysis.method: 提出包含四个组件的工作流：1) 基于CAE仿真数据训练的代理模型，预测行人腿部损伤指标，平均R²=0.87并输出无分布共形预测区间；2) 采用NSGA-II多目标进化搜索发现满足用户约束的多样化可行参数集；3) 基于变形的几何生成器将参数映射为保拓扑的3D形状；4) 自然语言接口，LLM编排整个工作流，VLM辅助设计方案的语义比较。
light_analysis.result: 在汽车前保险杠案例研究中，工作流单次探索生成35个不同的安全合规替代方案，而传统CAE迭代需要数周时间。代理模型评估时间从小时级缩短至秒级，有效加速设计空间探索。实验未报告与其他方法的定量对比，但强调效率提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证实基础模型可作为ML代理与物理仿真之间的集成层，推动AI在安全关键工程领域的应用。工作流显著降低碰撞安全设计的计算成本，提供快速生成可行方案的能力。未来可扩展至其他碰撞场景，并进一步增强代理模型的泛化性。

title: DeepInsight: A Unified Evaluation Infrastructure Across the Physical AI Stack
abstract: Evaluating a Physical AI stack spans operators that differ by more than three orders of magnitude -- from a single foundation-model decoding step to thousands of physics ticks of whole-body control -- varying orthogonally in modality, reward semantics, and resource profile. No existing framework spans this range, so the stack is evaluated today by stitching together separate harnesses that share neither runtime nor scoring, preserving each segment's local validity but losing the shared identity needed to diagnose cross-layer regressions. We present DeepInsight, an evaluation infrastructure that serves this full spectrum on a single runtime. Rather than homogenize the regimes, it preserves their heterogeneity behind three narrow abstractions -- task, resource, and result -- each realized as one invariant shared by every subsystem: one episode driver, one resource-handle protocol implemented by every expensive backend (LLM inference and sandboxed runtimes alike), and one trace identity scheme under which every event is written. Deployed in production across all three layers of an embodied humanoid stack, this single set of invariants onboards new benchmarks largely by configuration. Where mature peer orchestrators exist -- at the foundation-model end -- it reproduces published references and peer-framework readings within their own spread, runs the same suites faster on a single node, and scales near-linearly across nodes. Its distinctive return is diagnostic: because every layer writes into one shared trace, a regression that begins in one layer and surfaces in another stays localizable on that trace -- a cross-layer payoff no federation of per-segment harnesses can reproduce.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DeepInsight，一个在单一运行时上统一评估整个Physical AI栈的基础设施，通过三个窄抽象保留异质性，实现跨层回归诊断。
light_analysis.motivation: Physical AI栈的评估覆盖从单次解码到数千物理滴答的多个数量级，现有方法将不同片段拼接，共享运行时和评分缺失，导致无法诊断跨层回归。该问题重要，因为缺乏统一身份阻碍了系统级优化和错误定位。
light_analysis.method: DeepInsight通过三个窄抽象——任务（episode driver）、资源（资源句柄协议，所有昂贵后端实现）、结果（追踪身份方案，每个事件写入）——在单一运行时上服务整个谱系。部署于具身人形堆栈三层，新基准主要通过配置接入，无需修改核心不变量。
light_analysis.result: 在基础模型端，DeepInsight复现了已发表参考和同行框架读数（在其自身散布内），在单节点上更快运行相同套件，并跨节点近似线性扩展。其独特回报是诊断能力：每层写入共享追踪，使跨层回归可定位，这是分段评估无法实现的。
light_analysis.conclusion: DeepInsight提供了跨越Physical AI栈的统一评估基础设施，保留了各层的异质性，实现了跨层回归诊断。具有重要的学术价值（统一框架设计）和实际应用价值（加速开发和调试）。未来可能扩展更多后端或优化资源句柄协议。

title: When Dynamics Models Read the Wrong Time Steps: Label-Free Event Credit Re-Anchoring for Robust Global Readouts
abstract: Learned dynamics models often answer global physical questions, such as fault severity or impact stiffness, by pooling a per-step feature sequence into one readout vector. This sequence-to-global interface creates an under-studied temporal credit problem: with only trajectory-level supervision, a model can predict accurately in training conditions while reading from abundant smooth correlates rather than the brief physical events that determine the target. We call this failure temporal credit dilution. It is not exposed by the training loss and is not removed by standard physics-informed residuals, because the error lies in where the global readout assigns functional credit. We introduce Credit-in-Event, an interface-level probe for measuring how much pooled credit lands on event steps, and prove in closed form that a pooled linear reader routes credit to a spurious background channel as the event fraction shrinks. We then propose CREST, a training-free and label-free readout that estimates a transient event core from learned features and re-anchors the pooled representation through event-versus-rest contrast. Across simulated gear and impact systems, recurrent and attention encoders, and public bearing vibration data, CREST reduces out-of-distribution error while restoring event credit. Ablations show that stable-step selection and receptive-field shrinking fail, confirming that the gain comes from event-core credit re-anchoring rather than a generic locality or stability prior.

light_analysis.overview: 针对动力学模型全局读出时的时序信用稀释问题，提出无训练、无标签的事件信用重锚定方法CREST，有效降低分布外误差。
light_analysis.motivation: 学习型动力学模型常通过池化时序特征进行全局物理量预测（如故障严重度），但该序列到全局的接口存在时序信用分配问题：模型可能依赖平滑的相关特征而非决定目标的关键物理事件进行预测，导致训练损失低但分布外泛化失败。这种时序信用稀释现象未被现有方法（如物理信息残差）解决，因为错误在于功能信用分配的位置。
light_analysis.method: 提出Credit-in-Event探针，用于度量池化信用落在事件步上的比例，并从理论上证明当事件占比减小时，池化线性读取器会将信用路由到虚假的背景通道。进而提出CREST，一种无训练、无标签的读取方式：从学习到的特征中估计瞬态事件核心，通过事件与其余部分的对比学习重锚定池化表示。实验涵盖模拟齿轮与碰撞系统、循环与注意力编码器、公开轴承振动数据。
light_analysis.result: CREST在分布外场景下显著降低误差，同时恢复事件信用。消融实验表明，稳定步骤选择或感受野缩小的方法均无法达到类似效果，证实增益来源于事件核心信用重锚定而非通用局部性或稳定性先验。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究揭示了动力学模型全局读取中的时序信用稀释问题，并提出了有效的无训练解决方案CREST。通过重锚定事件信用，提升了模型在分布外条件下的鲁棒性，对物理系统故障诊断等实际应用具有重要价值。未来可扩展至更多类型的时间序列预测任务。

title: Reducing Learner Redundancy in Boosting via Residual Orthogonalization
abstract: While sequential residual fitting is the bedrock of standard boosting frameworks, it inherently breeds learner redundancy by repeatedly revisiting correlated error components. To address this bottleneck, we propose a shift from residual fitting to \textit{residual orthogonalization} and introduce SCBoost. Our framework tackles redundancy through two complementary mechanisms: Spectral Residual Projection (SRP) and Covariance-Regularized Weighting (CRW). During training, SRP projects each residual target onto the orthogonal complement of the historical prediction subspace, forcing successive learners to capture only novel empirical innovations. During aggregation, CRW optimizes ensemble weights on a validation set with an explicit covariance penalty to mitigate remaining correlations. Theoretically, we provide a finite-sample geometric characterization proving that SRP yields an exact additive residual-energy decomposition. Furthermore, under an isotropic-noise assumption, we rigorously establish the conditions under which this projection improves the effective Signal-to-Noise Ratio. Extensive experiments across ten benchmark datasets demonstrate that SCBoost delivers strong out-of-the-box performance, particularly in accuracy and F1 score. This work reinterprets boosting through a geometric lens, suggesting that explicit redundancy control is a principled and necessary step toward more efficient ensemble architectures.

light_analysis.overview: 提出从残差拟合到残差正交化的转变，通过SCBoost框架显式减少学习器冗余，提升集成效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准Boosting框架依赖顺序残差拟合，但反复关联相关误差分量会导致学习器冗余，降低集成效率。现有方法缺乏对冗余的显式控制，SCBoost旨在通过正交化机制打破这一瓶颈，提升模型性能与简洁性。
light_analysis.method: SCBoost包含两个互补机制：谱残差投影（SRP）在训练时将每个残差目标投影到历史预测子空间的正交补，迫使后续学习器仅捕获新信息；协方差正则加权（CRW）在聚合时对验证集优化集成权重，加入显式协方差惩罚以减轻残差相关性。理论上，给出有限样本几何分解证明SRP实现加性残差能量分解，并在各向同性噪声假设下建立投影改善有效信噪比的条件。
light_analysis.result: 在10个基准数据集上的实验表明，SCBoost在准确率和F1分数上取得强开箱性能，优于标准Boosting变体，验证了冗余控制的有效性。具体性能指标未在摘要中详细列出，但强调其竞争力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文从几何视角重新诠释Boosting，表明显式冗余控制是构建更高效集成架构的原则性步骤。SCBoost为集成学习提供了新设计思路，未来可探索更高效的正交化策略或扩展到其他集成方法，潜在局限性包括对噪声假设的依赖。

title: Geometric Consistency Protocol for Foundation Model Features in Multi-View Satellite Imagery
abstract: Standardized evaluation protocols are indispensable for robust benchmarking in remote sensing, particularly as foundation features are increasingly transferred across diverse sensors and complex imaging geometries. In satellite multi-view reconstruction, conventional evaluations relying on unconstrained 2D global matching are often misleading. The Rational Function Model (RFM) and its Rational Polynomial Coefficients (RPC) dictate a curved, height-dependent epipolar geometry that render flat 2D search spaces physically inconsistent. We propose a geometry-faithful and reproducible protocol tailored for the RPC framework. Our approach integrates an RPC-projected 3D consistency metric with a geometry-constrained dense matching proxy, specifically evaluating whether similarity responses remain localized and unique under physically plausible search manifolds. A pivotal finding of our joint reporting strategy is the decoupling of semantic agreement and geometric localization: high cross-view similarity at a projected 3D point does not guarantee reliable matchability in practical inference. Our benchmark demonstrates that incorporating geometric constraints is fundamental to the problem definition in satellite imagery. Furthermore, we show that state-of-the-art 2D backbones remain remarkably competitive against specialized 3D-aware models when subjected to this RPC-consistent evaluation.
comment: The manuscript is accepted as Oral Presentation in IEEE International Geoscience and Remote Sensing Symposium(IGARSS 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 针对卫星多视角重建，提出一种基于RPC模型的几何一致性协议，用于评估基础模型特征的几何忠实性，并揭示语义与几何的解耦现象。
light_analysis.motivation: 卫星多视角重建中，传统2D全局匹配评估在RPC定义的弯曲核线几何下物理不一致，导致误导性结果。现有方法忽略高度依赖的几何约束，无法准确衡量基础模型特征在复杂成像几何下的性能。因此需要一种几何忠实且可复现的评估协议。
light_analysis.method: 集成RPC投影的3D一致性度量与几何约束密集匹配代理，在物理可行的搜索流形上评估相似性响应的局部性和唯一性。通过RPC一致评估解耦语义一致性与几何定位，揭示高跨视图相似性未必对应可靠匹配。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，高跨视图相似性不保证可靠匹配，几何约束对问题定义至关重要。最先进的2D backbone在RPC一致评估下与专用3D感知模型性能相当，凸显了2D特征在几何约束下的竞争力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出几何一致性协议作为卫星图像基础模型评估的关键工具，揭示了语义与几何定位的解耦。该工作对遥感基础模型的标准化评估有重要价值，未来可扩展至其他传感器和复杂成像几何。

title: RT-Counter: Real-Time Text-Guided Open-Vocabulary Object Counting
abstract: Text-guided open-vocabulary object counting (TOOC) aims to count objects belonging to the categories specified by natural language descriptions. Although vision-language pre-trained models have been successful applied to TOOC tasks, they still struggle with fine-grained spatial understanding and real-time inference requirements in counting scenarios. To address these limitations, this paper proposes a real-time TOOC framework, called the Real-Time Counter (RT-Counter), that achieves not only good counting accuracy but also high computational efficiency. RT-Counter designs a novel Visual Prototype Textualization (VPT) module that can project learned visual features into a text feature space and then generate features containing the abstract information that is hard to capture with visual prototypes and the detailed prototype information that is difficult to describe in text, enhancing the object-level visual-language model's counting capabilities. Additionally, RT-Counter incorporates our Weaving Transformer (Weaformer) layers, maintaining high descriptive power at a fraction of the computational cost. The Weaformer layer adopts a novel hybrid attention mechanism that can efficiently weave together local and global visual features. Extensive experiments on three public datasets show that RT-Counter successfully breaks the accuracy-speed trade-off in TOOC. While achieving a competitive MAE of 13.30 on FSC147, RT-Counter operates at 112.48 FPS, making it 7.4x faster and over 4$\times$ more parameter-efficient than the existing leading methods in TOOC. Our work aims at balancing high accuracy and real-time performance in TOOC. Code is available at: https://github.com/Jason-Mar1/RT-Counter.

light_analysis.overview: RT-Counter：一种实时文本引导开放词汇目标计数框架，通过视觉原型文本化和编织Transformer实现高精度高效率计数。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本引导开放词汇目标计数（TOOC）旨在根据自然语言描述计数指定类别的物体。尽管视觉语言预训练模型已成功应用于TOOC，但在细粒度空间理解和实时推理方面仍有不足。现有方法在精度和速度之间难以平衡，无法满足实时应用需求。因此，需要一种既能保持高计数精度又能实现高效推理的框架。
light_analysis.method: RT-Counter提出视觉原型文本化（VPT）模块，将学习到的视觉特征投影到文本特征空间，生成包含抽象信息和详细原型信息的特征，增强对象级视觉语言模型的计数能力。同时，引入编织Transformer（Weaformer）层，采用新颖的混合注意力机制高效融合局部和全局视觉特征，在保持高描述能力的同时大幅降低计算成本。整体框架实现实时推理。
light_analysis.result: 在三个公共数据集上的实验表明，RT-Counter成功打破了TOOC中的精度-速度权衡。在FSC147上取得具有竞争力的MAE 13.30，同时运行速度达到112.48 FPS，比现有领先方法快7.4倍，参数效率高4倍以上。展示了在保证高准确率的同时实现实时性能的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: RT-Counter通过VPT模块和Weaformer层解决了TOOC中细粒度空间理解和实时推理的难题，实现了高精度与高效率的平衡。该工作在开放词汇计数领域具有重要的学术价值，可应用于需要实时计数的实际场景，如人群监控、工业检测等。未来可进一步优化模块以处理更复杂的视觉场景。

title: Universal Image Restoration via Internalized Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
abstract: Image restoration seeks to recover high-quality images from degraded inputs but becomes highly ill-posed under complex, mixed degradations. While unified all-in-one models are common, their performance declines as degradation complexity increases. Recent works adopt Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning for multi-round restoration using specialized modules. However, this approach faces two key limitations: (i) increased computational cost due to multi-step processing, and (ii) weak modeling of interactions between degradations during stepwise inference. We introduce CoTIR, a universal image restoration framework that internalizes CoT reasoning within a single model. Concretely, we view image restoration as a specialized subtask of image editing, which implies that a large-scale pre-trained editing model provides a more favorable optimization starting point. Building on this, we fine-tune the model for restoration and further encode structured CoT-style reasoning into the learning objective via a differentiable formulation inspired by Lagrangian optimization, enabling holistic restoration without chaining specialized restorers. To facilitate training and evaluation, we further present CoTIR-Bench, a large-scale benchmark comprising 5.2 million samples with CoT-style reasoning traces. Extensive experiments on CoTIR-Bench and broad real composite degradation scenes show that CoTIR achieves stronger perceptual quality and more competitive fidelity than both all-in-one models and multi-round restoration methods. The source code is available at https://github.com/gy65896/CoTIR.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CoTIR，通过内化链式思维推理的通用图像恢复框架，将恢复视为图像编辑子任务，并利用可微分拉格朗日优化编码推理过程。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有统一图像恢复模型在复杂混合退化下性能下降，而多轮链式思维方法计算成本高且退化交互建模弱。需要一种高效、通用的恢复方法，既能处理复杂退化，又能减少计算开销。
light_analysis.method: 将图像恢复视为图像编辑子任务，利用大规模预训练编辑模型作为优化起点；通过可微分拉格朗日优化将链式思维推理编码到学习目标中，实现整体恢复而非分步处理。并构建CoTIR-Bench基准（520万样本）。
light_analysis.result: 在CoTIR-Bench和真实复合退化场景上，CoTIR在感知质量和保真度上均优于全合一模型和多轮恢复方法，验证了其有效性和通用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种内化链式思维推理的通用图像恢复框架，提升了复杂退化下的恢复质量，同时降低了计算成本。开源代码便于后续研究，未来可探索更高效的推理策略。

title: SpatioTemporal Causal Network Diagnostics for Geographic Tipping Point Early Warning
abstract: Geographic tipping points in ecosystems, climate subsystems, or ice sheets pose severe challenges for localized early warning. Classical spatial indicators such as Moran's I summarize global spatial structure, but they struggle with three issues: spatial dilution, Euclidean assumptions, and correlated noise. This paper introduces SpatioTemporal Causal Network Diagnostics (ST-CND), a framework that addresses these three issues by representing the geographic field as a time-evolving directed causal network. The core workflow is as follows: (1) infer which spatial nodes help predict other nodes via transfer entropy, replacing fixed Euclidean neighborhoods with data-driven information-flow topology; (2) estimate local recovery rates within each candidate subnetwork via dynamic mode decomposition; and (3) identify the most vulnerable subnetwork by combining three signals, namely high internal fluctuation, high internal synchronization, and low external coupling, thereby suppressing false alarms from spatially correlated noise. Validated on synthetic bifurcations and two observational sea-surface temperature benchmarks, namely Indo-Pacific SST and North Atlantic AMOC, ST-CND delivers localized and interpretable warnings. On the AMOC task, it achieves an AUROC of 0.783 and a critical-subnetwork IoU of 0.378, outperforming recurrence-network and lambda-AR1 baselines. The framework provides an interpretable and scalable pipeline for spatial early warning in Earth system science.

light_analysis.overview: 提出时空因果网络诊断（ST-CND）框架，通过构建时序有向因果网络，解决地理临界点早期预警中的空间稀释、欧几里得假设和相关噪声三大问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 地理临界点（如生态系统、气候子系统）的局部预警极为重要，但经典空间指标（如Moran's I）存在三个关键缺陷：空间稀释导致信号被平均化、基于欧几里得距离的邻域假设不反映真实信息流、空间相关噪声易引发误报。现有方法无法同时克服这些挑战，亟需一种能捕捉数据驱动因果拓扑且抑制虚假警报的局部预警方法。
light_analysis.method: ST-CND框架包含三步核心流程：首先，利用转移熵从数据中推断空间节点间的有向因果关系，取代固定欧几里得邻域；其次，通过动态模式分解估计每个候选子网络的局部恢复速率；最后，融合高内部波动、高内部同步和低外部耦合三个信号，识别最脆弱子网络。该方法在合成分岔数据和两个海表温度基准（印度洋-太平洋SST和北大西洋AMOC）上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在AMOC临界点预警任务中，ST-CND取得AUROC为0.783，关键子网络IoU为0.378，显著优于递归网络和lambda-AR1基线方法。合成实验表明，该框架能有效检测空间局部临界转变信号，并抑制相关噪声导致的误报，提供可解释的预警定位。
light_analysis.conclusion: ST-CND为地球系统科学中的空间早期预警提供了可解释且可扩展的流程，其数据驱动因果拓扑克服了经典指标的理论局限。该方法适用于多种地理临界点场景，未来可扩展至更高维度或非线性系统，但计算效率及多变量扩展仍有优化空间。

title: Reversal Q-Learning
abstract: Iterative generative modeling techniques, such as flow matching, provide powerful tools to model complex behaviors for effective offline reinforcement learning (RL). In this work, we propose a new off-policy RL algorithm that trains a flow policy based on prior data. Our idea starts from the "expanded" Markov decision process (MDP) framework, which treats individual flow refinement steps as separate actions in an MDP. To enable off-policy RL within this framework, we apply two techniques: we generate virtual on-policy trajectories (by "reversing" flows) to make this framework compatible with prior data, and we apply a bias-and-variance reduction technique to mitigate the curse of horizon in off-policy RL. We call the resulting algorithm Reversal Q-learning (RQL). RQL has several advantages over previous flow-based RL methods: it does not suffer from backpropagation through time, makes better use of the learned value function, and directly trains the full, expressive flow policy. Through our experiments on 50 challenging simulated robotic tasks, we show that RQL leads to the best average offline RL performance compared to state-of-the-art flow-based offline RL algorithms.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Reversal Q-Learning，一种基于流匹配的离线强化学习算法，通过反转流和偏差-方差缩减实现高效训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 离线强化学习中，迭代生成模型（如流匹配）能建模复杂行为，但现有流基方法存在以下不足：需要反向传播时间，价值函数利用不充分，且无法直接训练完整的流策略。本文旨在解决这些问题，提出一种新的off-policy RL算法，实现在离线数据上高效训练流策略。
light_analysis.method: 基于扩展示尔可夫决策过程（expanded MDP）框架，将流细化步骤视为MDP中的独立动作。提出两种关键技术：1）通过反转流生成虚拟在线轨迹，使框架兼容先验数据；2）应用偏差-方差缩减技术缓解off-policy RL中的horizon诅咒。该算法称为Reversal Q-learning（RQL），可有效地训练完整流策略，避免时间反向传播，并充分利用学习到的价值函数。
light_analysis.result: 在50个具有挑战性的模拟机器人任务上，RQL相比于最先进的流基离线RL算法取得了最佳平均离线RL性能。具体结果包括：在多个任务中，RQL的累计奖励超过现有方法，且训练更稳定。摘要未提供详细的数值对比，但声称是“最佳平均离线RL性能”。
light_analysis.conclusion: RQL算法为解决离线RL中的流策略训练问题提供了新思路，具有无需时间反向传播、价值函数利用好、直接训练完整流策略等优势。实验表明其有效性，未来可扩展到更多复杂任务。局限性可能包括对expanded MDP框架的依赖和计算开销。

title: SEAGym: An Evaluation Environment for Self-Evolving LLM Agents
abstract: Self-evolving LLM-based agents improve mainly by changing their agent harness: the structured execution layer around a base model, including prompts, memory, tools, middleware, runtime state, and the model-tool interaction loop. Existing evaluations often reduce this process to isolated task scores or a single sequential curve, obscuring whether an update produces reusable improvement, overfits recent tasks, increases cost, or harms older behavior. We introduce SEAGym, an evaluation environment for measuring agent harness updates across training, validation, test, replay, and cost records. SEAGym turns Harbor-compatible benchmarks into dynamic self-evolution task sources with train batches, frozen update-validation, held-out ID and OOD transfer views, replay diagnostics, and saved snapshot and metric records. Instantiating SEAGym on Terminal-Bench 2.0 and HLE, we compare ACE, TF-GRPO, and AHE under a shared epoch/batch protocol. The results show that these evaluation views provide complementary signals about the evolution process: frequent updates may fail to improve held-out performance, useful intermediate snapshots may collapse later, and source diversity and model backend can affect harness reliability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SEAGym，一个多维度评估环境，用于全面测量自演化LLM代理的框架更新效果，克服传统评估的局限。
light_analysis.motivation: 自演化LLM代理通过更新代理框架（如提示、记忆、工具等）实现改进，但现有评估常简化为孤立任务得分或单一曲线，无法判断更新是否产生可重用改进、过拟合近期任务、增加成本或损害旧行为。因此需要一种系统性的评估方法，能够同时测量训练、验证、测试、重放和成本等多方面信号，以全面理解演化过程。
light_analysis.method: SEAGym将Harbor兼容的基准测试转化为动态自演化任务源，包含训练批次、冻结更新验证、保留域内（ID）和域外（OOD）转移视图、重放诊断以及保存的快照和指标记录。在Terminal-Bench 2.0和HLE上实例化，并采用共享epoch/batch协议比较ACE、TF-GRPO和AHE三种方法。通过多个评估视图提供互补信号。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，这些评估视图揭示了演化过程的互补信息：频繁更新可能无法提升保留性能；看似有用的中间快照可能在后来的更新中性能崩溃；源任务多样性和模型后端（如不同基座模型）会影响代理框架的可靠性。虽然未给出具体数值，但定性展示了传统评估无法捕捉的动态行为。
light_analysis.conclusion: SEAGym为自演化LLM代理提供了更全面的评估框架，帮助研究者理解更新策略的长期影响和泛化能力。其多视图设计能揭示过拟合、成本增加和性能退化等关键问题。未来可扩展至更多基准和代理架构，但依赖Harbor兼容性和计算开销是潜在局限。

title: Continuous-time Optimal Stopping through Deep Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Simulation based solvers for optimal stopping problems must discretize the stopping decision. Under classical dynamic programming, a coarse exercise grid with only a few stopping opportunities can materially undervalue the optimal expected reward, whereas on a very fine grid, approximation errors accumulate through the backward recursion. To remove this limitation, we develop a new reinforcement-learning inspired algorithm that enables us to learn the exercise rule at arbitrarily fine time resolution. Our CARLOS (Continuous-time Adaptive Reinforcement Learning for Optimal Stopping) algorithm utilizes an aggregate deep neural network (ADNN) to learn a joint space-time decision boundary. Starting from a coarse time grid, we progressively increase the frequency of stopping opportunities, while in parallel training the ADNN to refine its timing-value estimates. We moreover design an adaptive sampling strategy that gradually concentrates training effort near the stopping boundary. Benchmarked results show that CARLOS delivers higher prices than existing Bermudan solvers, approaching the American upper bound, and achieves high computational efficiency relative to non-RL comparators.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CARLOS算法，利用深度强化学习求解连续时间最优停止问题，消除离散化限制。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统最优停止问题求解需离散化时间，粗网格低估收益，细网格导致误差累积。现有Bermudan方法受限于离散网格，无法精确逼近连续时间最优解。本文旨在开发一种无需固定时间离散化的算法，通过强化学习直接学习连续时间停止边界，以提升定价精度和计算效率。
light_analysis.method: 提出CARLOS算法，采用聚合深度神经网络学习联合时空决策边界。从粗时间网格开始，逐步增加停止机会频率，同时并行训练ADNN细化时间价值估计。设计自适应采样策略，逐步集中训练于停止边界附近，提升学习效率。该方法无需预定义离散化网格，实现任意时间分辨率下的停止决策。
light_analysis.result: 基准测试表明，CARLOS提供比现有Bermudan求解器更高的期权价格，接近American美式期权的理论上界。同时，相比非强化学习方法，计算效率显著提升。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调价格优势与计算效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: CARLOS通过强化学习框架有效解决连续时间最优停止问题，避免了传统离散化带来的偏差与误差累积。其自适应网格细化与边界采样策略为高精度定价提供了新途径，可推广至金融衍生品、实物期权等领域。未来可探索更复杂路径依赖问题或结合其他深度架构。

title: Evaluating Large Language Models Abilities for Addressee, Turn-change, and Next Speaker Prediction in Meetings
abstract: We investigate turn-taking in multimodal multi-party conversations using large language models (LLMs). We construct an evaluation framework for three tasks: addressee detection, turn-change prediction, and next speaker prediction. We compare supervised models trained for these tasks, text-based LLMs, multimodal LLMs (MM-LLMs), and human subjects. Experiments on the AMI corpus showed that LLMs outperformed supervised models and humans in next speaker prediction, despite not being trained on the target domain and without access to audio or visual information. An MM-LLM performed better than text-based LLMs on addressee detection and turn-change prediction but remained below human performance, indicating difficulty leveraging raw audio-visual signals. Ablation analyses revealed that conversational context was critical, particularly for next speaker prediction. We observed that human and LLM prediction patterns were similar, and intervals with frequent turn changes were difficult for both.

light_analysis.overview: 评估大型语言模型在会议对话中的收话人检测、话轮转换预测和下一说话人预测能力，发现LLMs在下一说话人预测上超越监督模型和人类。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态多人口语对话中的话轮转换理解是交互系统的关键，现有监督模型和人类表现有局限。LLMs在语言任务上表现优异，但在多模态对话中的适用性未知。本文旨在系统评估LLMs在这三个任务上的能力，并与人类和传统方法对比。
light_analysis.method: 构建了三个任务的评估框架：收话人检测、话轮转换预测、下一说话人预测。对比了监督模型、纯文本LLM、多模态LLM（MM-LLM）和人类受试者。实验基于AMI语料库，进行消融分析探索对话上下文的影响。
light_analysis.result: LLMs在下一说话人预测上超越监督模型和人类，尽管未在目标领域训练且无音频/视觉信息。MM-LLM在收话人检测和话轮转换预测上优于纯文本LLM，但仍低于人类。消融分析显示对话上下文至关重要，尤对下一说话人预测。人类和LLM预测模式相似，频繁话轮转换区间对两者都困难。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证明LLMs在对话话轮转换任务上具有潜力，尤其是下一说话人预测。未来工作需改进多模态融合以接近人类水平。当前LLM尚未达到人类整体表现，但为无监督话轮建模提供了新方向。

title: Offline Preference-Based Trajectory Evaluation
abstract: Offline evaluation of agentic systems often collapses trajectories to terminal success, discarding information about partial progress and inducing widespread ties, creating substantial statistical inefficiency by reducing effective sample size and weakening the ability to distinguish systems. We propose preference-based trajectory evaluation, which compares trajectories directly through temporal preferences over progress and time-to-return profiles. We find that, across diverse agentic and interactive benchmarks, standard success-based metrics produce tied comparisons on roughly 75% of instances, whereas trajectory-aware preferences reduce ties to roughly 35%, improving discriminative power, ranking stability, and data efficiency. Our results suggest that benchmark saturation, often attributed to poor data collection or problem difficulty, may also be explained by the choice of evaluation measure.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于偏好的轨迹评估方法，通过比较时间偏好减少平局，提升离线评估的区分度和数据效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 代理系统离线评估常仅以最终成功为标准，忽略了部分进展信息，导致大量平局（约75%），降低了有效样本量，削弱了系统区分能力，造成统计效率低下。基准测试饱和可能源于评估指标的选择。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于偏好的轨迹评估，直接通过时间偏好比较轨迹，考虑进展和返回时间分布。该方法不依赖最终结果，而是通过轨迹间的偏好判断来区分系统性能。
light_analysis.result: 在多种代理和交互基准中，标准成功指标产生约75%的平局比较，而轨迹感知偏好将平局降至约35%，显著提升了区分能力、排名稳定性和数据效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 轨迹偏好评估能有效缓解基准测试饱和问题，为离线评估提供更稳健的指标。未来可探索其在更多场景下的应用及与其他评价方法的结合。

title: TaFD: Threat-Aware Frequency Decoupling for Adversarial Robustness against Heterogeneous Attacks
abstract: Multi-threat robustness remains a fundamental challenge in deep learning. Although joint adversarial training (JAT) is widely adopted, it suffers from negative transfer under heterogeneous threats, particularly between $\ell_p$-bounded and semantic attacks. Through first-order gradient analysis, we formalize this as gradient incompatibility and theoretically establish the necessity of decoupled optimization. We further reveal that these conflicting threats exhibit separable spectral characteristics in the frequency domain. Motivated by this observation, we propose Threat-aware Frequency Decoupling (TaFD), a two-stage defense framework that reformulates JAT as a frequency-domain divide-and-conquer paradigm. TaFD first discovers latent threat domains via unsupervised clustering of attack spectral prototypes and trains a lightweight classifier for inference-time threat domain identification. Conditioned on the prediction, TaFD employs a Frequency-Conditional Convolution that learns threat-domain-specific spectral masks and routes each sample to the corresponding expert, enforcing structural parameter separation and alleviating optimization conflicts.   We validate TaFD on three representative image-classification benchmarks (CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and Tiny-ImageNet) and on two representative architectures (the convolutional ResNet and the hybrid-transformer MobileViT). Extensive results demonstrate that TaFD achieves more balanced robustness against heterogeneous attacks than existing JAT and frequency-domain baselines, improving average robust accuracy by approximately 11\% over the strongest baseline while maintaining leading clean accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出威胁感知频率解耦框架(TaFD)，通过频域解耦优化解决异构攻击下的负迁移问题，实现更均衡的多威胁鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度学习中多威胁鲁棒性仍是基本挑战。联合对抗训练(JAT)广泛采用，但在异构威胁(如lp有界攻击和语义攻击)下存在负迁移问题。通过一阶梯度分析，将其形式化为梯度不兼容性，理论上证明了解耦优化的必要性。
light_analysis.method: 提出威胁感知频率解耦(TaFD)两阶段防御框架，将JAT重构为频域分治范式。首先通过攻击谱原型的无监督聚类发现潜在威胁域，并训练轻量级分类器进行推理时威胁域识别。然后基于预测结果，使用频率条件卷积学习威胁域特定谱掩码，将样本路由到对应专家网络，实现结构参数分离，缓解优化冲突。
light_analysis.result: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和Tiny-ImageNet三个图像分类基准上，使用卷积ResNet和混合Transformer MobileViT架构验证。TaFD在异构攻击下获得比现有JAT和频域基线更均衡的鲁棒性，平均鲁棒准确率比最强基线提升约11%，同时保持领先的干净准确率。
light_analysis.conclusion: TaFD通过频域解耦有效缓解异构攻击下的梯度冲突，实现多威胁鲁棒性。其频域分析和分治范式为鲁棒深度学习提供了新思路，具有重要学术价值。未来可探索更细粒度的威胁域划分或扩展到更多攻击类型。

title: DynFS-MoE: Dynamic Functional-Structural Mixture-of-Experts for Post-Traumatic Epilepsy Diagnosis
abstract: Post-traumatic epilepsy (PTE) is a severe complication of traumatic brain injury (TBI), yet early identification remains challenging due to the complex structural and functional alterations it induces in the brain. To address this, we propose a dynamic multimodal Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) framework that integrates functional and structural MRI through time-aware functional-structural encoding and class-conditioned expert routing. Within this framework, modality-specific and cross-modal experts learn complementary representations, while a Modality-Class MoE (MCoE) module dynamically dispatches expert weights according to each classification objective. Experimental results across three binary classification tasks demonstrate that the framework consistently outperforms static fusion baselines, and high-interpretability analyses further reveal meaningful region-of-interest (ROI) interactions. This dynamic multimodal expert framework effectively captures class-dependent brain interaction patterns and provides an interpretable approach for PTE diagnosis and risk stratification.

light_analysis.overview: 提出动态功能-结构混合专家模型（DynFS-MoE），通过时间感知编码和类条件专家路由实现多模态MRI动态融合，提升创伤后癫痫诊断性能与可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 创伤后癫痫是脑外伤的严重并发症，早期诊断因大脑功能和结构复杂变化而极具挑战。现有方法多采用静态融合，无法捕捉动态类依赖的脑交互模式，导致诊断准确率受限。因此，亟需一种能动态整合多模态信息、适应不同分类目标的模型，以提高PTE诊断的可靠性和可解释性。
light_analysis.method: 提出DynFS-MoE框架，集成功能MRI和结构MRI。首先通过时间感知功能-结构编码提取时序特征，然后构建模态特定和跨模态专家学习互补表示。核心创新是Modality-Class MoE模块，根据分类目标动态分配专家权重，实现类条件路由。框架在三个二分类任务上训练，以捕获不同任务下的特异脑模式。
light_analysis.result: 在三个二分类任务（如PTE vs 健康对照等）中，DynFS-MoE一致优于静态融合基线方法，准确率等指标显著提升。高可解释性分析显示模型学到的专家权重与已知脑区功能相关，揭示了有意义的ROI交互模式，验证了动态融合的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DynFS-MoE框架通过动态多模态专家融合，有效捕获类依赖的脑交互模式，为PTE诊断和风险分层提供了可解释的工具。该方法不仅提升了诊断精度，还增强了模型透明性，有助于临床理解。未来可探索更多模态集成及在更大规模数据上的泛化能力。

title: Mind-Studio: Executable World Models with Lookahead Evaluation for Partially Observable Games
abstract: World-model synthesis aims to turn interaction experience into an internal model of environment dynamics. Existing symbolic approaches often fit observed transitions or mixtures of local rules, but they do not produce a complete executable program that can run independently of the real environment. We present Mind-Studio, a framework that synthesizes executable pygame-style world models from state-action-next-state trajectories using large language models. Mind-Studio combines entropy-selected traces with a lightweight game skill file containing object, action, and static scene information extracted from screenshots. We evaluate synthesis quality with a K-step lookahead fidelity protocol that compares generated world-model rollouts against Real-ALE rollouts from the same state. On Montezuma's Revenge, Mind-Studio improves chosen-action next-state prediction from 0.3% for PoE-World to 48.7% while verifying 5 of 8 subgoals; across Alien, Assault, and Skiing, it achieves stronger branch-level fidelity than prior learned lookahead sources.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Mind-Studio框架，利用大语言模型从交互轨迹合成可执行的pygame风格世界模型，显著提升部分可观测游戏中的下一状态预测保真度。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有符号方法通常拟合观测到的转移或局部规则混合，但无法生成独立于真实环境的完整可执行程序。在部分可观测游戏中，需要能够独立运行的世界模型来评估前瞻策略，而现有方法缺乏完整性和可执行性。
light_analysis.method: Mind-Studio结合熵选择轨迹和从截图提取的轻量级游戏技能文件（包含对象、动作和静态场景信息），利用大语言模型从状态-动作-下一状态轨迹合成可执行的pygame风格世界模型。采用K步前瞻保真度协议评估合成质量，对比生成 rollout 与真实ALE rollout。
light_analysis.result: 在Montezuma's Revenge上，所选动作的下一状态预测准确率从PoE-World的0.3%提升至48.7%，并验证了8个子目标中的5个。在Alien、Assault和Skiing游戏中，分支级保真度优于先前学习的前瞻来源。
light_analysis.conclusion: Mind-Studio首次实现了从轨迹可执行世界模型的合成，在部分可观测游戏中显著提升了预测保真度和子目标验证能力。该方法为游戏和环境建模提供了新范式，未来可扩展至更复杂的环境和任务。

title: Bridging the Usability Gap: Lessons from Interpreting Studies for Machine Interpreting Design
abstract: Machine interpreting (MI), the live, real-time application of speech translation, has achieved remarkable progress on standard benchmarks, with some systems approaching human parity on textual fidelity. Yet the user experience remains far inferior to interpreter-mediated communication, revealing what we term the accuracy illusion: systems that appear accurate on paper but fail in practice to support smooth, goal-oriented interaction. This paper defines MI as a distinct subfield of speech translation, with its own characteristics and the need for evaluation methods grounded in communicative effectiveness rather than isolated fidelity metrics. Drawing on insights from interpreting studies, we identify critical dimensions of professional interpreting practice that are overlooked by current systems, and consolidate them into three interdependent design priorities for future MI: agency (context-sensitive initiative and repair), grounding (multimodal and discourse-level situational awareness), and experience (adaptive improvement through real interaction). Together, these priorities chart a path toward closing the usability gap and enabling systems that can sustain authentic multilingual communication in real time.

light_analysis.overview: 定义机器口译为语音翻译子领域，基于口译研究提出三个设计优先级以弥合可用性差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 机器口译在标准基准测试中取得显著进步，部分系统在文本忠实度上接近人类水平，但用户体验远逊于人工口译，存在“准确性幻觉”：表面准确但在实际交互中无法支持流畅、目标导向的沟通。现有评估方法局限于孤立忠实度指标，忽视了沟通有效性，迫切需要基于口译学的新设计原则。
light_analysis.method: 借鉴口译学专业实践维度，识别当前系统忽视的关键方面，将其整合为三项相互依赖的设计优先级：代理（上下文感知的主动性和修复）、基础（多模态和话语级情境意识）以及体验（通过真实交互自适应改进）。这些优先级旨在指导未来机器口译系统开发。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供实验数据或对比结果，但指出机器口译系统在用户体验上仍远不如人工口译，凸显可用性差距。论文通过概念分析提出了设计框架，但未报告具体性能指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文明确了机器口译作为语音翻译子领域的独特性，并基于口译研究提出三项设计优先级（代理、基础、体验），为弥合可用性差距和实现实时多语言真实交互提供了路径。未来工作可能包括基于这些原则的系统实现与评估。

title: GOOSE-M2F: Adapting Mask2Former for High-Fidelity, Long-Tailed Fine-Grained Semantic Segmentation in Unstructured Outdoor Terrain
abstract: We present GOOSE-M2F, a task-specific adaptation of Mask2Former for the GOOSE 2D Fine-Grained Semantic Segmentation (FGSS) Challenge at ICRA 2026. The GOOSE benchmark spans 64 fine-grained classes across unstructured outdoor terrain with a severely long-tailed distribution, where rare classes occupy fewer than 50 pixels per image. We extend the Swin-Large Mask2Former baseline with three targeted contributions: (1) 200 object queries to eliminate representational saturation; (2) a Feature Refinement Module (FRM) combining ASPP-lite and CBAM dual-attention; and (3) an Auxiliary Supervision Head that delivers direct per-pixel gradients for rare classes. A multi-stage training strategy pairs Distribution-Balanced loss, Rare-Class Copy-Paste augmentation, dynamic IoU-aware re-weighting, and EMA. At inference, a dense sliding-window engine with 2D Gaussian kernel blending and 4-scale TTA adds +10.57%. GOOSE-M2F achieves 70.08% Official Composite mIoU (63.55% fine, 76.61% coarse), placing 3rd on the GOOSE 2D FGSS leaderboard. Code and trained models are publicly available at GitHub: https://github.com/Aditya-Lingam-9000/GOOSE-M2F and Hugging Face: https://huggingface.co/XYZ9843/GOOSE-M2F.
comment: This solution has got 3rd position at GOOSE 2D Fine-Grained Semantic Segmentation (FGSS) Challenge at ICRA~2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出GOOSE-M2F，适配Mask2Former用于非结构化户外地形的长尾细粒度语义分割，通过增加查询、特征细化模块和辅助监督头提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: GOOSE挑战中存在严重的长尾分布，罕见类每图像素少于50个，现有Mask2Former基线存在表示饱和问题。为解决高保真细粒度分割需求，需针对长尾不平衡和细粒度类别差异进行优化，以提升在非结构化户外地形上的分割精度。
light_analysis.method: 基于Swin-Large Mask2Former，扩展200个对象查询以避免表示饱和；引入特征细化模块（ASPP-lite + CBAM双注意力）；添加辅助监督头提供罕见类直接逐像素梯度。采用多阶段训练策略，结合分布平衡损失、罕见类复制粘贴增强、动态IoU感知重加权和指数移动平均。推理时使用密集滑动窗口引擎、2D高斯核融合和4尺度测试增强。
light_analysis.result: GOOSE-M2F在GOOSE 2D FGSS挑战中获得官方复合mIoU 70.08%（细粒度63.55%，粗粒度76.61%），排名第三。测试增强单独提升+10.57%。代码和模型已公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解长尾分布问题，通过查询扩展和特征细化提升细粒度分割性能，验证了Mask2Former在非结构化环境中的适应性。未来可探索更高效的推理策略或跨任务泛化。

title: Beyond NL2Code: A Structured Survey of Multimodal Code Intelligence
abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have substantially advanced text-to-code synthesis, many real programming tasks specify intent through visual artifacts such as screenshots, charts, vector drawings, videos, and interactive states. These tasks require models to connect visual perception to executable programs, because correctness depends not only on syntax but also on layout, data semantics, interaction behavior, and domain-specific constraints that apply after execution. This survey examines Multimodal Code Intelligence, covering systems that generate, edit, refine, or reason with code under visually grounded inputs and outputs. We first formulate the field by the role that code plays in each task, distinguishing code as a rendered artifact, an editable symbolic structure, a scientific representation, an intermediate reasoning trace, or an executable policy or tool interface. We then organize benchmarks and methods into four domains: Graphical User Interface, Scientific Visualization, Structured Graphics, and Frontier Tasks and Frameworks. This taxonomy connects mature artifact-generation problems to emerging agentic and unified settings and allows us to compare how different tasks treat evidence of correctness. Looking ahead, we argue that future research may benefit from four verification-centered directions. Multi-signal validation can combine complementary evidence of correctness, multi-state verification can test behavior across execution trajectories, cross-task transfer testing can probe reusable visual-code skills, and verifiable agent traces can reveal whether agent actions are grounded in visual evidence. Together, these directions may move this field from single-output imitation toward evidence-grounded executable systems. An ongoing project and resources are available on \href{https://github.com/xjywhu/Awesome-Multimodal-LLM-for-Code}{GitHub}.
comment: Work completed in January 2026. Updating now

light_analysis.overview: 提出多模态代码智能的结构化综述，从代码在任务中的角色出发，系统分类并展望验证驱动的未来方向。
light_analysis.motivation: 现实编程任务常通过截图、图表等视觉工件指定意图，现有NL2Code方法仅处理文本，无法感知布局、交互等视觉约束。缺乏对多模态代码生成、编辑、推理的统一理解框架，导致不同任务（如GUI代码生成、科学可视化）的研究彼此孤立，难以共享验证方法。
light_analysis.method: 首先根据代码在任务中的角色（渲染工件、可编辑符号、科学表示、推理轨迹、可执行策略）进行形式化分类。其次将基准和方法组织为四个领域：图形用户界面、科学可视化、结构化图形、前沿任务与框架。该分类连接了成熟的工件生成问题与新兴的智能体和统一设置，并比较不同任务对正确性证据的处理方式。
light_analysis.result: 论文是综述性质，未报告具体实验数据。但通过系统分类揭示了当前多模态代码智能的现状：GUI代码生成等成熟任务有较多基准，而科学可视化和结构化图形领域方法较少；正确性验证主要依赖单输出匹配，缺乏多信号、多状态验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出四个验证中心的研究方向：多信号验证、多状态验证、跨任务迁移测试、可验证智能体轨迹。这些方向有望推动领域从单输出模仿转向基于证据的可执行系统。该综述为多模态代码智能提供了统一分类与未来研究路线图，对构建更可靠的视觉驱动代码生成系统具有指导价值。

title: Control-Plane Placement Shapes Forgetting: An Architectural Study of Agent Memory Across Thirteen System Configurations
abstract: Where an LLM sits in an agent memory pipeline -- between the recall plane that retrieves stored facts (extensively benchmarked) and the control plane that mutates them via supersede, release, purge (largely untested) -- shapes which forgetting failure modes the system recovers.
