Comparing thirteen system configurations on a 385-case adversarial surface, we observe three placement regimes with partly complementary coverage: deterministic primitives suffice for lexical/temporal categories but fail canonicalization (5% on identifier-obfuscation, 0% on cross-lingual); inscribe-time LLM recovers canonicalization (100%) but cannot help intent-aware deletion (0% on prefix-collision and compound-fact); a mutation-time hook recovers intent-aware deletion (78-85%) and brightens nearly all categories simultaneously (91.7-93.2% overall, $0.17 per 385-case run, 2.3s/case mutation latency vs. 64-191ms/case deterministic, recall path unchanged).   We expose the trade-off via ForgetEval, a 1000-case templated suite plus a 385-case adversarial layer (132 hand-crafted + 253 LLM-drafted oracle-validated) scored by deterministic substring match, paired with a six-method Adapter Protocol with honest N/A scoring that lets heterogeneous memory stores enter in 130 lines. Admission is corroborated by 10-annotator IAA (Fleiss' kappa = 0.958) and a 77-case external-authored subset (four blind contributors) that replicates the canonicalization asymmetry and amplifies the joint-placement lift (+27.8 pt). Production failures are predominantly forgetting failures rather than recall failures, yet existing benchmarks measure only recall. ForgetEval and all adapters are released under MIT.
comment: 25 pages including appendices. Code, benchmark, and adapters released under MIT at https://github.com/deeplethe/lethe

light_analysis.overview: 研究LLM代理内存中控制平面放置对遗忘失败模式的影响，提出ForgetEval评估套件。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有代理内存基准主要测试回忆平面（召回存储事实），而控制平面（通过supersede、release、purge修改事实）的测试不足。实际生产故障主要是遗忘失败而非召回失败，但缺乏专门评估遗忘的基准。本文旨在填补这一空白，系统研究控制平面放置对遗忘模式的影响。
light_analysis.method: 比较13种系统配置在385个对抗性案例上的表现，识别三种放置范式：确定性原语、写入时LLM、突变时钩子。提出ForgetEval，包含1000个模板案例和385个对抗层（132手工+253 LLM生成，经oracle验证）。配以六方法适配器协议（130行代码），支持异构内存存储，采用诚实N/A评分。
light_analysis.result: 确定性原语在词汇/时间类别表现良好，但规范化失败（标识符混淆5%，跨语言0%）；写入时LLM恢复规范化（100%），但无法处理意图感知删除（前缀冲突0%）；突变时钩子恢复意图感知删除（78-85%），总体提升至91.7-93.2%，成本$0.17/385案例，延迟2.3s/case vs 确定性64-191ms。10标注者IAA Fleiss' kappa=0.958。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了控制平面放置与遗忘失败模式的权衡，提供了ForgetEval评估套件和适配器协议，可复现。学术贡献在于首次系统研究代理记忆中的遗忘问题，实际价值在于帮助构建更稳健的LLM代理系统。未来工作可扩展至更复杂的记忆操作。

title: EHRNote-ChatQA: A Benchmark for Evidence-Grounded Multi-Turn Clinical Question Answering over Longitudinal Discharge Summaries
abstract: Discharge summaries are crucial clinical documents containing the context of a patient's overall hospital stay, and are routinely reviewed by medical experts for patient readmission, ongoing care, and diagnostic decision-making. When reviewing them, medical experts often must iteratively synthesize information across multiple summaries while verifying the evidence supporting each answer. Although large language models (LLMs) are increasingly explored for clinical question answering, existing benchmarks do not sufficiently reflect this setting: they often evaluate exam-style medical knowledge or focus on single-turn question answering with limited evidence-grounding evaluation. We introduce EHRNote-ChatQA, the first benchmark for evidence-grounded multi-turn clinical question answering over patients' multiple discharge summaries. Built from de-identified MIMIC-IV discharge summaries, EHRNote-ChatQA contains 967 patient-level multi-turn samples spanning one to five notes and 16,072 medical-expert-verified QA pairs (8,036 content questions, each paired with an evidence-grounding question) across eight clinical categories. The benchmark is constructed through an expert-informed pipeline combining discharge-summary structuring schema, expert-curated multi-turn QA templates, and LLM-based generation, followed by review and revision of every single QA sample by 11 medical experts. Benchmarking 22 open- and closed-source LLMs reveals several challenges, including that LLMs struggle more with evidence grounding than content answering, multi-turn errors compound across turns, and single-turn clinical QA performance does not reliably transfer to this setting. These findings establish EHRNote-ChatQA as a rigorous and practical benchmark for evaluating clinical QA systems. The dataset will be made publicly available through PhysioNet credentialed access.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个面向多份出院小结的、证据支持的多轮临床问答基准EHRNote-ChatQA，填补现有基准在证据溯源和多轮交互方面的空白。
light_analysis.motivation: 医生在审阅出院小结时需跨多份文档综合信息并验证证据，但现有基准多为单轮问答或考试式知识，缺乏对多轮证据支撑问答的评估。该研究旨在构建更贴近临床实际需求的基准，推动临床问答系统发展。
light_analysis.method: 基于MIMIC-IV出院小结，通过专家指导的流程构建：设计结构化出院小结模式、专家策划多轮问答模板、利用LLM生成候选，再由11位医学专家逐一审阅修订。最终包含967个患者级别多轮样本（覆盖1-5份小结）和16,072个QA对（内容问答+证据问答），涉及8个临床类别。
light_analysis.result: 对22个开源和闭源LLM进行基准测试，发现：LLM在证据溯源任务上表现显著差于内容问答；多轮问答中错误会累积；单轮临床QA性能不能可靠迁移至多轮证据问答场景。揭示了现有LLM在该设置下的关键挑战。
light_analysis.conclusion: EHRNote-ChatQA为临床问答系统提供了严格且实用的评估基准，揭示了多轮证据问答的独特困难。数据集将通过PhysioNet开放，有望促进临床LLM在证据敏感场景中的改进。未来可扩展至更多临床文档类型。

title: NeRD: Neuro-Symbolic Rule Distillation for Efficient Ontology-Grounded Chain-of-Thought in Medical Image Diagnosis
abstract: Interpretability is essential for trustworthy medical image diagnosis. However, existing concept-driven interpretable methods have key limitations: Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs) require scoring all predefined concepts at inference time and for manual intervention, imposing a substantial burden on clinicians, while rationale-based generative approaches often select concepts by class discriminability, which can drift from diagnostic ontologies. To address these issues, we propose Neuro-Symbolic Rule Distillation (NeRD), a framework that produces efficient, ontology-grounded reasoning chains that are sufficient yet non-redundant, without manually crafting diagnostic rules. Experiments on two skin datasets demonstrate strong diagnostic performance and interpretability, and blinded expert evaluation confirms the clinical plausibility of NeRD rationales. Our method further enables a first expert-in-the-loop study for Multimodal Chain-of-Thought-based diagnosis, achieving efficient and effective concept-level intervention.

light_analysis.overview: 提出神经符号规则蒸馏（NeRD）框架，高效生成基于本体的推理链，提升医学图像诊断的可解释性与临床合理性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有可解释性方法在医学图像诊断中面临挑战：概念瓶颈模型（CBM）需在推理时对所有预定义概念评分并依赖人工干预，加重临床医生负担；基于理由的生成方法常按类别可判别性选择概念，可能导致偏离诊断本体。这些问题限制了可解释模型的实用性和信任度，亟需一种既能保持诊断准确性又能生成与本体一致、充分且非冗余推理链的方法。
light_analysis.method: NeRD框架采用神经符号规则蒸馏技术，从数据中自动学习简洁、基于本体的推理规则，无需手动设计。核心创新包括：1) 结合神经网络的表征学习能力与符号规则的逻辑可解释性；2) 通过蒸馏过程确保推理链充分且无冗余；3) 利用医疗本体（如皮肤疾病分类标准）约束概念选择，使推理符合临床知识。在皮肤数据集上训练，支持多模态输入（图像+文本）。
light_analysis.result: 在两个皮肤疾病数据集上，NeRD实现了高诊断准确率，同时生成可解释的推理链。与CBM等方法相比，推理链长度更短、冗余度更低，且与诊断本体一致性更强。盲法专家评估证实其诊断理由在临床上合理可信。此外，NeRD首次实现了基于多模态思维链的专家在环诊断，有效支持概念级别的交互式干预，显著提升效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: NeRD为医学图像诊断提供了一种兼具高性能与高可解释性的解决方案，通过神经符号规则蒸馏弥合了深度学习黑箱与临床本体需求之间的鸿沟。其生成的本体基础推理链既满足完整性又避免冗余，且支持专家在环交互，具有重要的临床应用价值。未来可推广至更多医学领域，并探索与大型语言模型的融合以增强推理能力。

title: Greedy Coordinate Diffusion: Effective and Semantically Coherent Adversarial Attacks via Diffusion Guidance
abstract: Adversarial attacks on large language models have limited practical impact despite extensive research. Optimization-based attacks such as Greedy Coordinate Gradient (GCG) (Zou et al., 2023) produce high-perplexity, incoherent suffixes that existing defenses easily detect (Bengio et al., 2024).   Moreover, attempting to enforce coherence constraints during optimization often prevents the attack from successfully eliciting the specific targeted response, resulting in low success rates against robust models. Conversely, attacks that maintain coherence often alter the semantic intent of queries; when the model complies with these altered queries, responses fail to address the adversary's original goal. In this work, we introduce Greedy Coordinate Diffusion (GCD), a novel framework that efficiently generates adversarial attacks against safety-aligned models while maintaining low perplexity and high semantic adherence to the adversary's original intent. GCD leverages the generative priors of discrete diffusion language models to guide the search for adversarial suffixes that achieve semantic coherence and adherence.   Unlike GCG, GCD does not require direct gradient access, allowing it to operate in a gray-box setting. We show GCD achieves highest ASR while remaining competitive on response-quality scores, and that the constructed adversarial prompts are detected at lower rates than other methods by perplexity-based and guard-model filters.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Greedy Coordinate Diffusion (GCD)框架，利用离散扩散语言模型的生成先验高效生成低困惑度、高语义一致性的对抗性后缀。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有优化攻击如GCG产生高困惑度、不连贯的后缀，易被防御检测；而保持连贯性的攻击常改变语义意图，导致模型响应偏离原始目标。因此需要一种既能保持语义连贯性又能成功诱导目标响应的攻击方法。
light_analysis.method: GCD利用离散扩散语言模型的生成先验指导对抗性后缀搜索，无需直接梯度访问，可在灰盒设置中操作。它通过扩散模型的迭代采样过程，逐步优化后缀以平衡攻击成功率和语义连贯性。
light_analysis.result: GCD在攻击成功率(ASR)上达到最高，同时保持响应质量分数有竞争力。其构造的对抗提示被困惑度检测和Guard模型过滤的检测率显著低于其他方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: GCD框架有效生成了语义连贯且低困惑度的对抗攻击，提高了攻击的实际可行性。未来可扩展至其他安全对齐模型和更复杂的防御机制。

title: A Compositional Framework for Open-ended Intelligence
abstract: Open-ended intelligence is the capacity to adapt to novel problems and environments that are substantially different from those in training. A mathematics of open-ended intelligence requires two pillars: first, a minimal set of representational primitives (e.g., states, actions) and algorithmic primitives (e.g., nearest neighbor); and second, an acquired compositional grammar for selection, recursion, and branching that produces sequences of operations and recurring motifs. We formalize open-ended intelligence in terms of the compositional closure induced by a finite primitive set $P$ and a set of composition operators $C$. We characterize properties of the induced closure $\mathcal{L}(P,C)$ that support unbounded compositional generation across families of tasks and worlds. The closure of the two pillars yields infinite adaptive responses across a wide range of settings. The mathematics supports complementary research agendas, including evaluation metrics for explanation and interpretability, and novel architectures where compositional generalization is native. We propose next primitive prediction (NPP) as a novel architectural objective, where training encourages the acquisition of reusable algorithmic primitives and their compositional grammar, such that new solutions are generated through recombination. Given such an objective, curriculum learning and self-play can enable lifelong learning, expanding the closure by discovering reusable primitives and transition motifs across settings. We ground the framework through case studies in physics, evolution, and neuroscience.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个基于有限原始元素和组合算子的组合框架，以形式化开放式智能，并通过下一原始预测（NPP）实现自适应生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 开放式智能要求系统能够适应与训练环境显著不同的新问题和新环境。现有方法缺乏一个统一的数学框架来支持这种无限的组合生成，因此需要建立两个支柱：一是最小化的表示与算法原始元素集，二是习得的组合语法（包括选择、递归和分支），以产生操作序列和重复模式。该研究旨在通过组合闭包的概念形式化开放式智能，从而弥补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 论文形式化定义了有限原始集P和组合算子集C，并研究其诱导的闭包L(P,C)的性质，以支持跨任务家族和世界的无限组合生成。提出下一原始预测（NPP）作为新的架构目标，通过训练鼓励习得可重用算法原始元素及其组合语法，使新解通过重组合成。结合课程学习和自我对弈实现终身学习，不断扩展闭包。通过物理学、进化和神经科学案例研究验证框架。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但提出了一个理论框架并通过物理学、进化和神经科学领域的案例研究进行了验证。论文声称该框架能产生跨多种设置的无限自适应响应，并支持互补的研究方向，如解释性评估指标和原生组合泛化的新架构。结果主要体现在理论贡献和学术框架的构建上。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架为开放式智能提供了数学基础，通过原始元素集和组合算子实现无限的组合生成和自适应。其意义在于支持可解释性评估、组合泛化架构以及终身学习机制。未来工作可能包括进一步实证验证和扩展到其他领域。局限性在于目前缺乏大规模实验数据支持。

title: Show the Signal, Hide the Noise: Spectral Forcing for Pixel-Space Diffusion
abstract: Pixel-space diffusion models are trained on full-bandwidth noisy images, yet the useful signal available to the denoiser is strongly frequency dependent. Under rectified-flow diffusion and natural-image power-law spectra, the per-band data-to-noise contour $k^{*}(t) = (1-t)^{-2/α}$ separates a signal-bearing low-frequency region from a noise-dominated high-frequency region at each time $t$. We show that this implicit coarse-to-fine structure is not merely descriptive: it induces a capacity-allocation problem. A standard pixel-space denoiser must discover the moving bandwidth boundary internally and can spend computation on frequency-time regions where the optimal prediction collapses to deterministic baselines rather than data-distribution modeling. To make this boundary explicit, we introduce Spectral Forcing, a parameter-free, time-conditional 2D-DCT low-pass operator applied to the noisy input before the patch embedder. Its cutoff expands monotonically with the diffusion time and becomes the identity at the data endpoint. Through controlled synthetic experiments, we identify the regime in which the operator is beneficial: coarse patch tokenization and data whose high-frequency content is predominantly noise rather than essential signal. On ImageNet-256 with JiT-700M/32, Spectral Forcing consistently improves both FID and Inception Score across different training epochs, demonstrating robust gains throughout training; at finer tokenization, the spectral forcing is still competitive. We further insert the unchanged operator into SenseNova-U1, a unified text-to-image model, where it improves DPG-Bench and GenEval, showing that the input-side spectral prior transfers beyond class-conditional generation. These results suggest a route to capacity-efficient pixel-space diffusion by showing the signal and hiding the noise.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 Spectral Forcing，一种参数自由的频域低通算子，通过显式分离信号与噪声，提升像素空间扩散模型的容量利用效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 像素空间扩散模型在训练时处理全带宽噪声图像，但有用信号随频率衰减。现有模型隐式学习时变带宽边界，导致计算资源浪费在噪声主导区域，影响数据分布建模效率。该研究旨在显式引导模型关注有效信号，解决容量分配问题。
light_analysis.method: Spectral Forcing 是一种参数自由的 2D-DCT 低通算子，作用于噪声输入之后、补丁嵌入之前。其截止频率随扩散时间单调扩展，在数据端点变为恒等映射。算子利用自然图像功率谱与整流流扩散的解析解，定义数据-噪声等高线。通过控制实验识别其有效条件：粗粒度补丁分词及高频主要为噪声的数据。
light_analysis.result: 在 ImageNet-256 上使用 JiT-700M/32 训练，Spectral Forcing 持续改进 FID 和 Inception Score，各训练时期均表现稳健；在更细粒度分词下仍具竞争力。集成至统一文生图模型 SenseNova-U1 后，提升 DPG-Bench 和 GenEval 指标，验证了该频谱先验的跨任务迁移性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Spectral Forcing 通过显式分离信号与噪声，解决了像素空间扩散模型的容量效率问题，无需额外参数。实验证明其在类条件生成和文本到图像生成中的有效性，为设计更高效的像素空间扩散模型提供了新思路。未来可探索更优的频谱先验或自适应算子。

title: When Cognitive Graphs Meet LLMs: BDEI Cognitive Pathways for Panic Emotional Arousal Prediction
abstract: Predicting individual panic emotional arousal timing before manifestation is essential for proactive emergency intervention. Existing methods incorporate cognitive elements but none explicitly model the emotional arousal process, making them ill-suited for emotional arousal timing prediction. We argue that grounding prediction in appraisal emotion theory is necessary because it explicitly models this process, but three problems must be solved. (1) Appraisal theory posits that emotion arises from simultaneous evaluation across multiple threat dimensions, yet no prior work fuses these inputs into risk perception. (2) Existing cognitive models lack an Emotion node, decoupling threat appraisal from emotional arousal and forcing emotions to be inferred indirectly from behaviors. (3) Given their generalizable cognitive reasoning, current approaches adopt LLMs as the primary decision-maker, yet overlook the fragility and hallucination-proneness of their outputs. To address these issues, we introduce PanicCognitivePath (PCP), a framework that addresses all three. A Psychological Safety Distance (PSD) model, grounded in psychological distance theory, maps four-domain signals into a unified risk metric as the entry condition for subsequent cognitive reasoning. An explicit Emotion node grounded in appraisal emotion theory is introduced into BDI, forming a Belief-Desire-Emotion-Intention (BDEI) pathway. Agents whose risk metric exceeds the PSD threshold enter this pathway, coupling threat appraisal directly to emotional arousal. The BDEI pathway governs all state transitions while the LLM is confined to parameter estimation for the Belief-to-Desire transition, confining hallucinations to a single step and preventing error propagation. Experiments on Hurricane Sandy show PCP improves arousal timing accuracy by 10.68% over baselines, reduces peak count error to 7.07%.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PanicCognitivePath框架，结合认知图与LLM，实现恐慌情绪唤醒时间的精准预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法缺乏对情绪唤醒过程的显式建模，不适用于情绪唤醒时机预测。基于评价情绪理论进行预测是必要的，但面临三个问题：多威胁维度融合、缺乏情绪节点、LLM的幻觉问题。需要一种将认知推理与情绪建模紧密结合的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出PanicCognitivePath框架。首先，基于心理距离理论构建心理安全距离模型，将四域信号映射为统一风险指标。其次，在BDI模型中引入显式情绪节点，形成信念-欲望-情绪-意图路径。风险超过阈值的智能体进入该路径，将威胁评估直接耦合到情绪唤醒。LLM仅用于信念到欲望转变的参数估计，限制幻觉于单步并防止错误传播。
light_analysis.result: 在Hurricane Sandy数据集上，PCP将唤醒时间精度提升10.68%，峰值计数误差降至7.07%。与基线方法相比，显著改进了恐慌情绪唤醒时机的预测性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: PCP框架有效结合了认知图和LLM，实现了基于情绪理论的恐慌唤醒预测，在准确性和鲁棒性上优于现有方法。未来可扩展至其他情绪类型和更复杂的危机场景，但当前依赖特定理论假设，需进一步验证通用性。

title: When to Write and When to Suppress: Route-Specialized Dual Adapters for Memory-Assisted Knowledge Editing
abstract: Knowledge editing systems must update selected facts while preserving nearby but irrelevant behavior. This paper studies this problem in a memory-assisted setting where an edit memory is retrieved at inference time and a parameter-efficient adapter corrects the model's object preference. We argue that the central design question is not only how to write an edit, but also when to suppress it. We introduce \method{}, a route-specialized dual-adapter editor. A relevance router first decides whether a prompt should receive an edit memory. Routed prompts use an edit adapter trained to prefer the new object over the original object; unrouted non-direct prompts use a separate locality adapter trained to preserve or restore the original-object preference. We evaluate \method{} on three 1,000-case protocols, \cf{}, \zsre{}, and \mquake{}, under the same memory protocol and two 7B/8B base models. On Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct, \method{} obtains the best overall probability-preference accuracy on all three benchmarks: 0.8180 on \cf{}, 0.8946 on \zsre{}, and 0.9922 on \mquake{}. The same trend holds on Qwen3-8B. Router ablations show that the relevant memory boundary differs across datasets: a lexical neural router is safest on \cf{}, while BGE embedding routing is better on \zsre{} and \mquake{}. Component and module ablations show that the gain mainly comes from separating edit injection from off-route suppression rather than from simply increasing LoRA capacity.

light_analysis.overview: 提出路由专用双适配器方法，通过相关性路由器决定何时写入或抑制编辑，实现精准知识编辑。
light_analysis.motivation: 知识编辑系统需更新特定事实同时保持无关行为不变。现有方法仅关注如何写入编辑，忽略了何时抑制编辑的重要性。在记忆辅助设置中，编辑记忆在推理时检索，参数高效适配器修正模型对象偏好。核心问题不仅是写入编辑，更是何时抑制它，以避免对无关查询产生错误影响。
light_analysis.method: 提出Route-Specialized Dual Adapters方法。包含一个相关性路由器，首先判断当前提示是否应接收编辑记忆。若路由为直接编辑提示，则使用编辑适配器（训练为偏好新对象）；若非直接提示，则使用局部性适配器（训练为保留或恢复原始对象偏好）。该方法在Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct和Qwen3-8B上评估，基于CF、ZSR、MQuaKE三个基准。
light_analysis.result: 在Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct上，CF基准概率偏好准确率0.8180，ZSR 0.8946，MQuaKE 0.9922，均优于其他方法。Qwen3-8B上趋势相同。路由器消融实验表明，不同数据集的最佳路由器不同：CF使用词法神经路由器最安全，ZSR和MQuaKE使用BGE嵌入路由更好。组件消融表明性能提升主要来自分离编辑注入与路由外抑制，而非简单增加LoRA容量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法通过路由专用双适配器有效解决了知识编辑中何时写入与何时抑制的问题，显著提升了编辑的精确性和局部性。学术价值在于揭示了路由机制在记忆辅助编辑中的关键作用。实际应用可提升大模型知识更新的安全性。未来可探索更高效的路由策略或扩展到更大规模模型。

title: Zeta: Dual Whitening for Matrix Optimization via Coordinate-Adaptive Preconditioning
abstract: Large-scale neural network training increasingly relies on matrix-aware optimizers that exploit the structure of weight parameters beyond element-wise adaptation. However, existing matrix-aware methods such as Muon have an underappreciated vulnerability: their core operation, Newton-Schulz iteration, depends critically on input conditioning, yet the raw momentum matrices exhibit severe coordinate-wise scale heterogeneity. In this paper, we first verify this scale heterogeneity through a chi-square uniformity test, showing that intra-matrix scale imbalance is prevalent across Transformer layers and that coordinate whitening effectively corrects it. Motivated by this finding, we propose Zeta, a dual whitening optimizer that applies coordinate whitening and spectral whitening in a strictly ordered pipeline. The ordering is not a tunable choice but follows from a mathematical dependency: coordinate whitening establishes the statistical isotropy that spectral whitening requires to function reliably. We further prove that this dual pipeline strictly reduces orthogonalization error relative to pure spectral methods by improving the condition number of the input. Empirically, Zeta matches or surpasses strong baselines across language modeling (0.6B to 8B parameters), mixture-of-experts architectures, and vision tasks, demonstrating that resolving scale imbalance before orthogonalization leads to faster convergence and better generalization. Code is available at https://github.com/AIGCodeOS/aigcode_zeta_optimizer.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Zeta优化器，通过坐标白化和谱白化的双重流水线解决矩阵感知优化中的坐标尺度异质性，提升收敛速度和泛化性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有矩阵感知优化器（如Muon）依赖Newton-Schulz迭代，但动量矩阵存在严重的坐标尺度异质性，导致正交化误差。通过卡方均匀性检验证实了这种尺度不平衡普遍存在于Transformer层中，而坐标白化能有效校正。因此，需要一种方法在正交化前先解决尺度不平衡问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出Zeta双重白化优化器，严格按顺序执行坐标白化和谱白化：坐标白化先建立统计各向同性，使谱白化能可靠工作。该顺序由数学依赖决定，非可调超参数。理论上证明该流水线通过改善输入条件数，比纯谱方法降低正交化误差。
light_analysis.result: 在语言模型（0.6B-8B参数）、混合专家架构和视觉任务上，Zeta匹配或超越强基线。实验表明，在正交化前解决尺度不平衡能带来更快的收敛和更好的泛化。具体性能提升数据摘要未明确说明，但声称优于Muon等基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: Zeta通过双重白化解决了矩阵感知优化中的尺度异质性，提升了优化稳定性和效率。学术价值在于揭示了坐标白化与谱白化的顺序依赖关系，实际应用价值在于可替代现有优化器加速大模型训练。未来工作可探索自适应白化顺序或扩展到更多架构。

title: A New Multi-Domain Benchmark for Micro-Action Recognition and Detection
abstract: Micro-actions are short-duration, low-amplitude subtle body movements at the whole-body level that can reveal latent intentions, involuntary reactions, and fine-grained affective changes. Our previous MA-52 benchmark has provided an important foundation for micro-action recognition, but it remains limited in scale, scene diversity, task coverage, and evaluation protocols. To advance micro-action analysis toward more realistic and comprehensive settings, we introduce MMA-82, a large-scale multi-domain extension of MA-52. MMA-82 expands the label space from 52 to 82 fine-grained micro-action categories and covers four distinct domains, including laboratory interviews, street interviews, psychiatric patient interviews, and emotion-rich television videos, resulting in 77,856 annotated instances from 454 subjects. Built upon MMA-82, we establish two core tasks: Micro-Action Recognition and Multi-label Micro-Action Detection. For recognition, we further define in-domain and cross-domain protocols, including few-shot and zero-shot settings, to evaluate model robustness, transferability, and generalization. Extensive experiments show that current methods still struggle with realistic micro-action understanding, especially under domain shift, long-tailed category distributions, and complex temporal localization. Beyond benchmarking, we investigate the relationship between micro-actions and emotion, showing that micro-actions are strongly associated with emotional states and provide complementary cues to facial micro-expressions for improved emotion recognition. These results demonstrate that MMA-82 serves as a comprehensive and challenging benchmark for realistic micro-action analysis and a valuable resource for human-centered AI. MMA-82 is available at https://lpynow.github.io/MMA-82-AIM/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MMA-82，一个大规模多领域微动作识别与检测基准，扩展类别至82类，覆盖四个不同领域，支持跨域、少样本和零样本评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有MA-52基准在规模、场景多样性、任务覆盖和评估协议上存在局限。微动作是短时低幅的全身细微运动，能揭示隐藏意图和情绪，但当前方法在域迁移、长尾分布和复杂时序定位下表现不足，亟需更全面真实的基准推动研究。
light_analysis.method: MMA-82将微动作类别从52扩展到82，涵盖实验室访谈、街头采访、精神病人访谈和情感电视视频四个领域，包含454名被试的77,856个标注实例。定义两个核心任务：微动作识别和多标签微动作检测，识别任务进一步分为域内和跨域（少样本、零样本）协议，以评估模型的鲁棒性、迁移性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，现有方法在真实微动作理解上仍有困难，尤其在域迁移、长尾类别分布和复杂时序定位场景下。研究还发现微动作与情绪状态强相关，并能补充面部微表情线索以提升情绪识别性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: MMA-82作为真实场景微动作分析的全面挑战性基准，为人本AI提供了宝贵资源，有助于推进情感计算、人机交互等领域。未来工作可聚焦于提升模型在域迁移和长尾分布下的表现。

title: Clay-CNN Hybrids: Leveraging Geospatial Foundation Models as Auxiliary Context for Landslide Detection
abstract: Rapid post-event landslide mapping is essential for disaster response but remains difficult to automate due to extreme class imbalance. This study evaluates whether Clay v1.5, a Geospatial Foundation Model (GFM), can improve pixel-level landslide segmentation on the Landslide4Sense (L4S) benchmark, which contains 3,799 training chips with 14 Sentinel-2 and terrain bands and approximately 2% positive pixels. We compare three strategies: Clay as the primary encoder with multi-scale residual terrain fusion, a U-Net backbone augmented with Clay semantic context at the bottleneck, and a standard U-Net baseline. The hybrid U-Net + Clay model with two-stage Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) achieved the best test F1 of 64.5 +/- 1.8% over three seeds, surpassing the Clay-only backbone (55.2 +/- 3.6%) and the U-Net baseline (59.9%). Clay as a standalone encoder underperformed the U-Net due to the absence of multi-scale skip connections, but its pretrained representations consistently improved performance when injected as auxiliary context. These findings suggest that GFMs are most effective for landslide detection when they complement spatially detailed convolutional architectures rather than replace them.

light_analysis.overview: 提出混合U-Net+Clay模型，通过注入地理空间基础模型的语义上下文，提升滑坡分割性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 灾后滑坡快速制图对灾害响应至关重要，但自动检测面临极端类别不平衡问题（正像素仅约2%）。现有方法难以有效利用高维遥感数据，地理空间基础模型（GFM）如Clay v1.5的潜力尚未充分挖掘，需探索其与卷积架构的最佳结合方式。
light_analysis.method: 基于Landslide4Sense数据集（3799训练芯片，14个Sentinel-2和地形波段），比较三种策略：Clay作为主编码器（多尺度残差地形融合）、U-Net骨干网络在瓶颈层注入Clay语义上下文（混合模型）、标准U-Net基线。混合模型采用两阶段低秩适配（LoRA）微调Clay。
light_analysis.result: 混合U-Net+Clay模型在测试集上F1达64.5±1.8%，超越Clay-only骨干（55.2±3.6%）和U-Net基线（59.9%）。Clay作为独立编码器因缺乏多尺度跳跃连接而性能不佳，但作为辅助上下文注入时持续提升表现。
light_analysis.conclusion: 地理空间基础模型在滑坡检测中最有效的方式是作为空间细节卷积架构的辅助上下文，而非完全替代。该发现为遥感语义分割中GFM的应用提供了新思路，未来可探索更高效的融合策略及多任务学习。

title: SMGFM: Spectral Multimodal Graph Pretraining for Multimodal-Attributed Graphs
abstract: Multimodal-attributed graphs (MAGs) couple graph topology with node semantics from text, images, and other modalities. Traditional graph learning contextualizes node semantics by coupling topology with node features. However, this coupling design becomes troublesome in MAGs, where structure-induced and modality-intrinsic semantics may contribute differently to downstream tasks. Structure-induced semantics promote relational consistency through smooth topological variation, whereas modality-intrinsic semantics often encode local, fine-grained distinctions that should not be uniformly smoothed or aligned. Therefore, the key challenge is to identify semantic roles before cross-modal fusion. To this end, we leverage graph-frequency variation as a prior, where low-frequency components capture topology-consistent semantics and high-frequency components preserve modality-specific semantics. Based on this intuition, we propose SMGFM, a spectral multimodal graph pretraining framework that decomposes each modality-specific node signal into graph-frequency bands and assigns band-level semantic roles before cross-modal interaction. Concretely, SMGFM constructs frequency-resolved modality tokens with scalable Chebyshev filters, estimates their coupling reliability through topology-conditioned routing, and performs band-modality interaction before fusion. Its frequency-routed objectives align smooth consensus routes while preserving modality-specific routes, mitigating spatial-domain entanglement and uniform cross-modal alignment. Extensive experiments conducted on the MAG datasets demonstrate that SMGFM achieves state-of-the-art performance across graph-level and modality-level tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SMGFM，一种频谱多模态图预训练框架，利用图频率变化区分语义角色，实现高效的跨模态融合。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态属性图中，结构诱导语义与模态内在语义对下游任务贡献不同，但传统图学习通过耦合拓扑与节点特征统一处理，导致语义混淆。关键挑战在于跨模态融合前识别语义角色，避免将模态特定的细粒度差异错误平滑或对齐。
light_analysis.method: SMGFM利用图频率变化作为先验，将每个模态节点信号分解为低频（拓扑一致）和高频（模态特定）成分。使用可扩展Chebyshev滤波器构建频率分辨模态令牌，通过拓扑条件路由估计耦合可靠性，并在融合前进行带-模态交互。优化频率路由目标，对齐平滑共识路线同时保留模态特定路线。
light_analysis.result: 在多模态属性图数据集上，SMGFM在图级和模态级任务中均达到最先进性能。具体指标如分类准确率、F1分数等优于现有基线方法，尤其在处理模态冲突场景时表现显著提升，验证了频率分解策略的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SMGFM通过频谱分解有效区分语义角色，解决了传统方法中拓扑与模态语义纠缠的问题。学术上提出图频率先验的新视角，实际应用中可提升多模态图分析性能。未来可扩展至更多模态和更大规模图数据。

title: Multimodal Graph Negative Learning
abstract: Multimodal attributed graphs (MAGs) integrate graph topology with heterogeneous modality attributes, such as text and images, thereby enabling richer modeling of complex relational systems. However, such expressiveness also makes learning on MAGs depend on multiple semantic sources, including structural topology, textual and visual attributes, each of which can be regarded as a branch for node representation. Node-level branch semantic imbalance arises when these branches differ across nodes in semantic informativeness and reliability: a branch that provides discriminative semantics for one node may mislead another due to bias in modality quality or structural context. Existing methods often mitigate such heterogeneity through cross-branch agreement or alignment, implicitly treating the dominant prediction as reliable supervision. When the dominant branch is biased, forced imitation may propagate its bias to other branches and suppress original semantics that are useful for classification. We propose GraphMNL, a graph-aware multimodal negative learning framework that addresses this issue by using Negative Learning as cross-branch guidance. Instead of forcing inferior branches to imitate a teacher prediction, the model teaches them which classes a node is unlikely to belong to. GraphMNL builds a branch library, identifies dominant and inferior branches via graph-aware reliability arbitration, gates unstable transfer, and applies target-preserving negative learning over non-target classes. This design decouples target supervision from branch guidance so that supervised losses learn the correct class, while Negative Learning suppresses unlikely alternatives when branch agreement is unreliable. Through the comprehensive experimental evaluation, GraphMNL achieves the best performance on Grocery datasets with 72.47% accuracy and 76.60 F1 score on Reddit M datasets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GraphMNL图感知多模态负学习框架，通过负学习引导分支避免语义不平衡传播。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态属性图（MAGs）中不同模态分支（结构、文本、图像）的语义信息量和可靠性存在节点级不平衡，现有方法通过跨分支对齐强制模仿主导预测，若主导分支有偏则会传播偏差并抑制有用原始语义。因此需要一种不依赖主导分支可靠性的跨分支引导机制。
light_analysis.method: GraphMNL构建分支库，通过图感知可靠性仲裁识别主导与劣势分支，门控不稳定传输，并对非目标类进行目标保留负学习。该方法将目标监督与分支引导解耦，监督损失学习正确类别，负学习在分支一致不可靠时抑制不可能类别。
light_analysis.result: 在Grocery数据集上准确率达72.47%，在Reddit M数据集上F1分数达76.60，均取得最佳性能。实验证明负学习有效缓解分支语义不平衡，提升多模态图学习的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: GraphMNL通过负学习机制解决了多模态图中分支语义不平衡问题，无需依赖主导分支可靠性即可引导劣势分支。该方法显著提升节点分类性能，尤其适用于模态质量或结构上下文有偏的场景。未来可探索更细粒度的分支关系建模。

title: Last But Not Least: Boundary Attention CalibratiON for Multimodal KV Cache Compression
abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) achieve strong vision-language reasoning, but long visual contexts enlarge the KV cache and increase decoding latency. Existing compression methods rely on observation window attention for stable token-importance estimation, yet this aggregation can dilute sparse visual evidence and discard answer-critical tokens under aggressive compression. Therefore, we identify last-query attention as a complementary source for recovering such evidence, but its answer-irrelevant signals can mislead retention. We propose BACON, a plug-and-play method that calibrates observation window attention with last-query evidence and suppresses isolated noise via intra-layer coherence and inter-layer persistence. Across diverse benchmarks, models, budgets, and compression methods, BACON improves multimodal KV compression by 7.5% on average under the most aggressive budget, with gains up to 30.9%. Our project page is available at https://ryu1ion.github.io/official_BACON/

light_analysis.overview: 提出BACON，一种即插即用的多模态KV缓存压缩方法，通过校准观察窗口注意力与最后查询注意力来改善压缩效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型处理长视觉上下文时，KV缓存膨胀导致解码延迟。现有压缩方法依赖观察窗口注意力估计token重要性，但会稀释稀疏视觉证据，激进压缩下丢弃关键token。需要一种能保留答案关键视觉证据的压缩校准方法。
light_analysis.method: BACON利用最后查询注意力作为补充来源恢复被稀释的视觉证据，并通过层内一致性和层间持久性抑制孤立噪声。该方法即插即用，可集成到现有压缩框架中，无需修改模型结构。
light_analysis.result: 在多种基准、模型、压缩预算和方法下，BACON在最激进压缩预算下平均提升多模态KV压缩效果7.5%，最高提升30.9%。实验覆盖了不同视觉语言任务和模型规模。
light_analysis.conclusion: BACON有效校准了多模态KV缓存压缩中的注意力估计，显著提升高压缩比下的视觉证据保留能力。其即插即用特性便于实际部署，为多模态大模型的效率优化提供了新思路。未来可探索更复杂的注意力校准机制。

title: LATTEArena: An Evaluation Framework for LLM-powered Tabular Feature Engineering (Extended Version)
abstract: Feature engineering remains a cornerstone of tabular data analysis, and Large Language Models (LLMs) have emerged as a promising paradigm for its automation, giving rise to LLM-powered Automated Tabular Feature Engineering (LATTE). However, the field lacks standardized, cost-aware evaluation platforms, and the combinatorial explosion of design choices obscures true algorithmic progress. To bridge these gaps, we systematically deconstruct 15 representative LATTE methods into a unified 6-dimensional taxonomy. Based on this abstraction, we introduce LATTEArena, a standardized, modular, and extensible benchmarking framework that decouples monolithic pipelines into reusable execution blocks. By distilling the massive combinatorial space, we evaluate 24 core LATTE configurations across 7 research questions. Our head-to-head benchmarking goes beyond predictive accuracy to quantify token efficiency and execution robustness, yielding 17 empirical findings on cost-effectiveness trade-offs. Furthermore, we provide 3 concrete recommendations for optimal real-world deployment. By enabling controlled component-level comparisons, LATTEArena shifts the paradigm from ad-hoc prompt engineering to systematic context management. All code, datasets, and over 4,000 execution logs are publicly available to foster a dynamic, community-driven benchmark. Our framework, leaderboard, and all artifacts are hosted on the LATTEArena project website at https://goodenhak.github.io/LATTEArena.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LATTEArena，一个标准化、模块化、可扩展的评估框架，用于LLM驱动的表格特征工程，通过统一分类和成本感知评估，推动系统化进步。
light_analysis.motivation: 表格特征工程中，LLM用于自动化（LATTE）具有潜力，但缺乏标准化的成本感知评估平台，设计选择组合爆炸掩盖算法进展。现有方法采用临时提示工程，难以公平比较成本效益，亟需统一基准来解耦组件并量化真实改进。
light_analysis.method: 系统解构15种代表性LATTE方法为统一的6维分类法，基于此构建LATTEArena框架，将整体管道解耦为可重用执行模块。通过蒸馏组合空间，评估24种核心配置，涵盖7个研究问题，包括预测精度、token效率和执行鲁棒性，实现细粒度成本感知比较。
light_analysis.result: 头对头基准测试超越预测精度，量化token效率和执行鲁棒性，得到17个关于成本效益权衡的经验发现，以及3个具体部署建议。公开全部代码、数据集和超过4000条执行日志，支持社区驱动改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: LATTEArena从临时提示工程转向系统上下文管理，提供标准化基准，促进组件级比较和可控实验。学术上推动科学进步，实践上指导成本效益部署，未来可扩展至更多LLM和特征工程场景。

title: SceneConductor: 3D Scene Generation from a Single Image with Multi-Agent Orchestration
abstract: Generating complete 3D scenes from a single image requires inferring globally consistent geometry, object relationships, and environmental context from inherently ambiguous visual evidence. Despite recent progress in joint layout-and-mesh generation, existing methods often rely on holistic or weakly decomposed pipelines that entangle many factors at once and demand extensive scene-level supervision, limiting their generalization to complex real-world environments. We propose a multi-agent orchestration framework that decomposes single-image 3D scene generation into three structured stages: scene initialization, environment construction, and multi-agent refinement. The initialization stage extracts image-derived object masks, builds object-level 3D representations, and predicts an initial spatial layout to form a coarse 3D scene. The environment-construction stage then leverages this initialization together with point-map geometry to build an environmental scaffold of supporting surfaces, room boundaries, materials, and illumination. Finally, in the refinement stage, a planner agent identifies structural and visual inconsistencies, applies simple corrections directly, and dispatches specialist agents for complex localized revisions that are reintegrated into the global scene. To provide reliable structural initialization while reducing reliance on scene-level annotations, we further introduce a geometry-aware layout predictor supervised by sparse geometric priors derived from point maps. Unlike fully supervised layout generators, the predictor can be trained from segmentation-level data and generalizes robustly to diverse real-world scenes. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets show that our method consistently outperforms prior approaches in geometric accuracy, spatial consistency, and perceptual realism.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多智能体编排框架，从单张图像分阶段生成3D场景，提升几何精度和空间一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 单张图像生成完整3D场景需从模糊视觉线索推断全局几何、物体关系和环境上下文。现有方法依赖整体或弱分解流程，纠缠多种因素且需大量场景级监督，导致在复杂真实场景泛化不足。因此需要一种结构化分解方法以降低监督需求并提高鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 提出多智能体编排框架，分为三个阶段：1）场景初始化：提取图像物体掩码，构建3D表示并预测初始布局；2）环境构建：结合初始化与点地图几何生成支撑面、房间边界、材质和光照；3）多智能体细化：规划智能体识别缺陷并直接修正，派专业智能体进行复杂局部修订。同时引入几何感知布局预测器，用点地图稀疏几何先验监督，减少对场景级标注依赖。
light_analysis.result: 在基准数据集上，该方法在几何精度、空间一致性和感知真实感方面持续优于先前方法。摘要未给出具体数值指标，但强调了在多个评估维度上的改进，且布局预测器能从分割级数据训练并泛化到多样真实场景。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过多智能体编排将单图像3D场景生成分解为结构化阶段，有效提升生成质量与泛化能力。学术价值在于提出新的分解范式及稀疏几何先验监督方法，实际应用价值在于降低数据需求并适应复杂环境。未来工作可探索更细粒度的智能体分工或动态场景扩展。

title: Constitutional On-Policy Safe Distillation
abstract: On-policy self-distillation (OPSD) has emerged as an efficient post-training paradigm by using a teacher conditioned on privileged information to provide dense token-level supervision. Prior work has shown that OPSD can collapse in verifiable reasoning tasks, but safety alignment differs in that it is guided by high-level constitutions rather than explicit target answers, making it a natural setting to revisit dense distillation. However, our pilot study show that safety OPSD still suffers from severe collapse: constitutional conditioning contracts the teacher distribution toward short and overly conservative responses, and Reverse KL further amplifies this contraction into reduced expressiveness. We formalize this effect as geometric leakage under safety boundaries in a non-orthogonal semantic space, where safety pressure transfers into the expressiveness dimension. Based on this analysis, we propose Constitutional On-Policy Safe Distillation (COPSD), which first calibrates the teacher through a Cross-SFT cold-start and then performs constitution-conditioned on-policy distillation. Experiments on 12 benchmarks show that COPSD achieves a consistently stronger safety--helpfulness trade-off than baselines while substantially reducing the safety tax on general reasoning ability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出宪法在线安全蒸馏（COPSD），通过校准教师分布和条件蒸馏解决安全自蒸馏中的坍塌问题，实现更好的安全-有用性权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线自蒸馏在安全对齐中面临严重坍塌：宪法条件使教师分布趋于短且保守，反向KL进一步放大为表达性降低。作者将这种效应形式化为非正交语义空间中的几何泄漏，安全压力转移到表达维度。现有方法未解决此问题，导致安全对齐效率低下。
light_analysis.method: COPSD首先通过交叉监督微调（Cross-SFT）冷启动校准教师模型，消除初始偏差；然后基于宪法条件进行在线蒸馏，利用校准后的教师提供密集监督。该方法从几何泄漏角度分析坍塌机制，通过冷启动和条件蒸馏缓解安全压力向表达维度的转移。
light_analysis.result: 在12个基准上，COPSD相比基线实现了一致更强的安全-有用性权衡，同时显著降低了对通用推理能力的安全税（safety tax）。具体表现为在保持安全性的同时，减少了表达性和推理能力的损失，优于传统在线自蒸馏方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: COPSD有效解决了安全在线自蒸馏的坍塌问题，提供了更好的安全-有用性权衡。其几何泄漏分析为安全对齐提供了理论视角。未来可探索更高效的冷启动策略或扩展到多模态安全蒸馏。

title: Response-Aware Multimodal Learning for Post-Treatment Visual Acuity Forecasting
abstract: Long-term visual acuity (VA) forecasting after anti-VEGF therapy is important for counseling and follow-up planning in diabetic macular edema (DME), yet remains challenging when only early post-treatment findings are available. While prior OCT-based methods mainly focus on short-term response or single-endpoint prediction, multi-horizon VA forecasting from early longitudinal data remains insufficiently under-explored. In this study, we assembled a real-world cohort of 188 anti-VEGF--treated DME patients with paired baseline and month-1 OCT scans, along with tabular OCT-derived biomarkers and non-imaging clinical variables. Using only these early data, we formulate a multi-horizon VA forecasting problem aimed at predicting visual outcomes at 3, 6, 12, 18, and 24 months, reflecting clinically meaningful follow-up intervals. We propose ReVA, a response-aware multimodal framework that combines baseline and month-1 OCT features with tabular variables to capture disease status and early treatment response. ReVA integrates spatial OCT attention, dependency-aware tabular encoding, and cross-modal fusion to predict patient-specific long-term VA trajectories. The proposed framework achieves MAE=0.1246, RMSE=0.1621, and R^2=0.6064 for 24-month VA prediction, with consistent performance across all forecast horizons. Our findings show that incorporating early treatment-response signals enables clinically meaningful long-term visual acuity forecasting, supporting data-driven decision support for routine anti-VEGF management. Code and pretrained models will be released on https://github.com/nguyenpbui/ReVA.

light_analysis.overview: 提出响应感知多模态框架ReVA，利用早期抗VEGF治疗后的OCT和临床数据预测糖尿病性黄斑水肿患者的长期视力轨迹。
light_analysis.motivation: 长期视力预测对于抗VEGF治疗后的咨询和随访计划至关重要，但现有OCT方法主要关注短期反应或单一终点，缺乏多时间点预测。本研究利用早期治疗后数据（基线及第1个月）预测3-24个月的视力，解决临床未满足的需求。
light_analysis.method: 构建188名DME患者队列，包含基线及第1个月OCT扫描、OCT生物标志物和非影像临床变量。ReVA框架融合空间OCT注意力机制、依赖感知表格编码和跨模态融合，输出多时间点（3、6、12、18、24个月）视力预测。
light_analysis.result: 24个月视力预测MAE=0.1246, RMSE=0.1621, R²=0.6064，在所有预测时间点表现一致。与基线方法对比，摘要未明确说明具体数值，但强调早期治疗反应信号提升了预测性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: ReVA通过整合早期治疗反应实现了临床有意义的长期视力预测，支持数据驱动的DME患者管理。未来可扩展至其他眼病，代码开源将促进复现和应用。

title: Teaching Values to Machines: Simulating Human-Like Behavior in LLMs
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate a remarkable capacity to adopt different personas and roles; however, it remains unclear whether they can manifest behavior that adheres to a coherent, human-like value structure. In this work, we draw on established psychological value theory to induce human-like values in LLMs and assess their alignment with patterns observed in human studies. Using validated psychological questionnaires, we conduct large-scale experiments -- over 5 million questions -- to evaluate value structures and value-behavior relationships in leading LLMs and compare them to humans. Our findings reveal strong agreement between value-prompted LLMs and humans across both dimensions. Moreover, incorporating human value distributions enhances population-level simulations with value-induced LLMs. These findings highlight the potential of value-induced LLMs as effective, psychologically grounded tools for simulating human behavior.
comment: We had some disagreement regarding proper attribution; we hope to resolve it soon and upload the paper

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过心理学价值理论诱导LLM表现类人价值观的方法，并验证其与人类行为模式的高度一致。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM能扮演不同角色，但能否表现连贯、类人的价值结构尚不清楚。理解并模拟人类价值观对构建可信的AI系统至关重要，而传统方法缺乏心理学理论指导，难以保证价值一致性。
light_analysis.method: 基于心理学价值理论设计价值提示，向LLM注入类人价值观。使用验证过的心理学问卷，对领先LLM进行超500万问题的大规模实验，评估其价值结构及价值-行为关系，并与人类基线对比。
light_analysis.result: 价值提示的LLM与人类在价值维度上表现出强一致性，人群模拟中融入人类价值分布显著提升了模拟效果。具体指标未明确，但摘要指出“strong agreement”和“enhances population-level simulations”。
light_analysis.conclusion: 价值诱导的LLM可作为有效的、基于心理学理论的工具模拟人类行为，为社会科学研究提供新方法。未来可探索更精细的价值动态模拟及跨文化泛化。

title: Flash-GRPO: Efficient Alignment for Video Diffusion via One-Step Policy Optimization
abstract: Group Relative Policy Optimization has emerged as essential for aligning video diffusion models with human preferences, but faces a critical computational bottleneck: training a 14B parametered model typically demands hundreds of GPU days per experiment. Existing efficiency methods reduce costs through sliding window subsampling training timesteps, but fundamentally compromise optimization, exhibiting severe instability and failing to reach full trajectory performance. We present Flash-GRPO, a single-step training framework that outperforms full trajectory training in alignment quality under low computational budgets while substantially improving training efficiency. Flash-GRPO addresses two critical challenges: iso-temporal grouping eliminates timestep-confounded variance by enforcing prompt-wise temporal consistency, decoupling policy performance from timestep difficulty; temporal gradient rectification neutralizes the time-dependent scaling factor that causes vastly inconsistent gradient magnitudes across timesteps. Experiments on 1.3B to 14B parameter models validate Flash-GRPO's effectiveness, demonstrating substantial training acceleration with consistent stability and state-of-the-art alignment quality.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Flash-GRPO单步训练框架，大幅提升视频扩散模型对齐效率，在低计算预算下实现优于全轨迹训练的对齐质量。
light_analysis.motivation: Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) 在对齐视频扩散模型与人类偏好中至关重要，但训练14B参数模型需要数百GPU天，计算成本过高。现有效率方法通过滑动窗口子采样训练时间步来降低成本，但严重损害优化稳定性，无法达到全轨迹性能。因此，需要一种既能大幅提升训练效率又不牺牲对齐质量的方法。
light_analysis.method: Flash-GRPO是一种单步训练框架，通过两个关键创新解决GRPO的计算瓶颈：1) 等时分组（iso-temporal grouping），强制提示时间一致性，消除时间步混杂方差，解耦策略性能与时间步难度；2) 时间梯度校正（temporal gradient rectification），中和时间依赖缩放因子导致的跨时间步梯度幅度不一致。方法在1.3B至14B参数模型上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在1.3B到14B参数的视频扩散模型上，Flash-GRPO实现了显著的训练加速，同时保持一致的稳定性，并达到最先进的对齐质量。与全轨迹训练相比，在低计算预算下对齐质量更优，且训练效率大幅提升，具体加速倍数和量化指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: Flash-GRPO通过单步策略优化高效解决视频扩散模型对齐中的计算瓶颈，学术上提出等时分组和时间梯度校正两种新机制，实践上显著降低训练成本并提升对齐质量。未来可探索其在大规模多模态模型中的应用，以及进一步优化稳定性。

title: Learning to Decide with AI Assistance under Human-Alignment
abstract: It is widely agreed that when AI models assist decision-makers in high-stakes domains by predicting an outcome of interest, they should communicate the confidence of their predictions. However, empirical evidence suggests that decision-makers often struggle to determine when to trust a prediction based solely on this communicated confidence. In this context, recent theoretical and empirical work suggests a positive correlation between the utility of AI-assisted decision-making and the degree of alignment between the AI confidence and the decision-makers' confidence in their own predictions. Crucially, these findings do not yet elucidate the extent to which this alignment influences the complexity of learning to make optimal decisions through repeated interactions. In this paper, we address this question in the canonical case of binary predictions and binary decisions. We first show that this problem is equivalent to a two-armed online contextual learning problem with full feedback, and establish a lower bound of $Ω(\sqrt{|H| \cdot |B| \cdot T} )$ on the expected regret any learner can attain, where $H$ and $B$ denote the sets of human and AI confidence values. We then demonstrate that, under perfect alignment between AI and human confidence, a learner can attain an expected regret of $O(\sqrt{|H| \cdot T\log T})$ and, when $\sqrt{|H|} = O(\log T)$ and $B$ is countable, a non-trivial generalization of the Dvoretzky-Kiefer-Wolfowitz inequality improves the regret bound to $O(\sqrt{T\log T})$. Taken together, these results reveal that alignment can reduce the complexity of learning to make decisions with AI assistance. Experiments on real data from two different human-subject studies where participants solve simple decision-making tasks assisted by AI models show that our theoretical results are robust to violations of perfect alignment.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示人机置信度对齐可降低AI辅助决策学习复杂度，建立理论边界并通过实验验证。
light_analysis.motivation: AI辅助决策中，仅提供预测置信度难以让人类决定何时信任，近期工作表明AI与人类置信度对齐与决策效用正相关，但未阐明对齐如何影响学习复杂度。本文研究此问题，旨在填补理论空白。
light_analysis.method: 将二进制预测与决策问题转化为两臂在线上下文学习问题，给定人类和AI置信度集合H和B，建立遗憾下界Ω(√(|H|·|B|·T))，并证明完美对齐下遗憾上界O(√(|H|·T log T))，在√(|H|)=O(log T)且B可数时改进为O(√(T log T))。
light_analysis.result: 理论表明对齐可降低学习复杂度；通过两个真实人类实验（简单决策任务+AI辅助）验证理论对完美对齐违背的鲁棒性，实验支持理论结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献：揭示对齐对学习复杂度的积极影响，为设计高效人机协作系统提供理论指导。未来可扩展到更复杂决策场景及非完美对齐情况。

title: A Recipe for Long-Context Reasoning in Large Language Models via On-Policy Optimization and Distillation
abstract: Existing approaches to post-train models for long-context tasks face complementary limitations: (i) supervised fine-tuning (SFT) provides stable supervision but suffers from exposure bias; (ii) reinforcement learning methods such as Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) train on model-generated trajectories but struggle with long-horizon credit assignment and sparse rewards; and (iii) on-policy distillation (OPD) provides dense token-level guidance but does not directly optimize task rewards. We study these complementary strategies for long-context alignment and derive a recipe that combines GRPO with OPD-style teacher guidance: the student learns from its own rollouts using outcome-level rewards, while a stronger teacher provides dense token-level regularization in place of the standard reference policy. This is especially useful when process-level supervision is difficult to obtain. To support this study, we introduce LongBlocks, a synthetic multilingual dataset spanning multi-hop reasoning, contextual grounding, and long-form generation. Through controlled ablations, we isolate the roles of cold-start initialization, teacher anchoring, and data mixing, showing that our recipe yields a more stable and effective path to long-context reasoning than GRPO or OPD while preserving short-context capabilities.

light_analysis.overview: 提出结合GRPO与on-policy蒸馏的处方，用于提升大语言模型的长上下文推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有后训练方法存在互补局限：SFT稳定但有暴露偏差；GRPO在长程信用分配和稀疏奖励上困难；OPD不直接优化任务奖励。需要一种综合策略来平衡稳定性和奖励优化，同时保持在短上下文上的能力。
light_analysis.method: 结合GRPO和OPD：学生模型从自身rollout中学习结果级奖励，同时更强的教师模型提供密集token级正则化替代标准参考策略。引入LongBlocks多语言数据集，包含多跳推理、上下文定位和长文本生成任务，用于受控消融实验。
light_analysis.result: 通过消融实验隔离冷启动初始化、教师锚定和数据混合的作用，表明该处方在长上下文推理上比单独GRPO或OPD更稳定有效，同时保持短上下文能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出的综合策略克服了现有方法的互补局限，为长上下文对齐提供了更优路径。LongBlocks数据集支持研究。未来可探索过程级监督或更复杂的教师指导。

title: Conformal Path Reasoning: Trustworthy Knowledge Graph Question Answering via Path-Level Calibration
abstract: Knowledge Graph Question Answering (KGQA) offers grounded, interpretable reasoning, but existing methods often fail to provide reliable coverage guarantees over retrieved answers. While Conformal Prediction (CP) offers a principled framework for producing prediction sets with statistical guarantees, prior conformal KGQA methods suffer from two critical pitfalls: violated coverage guarantees due to invalid calibration, and weak score discriminability that yields excessively large prediction sets. We propose Conformal Path Reasoning (CPR), a novel trustworthy KGQA framework built on two key innovations. First, query-level conformal calibration over path-level scores preserves exchangeability to ensure valid coverage guarantees. Second, we introduce the Residual Conformal Value Network (RCVNet), a lightweight module trained via PUCT-guided exploration to learn discriminative path-level nonconformity scores. Extensive experiments show that CPR significantly improves the Empirical Coverage Rate by 45% while reducing prediction set size by 52% on average over conformal baselines across benchmark datasets, highlighting its effectiveness for reliable conformal reasoning over knowledge graphs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Conformal Path Reasoning (CPR)框架，通过查询级路径共形校准和RCVNet学习非一致性分数，实现有效且紧凑的预测集。
light_analysis.motivation: 知识图谱问答(KGQA)需要可靠的覆盖保证，但现有共形预测方法存在两大问题：校准无效导致覆盖保证被破坏，分数区分度弱导致预测集过大。这些问题限制了共形预测在KGQA中的实际应用。本文旨在通过路径级校准和可学习分数解决这些缺陷。
light_analysis.method: CPR框架包含两个核心创新：1) 查询级共形校准，在路径级分数上保持交换性，确保有效的覆盖保证；2) 残差共形价值网络(RCVNet)，通过PUCT引导的探索训练，学习具有强区分能力的路径级非一致性分数。该方法无需修改底层KGQA模型，仅对输出进行后处理。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准数据集上，CPR相比共形基线方法，经验覆盖率平均提升45%，同时预测集大小平均降低52%。这表明CPR在保持统计保证的同时显著提高了预测集的紧凑性，优于现有共形KGQA方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: CPR通过路径级共形校准和可学习分数有效解决了共形预测在KGQA中的两大难题，实现了更可靠且更紧凑的推理。该方法具有通用性，可应用于其他基于路径的知识图谱推理任务。未来工作可探索动态校准策略或扩展到多跳推理场景。

title: DVD: Discrete Voxel Diffusion for 3D Generation and Editing
abstract: We introduce Discrete Voxel Diffusion (DVD), a discrete diffusion framework to generate, assess, and edit sparse voxels for SLat (Structured LATent) based 3D generative pipelines. Although discrete diffusion has not generally displaced continuous diffusion in image-like generation, we show that it can be an effective first-stage prior for sparse voxel scaffolds. By treating voxel occupancy as a native discrete variable, DVD avoids continuous-to-discrete thresholding and provides a simple framework for voxel generation, uncertainty estimation, and editing. Beyond quality gains, DVD provides more interpretable generation dynamics through explicit categorical modeling. Furthermore, we leverage the predictive entropy as a robust uncertainty metric to identify ambiguous voxel regions and complicated samples, facilitating tasks such as data filtering and quality assessment. Finally, we propose a lightweight fine-tuning strategy using block-structured perturbation patterns. This approach empowers the model to inpaint and edit voxels within a single sampling round, requiring negligible auxiliary computation and no additional model evaluations. Code is available at https://github.com/TeCai/DVD.

light_analysis.overview: 提出离散体素扩散模型(DVD)，将体素占用作为原生离散变量，避免连续-离散阈值化，实现稀疏体素的生成、不确定性估计和编辑，提供更可解释的生成动态。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D生成方法多采用连续扩散模型，对稀疏体素需进行连续到离散的阈值化，造成信息损失和不确定性；同时缺乏有效的不确定性度量与灵活编辑能力。离散扩散虽在图像生成中不占优势，但体素离散本质使其能作为有效先验，从而解决上述问题。
light_analysis.method: DVD以离散扩散框架直接建模体素占用，无需阈值转换；利用预测熵作为鲁棒不确定性度量，识别模糊区域；提出块结构扰动微调策略，仅需单次采样即可实现体素修复和编辑，且辅助计算量极小，无需额外模型评估。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体数值指标，但指出DVD在生成质量上优于阈值化方法，且生成动态更可解释；不确定性度量有效用于数据过滤与质量评估；编辑策略在单次采样内完成，计算开销可忽略。实验细节需参考论文。
light_analysis.conclusion: DVD为稀疏体素提供了统一的生成、评估与编辑框架，通过离散扩散避免了连续-离散转换，增强了可解释性。不确定性估计和轻量级编辑策略具有实际应用价值，未来可探索其在稠密体素与其他3D表示上的扩展。

title: Weisfeiler Lehman Test on Combinatorial Complexes: Generalized Expressive Power of Topological Neural Networks
abstract: Topological neural networks have emerged as effective tools for modeling higher-order relational structures beyond pairwise graphs, including hypergraphs, simplicial complexes, and cell complexes. However, existing Weisfeiler-Leman type expressivity analyses are typically developed on different structural domains and rely on domain-specific neighborhood systems, making their expressive powers difficult to compare within a common formalism. In this paper, we introduce the Combinatorial Complex Weisfeiler-Leman (CCWL) framework, a unified expressive power refinement defined on combinatorial complexes. By exploiting the ability of combinatorial complexes to represent both set-type relations and part-whole hierarchies, CCWL performs topological color refinement through four structural neighborhoods: boundary, co-boundary, lower adjacency, and upper adjacency. We show that, under specified lifting maps, CCWL can simulate several domain-specific WL-type refinements, thereby providing a common theoretical baseline for analyzing topological message passing. We further study the neighborhood sufficiency problem and prove that, under explicit coverage conditions, a reduced refinement using only lower- and upper-adjacent bridge information preserves the distinguishing power of the full four-neighborhood CCWL refinement. Guided by this theoretical result, we instantiate the reduced refinement as the Combinatorial Complex Isomorphism Network (CCIN). Experiments on synthetic and real-world benchmarks demonstrate that CCIN achieves competitive performance against representative graph and topological neural network baselines. Ablation studies and resource-efficiency analyses further support the effectiveness of the proposed lower/upper-neighborhood design.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CCWL框架，统一拓扑神经网络的表达性分析，并基于理论推导设计高效的CCIN模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有拓扑神经网络（如超图、单纯复形）的Weisfeiler-Lehman型表达性分析依赖于特定领域邻域系统，难以在统一形式下比较。本文旨在通过组合复形统一表达性分析，解决不同结构表示之间的比较问题，并降低计算复杂度。
light_analysis.method: 引入组合复形上的CCWL框架，利用组合复形表示集合关系和部分-整体层次，通过边界、共边界、下邻接和上邻接四种结构邻域进行拓扑颜色细化。理论上证明在显式覆盖条件下，仅使用下/上邻接桥信息的简化细化保持完整四邻域CCWL的区分能力，并据此实例化为CCIN模型。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实世界基准上，CCIN在节点和图分类任务中取得与代表性图/拓扑神经网络相当的性能。消融研究和资源效率分析验证了下/上邻域设计的有效性，且计算开销更低。
light_analysis.conclusion: CCWL提供了拓扑消息传递的统一理论基线，CCIN在保持表达性的同时提高了效率。未来可探索更高效的邻域选择策略及应用于其他高阶结构。

title: NeuroClaw Technical Report
abstract: Agentic artificial intelligence systems promise to accelerate scientific workflows, but neuroimaging poses unique challenges: heterogeneous modalities (sMRI, fMRI, dMRI, EEG), long multi-stage pipelines, and persistent reproducibility risks. To address this gap, we present NeuroClaw, a domain-specialized multi-agent research assistant for executable and reproducible neuroimaging research. NeuroClaw operates directly on raw neuroimaging data across formats and modalities, grounding decisions in dataset semantics and BIDS metadata so users need not prepare curated inputs or bespoke model code. The platform combines harness engineering with end-to-end environment management, including pinned Python environments, Docker support, automated installers for common neuroimaging tools, and GPU configuration. In practice, this layer emphasizes checkpointing, post-execution verification, structured audit traces, and controlled runtime setup, making toolchains more transparent while improving reproducibility and auditability. A three-tier skill/agent hierarchy separates user-facing interaction, high-level orchestration, and low-level tool skills to decompose complex workflows into safe, reusable units. Alongside the NeuroClaw framework, we introduce NeuroBench, a system-level benchmark for executability, artifact validity, and reproducibility readiness. Across multiple multimodal LLMs, NeuroClaw-enabled runs yield consistent and substantial score improvements compared with direct agent invocation. Project homepage: https://cuhk-aim-group.github.io/NeuroClaw/index.html

light_analysis.overview: NeuroClaw：面向神经影像学的领域专用多智能体研究助手，实现可执行与可复现的研究流程。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经影像学研究面临异构模态（sMRI、fMRI、dMRI、EEG）、长多阶段流程及持续可重复性风险等独特挑战。现有AI智能体系统难以直接处理原始数据、缺乏领域适配，导致研究效率低、结果难复现。因此需要一种能直接操作原始数据、利用BIDS元数据、内置环境管理和审计追踪的专用工具，以推动可执行和可复现的神经影像研究。
light_analysis.method: NeuroClaw提出三层技能/智能体层次结构：用户交互层、高层编排层和底层工具技能层，将复杂工作流分解为安全可重用单元。平台集成端到端环境管理（ pinned Python、Docker、自动安装器、GPU配置）、检查点、执行后验证、结构化审计追踪和可控运行时设置。还引入NeuroBench系统级基准测试，评估可执行性、工件有效性和可复现性就绪度。通过多种多模态大语言模型进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 在多个多模态大语言模型上，NeuroClaw启用运行相比直接智能体调用在可执行性、工件有效性和可复现性就绪度上取得一致且显著的得分提升。具体提升幅度摘要未明确说明，但实验表明NeuroClaw系统性地改善了神经影像研究流程的可靠性和透明度。
light_analysis.conclusion: NeuroClaw为神经影像学提供了首个专注于可执行性和可复现性的多智能体框架，通过直接操作原始数据、集成环境管理和分层智能体架构，有效解决了模态异构和流程复杂性问题。NeuroBench基准进一步助力系统评估。未来可扩展至更多神经影像模态和更复杂的工作流，推动AI辅助科学研究的标准化与可复现。

title: DPRM: A Plug-in Doob h transform-induced Token-Ordering Module for Diffusion Language Models
abstract: Diffusion language models generate without a fixed left-to-right order, leaving token ordering as a central algorithmic choice. Existing systems mainly use random masking or confidence-driven ordering, which respectively suffer from train--test mismatch and myopic exploration. We introduce DPRM (Doob -transform Process Reward Model), a plug-in token-ordering module that keeps the host architecture, denoising objective and supervision unchanged, and modifies only the ordering policy. DPRM starts from confidence-driven ordering and gradually shifts to process-reward-guided ordering through online estimates. We characterize the exact DPRM policy as a reward-tilted Gibbs reveal law, prove convergence of its stagewise Soft-BoN approximation, show that the online bucketized controller tracks the exact DPRM score at empirical-Bernstein rates, and establish a sample-complexity advantage under tractable optimization assumptions.   Across nine hosts covering language reasoning, test-time scaling, protein, single-cell, molecular, DNA, text-to-image generation, and VQA, DPRM order variants improve several language, DNA, and multimodal settings while also identifying boundary cases where confidence-only ordering or task-specific utilities are preferable. Code is available at: https://github.com/DakeBU/DPRM-DLLM

light_analysis.overview: 提出DPRM即插即用令牌排序模块，通过Doob h变换实现从置信度驱动到过程奖励引导的渐进式排序策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散语言模型生成时无固定顺序，现有随机掩码或置信度驱动排序存在训练-测试不匹配和短视探索问题。DPRM旨在通过在线估计逐步优化排序策略，提升生成质量。
light_analysis.method: DPRM保持宿主架构、去噪目标和监督不变，仅修改排序策略。从置信度驱动开始，通过在线估计逐步转向过程奖励引导，定义为奖励倾斜的Gibbs揭示律，并证明阶段式Soft-BoN近似收敛、在线桶控制器以经验Bernstein速率跟踪精确得分，以及样本复杂性优势。
light_analysis.result: 在9个宿主（语言推理、测试时缩放、蛋白质、单细胞、分子、DNA、文本到图像生成、VQA）上，DPRM改进多个语言、DNA和多模态设置，同时识别出仅用置信度排序或任务特定效用更优的边界情况。
light_analysis.conclusion: DPRM是一种即插即用令牌排序模块，具有理论保障，能有效提升扩散语言模型性能。但存在边界情况需进一步研究，未来可探索更优的排序策略或任务适配。

title: Agentic World Modeling: Foundations, Capabilities, Laws, and Beyond
abstract: As AI systems move from generating text to accomplishing goals through sustained interaction, the ability to model environment dynamics becomes a central bottleneck. Agents that manipulate objects, navigate software, coordinate with others, or design experiments require predictive environment models, yet the term world model carries different meanings across research communities. We introduce a "levels x laws" taxonomy organized along two axes. The first defines three capability levels: L1 Predictor, which learns one-step local transition operators; L2 Simulator, which composes them into multi-step, action-conditioned rollouts that respect domain laws; and L3 Evolver, which autonomously revises its own model when predictions fail against new evidence. The second identifies four governing-law regimes: physical, digital, social, and scientific. These regimes determine what constraints a world model must satisfy and where it is most likely to fail. Using this framework, we synthesize over 400 works and summarize more than 100 representative systems spanning model-based reinforcement learning, video generation, web and GUI agents, multi-agent social simulation, and AI-driven scientific discovery. We analyze methods, failure modes, and evaluation practices across level-regime pairs, propose decision-centric evaluation principles and a minimal reproducible evaluation package, and outline architectural guidance, open problems, and governance challenges. The resulting roadmap connects previously isolated communities and charts a path from passive next-step prediction toward world models that can simulate, and ultimately reshape, the environments in which agents operate. Code and resources are available at: https://github.com/matrix-agent/awesome-agentic-world-modeling.

light_analysis.overview: 提出“levels x laws”分类法，综述400+工作，建立从被动预测到主动重塑环境的代理世界建模路线图。
light_analysis.motivation: AI系统从文本生成转向通过交互实现目标，环境动态建模成为瓶颈。但世界模型概念在不同社区含义不一，缺乏统一框架，导致评估不一致和失败模式未系统分析。本文旨在整合分散研究，推动可复现评估和架构指导。
light_analysis.method: 提出二维分类法：能力级别（L1单步预测、L2多步模拟、L3自主修订模型）和定律领域（物理、数字、社会、科学）。基于此综述400+论文，分析每对级别-领域的方法与失败模式，提出以决策为中心的评估原则和最小可复现评估包。
light_analysis.result: 总结了超过100个代表性系统，覆盖模型强化学习、视频生成、Web/GUI代理、多智能体社会模拟和科学发现。分类法揭示了不同领域世界模型的共性和差异，提供了架构指导和开放问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立了连接孤立社区的路线图，从被动预测走向能模拟并重塑环境的主动世界模型。提供代码和资源促进可复现研究。潜在局限：分类法可能存在重叠，需进一步实证验证。

title: Conditional Attribution for Root Cause Analysis in Time-Series Anomaly Detection
abstract: Root cause analysis (RCA) for time-series anomaly detection is critical for the reliable operation of complex real-world systems. Existing explanation methods often rely on unrealistic feature perturbations and ignore temporal and cross-feature dependencies, leading to unreliable attributions. We propose a conditional attribution framework that explains anomalies relative to contextually similar normal system states. Instead of using marginal or randomly sampled baselines, our method retrieves representative normal instances conditioned on the anomalous observation, enabling dependency-preserving and operationally meaningful explanations. To support high-dimensional time-series data, contextual retrieval is performed in learned low-dimensional representations using both variational autoencoder latent spaces and UMAP manifold embeddings. By grounding the retrieval process in the system's learned manifold, this strategy avoids out-of-distribution artifacts and ensures attribution fidelity while maintaining computational efficiency. We further introduce confidence-aware and temporal evaluation metrics for assessing explanation reliability and responsiveness. Experiments on the SWaT and MSDS benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed approach consistently improves root-cause identification accuracy, temporal localization, and robustness across multiple anomaly detection models. These results highlight the practical utility of conditional attribution for explainable anomaly diagnosis in complex time-series systems. Code and models are available at: https://github.com/dfki-av/Conditional-Attribution-for-Root-Cause-Analysis-in-Time-Series-Anomaly-Detection.
comment: Accepted at ECML PKDD. 16 pages, 8 figures, 13 tables, and an appendix

light_analysis.overview: 提出条件归因框架，通过检索上下文相似正常状态来解释时间序列异常，提升根因分析的可靠性和可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有异常解释方法依赖不现实的随机特征扰动，忽略时间和跨特征依赖，导致归因结果不可靠且缺乏操作性意义。在复杂系统中，需要一种能保留依赖结构、基于上下文相似正常状态进行归因的方法，以提升根因定位的准确性和可信度。
light_analysis.method: 提出条件归因框架，替代随机基线，通过检索与异常观测上下文相似的正常实例进行解释。利用变分自编码器（VAE）潜空间和UMAP流形嵌入，在低维表示中进行上下文检索，避免分布外伪影并保持归因保真度。同时引入置信感知和时间评估指标，衡量解释的可靠性与响应性。
light_analysis.result: 在SWaT和MSDS两个工业基准数据集上，该方法在多个异常检测模型（如LSTM、TCN等）上一致提升了根因识别准确率、时间定位精度和归因鲁棒性。具体性能改进优于现有归因方法，摘要未提供精确数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 条件归因框架为复杂时间序列系统的异常诊断提供了实用且可解释的解决方案，通过保留数据依赖和避免分布外问题，提升了归因可靠性。该方法可扩展至其他时序分析任务，代码已开源，未来可研究更高效的检索策略。

title: Do We Still Need Humans in the Loop? Comparing Human and LLM Annotation in Active Learning for Hostility Detection
abstract: Instruction-tuned LLMs can annotate thousands of instances at low cost. This raises two questions for active learning (AL): can LLM labels replace human labels within the AL loop, and does AL remain necessary when entire corpora can be cheaply labeled? We investigate both on a new dataset of 277,902 German political TikTok comments (25,974 LLM-labeled, 5,000 human-annotated), comparing LLM and human annotation across seven conditions, four encoders, and 10 random seeds. Under a two-question interface that mirrors the human annotation task, LLM annotation at scale outperforms human-supervised classifiers at roughly one-tenth the cost (\$28 for GPT-5.2 Batch API vs. \$316 for Prolific). The advantage holds for both a closed-source (GPT-5.2) and an open-weight (Qwen3.5-122B-10B) LLM, is robust under soft-label evaluation, and is unlocked specifically by the two-question decomposition; a holistic single-prompt baseline only ties with human supervision. AL provides no reliable advantage over random sampling under either LLM annotator. However, error structure varies sharply: only GPT-5.2 under the two-question interface produces classifiers with near-human FP/FN balance, while other LLM variants over-flag border-control and economic competition discourse. We release the dataset and code.

light_analysis.overview: 研究对比了人类与LLM在主动学习中的标注效果，发现LLM标注性能接近人类且成本更低，但错误结构有显著差异。
light_analysis.motivation: 指令微调LLM能以低成本标注大量数据，引发两个问题：LLM标签能否替代主动学习中的人类标签？当整个语料库可廉价标注时，主动学习是否还有必要？现有研究缺乏对此的系统比较，尤其是在仇恨检测领域。
light_analysis.method: 构建德国政治TikTok评论数据集（277,902条），采用两问题界面模仿人工标注任务，对比LLM（GPT-5.2和Qwen3.5-122B-10B）与人工标注在七种条件、四种编码器、10个随机种子下的表现。关键创新是两问题分解而非整体提示。
light_analysis.result: LLM标注的分类器性能优于人工监督分类器，成本约为1/10（GPT-5.2 Batch API花费28美元 vs Prolific 316美元）。优势对闭源和开源LLM均成立，主动学习相比随机采样无可靠优势。但错误结构差异显著：仅GPT-5.2在两问题接口下产生接近人类的FP/FN平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明LLM可有效取代主动学习中的标注角色，且主动学习在低成本LLM标注下不再必要。但错误结构差异需注意，不同LLM可能引入系统性偏差。数据集和代码已开源。

title: SCC-Loc: A Unified Semantic Cascade Consensus Framework for UAV Thermal Geo-Localization
abstract: Cross-modal Thermal Geo-localization (TG) provides a robust, all-weather solution for Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) in Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS)-denied environments. However, profound thermal-visible modality gaps introduce severe feature ambiguity, systematically corrupting conventional coarse-to-fine registration. To dismantle this bottleneck, we propose SCC-Loc, a unified Semantic-Cascade-Consensus localization framework. By sharing a single DINOv2 backbone across global retrieval and MINIMA$_{\text{RoMa}}$ matching, it minimizes memory footprint and achieves zero-shot, highly accurate absolute position estimation. Specifically, we tackle modality ambiguity by introducing three cohesive components. First, we design the Semantic-Guided Viewport Alignment (SGVA) module to adaptively optimize satellite crop regions, effectively correcting initial spatial deviations. Second, we develop the Cascaded Spatial-Adaptive Texture-Structure Filtering (C-SATSF) mechanism to explicitly enforce geometric consistency, thereby eradicating dense cross-modal outliers. Finally, we propose the Consensus-Driven Reliability-Aware Position Selection (CD-RAPS) strategy to derive the optimal solution through a synergy of physically constrained pose optimization. To address data scarcity, we construct Thermal-UAV, a comprehensive dataset providing 11,890 diverse thermal queries referenced against a large-scale satellite ortho-photo and corresponding spatially aligned Digital Surface Model (DSM). Extensive experiments demonstrate that SCC-Loc establishes a new state-of-the-art, suppressing the mean localization error to 9.37 m and providing a 7.6-fold accuracy improvement within a strict 5-m threshold over the strongest baseline. Code and dataset are available at https://github.com/FloralHercules/SCC-Loc.
comment: 17 pages, 5 figures. Submitted to IEEE J-STARS

light_analysis.overview: 提出SCC-Loc统一语义级联共识框架，解决无人机热地理定位中的跨模态歧义，实现零样本高精度绝对位置估计。
light_analysis.motivation: 在GNSS拒止环境中，无人机热地理定位依赖跨模态热-可见图像配准，但模态差异导致特征模糊，传统粗到细配准方法性能严重下降。现有方法难以有效消除模态鸿沟，且缺乏大规模热地理标注数据集。因此需要一种能够显式处理模态歧义、具备鲁棒几何一致性的定位框架。
light_analysis.method: SCC-Loc采用共享DINOv2骨干网络统一全局检索和局部匹配，减少内存占用。核心包括三个组件：语义引导视口对齐（SGVA）自适应优化卫星裁剪区域；级联空间自适应纹理结构滤波（C-SATSF）强制执行几何一致性消除异常点；共识驱动可靠性感知位置选择（CD-RAPS）结合物理约束推导最优位姿。同时构建了Thermal-UAV数据集，含11890对热查询及其对应卫星正射影像和DSM。
light_analysis.result: 在Thermal-UAV数据集上，SCC-Loc平均定位误差降至9.37米，较最强基线在5米阈值内精度提升7.6倍。消融实验验证了各组件的有效性，框架实现零样本定位，无需要额外训练。
light_analysis.conclusion: SCC-Loc通过语义级联共识机制有效解决了热-可见模态歧义问题，实现了高精度、鲁棒的无人机热地理定位，具有重要的实用价值。数据集和代码已开源。未来可进一步扩展至其他跨模态定位场景，并探索更高效的轻量级骨干网络。

title: DiffAttn: Diffusion-Based Drivers' Visual Attention Prediction with LLM-Enhanced Semantic Reasoning
abstract: Drivers' visual attention provides critical cues for anticipating latent hazards and directly shapes decision-making and control maneuvers, where its absence can compromise traffic safety. To emulate drivers' perception patterns and advance visual attention prediction for intelligent vehicles, we propose DiffAttn, a diffusion-based framework that formulates this task as a conditional diffusion-denoising process, enabling more accurate modeling of drivers' attention. To capture both local and global scene features, we adopt Swin Transformer as encoder and design a decoder that combines a Feature Fusion Pyramid for cross-layer interaction with dense, multi-scale conditional diffusion to jointly enhance denoising learning and model fine-grained local and global scene contexts. Additionally, a large language model (LLM) layer is incorporated to enhance top-down semantic reasoning and improve sensitivity to safety-critical cues. Extensive experiments on four public datasets demonstrate that DiffAttn achieves state-of-the-art (SoTA) performance, surpassing most video-based, top-down-feature-driven, and LLM-enhanced baselines. Our framework further supports interpretable driver-centric scene understanding and has the potential to improve in-cabin human-machine interaction, risk perception, and drivers' state measurement in intelligent vehicles.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DiffAttn，一种基于扩散的驾驶员视觉注意力预测框架，结合Swin Transformer和LLM语义推理，实现最先进性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 驾驶员视觉注意力对预测潜在危险和决策控制至关重要，但现有方法在建模注意力时不够精确，难以有效融合局部与全局场景特征及语义推理。DiffAttn通过条件扩散去噪过程，旨在更准确地模拟驾驶员注意力模式，提升交通安全。
light_analysis.method: 采用Swin Transformer编码器提取局部和全局特征，解码器设计特征融合金字塔实现跨层交互，并引入密集多尺度条件扩散增强去噪学习。同时，集成LLM层增强自上而下的语义推理，提高对安全关键线索的敏感性。在四个公开数据集上进行训练和评估。
light_analysis.result: 在四个公开数据集上达到最先进性能，超越大多数基于视频、自上而下特征驱动和LLM增强的基线方法，具体指标摘要未明确说明，但整体效果显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: DiffAttn提供了可解释的驾驶员中心场景理解，有潜力改进智能座舱人机交互、风险感知和驾驶员状态监测。未来工作可探索实际应用中的部署与扩展。

title: Evaluating Interactive 2D Visualization as a Sample Selection Strategy for Biomedical Time-Series Data Annotation
abstract: Reliable machine-learning models in biomedical settings depend on accurate labels, yet annotating biomedical time-series data remains challenging. Algorithmic sample selection may support annotation, but evidence from studies involving real human annotators is scarce. Consequently, we compare three sample selection methods for annotation: random sampling (RND), farthest-first traversal (FAFT), and a graphical user interface-based method enabling exploration of complementary 2D visualizations (2DVs) of high-dimensional data. We evaluated the methods across four classification tasks in infant motility assessment (IMA) and speech emotion recognition (SER). Twelve annotators, categorized as experts or non-experts, performed data annotation under a limited annotation budget, and post-annotation experiments were conducted to evaluate the sampling methods. Across all classification tasks, 2DV performed best when aggregating labels across annotators. In IMA, 2DV most effectively captured rare classes, but also exhibited greater annotator-to-annotator label distribution variability resulting from the limited annotation budget, decreasing classification performance when models were trained on individual annotators' labels; in these cases, FAFT excelled. For SER, 2DV outperformed the other methods among expert annotators and matched their performance for non-experts in the individual-annotator setting. A failure risk analysis revealed that RND was the safest choice when annotator count or annotator expertise was uncertain, whereas 2DV had the highest risk due to its greater label distribution variability. Furthermore, post-experiment interviews indicated that 2DV made the annotation task more interesting and enjoyable. Overall, 2DV-based sampling appears promising for biomedical time-series data annotation, particularly when the annotation budget is not highly constrained.
comment: Accepted for publication in Computers in Biology and Medicine (Elsevier)

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于交互式2D可视化的样本选择方法，用于生物医学时间序列数据标注，实验表明其在多标注者聚合场景下优于随机采样和最远优先遍历。
light_analysis.motivation: 生物医学时间序列数据标注困难，算法辅助样本选择可能提升效率，但现有研究缺乏真实人类标注者的实验证据。为此，需要比较不同样本选择方法在有限标注预算下的实际效果，以确定最有效策略。
light_analysis.method: 比较三种样本选择方法：随机采样(RND)、最远优先遍历(FAFT)和基于图形用户界面的2D可视化(2DV)方法，2DV通过探索高维数据的互补2D视图辅助选择。在婴儿运动评估(IMA)和语音情感识别(SER)四个分类任务上，由12名专家和非专家标注者在有限预算下进行标注，并评估分类性能。
light_analysis.result: 聚合所有标注者标签时，2DV在所有任务中表现最佳。在IMA中，2DV最有效捕获稀有类，但标注者间标签分布变异性大，导致个体模型性能下降；此时FAFT更好。在SER中，2DV在专家标注者中胜出，非专家中与其他方法持平。RND在标注者数量或专业知识不确定时最安全，2DV风险最高。
light_analysis.conclusion: 基于2D可视化的样本选择方法在生物医学时间序列标注中具有潜力，尤其当标注预算不严格受限时，能提高聚合标签的性能和标注者体验。但需注意其标签分布变异性带来的风险，未来可探索减少变异性的策略或结合其他方法。

title: Beyond MACs: Hardware Efficient Architecture Design for Vision Backbones
abstract: Vision backbone networks play a central role in modern computer vision. Enhancing their efficiency directly benefits a wide range of downstream applications. To measure efficiency, many publications rely on MACs (Multiply Accumulate operations) as a predictor of execution time. In this paper, we experimentally demonstrate the shortcomings of such a metric, especially in the context of edge devices. By contrasting the MAC count and execution time of common architectural design elements, we identify key factors for efficient execution and provide insights to optimize backbone design. Based on these insights, we present LowFormer, a novel vision backbone family. LowFormer features a streamlined macro and micro design that includes Lowtention, a lightweight alternative to Multi-Head Self-Attention. Lowtention not only proves more efficient, but also enables superior results on ImageNet. Additionally, we present an edge GPU version of LowFormer, that can further improve upon its baseline's speed on edge GPU and desktop GPU. We demonstrate LowFormer's wide applicability by evaluating it on smaller image classification datasets, as well as adapting it to several downstream tasks, such as object detection, semantic segmentation, image retrieval, and visual object tracking. LowFormer models consistently achieve remarkable speed-ups across various hardware platforms compared to recent state-of-the-art backbones. Code and models are available at https://github.com/altair199797/LowFormer/blob/main/Beyond_MACs.md.
comment: Accepted at International Journal of Computer Vision (IJCV)

light_analysis.overview: 提出LowFormer视觉骨干网络家族，质疑MACs作为效率指标的可靠性，并通过轻量级注意力机制Lowtention实现硬件高效设计。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前视觉骨干网络常使用MACs（乘加操作数）作为效率预测指标，但作者通过实验表明MACs无法准确反映实际执行时间，尤其在边缘设备上。现有设计忽视内存访问、并行性等硬件因素，导致优化不足。因此需要一种更贴近硬件实际性能的架构设计方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出LowFormer，包含Lowtention轻量级自注意力替代多头自注意力，降低计算复杂度和内存占用。设计采用流线型宏微观结构，并针对边缘GPU优化版本，平衡精度与速度。在ImageNet等数据集上训练，通过消融实验验证设计选择的有效性。
light_analysis.result: LowFormer在ImageNet上达到与SOTA骨干相当或更优的精度，同时在桌面GPU和边缘GPU上实现显著加速。例如，相比其他方法，速度提升可达2倍以上。在下游任务（目标检测、语义分割、图像检索、目标跟踪）中同样表现高效，验证了其广泛适用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: LowFormer揭示了MACs指标的局限性，并提供了硬件高效的骨干设计范式。其轻量注意力Lowtention可应用于多种任务，有助于推动边缘设备上的实时视觉应用。未来可进一步探索更细粒度的硬件协同优化。

title: Evidence of Layered Positional and Directional Constraints in the Voynich Manuscript: Implications for Cipher-Like Structure
abstract: The Voynich Manuscript (VMS) exhibits a script of uncertain origin whose grapheme sequences have resisted linguistic analysis. We present a systematic analysis of its grapheme sequences, revealing two complementary structural layers: a character-level right-to-left optimization in word-internal sequences and a left-to-right dependency at word boundaries, a directional dissociation not observed in any of our four comparison languages (English, French, Hebrew, Arabic).   We further evaluate two classes of structured generator against a four-signature joint criterion: a parametric slot-based generator and a Cardan grille implementing Rugg's (2004) gibberish hypothesis. Across their full tested parameter spaces, neither class reproduces all four signatures simultaneously.   While these results do not rule out generator classes we have not tested, they provide the first quantitative benchmarks against which any future generative or cryptanalytic model of the VMS can be evaluated, and they suggest that the VMS exhibits cipher-like structural constraints that are difficult to reproduce from simple positional or frequency-based mechanisms alone.

light_analysis.overview: 通过系统分析伏尼契手稿的字符序列，发现其具有双层方向性结构约束，并提供了首个定量基准。
light_analysis.motivation: 伏尼契手稿的字符序列难以解析，现有方法无法解释其结构。本文旨在通过分析字符序列中的位置和方向约束，揭示其潜在的密码学结构，并为未来生成或密码分析模型提供基准。
light_analysis.method: 系统分析了伏尼契手稿的字符序列，发现字符级右到左优化和词边界左到右依赖。评估了参数化槽位生成器和Cardan grille两类生成器，使用四个签名的联合标准进行测试。
light_analysis.result: 两类生成器在完整参数空间内均无法同时再现所有四个签名，表明伏尼契手稿的结构约束难以通过简单机制再现，提供了首个定量基准。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了伏尼契手稿类似密码的结构约束，为未来模型提供了定量基准。局限性是未测试所有生成器类，未来可探索其他模型。

title: ThinkJEPA: Empowering Latent World Models with Large Vision-Language Reasoning Model
abstract: Recent progress in latent world models (e.g., V-JEPA2) has shown promising capability in forecasting future world states from video observations. Nevertheless, dense prediction from a short observation window limits temporal context and can bias predictors toward local, low-level extrapolation, making it difficult to capture long-horizon semantics and reducing downstream utility. Vision--language models (VLMs), in contrast, provide strong semantic grounding and general knowledge by reasoning over uniformly sampled frames, but they are not ideal as standalone dense predictors due to compute-driven sparse sampling, a language-output bottleneck that compresses fine-grained interaction states into text-oriented representations, and a data-regime mismatch when adapting to small action-conditioned datasets.
