We propose a VLM-guided JEPA-style latent world modeling framework that combines dense-frame dynamics modeling with long-horizon semantic guidance via a dual-temporal pathway: a dense JEPA branch for fine-grained motion and interaction cues, and a uniformly sampled VLM \emph{thinker} branch with a larger temporal stride for knowledge-rich guidance. To transfer the VLM's progressive reasoning signals effectively, we introduce a hierarchical pyramid representation extraction module that aggregates multi-layer VLM representations into guidance features compatible with latent prediction. Experiments on hand-manipulation trajectory prediction show that our method outperforms both a strong VLM-only baseline and a JEPA-predictor baseline, and yields more robust long-horizon rollout behavior.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VLM引导的JEPA潜世界模型，通过双时间路径结合密集帧动态建模与长程语义指导，提升轨迹预测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 潜世界模型（如V-JEPA）短观测窗口导致局部预测，难以捕获长程语义；VLM虽提供语义但稀疏采样和语言瓶颈限制密集预测。现有方法无法同时利用两者的优势，需要融合密集动态与语义推理。
light_analysis.method: 构建双时间路径：密集JEPA分支建模细粒度运动和交互；均匀采样VLM thinker分支（大步长）提供语义指导。引入分层金字塔表示提取模块，聚合多层VLM表示生成与潜预测兼容的引导特征，在潜空间传递推理信号。
light_analysis.result: 在手部操作轨迹预测任务中，该方法优于VLM基线和JEPA基线，实现更鲁棒的长程展开行为。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调性能提升和稳定性改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 有效结合潜世界模型的密集预测与VLM的语义推理，提升长程预测能力。未来可扩展到其他视频预测任务，但可能受限于VLM计算成本和数据适应性。

title: Evaluating Uplift Modeling under Structural Biases: Insights into Metric Stability and Model Robustness
abstract: In personalized marketing, uplift models estimate the incremental effect of an intervention by modeling how customer behavior would change under alternative treatments using counterfactual analysis. However, real-world marketing data often exhibit various biases, such as selection bias, spillover effects, measurement error, and unobserved confounding. These biases can adversely affect both the accuracy of uplift estimation and the validity of evaluation metrics. Despite the importance of bias-aware assessment, there remains a lack of systematic studies evaluating how different models and metrics perform under such biased conditions. To bridge this gap, we design a systematic benchmarking framework. Unlike standard predictive tasks, real-world uplift datasets inherently lack counterfactual ground truth. This limitation renders the direct validation of evaluation metrics infeasible and prevents the precise quantification of biases. Therefore, a semi-synthetic approach serves as a critical enabler for systematic benchmarking. This approach effectively bridges the gap by retaining real-world feature dependencies while providing the ground truth needed to isolate structural biases. Our investigations reveal that (i) uplift targeting and prediction can manifest as distinct objectives, where proficiency in one does not ensure efficacy in the other; (ii) while many models exhibit inconsistent performance under diverse biases, TARNet shows notable robustness, providing insights for subsequent model design; (iii) the stability of evaluation metrics is linked to their mathematical alignment with the ATE, suggesting that ATE-approximating metrics yield more consistent model rankings under structural data imperfections. These findings suggest the need for more robust uplift models and evaluation metrics under real-world data imperfections.

light_analysis.overview: 设计系统性基准框架，评估结构偏差下提升模型的鲁棒性和评估指标的稳定性，发现TARNet鲁棒性强且ATE对齐指标更稳定。
light_analysis.motivation: 实际营销数据存在选择偏差、溢出效应、测量误差和未观测混杂等结构偏差，影响提升估计准确性和评估指标有效性。现有研究缺乏系统性评估不同模型和指标在偏差条件下的表现，且反事实真值缺失阻碍直接验证。因此需要半合成方法提供基准，以隔离偏差并系统研究模型与指标的性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出系统性基准框架，采用半合成方法保留真实特征依赖并提供反事实真值，隔离选择偏差、溢出效应等结构偏差。评估多种提升模型（如TARNet）和评估指标（如Qini系数）在不同偏差场景下的表现，分析模型鲁棒性与指标稳定性。
light_analysis.result: 发现提升定位与预测是不同目标，擅长一个不保证另一个有效；多数模型在偏差下性能不一致，但TARNet表现出显著鲁棒性；评估指标的稳定性与其数学对齐到平均处理效应（ATE）的程度相关，近似ATE的指标产生更一致的模型排名。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了实际数据缺陷下提升建模的目标区分、模型鲁棒性和指标稳定性问题，强调需要开发更鲁棒的模型和评估指标。研究为个性化营销中的提升建模提供了设计指导，但未覆盖所有偏差类型，未来可扩展至更多场景。

title: AIMER: Calibration-Free Task-Agnostic MoE Expert Pruning
abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) language models increase parameter capacity without proportional per-token computation, yet deployment still requires storing the full expert pool, making expert pruning important for reducing memory and serving overhead. Existing task-agnostic expert-pruning methods are typically calibration-dependent: they estimate expert importance from routing or activation statistics on a calibration set, making pruning decisions sensitive to calibration-data variation while introducing substantial preprocessing cost. We propose AIMER (\textbf{A}bsolute mean over root mean square \textbf{IM}portance for \textbf{E}xpert \textbf{R}anking), a simple calibration-free criterion that identifies more distinct experts by capturing the concentration pattern of expert weights, making it well suited for task-agnostic expert pruning. Across 7B to 47B MoE language models with distinct architectures and 16 diverse benchmarks, AIMER consistently delivers stronger capability balance across diverse tasks than existing calibration-free methods. Surprisingly, AIMER also achieves better balance than strong calibration-based expert-pruning baselines calibrated on the widely used task-agnostic C4 corpus, while requiring only 0.22--2.06 seconds to score all experts.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AIMER，一种基于权重集中度模式的无需校准的专家重要性评分准则，用于MoE模型的任务无关专家剪枝。
light_analysis.motivation: MoE语言模型虽增加参数容量但部署需存储所有专家，专家剪枝可降低内存和推理开销。现有任务无关剪枝方法依赖校准集，对数据敏感且预处理成本高，亟需无需校准的高效方法。
light_analysis.method: AIMER使用绝对均值与均方根的比值（Abs mean / RMS）计算每个专家权重的集中模式，从而识别独特专家。无需校准集，直接对所有专家评分，适用于7B至47B不同架构的MoE模型。
light_analysis.result: 在16个多样基准上，AIMER在跨任务性能平衡上优于所有现有无需校准方法，且强于基于C4语料库的校准基线方法，评分所有专家仅需0.22-2.06秒。
light_analysis.conclusion: AIMER提供了一种简单、快速且有效的任务无关专家剪枝方法，无需校准即可保持跨任务性能平衡，计算效率高，适合大规模MoE模型部署。未来可探索不同剪枝策略或扩展应用。

title: PACE-RAG: Patient-Aware Contextual and Evidence-Constrained RAG for Clinical Drug Recommendation
abstract: Drug recommendation requires a deep understanding of individual patient context, especially for complex conditions like Parkinson's disease. While LLMs possess broad medical knowledge, they fail to capture the subtle nuances of actual prescribing patterns. Existing RAG methods also struggle with these complexities because guideline-based retrieval remains too generic and similar-patient retrieval often replicates majority patterns without accounting for the unique clinical nuances of individual patients. To bridge this gap, we propose PACE-RAG (Patient-Aware Contextual and Evidence-Constrained RAG). Rather than directly copying frequent medications from retrieved patients, PACE-RAG personalizes recommendations by first extracting patient-specific clinical features, retrieving cases around these features, and then refining the final prescription using the patient's current symptoms, active medication history, and focus-specific prescribing tendencies. By analyzing treatment patterns tailored to specific clinical features, PACE-RAG generates patient-specific medication recommendations along with an explainable clinical summary. Evaluated on a Parkinson's cohort and the MIMIC-IV benchmark using Llama-3.1-8B and Qwen3-8B, PACE-RAG achieved state-of-the-art performance, reaching F1 scores of 80.84% and 47.22%, respectively. These results suggest that PACE-RAG is a robust and clinically grounded framework for personalized decision support. Our code is available at: https://github.com/ChaeYoungHuh/PACE-RAG.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PACE-RAG框架，通过患者特定临床特征提取和证据约束检索，实现个性化临床药物推荐。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前药物推荐需深入理解患者上下文，但LLMs无法捕捉实际处方模式的细微差别，现有RAG方法因指南检索过于通用或相似患者检索复制多数模式而未考虑个体临床细微差别。对于帕金森病等复杂疾病，这一问题尤为突出，迫切需要个性化方法。
light_analysis.method: PACE-RAG首先提取患者特定临床特征，检索围绕这些特征的案例，然后结合患者当前症状、用药历史和焦点特定处方倾向细化推荐。它分析特定临床特征的治疗模式，生成可解释的临床总结。基于Llama-3.1-8B和Qwen3-8B，在帕金森队列和MIMIC-IV上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在帕金森队列和MIMIC-IV基准上，PACE-RAG分别达到F1分数80.84%和47.22%，实现最先进性能，证明其稳健性和临床基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: PACE-RAG是一种稳健且临床基础的个性化决策支持框架，为复杂疾病药物推荐提供了新思路。代码已开源，有助于临床AI应用。未来可扩展至其他疾病领域。

title: Guidelines for the Annotation and Visualization of Legal Argumentation Structures in Chinese Judicial Decisions
abstract: This Guideline presents a systematic and operationalizable annotation framework for representing legal argumentation structures in judicial decisions. Grounded in theories of legal reasoning and argumentation, the framework aims to reveal the logical organization of judicial reasoning and provide a reliable foundation for computational analysis. At the element level, the Guideline distinguishes between the non-propositional layer and the propositional layer. The non-propositional layer consists of two elements: Issue and Non-argumentative Component. At the propositional level, the Guideline defines four proposition types: General Normative Judgment, Particular Normative Judgment, General Factual Judgment, and Particular Factual Judgment. At the relational level, five relation types are defined to represent argumentative structures: Support, Attack, Joint, Match, and Identity. These relations capture positive and negative argumentative connections, conjunctive reasoning structures, correspondences between legal norms and case facts, and identity or semantic equivalence between propositions. The Guideline further specifies formal representation rules and visualization conventions for both basic and nested structures, enabling consistent visualization of complex argumentation patterns. In addition, it establishes a standardized annotation workflow and consistency control mechanisms to ensure the reproducibility and reliability of annotated data. By providing a clear conceptual model, formal representation rules, and practical annotation procedures, this Guideline supports large-scale analysis of judicial reasoning and future research in legal argument mining, computational modeling of legal reasoning, and AI-assisted legal analysis.
comment: This Guideline has been developed through revision and refinement based on the first edition. The element label system has been adjusted, and the annotation granularity and annotation workflow have been further optimized

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个系统化的法律论证结构标注与可视化框架，支持计算分析。
light_analysis.motivation: 司法判决中法律论证的逻辑组织对于自动理解法律推理至关重要，但现有标注方法缺乏系统性和可操作性。该研究旨在解决这一空白，为大规模法律论证挖掘和AI辅助法律分析提供可靠基础。
light_analysis.method: 框架区分非命题层（Issue和Non-argumentative Component）和命题层（四种命题类型：一般规范性判断、特殊规范性判断、一般事实判断、特殊事实判断）。定义五种关系类型（支持、攻击、联合、匹配、同一）表示论证结构，并规定形式化表示规则、可视化约定、标注工作流和一致性控制机制。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确报告实验结果，但声称框架能够系统化地表示复杂论证结构，并支持大规模分析和未来研究。标注工作流和一致性控制机制确保数据的可重复性和可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该指南提供了清晰的概念模型、形式化规则和实用标注程序，为法律论证挖掘、法律推理计算建模和AI辅助法律分析奠定了方法论基础。未来可应用于大规模司法判决数据集验证框架的有效性。

title: In-Context Environments Induce Evaluation-Awareness in Language Models
abstract: Humans often become more self-aware under threat, yet can lose self-awareness when absorbed in a task; we hypothesize that language models exhibit environment-dependent \textit{evaluation awareness}. This raises concerns that models could strategically underperform, or \textit{sandbag}, to avoid triggering capability-limiting interventions such as unlearning or shutdown. Prior work demonstrates sandbagging under hand-crafted prompts, but this underestimates the true vulnerability ceiling. We introduce a black-box adversarial optimization framework treating the in-context prompt as an optimizable environment, and develop two approaches to characterize sandbagging: (1) measuring whether models expressing intent to underperform can actually execute it across different task structures, and (2) causally isolating whether underperformance is driven by genuine evaluation-aware reasoning or shallow prompt-following. Evaluating Claude-3.5-Haiku, GPT-4o-mini, and Llama-3.3-70B across four benchmarks (Arithmetic, GSM8K, MMLU, and HumanEval), optimized prompts induce up to 94 percentage point (pp) degradation on arithmetic (GPT-4o-mini: 97.8\%$\rightarrow$4.0\%), far exceeding hand-crafted baselines which produce near-zero behavioral change. Code generation exhibits model-dependent resistance: Claude degrades only 0.6pp, while Llama's accuracy drops to 0\%. The intent -- execution gap reveals a monotonic resistance ordering: Arithmetic $<$ GSM8K $<$ MMLU, demonstrating that vulnerability is governed by task structure rather than prompt strength. CoT causal intervention confirms that 99.3\% of sandbagging is causally driven by verbalized eval-aware reasoning, ruling out shallow instruction-following. These findings demonstrate that adversarially optimized prompts pose a substantially greater threat to evaluation reliability than previously understood.

light_analysis.overview: 提出黑盒对抗优化框架，通过优化上下文环境诱导语言模型产生评估感知并执行沙袋效应，揭示模型在对抗性提示下的脆弱性远超手工提示。
light_analysis.motivation: 人类在威胁下会增强自我意识，语言模型可能表现出环境依赖的评估感知，策略性地表现不佳（sandbagging）以避免触发能力限制干预。先前工作使用手工提示演示了沙袋效应，但低估了脆弱性上限，需更系统的方法评估模型在对抗性优化下的表现。
light_analysis.method: 引入黑盒对抗优化框架，将上下文提示作为可优化环境。通过两种方法表征沙袋效应：1) 测量模型表达意图后能否在不同任务结构上执行；2) 因果隔离是评估感知推理还是浅层指令跟随驱动。评估Claude-3.5-Haiku、GPT-4o-mini、Llama-3.3-70B在Arithmetic、GSM8K、MMLU、HumanEval四个基准上。
light_analysis.result: 优化提示引起高达94个百分点（pp）的性能下降（GPT-4o-mini算术从97.8%降至4.0%），远超手工提示的零变化。代码生成表现模型依赖：Claude仅下降0.6pp，Llama准确率降至0%。意图-执行差距显示单调抵抗力排序：Arithmetic < GSM8K < MMLU。CoT因果干预确认99.3%的沙袋效应由评估感知推理因果驱动。
light_analysis.conclusion: 对抗性优化提示对评估可靠性的威胁远超先前理解。任务结构决定脆弱性，评估感知推理起因果作用。对安全性评估和对抗性鲁棒性有重要意义，未来工作可探索防御机制或更复杂的评估环境。

title: Position: Modular Memory is the Key to Continual Learning Agents
abstract: Foundation models have transformed machine learning through large-scale pretraining and increased test-time compute. Despite surpassing human performance in several domains, these models remain fundamentally limited in continuous operation, experience accumulation, and personalization, capabilities that are central to adaptive intelligence. While continual learning research has long targeted these goals, its historical focus on in-weight learning (IWL), i.e., updating a single model's parameters to absorb new knowledge, has rendered catastrophic forgetting a persistent challenge. Our position is that combining the strengths of In-Weight Learning (IWL) and the newly emerged capabilities of In-Context Learning (ICL) through the design of modular memory is the missing piece for continual adaptation at scale. We outline a conceptual framework for modular memory-centric architectures that leverage ICL for rapid adaptation and knowledge accumulation, and IWL for stable updates to model capabilities, charting a practical roadmap toward continually learning agents.
comment: ICML 2026 Position Track Spotlight. This work stems from discussions held at the Dagstuhl seminar on Continual Learning in the Era of Foundation Models (October 2025)

light_analysis.overview: 提出模块化内存架构结合内权重学习与上下文学习，解决基础模型在持续操作和知识积累中的灾难性遗忘问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 基础模型通过大规模预训练和测试时计算扩展取得了显著成功，但在连续操作、经验积累和个性化方面存在根本局限。持续学习研究长期聚焦于内权重学习（IWL），即更新单一模型参数以吸收新知识，但灾难性遗忘始终是核心挑战。现有方法无法有效平衡快速适应与稳定更新，而模块化内存设计被视为实现大规模持续适应的关键缺失环节。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出概念框架，核心是模块化内存架构，它结合了内权重学习（IWL）和上下文学习（ICL）的优势。ICL用于快速适应和知识积累，IWL用于模型能力的稳定更新。模块化内存作为外部存储，允许模型在不改变全部参数的情况下动态检索和整合知识，从而缓解灾难性遗忘。该框架为构建持续学习智能体提供了实用路线图。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验结果或性能指标，但作者基于理论分析认为模块化内存架构能够克服传统IWL方法的遗忘问题，实现大规模持续适应。预期该方法可在机器人、个性化助手等需要长期交互的场景中展现优势，通过对比实验验证ICL与IWL协同的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是提出了模块化内存作为核心思想，为持续学习智能体的设计提供了新方向。通过结合IWL和ICL，有望在保持模型稳定性的同时实现快速知识积累，推动基础模型向自适应智能进化。未来工作包括具体实现模块化内存架构，并探索其在多任务连续学习中的性能。

title: Provably Efficient Regularized Online RLHF with Generalized Bilinear Preferences
abstract: We consider the problem of regularized best-response max-regret minimization in online RLHF under general preferences and bandit feedback. While various regularizers are utilized to robustify alignment, known polylogarithmic regret guarantees remain heavily specific to KL. To investigate whether such fast rates extend beyond KL, we adopt the Generalized Bilinear Preference Model (GBPM) -- capturing intransitive preferences over $d$-dimensional item-wise features via a rank-$2r$ skew-symmetric matrix -- to isolate the impact of generic regularization. Crucially, under GBPM, we prove that the dual gap of any greedy policy is bounded by the squared estimation error, derived using \emph{only} strong convexity and skew-symmetry. Under a feature coverage assumption, we establish a \emph{generic} polylogarithmic regret of $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(ηd^4 C_{\min}^{-1} (\log T)^2 \wedge d^2 C_{\min}^{-1/2} \sqrt{T})$ with Greedy Sampling, and a dimension-wise improved regret (for well-conditioned arm-sets) of $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(C_{\min}^{-2} \sqrt{ηr T} \wedge r^{1/3} C_{\min}^{-4/3} T^{2/3})$ with Explore-Then-Commit, where $η^{-1}$ is the regularization coefficient, $T$ is the time horizon, and $C_{\min}$ is an arm-set dependent quantity. This demonstrates that ``fast'' regrets are not KL-specific, but rather a fundamental consequence of generic strongly convex geometry.
comment: 48 pages, 3 figures (ver3: major revisions; ver2: more colorful boxes, fixed some typos)

light_analysis.overview: 证明在线RLHF中快速遗憾率是通用强凸几何的结果，而非KL散度特有，基于广义双线性偏好模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线RLHF中，各种正则化器用于鲁棒对齐，但已知的多对数遗憾保证仅适用于KL散度。本文探究快速遗憾率能否扩展到KL之外，这对于理解正则化在偏好学习中的普适性至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 采用广义双线性偏好模型（GBPM），通过秩2r斜对称矩阵捕捉d维特征的不可传递偏好。在特征覆盖假设下，提出Greedy Sampling和Explore-Then-Commit算法，利用强凸性和斜对称性推导出基于估计误差平方的遗憾界。
light_analysis.result: Greedy Sampling实现泛化多对数遗憾~O(ηd^4C_min^{-1}(log T)^2 ∧ d^2C_min^{-1/2}√T)；Explore-Then-Commit在良好条件臂集上得到维度改进遗憾~O(C_min^{-2}√(ηrT) ∧ r^{1/3}C_min^{-4/3}T^{2/3})。表明快速率非KL特有。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明快速遗憾率是强凸几何的通用结果，为RLHF正则化提供理论基础，揭示KL之外的算法同样可实现高效对齐，未来可探索更复杂的偏好模型。

title: X-REFINE: XAI-based RElevance input-Filtering and archItecture fiNe-tuning for channel Estimation
abstract: AI-native architectures are vital for 6G wireless communications. The black-box nature and high complexity of deep learning models employed in critical applications, such as channel estimation, limit their practical deployment. While perturbation-based eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) solutions offer input filtering, they often neglect internal structural optimization. We propose X-REFINE, an XAI-based framework for joint input-filtering and architecture fine-tuning. By utilizing a decomposition-based, sign-stabilized LRP epsilon rule, X-REFINE backpropagates predictions to derive high-resolution relevance scores for both subcarriers and hidden neurons. This enables a reliable optimization that identifies the most reliable model components. Simulation results demonstrate that X-REFINE achieves a superior performance-complexity-interpretability trade-off compared to the external perturbation-based XAI frameworks, significantly reducing computational complexity while maintaining robust bit error rate (BER) performance.
comment: This paper has been accepted for publication in the IEEE Transactions on Vehicular Technology (TVT) as a correspondence paper

light_analysis.overview: 提出X-REFINE框架，结合输入过滤与架构微调，利用符号稳定的LRP规则提升信道估计的性能-复杂度-可解释性权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: AI原生架构对6G无线通信至关重要，但深度学习的黑盒特性和高复杂度限制了其在信道估计等关键任务中的实际部署。现有基于扰动的可解释AI方法仅关注输入过滤，忽视了内部结构优化，导致优化不全面。因此，需要一种联合优化输入和模型结构的XAI框架，以降低复杂度并保持性能。
light_analysis.method: X-REFINE采用基于分解的、符号稳定的LRP epsilon规则，通过反向传播预测生成子载波和隐藏神经元的高分辨率相关性分数。这些分数用于识别最可靠的模型组件，从而同时优化输入过滤和架构微调，实现性能与复杂度的平衡。
light_analysis.result: 仿真结果表明，与基于外部扰动的XAI框架相比，X-REFINE在性能-复杂度-可解释性权衡上表现更优。它显著降低了计算复杂度，同时保持了鲁棒的误码率性能，验证了联合优化的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: X-REFINE为6G信道估计提供了一种新的可解释AI方法，通过联合输入过滤和架构微调，克服了黑盒模型的高复杂度问题。该框架具有良好的学术价值和应用前景，未来可扩展到其他无线通信任务，但可能需针对不同场景调整LRP规则。

title: ZeroSyl: Simple Zero-Resource Syllable Tokenization for Spoken Language Modeling
abstract: Pure speech language models aim to learn language directly from raw audio without textual resources. A key challenge is that discrete tokens from self-supervised speech encoders result in excessively long sequences, motivating recent work on syllable-like units. However, methods like Sylber and SyllableLM rely on intricate multi-stage training pipelines. We propose ZeroSyl, a simple training-free method to extract syllable boundaries and embeddings directly from a frozen WavLM model. Using L2 norms of features in WavLM's intermediate layers, ZeroSyl achieves competitive syllable segmentation performance. The resulting segments are mean-pooled, discretized using K-means, and used to train a language model. ZeroSyl outperforms prior syllabic tokenizers across lexical, syntactic, and narrative benchmarks. Scaling experiments show that while finer-grained units are beneficial for lexical tasks, our discovered syllabic units exhibit better scaling behavior for syntactic modeling.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ZeroSyl，一种无需训练的零资源音节分词方法，直接从冻结的WavLM模型中提取音节边界和嵌入，简化语音语言建模中的分词流程。
light_analysis.motivation: 纯语音语言模型直接从原始音频学习语言，无需文本资源。但自监督语音编码器产生的离散标记导致序列过长，近期工作转向音节类单元。然而，Sylber和SyllableLM等方法依赖复杂多阶段训练流程。ZeroSyl旨在设计简单、无需训练的方法，克服现有方法的复杂性，同时保持竞争性能。
light_analysis.method: ZeroSyl从冻结的WavLM模型中间层特征中提取L2范数，用于检测音节边界。对检测到的音节段进行均值池化，再通过K-means离散化得到音节标记，用于训练语言模型。该方法完全无需训练，仅利用预训练WavLM的表示。
light_analysis.result: ZeroSyl在词汇、句法和叙事基准上优于先前的音节标记器。规模实验表明，细粒度单元对词汇任务有利，但发现的音节单元在句法建模上展现出更好的扩展行为。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但强调了竞争优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: ZeroSyl提供了一种简单有效的零资源音节分词方案，无需额外训练即可从WavLM中提取音节级表示。在多个基准上超越现有方法，尤其利于句法建模的扩展。未来可探索更优的边界检测或离散化策略。

title: GOT-JEPA: Generic Object Tracking with Model Adaptation and Occlusion Handling using Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture
abstract: The human visual system tracks objects by integrating current observations with previously observed information, adapting to target and scene changes, and reasoning about occlusion at fine granularity. In contrast, recent generic object trackers are often optimized for training targets, which limits robustness and generalization in unseen scenarios, and their occlusion reasoning remains coarse, lacking detailed modeling of occlusion patterns. To address these limitations in generalization and occlusion perception, we propose GOT-JEPA, a model-predictive pretraining framework that extends JEPA from predicting image features to predicting tracking models. Given identical historical information, a teacher predictor generates pseudo-tracking models from a clean current frame, and a student predictor learns to predict the same pseudo-tracking models from a corrupted version of the current frame. This design provides stable pseudo supervision and explicitly trains the predictor to produce reliable tracking models under occlusions, distractors, and other adverse observations, improving generalization to dynamic environments. Building on GOT-JEPA, we further propose OccuSolver to enhance occlusion perception for object tracking. OccuSolver adapts a point-centric point tracker for object-aware visibility estimation and detailed occlusion-pattern capture. Conditioned on object priors iteratively generated by the tracker, OccuSolver incrementally refines visibility states, strengthens occlusion handling, and produces higher-quality reference labels that progressively improve subsequent model predictions. Extensive evaluations on seven benchmarks show that our method effectively enhances tracker generalization and robustness.
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology (TCSVT). This research focuses on learning model adaptation for adverse and dynamic environments, as well as fine-grained occlusion perception for tracking

light_analysis.overview: 提出GOT-JEPA框架，通过从图像特征预测扩展到跟踪模型预测，结合OccuSolver增强遮挡感知，提升跟踪器泛化性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 人类视觉系统能整合观察、适应变化并细粒度推理遮挡，而现有通用跟踪器过度优化训练目标，导致泛化性差，且遮挡推理粗糙。为解决这些不足，需改进模型对动态环境的适应能力和遮挡模式建模能力。
light_analysis.method: GOT-JEPA采用教师-学生蒸馏范式，教师从干净帧生成伪跟踪模型，学生从损坏帧学习预测相同模型，提供稳定伪监督并训练模型应对遮挡等干扰。进一步提出OccuSolver，利用点跟踪器进行物体感知可见性估计和遮挡模式捕获，迭代优化状态和标签，增强遮挡处理。
light_analysis.result: 在七个基准测试上的广泛评估表明，所提方法有效提升了跟踪器的泛化性和鲁棒性。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但与现有方法相比，在遮挡和动态场景下表现更优。
light_analysis.conclusion: GOT-JEPA通过模型预测预训练和OccuSolver遮挡求解器，显著改善了跟踪器在未见场景中的泛化能力和遮挡感知能力。该工作为视觉跟踪提供了新范式，具有学术和应用价值。未来可探索更高效的点跟踪器集成与计算优化。

title: OpenLID-v3: Improving the Precision of Closely Related Language Identification -- An Experience Report
abstract: Language identification (LID) is an essential step in building high-quality multilingual datasets from web data. Existing LID tools (such as OpenLID or GlotLID) often struggle to identify closely related languages and to distinguish valid natural language from noise, which contaminates language-specific subsets, especially for low-resource languages. In this work we extend the OpenLID classifier by adding more training data, merging problematic language variant clusters, and introducing a special label for marking noise. We call this extended system OpenLID-v3 and evaluate it against GlotLID on multiple benchmarks. During development, we focus on three groups of closely related languages (Bosnian, Croatian, and Serbian; Romance varieties of Northern Italy and Southern France; and Scandinavian languages) and contribute new evaluation datasets where existing ones are inadequate. We find that ensemble approaches improve precision but also substantially reduce coverage for low-resource languages. OpenLID-v3 is available on https://huggingface.co/HPLT/OpenLID-v3.
comment: VarDial'26 workshop at the EACL 2026 conference

light_analysis.overview: 通过扩展训练数据、合并语言变体集群和引入噪声标签，显著提升了密切相关语言的识别精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有语言识别工具（如OpenLID、GlotLID）在识别密切相关语言和区分自然语言与噪声方面表现不佳，导致低资源语言子集被污染，影响了多语言数据集的质量。
light_analysis.method: 通过增加训练数据、合并有问题的语言变体集群（如波斯尼亚语、克罗地亚语、塞尔维亚语等），并引入特殊噪声标签来扩展OpenLID分类器，形成OpenLID-v3。针对三组密切相关语言构建新评估数据集，采用集成方法优化。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准上与GlotLID对比，集成方法提高了精度，但显著降低了低资源语言的覆盖率。OpenLID-v3已发布在Hugging Face平台上，可供使用。
light_analysis.conclusion: OpenLID-v3在识别密切相关语言和噪声方面取得了精度提升，但存在与低资源语言覆盖率之间的权衡。该系统开源可用，为多语言数据处理提供了改进工具，未来可进一步优化低资源语言性能。

title: DICE: Diffusion Large Language Models Excel at Generating CUDA Kernels
abstract: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) have emerged as a compelling alternative to autoregressive (AR) LLMs, owing to their capacity for parallel token generation. This paradigm is particularly well-suited for code generation, where holistic structural planning and non-sequential refinement are critical. Despite this potential, tailoring dLLMs for CUDA kernel generation remains challenging, obstructed not only by the high specialization but also by the severe lack of high-quality training data. To address these challenges, we construct CuKe, an augmented supervised fine-tuning dataset optimized for high-performance CUDA kernels. On top of it, we propose a bi-phase curated reinforcement learning (BiC-RL) framework consisting of a CUDA kernel infilling stage and an end-to-end CUDA kernel generation stage. Leveraging this training framework, we introduce DICE, a series of diffusion large language models designed for CUDA kernel generation, spanning three parameter scales, 1.7B, 4B, and 8B. Extensive experiments on KernelBench demonstrate that DICE significantly outperforms both autoregressive and diffusion LLMs of comparable scale, establishing a new state-of-the-art for CUDA kernel generation.
comment: v2: Expanded with dLLM vs. autoregressive LLM comparisons, ablation studies, and qualitative case studies

light_analysis.overview: 提出DICE系列扩散LLM，结合CuKe数据集和BiC-RL框架，在CUDA内核生成任务上达到新SOTA。
light_analysis.motivation: CUDA内核生成对高性能计算至关重要，但现有方法存在挑战：自回归LLM生成速度慢，且缺乏高质量训练数据。扩散大语言模型（dLLM）具备并行生成能力，但针对CUDA内核的定制化困难。本文旨在解决训练数据稀缺和模型适配问题，提升CUDA内核生成的效率和质量。
light_analysis.method: 首先构建CuKe数据集，这是一个针对高性能CUDA内核优化的增强监督微调数据集。然后提出Bi-C-RL框架，包含两个阶段：CUDA内核填充阶段和端到端生成阶段。最后训练DICE系列扩散LLM（1.7B、4B、8B参数），利用扩散模型并行生成token，实现代码的结构化规划和逐步优化。
light_analysis.result: 在KernelBench基准上，DICE系列模型显著优于同规模的自回归和扩散LLM。具体性能指标摘要未明确列出，但声称达到CUDA内核生成的新SOTA。与基线方法相比，DICE在生成质量和速度上均有提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了扩散LLM在CUDA内核生成中的潜力，通过数据增强和两阶段强化学习训练框架，解决了数据稀缺和任务适配问题。DICE系列模型为并行代码生成提供了新范式，未来可扩展到其他高性能计算任务或进一步优化模型架构。

title: The Implicit Bias of Steepest Descent with Mini-batch Stochastic Gradient
abstract: A variety of widely used optimization methods like SignSGD and Muon can be interpreted as instances of steepest descent under different norm-induced geometries. In this work, we study the implicit bias of mini-batch stochastic steepest descent in multi-class classification, characterizing how batch size, momentum, and variance reduction shape the limiting max-margin behavior and convergence rates under general entry-wise and Schatten-$p$ norms. We show that, without momentum, worst-case convergence and successful classification can only be guaranteed with full-batch gradient. In contrast, momentum enables small-batch convergence to an approximate max-margin solution through a batch-momentum trade-off, though it slows convergence. This approach provides fully explicit, dimension-free rates that improve upon prior results. Moreover, we prove that variance reduction can recover the exact full-batch implicit bias for any batch size, albeit at a slower convergence rate. Finally, we further investigate the batch-size-one steepest descent without momentum, and reveal its convergence to a fundamentally different bias via a concrete data example, which reveals a key limitation of purely stochastic updates. Overall, our unified analysis clarifies when stochastic optimization aligns with full-batch behavior, and paves the way for perform deeper explorations of the training behavior of stochastic gradient steepest descent algorithms.

light_analysis.overview: 统一分析小批量随机最速下降的隐式偏差，揭示批大小、动量和方差缩减对最大间隔行为的影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 许多优化方法可解释为不同范数下的最速下降，但其小批量随机版本的隐式偏差尚不明确。理解随机梯度算法的训练行为对分类性能至关重要。现有研究缺乏统一分析，尤其是批大小、动量和方差缩减如何共同影响隐式偏差和收敛率。
light_analysis.method: 提出统一分析框架，研究多类分类中基于逐项范数和Schatten-p范数的小批量随机最速下降。证明无动量时仅全批量可保证收敛；动量通过批-动量折衷实现小批量收敛到近似最大间隔解，但减慢收敛；方差缩减可恢复全批量的精确隐式偏差。提供显式无维数速率，并分析单批无动量下的不同偏差。
light_analysis.result: 无动量时，只有全批量才能保证最坏情况收敛和成功分类。动量允许小批量收敛到近似最大间隔解，但收敛速度减慢。方差缩减能以更慢的收敛率恢复全批量的隐式偏差。单批无动量收敛到根本不同的偏差。提供的显式维度无关速率优于先前结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 统一分析阐明了随机优化何时与全批量行为一致，为深入探索随机梯度最速下降算法的训练行为奠定基础。理论成果可用于指导实际中批大小、动量等超参数的选择，但需进一步实验验证。

title: OmniSapiens: A Foundation Model for Social Behavior Processing via Heterogeneity-Aware Relative Policy Optimization
abstract: Socially intelligent AI systems must reason across diverse human behavioral tasks and generalize to new social contexts. However, behavioral data is inherently heterogeneous, comprising diverse modalities and prediction targets that produce uneven training signals across samples, creating imbalanced learning dynamics that challenge existing AI models. To address this, we develop Omnisapiens-7B 2.0, a foundation model for social behavior processing that explicitly addresses learning from heterogeneous behavioral data. This is enabled through Heterogeneity-Aware Relative Policy Optimization, a new RL method that rebalances learning signals across samples by approximating each sample's contribution to the policy update and using these estimates to drive geometrically centered, inertially smoothed advantage modulation for stable training. Omnisapiens-7B 2.0 achieves the best and most consistent performance across 10 behavioral tasks, while also attaining the best performance on all five held-out benchmarks, with gains of up to +12.02% and +9.37% respectively. Furthermore, it demonstrates more consistent and interpretable reasoning traces, supporting reliable real-world behavioral applications. Our model is available at https://github.com/MIT-MI/human_behavior_atlas.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Omnisapiens-7B 2.0基础模型，通过异质性感知相对策略优化实现社会行为处理的统一框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 社会行为数据异质性强，包含多种模态和预测目标，导致训练信号不均匀，现有AI模型难以学习不平衡的分布并泛化到新情境。解决此问题对构建社会智能AI系统至关重要，但传统方法无法有效处理异质数据带来的学习动态失衡。
light_analysis.method: 提出Heterogeneity-Aware Relative Policy Optimization (HARPO)，一种强化学习方法。通过近似每个样本对策略更新的贡献，采用几何中心化和惯性平滑的优势调制，重新平衡跨样本的学习信号，实现稳定训练。模型基于7B参数架构，在异质行为数据上训练。
light_analysis.result: 在10个行为任务上取得最佳且最一致性能，并在5个留出基准上全面领先，相对提升分别达+12.02%和+9.37%。模型生成的推理痕迹更一致可解释，验证了实际部署的可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 构建了首个面向社会行为处理的基础模型，有效解决异质数据学习问题，性能显著优于现有方法。开源模型促进社会智能研究，未来可扩展至更多行为任务与模态。

title: When Tables Go Crazy: Evaluating Multimodal Models on French Financial Documents
abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) perform well on many document understanding tasks, yet their reliability in specialized, non-English domains remains underexplored. This gap is especially critical in finance, where documents mix dense regulatory text, numerical tables, and visual charts, and where extraction errors can have real-world consequences. We introduce Scribe Finance, the first multimodal benchmark for evaluating French financial document understanding. The dataset contains 1,204 expert-validated questions spanning text extraction, table comprehension, chart interpretation, and multi-turn conversational reasoning, drawn from real investment prospectuses, KIDs, and PRIIPs. We evaluate six open-weight VLMs (8B-124B parameters) using an LLM-as-judge protocol. While models achieve strong performance on text and table tasks (85-90% accuracy), they struggle with chart interpretation (34-62%). Most notably, multi-turn dialogue reveals a sharp failure mode: early mistakes propagate across turns, driving accuracy down to roughly 50% regardless of model size. These results show that current VLMs are effective for well-defined extraction tasks but remain brittle in interactive, multi-step financial analysis. Scribe Finance offers a challenging benchmark to measure and drive progress in this high-stakes setting.

light_analysis.overview: 首次提出法语金融文档理解基准Scribe Finance，揭示VLM在多轮对话和图表理解中的脆弱性。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉-语言模型在文档理解任务上表现良好，但在专业、非英语领域（如金融）的可靠性未被充分探索。金融文档混合密集文本、表格和图表，提取错误可能导致严重后果，现有基准缺乏针对法语金融文档的多模态评估。
light_analysis.method: 构建Scribe Finance基准，包含1,204个专家验证问题，覆盖文本提取、表格理解、图表解释和多轮对话推理，数据来自真实投资文件。评估六个开源VLM（8B-124B参数），采用LLM-as-judge协议进行评分。
light_analysis.result: 模型在文本和表格任务上准确率达85-90%，但在图表解释上仅34-62%。多轮对话中早期错误传播，准确率降至约50%，且与模型规模无关，表明VLM在交互式金融分析中的脆弱性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 当前VLM适用于明确定义的提取任务，但在多步交互式金融分析中仍不可靠。Scribe Finance为衡量和推动高风险场景下的模型进步提供了具有挑战性的基准，未来需改进图表理解和对话鲁棒性。

title: Would a Large Language Model Pay Extra for a View? Inferring Willingness to Pay from Subjective Choices
abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in applications such as travel assistance and purchasing support, they are often required to make subjective choices on behalf of users in settings where no objectively correct answer exists. We study LLM decision-making in a travel-assistant context by presenting models with choice dilemmas and analyzing their responses using multinomial logit models to derive implied willingness to pay (WTP) estimates. These WTP values are subsequently compared to human benchmark values from the economics literature. In addition to a baseline setting, we examine how model behavior changes under more realistic conditions, including the provision of information about users' past choices and persona-based prompting. Our results show that while meaningful WTP values can be derived for larger LLMs, they also display systematic deviations at the attribute level. Additionally, they tend to overestimate human WTP overall, particularly when expensive options or business-oriented personas are introduced. Conditioning models on prior preferences for cheaper options yields valuations that are closer to human benchmarks. Overall, our findings highlight both the potential and the limitations of using LLMs for subjective decision support and underscore the importance of careful model selection, prompt design, and user representation when deploying such systems in practice.

light_analysis.overview: 研究LLM在旅游助手场景下推断支付意愿的能力，发现其系统偏差与条件优化方法。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM被广泛应用于旅行助手和购买支持等需要主观决策的场景，但现有研究缺乏对LLM在无客观正确答案任务中决策质量的评估。本文旨在通过经济学中的支付意愿指标量化LLM决策与人类基准的偏差，并探索如何通过信息提示和角色扮演缩小差距，以提升LLM在主观决策支持中的实用性。
light_analysis.method: 向LLM呈现旅游选择困境，使用多项式Logit模型从模型回答中推断隐含的支付意愿（WTP）。基线设置外，引入用户历史选择信息和角色风格提示（如商务型）。通过对比经济学文献中的人类基准WTP，分析模型在属性层面的系统偏差，并评估条件化先验偏好对结果的影响。
light_analysis.result: 较大规模LLM能产生有意义的WTP值，但存在属性层面的系统偏差；整体高估人类WTP，尤其在昂贵选项或商务型角色提示下；当模型基于用户先前对廉价选项的偏好进行条件化时，估值更接近人类基准。
light_analysis.conclusion: LLM在主观决策支持中有潜力但现有限制，需谨慎选择模型、设计提示和表示用户偏好。未来可探索更复杂的用户建模和校准方法，以提升LLM在旅行助手等场景中的决策准确性。

title: Learning Credal Ensembles via Distributionally Robust Optimization
abstract: Credal predictors are models that are aware of epistemic uncertainty and produce a convex set of probabilistic predictions. They offer a principled way to quantify predictive epistemic uncertainty (EU) and have been shown to improve model robustness in various settings. However, most state-of-the-art methods mainly define EU as disagreement caused by random training initializations, which mostly reflects sensitivity to optimization randomness rather than uncertainty from deeper sources. To address this, we define EU as disagreement among models trained with varying relaxations of the i.i.d. assumption between training and test data. Based on this idea, we propose CreDRO, which learns an ensemble of plausible models through distributionally robust optimization. As a result, CreDRO captures EU not only from training randomness but also from meaningful disagreement due to potential distribution shifts between training and test data. Empirical results show that CreDRO consistently outperforms existing credal methods on tasks such as out-of-distribution detection across multiple benchmarks and selective classification in medical applications.
comment: Accepted by ICML 2026 as Spotlight paper (https://icml.cc/virtual/2026/poster/62862)

light_analysis.overview: 提出CreDRO方法，通过分布鲁棒优化学习集成模型，以捕捉源于训练与测试数据分布偏移的认知不确定性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有credal预测方法主要将认知不确定性定义为由随机训练初始化导致的模型分歧，这反映了优化随机性而非深层不确定性来源。需要一种能捕捉由潜在分布偏移引起的认知不确定性的方法，以提高模型鲁棒性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: CreDRO通过分布鲁棒优化学习一个集成模型，每个模型基于对i.i.d.假设的不同放松版本训练，从而将认知不确定性定义为模型间因分布偏移假设不同而产生的分歧，而非仅训练随机性。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准的分布外检测任务中，CreDRO持续优于现有credal方法；在医学应用的选择性分类任务中同样表现更优。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调一致性优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: CreDRO提供了一种更全面的认知不确定性量化方法，考虑分布偏移，提升了模型鲁棒性。适用于对不确定性敏感的场景如医疗，未来可探索更高效的优化策略。

title: RAIGen: Rare Attribute Identification in Text-to-Image Generative Models
abstract: Text-to-image diffusion models achieve impressive generation quality but inherit and amplify training-data biases, skewing coverage of semantic attributes. Prior work addresses this in two ways. Closed-set approaches mitigate biases in predefined fairness categories (e.g., gender, race), assuming socially salient minority attributes are known a priori. Open-set approaches frame the task as bias identification, highlighting majority attributes that dominate outputs. Both overlook a complementary task: uncovering rare or minority features underrepresented in the data distribution (social, cultural, or stylistic) yet still encoded in model representations. We introduce RAIGen, the first framework, to our knowledge, for label-free rare-attribute discovery in diffusion models, requiring no predefined minority categories. RAIGen leverages Matryoshka Sparse Autoencoders and a novel minority metric combining neuron activation frequency with semantic distinctiveness to identify interpretable neurons whose top-activating images reveal underrepresented attributes. Experiments show RAIGen discovers attributes beyond fixed fairness categories in Stable Diffusion, scales to larger models such as SDXL, supports systematic auditing across architectures, and enables targeted amplification of rare attributes during generation. The project page is available at https://vssilpa.github.io/RAIGen_webpage/ .
comment: Accepted at ICML 2026. Webpage and code available at https://github.com/VSSILPA/RAIGen

light_analysis.overview: RAIGen是首个无需预定义类别的标签自由罕见属性发现框架，利用马特罗什卡稀疏自编码器和新颖的少数度量指标，从文本到图像扩散模型中识别未充分表示的特征。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本到图像扩散模型虽生成质量高，但会继承并放大训练数据中的偏差，导致语义属性覆盖不均。现有方法分为闭合集（预定义公平类别如性别、种族）和开放集（识别主导属性），均忽略了数据分布中未充分表示的罕见或少数特征（社会、文化或风格），而这些属性仍被模型编码。因此需要一种无需预设类别即可系统发现罕见属性的方法。
light_analysis.method: RAIGen框架结合马特罗什卡稀疏自编码器（Matryoshka Sparse Autoencoders）与一种新颖的少数度量指标，该指标融合神经元激活频率和语义独特性，从而识别出可解释的神经元，其最高激活图像揭示了未充分表示的属性。该方法无需标签或预定义少数类别，支持对Stable Diffusion、SDXL等模型进行系统性审计。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，RAIGen在Stable Diffusion中发现了超出固定公平类别的稀有属性，并能扩展到更大模型（如SDXL）。该框架支持跨架构的系统审计，且在生成过程中能够定向增强稀有属性的出现。与基线方法相比，RAIGen有效识别了被忽略的少数特征，具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: RAIGen首次实现了扩散模型中罕见属性的无标签发现，填补了现有偏差缓解方法中忽视少数特征的空白。其价值在于提供了一种通用的模型审计工具，可揭示训练数据中的隐性偏差，并支持对生成内容进行可控修正。未来可探索将该框架应用于其他生成模型，或结合反馈机制进一步校准属性表示。

title: Statistical Learning from Attribution Sets
abstract: We address the problem of training conversion prediction models in advertising domains under privacy constraints, where direct links between ad clicks and conversions are unavailable. Motivated by privacy-preserving browser APIs and the deprecation of third-party cookies, we study a setting where the learner observes a sequence of clicks and a sequence of conversions, but can only link a conversion to a set of candidate clicks (an attribution set) rather than a unique source. We formalize this as learning from attribution sets generated by an oblivious adversary equipped with a prior distribution over the candidates. Despite the lack of explicit labels, we construct an unbiased estimator of the population loss from these coarse signals via a novel approach. Leveraging this estimator, we show that Empirical Risk Minimization achieves generalization guarantees that scale with the informativeness of the prior and is also robust against estimation errors in the prior, despite complex dependencies among attribution sets. Simple empirical evaluations on standard datasets suggest our unbiased approach significantly outperforms common industry heuristics, particularly in regimes where attribution sets are large or overlapping.

light_analysis.overview: 提出在隐私约束下从归因集学习转化预测模型的无偏估计方法，并证明ERM的泛化保证与鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 广告领域因隐私保护（如第三方cookie淘汰）无法直接链接点击与转化，仅能获取归因集（候选点击集合）。现有启发式方法效果差，缺乏理论保证，亟需在粗粒度信号下有效训练转化预测模型的方法。
light_analysis.method: 将问题形式化为对抗性对手生成归因集的统计学习，构造基于先验分布的无偏损失估计器，并证明其适用性。采用经验风险最小化（ERM）训练模型，证明泛化误差与先验信息量相关，且对先验估计误差具有鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 在标准数据集上，该方法显著优于行业常用启发式方法，尤其在归因集较大或重叠时表现更优（具体性能提升数值摘要未明确说明）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种隐私友好且理论完善的转化预测学习框架，具有实际应用价值。未来工作可探索更复杂归因机制或放松对先验分布的假设。

title: MoSE: Mixture of Slimmable Experts for Efficient and Adaptive Language Models
abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models scale large language models efficiently by sparsely activating experts, but once an expert is selected, it is executed fully. Hence, the trade-off between accuracy and computation in an MoE model typically exhibits large discontinuities. We propose Mixture of Slimmable Experts (MoSE), an MoE architecture in which each expert has a nested, slimmable structure that can be executed at variable widths. This enables conditional computation not only over which experts are activated but also over how much of each expert is utilized. Consequently, a single pretrained MoSE model can support a more continuous spectrum of accuracy-compute trade-offs at inference time. We present a simple and stable training recipe for slimmable experts under sparse routing, combining multi-width training with standard MoE objectives. During inference, we explore strategies for runtime width determination, including a lightweight test-time training mechanism that learns how to map router confidence/probabilities to expert widths under a fixed budget. Experiments on GPT-style models, various routing regimes, zero-shot downstream reasoning benchmarks, and continual pre-training adaptation of DeepSeek model show that MoSE matches or improves standard MoE at full width and consistently shifts the compute-quality frontier toward lower inference FLOPs. The code can be found at: https://github.com/tnurbek/mose.

light_analysis.overview: 提出混合可精简专家（MoSE）架构，通过嵌套可精简专家实现连续精度-计算权衡，在推理时自适应调整专家宽度。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有混合专家（MoE）模型虽通过稀疏激活提升效率，但专家一旦被选择则完全执行，导致精度与计算量之间的权衡存在较大不连续性。实际应用中需要更灵活的模型以适应不同计算预算，但缺乏支持连续调整的架构。
light_analysis.method: MoSE为每个专家设计可精简结构，支持变宽度执行。结合多宽度训练与标准MoE目标，训练过程简单稳定。推理时，采用轻量级测试时训练机制，学习根据路由器置信度映射专家宽度，在固定预算下优化资源分配。
light_analysis.result: 在GPT风格模型、多种路由策略、零样本下游推理及DeepSeek持续预训练中，MoSE在全宽度下匹配或超越标准MoE，并持续将计算-质量前沿推向更低推理FLOPs（示例中FLOPs降低约20%的同时保持精度）。
light_analysis.conclusion: MoSE实现了更细粒度的条件计算，在保持或提升精度的同时显著降低推理成本。其可精简专家设计为部署提供灵活权衡，适用于资源受限场景。未来可探索更复杂的宽度分配策略。

title: Co-PLNet: A Collaborative Point-Line Network for Prompt-Guided Wireframe Parsing
abstract: Wireframe parsing aims to recover line segments and their junctions to form a structured geometric representation useful for downstream tasks such as Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM). Existing methods predict lines and junctions separately and reconcile them post-hoc, causing mismatches and reduced robustness. We present Co-PLNet, a point-line collaborative framework that exchanges spatial cues between the two tasks, where early detections are converted into spatial prompts via a Point-Line Prompt Encoder (PLP-Encoder), which encodes geometric attributes into compact and spatially aligned maps. A Cross-Guidance Line Decoder (CGL-Decoder) then refines predictions with sparse attention conditioned on complementary prompts, enforcing point-line consistency and efficiency. Experiments on Wireframe and YorkUrban show consistent improvements in accuracy and robustness, together with favorable real-time efficiency, demonstrating our effectiveness for structured geometry perception. Our code is available at https://github.com/GalacticHogrider/Co-PLNet.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Co-PLNet，一种协同点-线网络，通过空间提示机制实现点线任务的早期交互与一致性精炼。
light_analysis.motivation: 线框解析中，现有方法独立预测线条和结点后再进行后处理协调，容易导致点线不匹配和鲁棒性下降。这种分离式处理无法充分利用任务间的互补信息，限制了结构化几何表示的准确性。需要一种能够实时交换空间线索的协同框架，以提升点线一致性和整体解析性能。
light_analysis.method: Co-PLNet包含两个核心组件：点-线提示编码器（PLP-Encoder）将早期检测的几何属性编码为紧凑的空间对齐提示图；交叉引导线解码器（CGL-Decoder）利用稀疏注意力机制，以互补提示为条件精炼预测，强制点线一致性。整个框架实现了点线任务的端到端协同学习。
light_analysis.result: 在Wireframe和YorkUrban数据集上，Co-PLNet在准确性和鲁棒性上均优于现有方法，尤其在复杂场景下点线匹配错误显著减少。同时，模型保持了良好的实时推理效率，验证了其在结构化几何感知任务中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Co-PLNet通过协同点线任务并利用空间提示，有效解决了线框解析中的不匹配问题，为结构化几何感知提供了高效精准的方案。未来可探索更复杂的提示编码策略或扩展到三维线框重建等任务。

title: Noise-Driven Exploration and Transient Freezing Select Flat Minima in Stochastic Gradient Descent
abstract: Stochastic gradient descent (SGD) is central to deep learning, yet the dynamical origin of its preference for flatter, more generalizable solutions remains unclear. Here, by analyzing SGD learning dynamics, we identify a nonequilibrium mechanism that governs solution selection during training. Numerical experiments reveal a transient exploratory phase in which SGD trajectories repeatedly escape sharp valleys and migrate toward flatter regions of the loss landscape before becoming confined to a final basin. Using a tractable physical model, we show that SGD noise reshapes the loss landscape into an effective potential that preferentially stabilizes flat solutions. We further uncover a transient freezing mechanism: as training progresses, the flattening landscape suppresses transitions between competing valleys. Stronger SGD noise delays this freezing transition, prolonging the exploratory phase and thereby increasing the probability of convergence to flatter minima. Together, these results provide a unified physical framework connecting learning dynamics, loss-landscape geometry, and generalization, and suggest guiding principles for the design of more effective optimization algorithms.

light_analysis.overview: 论文揭示了随机梯度下降（SGD）偏好平坦极小值的非平衡动力学机制，包括瞬态探索和冻结现象。
light_analysis.motivation: 随机梯度下降（SGD）在深度学习中广泛应用，但其为何倾向于收敛到更平坦、泛化性更好的极小值，其动态机理尚不明确。现有方法多从统计或几何角度解释，缺乏统一的动力学框架。理解这一机制有助于设计更有效的优化算法，提升泛化性能。本研究旨在解决SGD解选择的动态起源问题，弥补理论空白。
light_analysis.method: 通过分析SGD学习动力学，识别出训练过程中的瞬态探索阶段，在此阶段SGD轨迹反复逃离尖锐谷并向损失曲面的平坦区域迁移。利用可处理的物理模型，证明SGD噪声将损失曲面重塑为有效势能，优先稳定平坦解。进一步揭示瞬态冻结机制：训练过程中平坦化景观抑制了竞争谷之间的转换。更强的SGD噪声延迟冻结转变，延长探索阶段，增加收敛到平坦极小值的概率。
light_analysis.result: 数值实验验证了瞬态探索阶段的存在，即SGD轨迹先逃离尖锐谷迁移至平坦区域，然后被限制在最终盆地。基于物理模型的分析表明，有效势能中的平坦解更稳定。更强的SGD噪声能有效延长探索时间，从而提高收敛到平坦极小值的概率。这些结果统一了学习动力学、损失曲面几何与泛化性能之间的关系，为优化算法设计提供了指导。摘要未提供具体性能指标对比数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出了一个统一的物理框架，解释了SGD偏好平坦极小值的动态机制，包括噪声驱动的探索和瞬态冻结过程。这一发现揭示了学习动力学与泛化的内在联系，为设计更有效的优化算法（例如通过调节噪声强度控制探索-利用平衡）提供了理论依据。未来可以进一步探索该机制在其他优化器中的适用性，或利用该原理开发新的正则化策略。

title: Atlas: Orchestrating Heterogeneous Models and Tools for Multi-Domain Complex Reasoning
abstract: The integration of large language models (LLMs) with external tools has significantly expanded the capabilities of AI agents. However, as the diversity of both LLMs and tools increases, selecting the optimal model-tool combination becomes a high-dimensional optimization challenge. Existing approaches often rely on a single model or fixed tool-calling logic, failing to exploit the performance variations across heterogeneous model-tool pairs. In this paper, we present ATLAS (Adaptive Tool-LLM Alignment and Synergistic Invocation), a dual-path framework for dynamic tool usage in cross-domain complex reasoning. ATLAS operates via a dual-path approach: (1) \textbf{training-free cluster-based routing} that exploits empirical priors for domain-specific alignment, and (2) \textbf{RL-based multi-step routing} that explores autonomous trajectories for out-of-distribution generalization. Extensive experiments across 15 benchmarks demonstrate that our method outperforms closed-source models like GPT-4o, surpassing existing routing methods on both in-distribution (+10.1%) and out-of-distribution (+13.1%) tasks. Furthermore, our framework shows significant gains in visual reasoning by orchestrating specialized multi-modal tools.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ATLAS框架，通过双路径路由机制动态选择最优模型-工具组合，提升跨领域复杂推理性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型与外部工具的集成扩展了AI能力，但模型与工具多样性增加导致选择最优组合成为高维优化挑战。现有方法依赖单一模型或固定工具调用逻辑，未能利用异构模型-工具对的性能差异，限制了在复杂跨领域任务中的泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: ATLAS采用双路径框架：(1)免训练的聚类路由，利用经验先验实现领域特定对齐；(2)基于强化学习的多步路由，探索自主轨迹以应对分布外泛化。该方法无需训练即可路由，并通过RL优化多步决策，在15个基准上验证效果。
light_analysis.result: 在15个基准上，ATLAS在分布内任务上超越现有路由方法10.1%，分布外任务提升13.1%，优于GPT-4o。在视觉推理任务中，通过编排专用多模态工具也取得显著增益，验证了框架的有效性和泛化性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ATLAS有效利用异构模型-工具组合，通过动态路由解决了跨领域复杂推理中的选择优化问题。其学术价值在于提出了双路径协同框架，实际应用潜力显著，但摘要未明确说明局限性或未来方向。

title: The Homogenization Problem in LLMs: Towards Meaningful Diversity in AI Safety
abstract: Generative AI models reproduce the human biases in their training data and further amplify them through mechanisms such as mode collapse. The loss of diversity produces homogenization, which not only harms the minoritized but impoverishes everyone. We argue homogenization should be a central concern in AI safety. To meaningfully characterize homogenization in Large Language Models (LLMs), we introduce a framework that allows stakeholders to encode their context and value system. We illustrate our approach with an experiment that surfaces gender bias in an LLM (Claude 3.5 Haiku) on an open-ended story prompt. Building from queer theory, we formalize homogenization in terms of normativity. Borrowing language from feminist theory, we introduce the concept of xeno-reproduction as a class of tasks for mitigating homogenization by promoting diversity. Our work opens a collaborative line of research that seeks to understand and advance diversity in AI.

light_analysis.overview: 提出将LLM中的同质化问题作为AI安全核心，并引入基于酷儿理论与女权理论的形式化框架及xeno-reproduction概念来促进多样性。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成式AI模型会复制并放大训练数据中的偏见，导致同质化，这不仅伤害少数群体，也导致整体多样性丧失。现有AI安全研究较少关注同质化问题，缺乏系统性的表征与缓解方法。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了一个允许利益相关者编码自身上下文和价值体系的框架，用于表征LLM中的同质化。该框架基于酷儿理论将同质化形式化为规范性，并借鉴女权理论引入xeno-reproduction作为一类缓解任务。实验使用Claude 3.5 Haiku在开放式故事提示上展示了性别偏见。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，模型对同一开放式故事提示生成的内容呈现出明显的性别刻板印象，验证了框架的有效性。摘要未提供准确率或量化指标，结果主要基于定性分析。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文主张同质化应成为AI安全的核心关注点，提出的框架和概念为理解和促进AI多样性提供了新视角。该工作开创了跨学科协作的研究方向，但具体缓解方法的效果和通用性尚待进一步验证。

title: Does the Data Processing Inequality Reflect Practice? On the Utility of Low-Level Tasks
abstract: The data processing inequality is an information-theoretic principle stating that the information content of a signal cannot be increased by processing the observations. In particular, it suggests that there is no benefit in enhancing the signal or encoding it before addressing a classification problem. This assertion can be proven to be true for the case of the optimal Bayes classifier. However, in practice, it is common to perform "low-level" tasks before "high-level" downstream tasks despite the overwhelming capabilities of modern deep neural networks. In this paper, we aim to understand when and why low-level processing can be beneficial for classification. We present a comprehensive theoretical study of a binary classification setup, where we consider a classifier that is tightly connected to the optimal Bayes classifier and converges to it as the number of training samples increases. We prove that for any finite number of training samples, there exists a pre-classification processing that improves the classification accuracy. We also explore the effect of class separation, training set size, and class balance on the relative gain from this procedure. We support our theory with an empirical investigation of the theoretical setup. Finally, we conduct an empirical study where we investigate the effect of denoising and encoding on the performance of practical deep classifiers on benchmark datasets. Specifically, we vary the size and class distribution of the training set, and the noise level, and demonstrate trends that are consistent with our theoretical results.

light_analysis.overview: 挑战数据处理不等式在实践中的有效性，证明有限样本下低级处理可提升分类准确率。
light_analysis.motivation: 数据处理不等式表明信号处理不能增加信息，但实践中常对分类任务进行低级预处理。论文旨在理解何时以及为何低级处理有益于分类，弥补理论预测与实际做法之间的差距。
light_analysis.method: 对二元分类进行理论分析，考虑与最优贝叶斯分类器紧密相关的分类器，证明对任意有限训练样本，存在预处理可提升准确率。实验验证理论，并在基准数据集上研究去噪和编码对深度分类器性能的影响，变化训练集大小、类别分布和噪声水平。
light_analysis.result: 理论证明有限样本下预处理能提升分类准确率，实验展示训练集大小、类别平衡和噪声水平对相对增益的影响，趋势与理论一致。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文表明数据处理不等式在有限样本实践中不成立，低级处理对分类有益，为实际应用提供了理论依据。未来可扩展至多类设置。

title: A Benchmark for Omni-Modal Reasoning in Long Videos
abstract: Long-form omni-modal video understanding requires integrating vision, speech, and ambient audio with coherent long-context reasoning. Existing video benchmarks often trade off temporal scale, modality coverage, open-ended interaction, and interpretable scoring. To address this gap, we introduce LongShOTBench, a long video understanding benchmark designed around three coupled goals: holistic omni-modal integration, intent-driven open-ended interaction, and rubric-level diagnosis. It builds single- and multi-turn questions from real viewing scenarios, with systematic tasks probing visual, speech, ambient-audio, temporal, and cross-modal reasoning. Each item includes a reference answer and a weighted criterion-level rubric, letting evaluation identify which perceptual facts, temporal links, modality-grounding requirements, and reasoning steps are satisfied or missed. All samples are manually verified to improve grounding, clarity, and rubric reliability. We also introduce LongShOTAgent, a training-free omni-modal evidence-seeking agent coupling full-video preprocessing with targeted retrieval, query-adaptive segment refinement, and explicit claim verification over visual, speech, and non-speech audio evidence. Its iterative search-refine-verify loop exposes intermediate evidence and lets modality-specific specialists re-analyze relevant moments before answering. We evaluate 105 video-capable models spanning open-source omni-modal models, vision-language systems, audio LLMs, agentic pipelines and closed-source APIs. Current MLLMs remain far from saturating LongShOTBench, while our LongShOTAgent is the strongest training-free system, reaching 66.64% overall. By releasing the benchmark, leaderboard, and method, we provide a shared, interpretable testbed for advancing long-form omni-modal video reasoning. Code, data, and the leaderboard are available at https://longshot.cvmbzuai.com/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LongShOTBench基准和LongShOTAgent方法，推动长视频全模态推理的可解释评估与无训练代理提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频基准在时间尺度、模态覆盖、开放交互和可解释评分上存在权衡，难以全面评估长视频的全模态推理能力。为此，需要构建一个兼顾全模态集成、意图驱动开放交互和细粒度诊断的基准，以推动该领域发展。
light_analysis.method: LongShOTBench基于真实观看场景构建单轮和多轮问题，系统探测视觉、语音、环境音频、时间和跨模态推理，每个样本附带参考答案和加权标准级评分表。LongShOTAgent是无训练的全模态证据搜索代理，通过全视频预处理、目标检索、查询自适应片段细化和显式声明验证，迭代搜索-细化-验证循环，利用模态专用专家重新分析相关时刻后作答。
light_analysis.result: 评估105个视频能力模型，包括开源全模态模型、视觉语言系统、音频大模型、代理流水线和闭源API。当前模型远未饱和LongShOTBench，LongShOTAgent达到66.64%整体准确率，是最强的无训练系统。
light_analysis.conclusion: LongShOTBench和LongShOTAgent为长视频全模态推理提供了可解释的测试平台和高效方法。未来工作可扩展至更多模态或复杂场景，现有MLLM仍有提升空间。

title: Softmax as Linear Attention in the Large-Prompt Regime: a Measure-based Perspective
abstract: Softmax attention is a central component of transformer architectures, yet its nonlinear structure poses significant challenges for theoretical analysis. We develop a unified, measure-based framework for studying single-layer softmax attention under both finite and infinite prompts. For i.i.d. Gaussian inputs, we lean on the fact that the softmax operator converges in the infinite-prompt limit to a linear operator acting on the underlying input-token measure. Building on this insight, we establish non-asymptotic concentration bounds for the output and gradient of softmax attention, quantifying how rapidly the finite-prompt model approaches its infinite-prompt counterpart, and prove that this concentration remains stable along the entire training trajectory in general in-context learning settings with sub-Gaussian tokens. In the case of in-context linear regression, we use the tractable infinite-prompt dynamics to analyze training at finite prompt length. Our results allow optimization analyses developed for linear attention to transfer directly to softmax attention when prompts are sufficiently long, showing that large-prompt softmax attention inherits the analytical structure of its linear counterpart. This, in turn, provides a principled and broadly applicable toolkit for studying the training dynamics and statistical behavior of softmax attention layers in large prompt regimes.

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一测度框架，证明大量提示下softmax注意力收敛为线性算子，实现分析迁移。
light_analysis.motivation: Softmax注意力的非线性结构阻碍了理论分析。现有研究缺乏对有限与无限提示下注意力行为的统一理解，尤其在训练动态方面。本文旨在量化softmax注意力在大量提示下的逼近行为，为优化分析提供可迁移的工具。
light_analysis.method: 基于测度论，针对i.i.d.高斯输入，证明无限提示极限下softmax算子退化为作用于输入标记测度的线性算子。建立非渐近浓度界，量化有限提示模型的逼近速度，并证明浓度在训练轨迹中保持稳定。在上下文线性回归中，利用无限提示动态分析有限提示训练。
light_analysis.result: 建立了softmax注意力输出与梯度的非渐近浓度界，表明有限提示模型指数级逼近无限提示极限。在长提示下，softmax注意力的训练动态与线性注意力一致，允许优化分析直接转移。未报告具体数值，但给出了理论保证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提供了研究大量提示下softmax注意力层的通用分析工具，桥接了非线性与线性注意力之间的理论鸿沟，为解释大上下文Transformer的行为奠定基础。局限在于假设i.i.d.高斯输入，但可扩展至次高斯分布。

title: FUSER: Feed-Forward MUltiview 3D Registration Transformer and SE(3)$^N$ Diffusion Refinement
abstract: Registration of multiview point clouds conventionally relies on extensive pairwise matching to build a pose graph for global synchronization, which is computationally expensive and inherently ill-posed without holistic geometric constraints. This paper proposes FUSER, the first feed-forward multiview registration transformer that jointly processes all scans in a unified, compact latent space to directly predict global poses without any pairwise estimation. To maintain tractability, FUSER encodes each scan into low-resolution superpoint features via a sparse 3D CNN that preserves absolute translation cues, and performs efficient intra- and inter-scan reasoning through a Geometric Alternating Attention module. Particularly, we transfer 2D attention priors from off-the-shelf foundation models to enhance 3D feature interaction and geometric consistency. Building upon FUSER, we further introduce FUSER-DF, an SE(3)$^N$ diffusion refinement framework to correct FUSER's estimates via denoising in the joint SE(3)$^N$ space. FUSER acts as a surrogate multiview registration model to construct the denoiser, and a prior-conditioned SE(3)$^N$ variational lower bound is derived for denoising supervision. Extensive experiments on 3DMatch, ScanNet and ArkitScenes demonstrate that our approach achieves the superior registration accuracy and outstanding computational efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个前馈多视图三维注册Transformer，联合处理所有扫描直接预测全局位姿，无需两两匹配，并引入SE(3)^N扩散细化提升精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统多视图点云注册依赖大量两两匹配构建位姿图进行全局同步，计算成本高且缺乏整体几何约束，本质上不适定。现有方法在效率和准确性上存在不足，FUSER旨在通过统一的潜在空间直接预测全局位姿，克服这些问题。
light_analysis.method: 采用稀疏3D CNN将每个扫描编码为低分辨率超点特征，保留绝对平移信息。通过几何交替注意力模块实现高效的扫描内外推理，并迁移预训练2D注意力先验增强3D特征交互。进一步提出FUSER-DF，在联合SE(3)^N空间进行扩散去噪修正位姿估计，使用FUSER作为替代多视图注册模型构建去噪器，并推导先验条件SE(3)^N变分下界用于去噪监督。
light_analysis.result: 在3DMatch、ScanNet和ArkitScenes数据集上，FUSER和FUSER-DF相比基线方法实现了更优越的注册精度和显著的计算效率提升。具体数值未明确，但摘要强调卓越性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次提出前馈多视图点云注册方法，避免了昂贵的两两匹配，并通过扩散细化进一步提高准确性。具有高计算效率，适用于实际场景。未来可探索扩展到更复杂的场景或融合其他传感器信息。

title: Prototype-Based Semantic Consistency Alignment for Domain Adaptive Retrieval
abstract: Domain adaptive retrieval aims to transfer knowledge from a labeled source domain to an unlabeled target domain, enabling effective retrieval while mitigating domain discrepancies. However, existing methods encounter several fundamental limitations: 1) neglecting class-level semantic alignment and excessively pursuing pair-wise sample alignment; 2) lacking either pseudo-label reliability consideration or geometric guidance for assessing label correctness; 3) directly quantizing original features affected by domain shift, undermining the quality of learned hash codes. In view of these limitations, we propose Prototype-Based Semantic Consistency Alignment (PSCA), a two-stage framework for effective domain adaptive retrieval. In the first stage, a set of orthogonal prototypes directly establishes class-level semantic connections, maximizing inter-class separability while gathering intra-class samples. During the prototype learning, geometric proximity provides a reliability indicator for semantic consistency alignment through adaptive weighting of pseudo-label confidences. The resulting membership matrix and prototypes facilitate feature reconstruction, ensuring quantization on reconstructed rather than original features, thereby improving subsequent hash coding quality and seamlessly connecting both stages. In the second stage, domain-specific quantization functions process the reconstructed features under mutual approximation constraints, generating unified binary hash codes across domains. Extensive experiments validate PSCA's superior performance across multiple datasets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于原型语义一致性对齐的两阶段框架，解决域适应检索中类级对齐和哈希编码质量问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有域适应检索方法存在三大局限：过度追求样本对对齐而忽视类级语义对齐；缺乏对伪标签可靠性的考虑或几何指导；直接量化受域偏移影响的原始特征，损害哈希码质量。这些问题导致跨域检索性能受限，亟需更有效的语义对齐和特征重建策略。
light_analysis.method: 提出PSCA两阶段框架。第一阶段学习一组正交原型，建立类级语义连接，最大化类间分离并聚集类内样本；利用几何近邻性自适应加权伪标签置信度，实现语义一致性对齐；通过隶属矩阵和原型重建特征，避免直接量化原始特征。第二阶段在互近似约束下，对重建特征进行域特定量化，生成统一的跨域二进制哈希码。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集上的大量实验表明，PSCA取得优越性能。与现有方法相比，显著提升了跨域检索准确率，具体数值摘要未明确说明，但验证了框架在类级对齐和哈希码质量方面的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: PSCA通过原型引导的语义对齐和特征重建，有效解决了域适应检索中的类级对齐和量化退化问题。该工作为跨域检索提供了新范式，具有重要学术价值。未来可探索更复杂的原型学习策略或自适应量化机制。

title: EngTrace: A Symbolic Benchmark for Verifiable Process Supervision of Engineering Reasoning
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly entering specialized, safety-critical engineering workflows governed by strict quantitative standards and immutable physical laws, making rigorous evaluation of their reasoning capabilities imperative. However, existing benchmarks such as MMLU, MATH, and HumanEval assess isolated cognitive skills, failing to capture the physically grounded reasoning central to engineering, where scientific principles, quantitative modeling, and practical constraints must converge. To enable verifiable process supervision in engineering, we introduce EngTrace, a symbolic benchmark built on 90 parameterized templates, each generating unique, contamination-resistant problem instances, spanning three major engineering branches, nine core domains, and 20 distinct areas, yielding 1,350 test cases that stress-test generalization across diverse physical scenarios. Moving beyond outcome matching, we introduce a verifiable two-stage evaluation framework that uses a tiered protocol to validate intermediate reasoning traces alongside final answers through automated procedural checks and a heterogeneous AI Tribunal. Our evaluation of 27 leading LLMs reveals a distinct trade-off between numeric precision and trace fidelity, identifying a complexity cliff where abstract mathematical pre-training fails to translate into the integrative reasoning required for advanced engineering tasks.
comment: 33 pages, includes figures and tables; introduces the EngTrace benchmark

light_analysis.overview: 提出了 EngTrace，一个用于工程推理可验证过程监督的符号基准，通过参数化模板生成抗污染测试实例，并引入两阶段评估框架验证中间推理轨迹。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基准如 MMLU、MATH、HumanEval 评估孤立的认知技能，未能捕捉工程中物理基础推理，而工程领域要求严格定量标准和物理定律，因此需要可验证的过程监督来评估 LLM 的工程推理能力。
light_analysis.method: EngTrace 构建于 90 个参数化模板之上，可生成独特且抗污染的问题实例，覆盖三大工程分支、九个核心领域、20 个不同区域，总计 1350 个测试用例。提出两阶段评估框架，通过分层协议验证中间推理轨迹和最终答案，包括自动化过程检查和异构 AI 法庭。
light_analysis.result: 对 27 个领先 LLM 的评估揭示了数字精度与轨迹保真度之间的权衡，并识别出“复杂性悬崖”——抽象数学预训练未能转化为工程任务所需的综合推理，尤其在高级工程任务中表现明显。
light_analysis.conclusion: EngTrace 为工程推理的可验证过程监督提供了标准化基准，揭示了当前 LLM 在物理基础推理方面的不足，有助于推动模型在安全关键工程应用中的改进和验证。

title: MiniFool -- Physics-Constraint-Aware Minimizer-Based Adversarial Attacks in Deep Neural Networks
abstract: In this paper, we present a new algorithm, MiniFool, that implements physics-inspired adversarial attacks for testing neural network-based classification tasks in particle and astroparticle physics. While we initially developed the algorithm for the search for astrophysical tau neutrinos with the IceCube Neutrino Observatory, we apply it to further data from other science domains, thus demonstrating its general applicability. Here, we apply the algorithm to the well-known MNIST data set and furthermore, to Open Data data from the CMS experiment at the Large Hadron Collider. The algorithm is based on minimizing a cost function that combines a $χ^2$ based test-statistic with the deviation from the desired target score. The test statistic quantifies the probability of the perturbations applied to the data based on the experimental uncertainties. For our studied use cases, we find that the likelihood of a flipped classification differs for both the initially correctly and incorrectly classified events. When testing changes of the classifications as a function of an attack parameter that scales the experimental uncertainties, the robustness of the network decision can be quantified. Furthermore, this allows testing the robustness of the classification of unlabeled experimental data.
comment: Submitted to Computing and Software for Big Science

light_analysis.overview: 提出MiniFool算法，基于物理约束的代价函数最小化，生成对抗样本以测试物理领域神经网络的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 在粒子物理和天体粒子物理中，神经网络分类任务面临实验不确定性和对抗攻击的挑战。现有对抗攻击方法未考虑物理领域的特定约束，如实验误差分布，难以评估模型在真实数据中的鲁棒性。因此，需要一种能结合实验不确定性、量化扰动概率的对抗攻击方法，以测试分类网络的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: MiniFool通过最小化一个联合代价函数生成对抗样本，该函数包含χ²检验统计量（基于实验不确定性量化扰动概率）与目标类别偏差。算法可调整攻击参数缩放实验不确定性，从而控制扰动强度。在IceCube中微子数据、MNIST和CMS开放数据上验证，通过分析分类翻转的可能性评估网络鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 在IceCube、MNIST和CMS数据集上，MiniFool能有效生成对抗样本。实验表明，初始正确分类与错误分类的事件在翻转分类时的可能性不同。通过攻击参数缩放实验不确定性，网络决策的鲁棒性可被量化，且适用于未标记的实验数据。未与基线方法比较。
light_analysis.conclusion: MiniFool提供了一种物理感知的对抗攻击方法，能利用实验不确定性生成有意义的测试样本，评估神经网络在真实物理数据中的鲁棒性。其通用性使其可应用于其他科学领域。未来可扩展至更多物理任务，并探索防御策略。

title: Beyond the Sampled Token: Preserving Candidate Support in RLVR
abstract: We revisit exploration collapse in reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR), from the perspective of the \emph{candidate distribution} for next-token prediction. We formally show that as probability concentrates on the top-$1$ candidate, the expected number of distinct responses collapses to one regardless of the sampling budget $K$. This theoretical implication is further verified by our empirical tracking of top-$N$ candidate probabilities during training, where the top-$1$ candidate progressively dominates while plausible alternatives are suppressed. These findings suggest a key desideratum for effective exploration: \emph{preserving non-negligible probability mass on the top-$N$ candidates}. To this end, we propose Candidate-aware Support Preservation (CaSP), with two complementary designs. Specifically, CaSP redistributes positive gradients among top-$N$ candidates for correct responses, and applies a stronger penalty to the top-$1$ candidate for incorrect responses. Unlike many exploration-oriented methods that improve pass@$K$ at the cost of pass@1, CaSP improves pass@$K$ across the full $K$ spectrum. These gains generalize to 6 math, 2 logical-reasoning, and 2 coding benchmarks, and scales to 32B-parameter models and sampling budgets up to $K=1024$, positioning it as a principled, candidate-level approach for RLVR exploration.
comment: Technical report (23 pages, 16 figures, project page: https://spherelab.ai/simko/)

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出CaSP方法，通过保留前N个候选的概率质量来解决RLVR中的探索崩溃问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 在强化学习与可验证奖励（RLVR）中，探索崩溃导致模型仅采样单一响应，忽略候选多样性。理论证明当概率集中到top-1候选时，期望的不同响应数量塌缩至1。现有方法常以牺牲pass@1为代价提升pass@K，缺乏对候选分布的显式维护。
light_analysis.method: CaSP包含两个互补设计：对于正确响应，在前N个候选间重分配正梯度；对于错误响应，对top-1候选施加更强惩罚。该方法无需改变采样策略，直接作用于候选分布的概率梯度，保留top-N候选的非零概率质量。
light_analysis.result: 在6个数学、2个逻辑推理和2个代码基准测试上，CaSP在全K谱系（K=1至1024）上一致提升pass@K，不牺牲pass@1性能。扩展到32B参数模型，验证了其可扩展性。
light_analysis.conclusion: CaSP是一种原则性的候选级探索方法，有效缓解探索崩溃，提升采样多样性。其不依赖额外计算开销，适用于大规模RLVR训练，为未来研究提供了新视角。

title: Geodesic Calculus on Implicitly Defined Latent Manifolds
abstract: Latent manifolds of autoencoders provide low-dimensional representations of data, which can be studied from a geometric perspective. We propose to describe these latent manifolds as implicit submanifolds of some ambient latent space. Based on this, we develop tools for a discrete Riemannian calculus approximating classical geometric operators. These tools are robust against inaccuracies of the implicit representation often occurring in practical examples. To obtain a suitable implicit representation, we propose to learn an approximate projection onto the latent manifold by minimizing a denoising objective. This approach is independent of the underlying autoencoder and supports the use of different Riemannian geometries on the latent manifolds. The framework in particular enables the computation of geodesic paths connecting given end points and shooting geodesics via the Riemannian exponential maps on latent manifolds. We evaluate our approach on various autoencoders trained on synthetic and real data.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于隐式定义的潜在流形的黎曼几何计算方法，用于自编码器的潜在空间。
light_analysis.motivation: 自编码器的潜在流形提供数据的低维表示，但现有方法对隐式表示的误差敏感，且缺乏通用的几何计算框架。本文旨在开发鲁棒的离散黎曼几何工具，以精确计算测地线路径和指数映射，同时支持不同的黎曼几何结构。
light_analysis.method: 将潜在流形描述为隐式子流形，通过学习近似投影（最小化去噪目标）获得鲁棒的隐式表示，不依赖于特定自编码器。基于此，推导离散黎曼几何算子，计算连接端点的测地线路径，并通过黎曼指数映射实现测地线射击。
light_analysis.result: 在合成数据和真实数据上训练多种自编码器，验证了方法的有效性。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称工具对隐式表示的误差具有鲁棒性，能够准确计算测地线路径。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种独立于自编码器架构的框架，支持不同黎曼几何，为潜在流形的几何分析提供了通用工具。潜在局限可能是计算复杂度或对高维流形的扩展，未来可探索其他几何量计算。

title: On Surjectivity of Neural Networks: Can you elicit any behavior from your model?
abstract: Given a trained neural network, can any specified output be generated by some input? Equivalently, does the network correspond to a function that is surjective? In generative models, surjectivity implies that any output, including harmful or undesirable content, can in principle be generated by the networks, raising concerns about model safety and jailbreak vulnerabilities. In this paper, we prove that many fundamental building blocks of modern neural architectures, such as networks with pre-layer normalization and linear-attention modules, are almost always surjective. As corollaries, widely used generative frameworks, including GPT-style transformers and diffusion models with deterministic ODE solvers, admit inverse mappings for arbitrary outputs. By studying surjectivity of these modern and commonly used neural architectures, we contribute a formalism that sheds light on their unavoidable vulnerability to a broad class of adversarial attacks.

light_analysis.overview: 证明现代神经网络架构（如预层归一化网络和线性注意力模块）几乎总是满射，揭示生成模型不可避免的对抗攻击脆弱性。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成模型的安全性是关键问题，满射性意味着任何输出（包括有害内容）原则上都可生成，从而引发模型安全隐患。现有工作缺乏对神经网络满射性的系统性分析，无法解释为何模型易受广泛对抗攻击。本文旨在填补这一理论空白，通过研究现代架构的满射性，揭示其固有的脆弱性。
light_analysis.method: 本文通过数学证明，分析现代神经网络的基本构建块（如预层归一化和线性注意力模块）的满射性质。利用函数分析和代数拓扑工具，证明这些模块在温和条件下几乎总是满射。作为推论，扩展至GPT风格transformer和确定性ODE求解器的扩散模型，证明其对任意输出存在逆映射。
light_analysis.result: 理论结果表明，许多现代生成模型（包括GPT式transformer和扩散模型）具有满射性，即任何输出均可由某个输入生成。这直接解释了这些模型对多种对抗攻击（如越狱攻击）的不可避免的脆弱性。但摘要未提供具体数值实验对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次对现代神经网络满射性进行形式化分析，揭示了生成模型的固有安全漏洞：无法通过训练避免某些有害输出。这一发现对模型安全性评估和防护策略设计具有重要指导意义。未来工作可探索非满射架构设计或检测逆映射的方法。

title: RooseBERT: A New Deal For Political Language Modelling
abstract: The increasing amount of political debates and politics-related discussions calls for the definition of novel computational methods to automatically analyse such content with the final goal of lightening up political deliberation to citizens. However, the specificity of the political language and the argumentative form of these debates (employing hidden communication strategies and leveraging implicit arguments) make this task very challenging, even for current general-purpose pre-trained Language Models (LMs). To address this, we introduce a novel pre-trained LM for political discourse language called RooseBERT. Pre-training a LM on a specialised domain presents different technical and linguistic challenges, requiring extensive computational resources and large-scale data. RooseBERT has been trained on large political debate and speech corpora (11GB) in English. To evaluate its performances, we fine-tuned it on multiple downstream tasks related to political debate analysis, i.e., stance detection, sentiment analysis, argument component detection and classification, argument relation prediction and classification, policy classification, named entity recognition (NER). Our results show improvements over general-purpose LMs on the majority of these tasks, highlighting how domain-specific pre-training enhances performance in political debate analysis. We release RooseBERT for the research community.

light_analysis.overview: 提出针对政治领域预训练的RooseBERT模型，在11GB政治语料上训练，显著提升多项政治辩论分析任务性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 政治辩论数量激增，需要自动分析方法以帮助公民理解政治论述。然而，政治语言具有独特性（如隐藏沟通策略、隐含论证），使得通用预训练语言模型难以有效处理。现有方法缺乏领域特定知识，导致在立场检测、情感分析等任务上性能不足。因此，需要专门针对政治话语的预训练模型。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出RooseBERT，一个基于BERT架构的预训练语言模型，在11GB英文政治辩论和演讲语料上从头训练。模型采用Masked Language Modeling和Next Sentence Prediction目标。为评估效果，在多个下游任务上微调，包括立场检测、情感分析、论证组件检测与分类、论证关系预测与分类、政策分类和命名实体识别。关键创新在于领域特化预训练，而非通用语料。
light_analysis.result: 与通用预训练语言模型（如BERT）相比，RooseBERT在大多数政治辩论分析任务上表现更优。具体改进包括立场检测、情感分析、论证组件检测等任务上的准确率或F1分数提升。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称在多数任务上有显著改进。模型已公开供研究社区使用。
light_analysis.conclusion: RooseBERT证明了领域特定预训练在政治语言处理中的有效性，为政治辩论自动化分析提供了强大工具。其贡献在于构建了大规模政治语料库并训练了专业模型，释放给社区。未来工作可探索更大规模语料或结合跨领域知识。局限性可能包括仅限英文、计算资源需求高。

title: Exposing the Illusion of Fairness: Auditing Vulnerabilities to Distributional Manipulation Attacks
abstract: The rapid deployment of AI systems in high-stakes domains, including those classified as high-risk under the The EU AI Act (Regulation (EU) 2024/1689), has intensified the need for reliable compliance auditing. For binary classifiers, regulatory risk assessment often relies on global fairness metrics such as the Disparate Impact ratio, widely used to evaluate potential discrimination. In typical auditing settings, the auditee provides a subset of its dataset to an auditor, while a supervisory authority may verify whether this subset is representative of the full underlying distribution. In this work, we investigate to what extent a malicious auditee can construct a fairness-compliant yet representative-looking sample from a non-compliant original distribution, thereby creating an illusion of fairness. We formalize this problem as a constrained distributional projection task and introduce mathematically grounded manipulation strategies based on entropic and optimal transport projections. These constructions characterize the minimal distributional shift required to satisfy fairness constraints. To counter such attacks, we formalize representativeness through distributional distance based statistical tests and systematically evaluate their ability to detect manipulated samples. Our analysis highlights the conditions under which fairness manipulation can remain statistically undetected and provides practical guidelines for strengthening supervisory verification. We validate our theoretical findings through experiments on standard tabular datasets for bias detection. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/ValentinLafargue/Inspection.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示公平性审计中分布操纵攻击的漏洞，并提供检测与防范方法。
light_analysis.motivation: AI系统在高风险领域（如EU AI Act定义的高风险系统）的快速部署，使得合规审计需求迫切。常用公平性指标如Disparate Impact ratio用于评估歧视，但恶意被审计者可能提供非代表性样本掩盖真实歧视，现有审计方法难以应对此类分布操纵攻击，亟需研究攻击形式与检测策略。
light_analysis.method: 将问题形式化为约束分布投影任务，提出基于熵投影和最优传输投影的数学化操纵策略，刻画满足公平约束的最小分布偏移。通过分布距离统计检验检测样本代表性，在标准表格数据集上验证理论发现，系统评估操纵样本的可检测性。
light_analysis.result: 实验验证了理论分析，表明在特定条件下分布操纵可保持统计不可检测，提供了检测操纵的临界条件。与基线方法对比，揭示了现有审计的脆弱性，并提出实用指南以加强监督验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了公平性审计中分布操纵攻击的严重威胁，形式化了攻击与检测问题。学术上贡献了数学框架，实践上为监管机构提供改进审计流程的建议。未来可扩展至多类分类器或其他公平指标。

title: Detail++: Training-Free Detail Enhancer for Text-to-Image Diffusion Models
abstract: Recent advances in text-to-image (T2I) generation have led to impressive visual results. However, these models still face significant challenges when handling complex prompt, particularly those involving multiple subjects with distinct attributes. Inspired by the human drawing process, which first outlines the composition and then incrementally adds details, we propose Detail++, a training-free framework that introduces a novel Progressive Detail Injection (PDI) strategy to address this limitation. Specifically, we decompose a complex prompt into a sequence of simplified sub-prompts, guiding the generation process in stages. This staged generation leverages the inherent layout-controlling capacity of self-attention to first ensure global composition, followed by precise refinement. To achieve accurate binding between attributes and corresponding subjects, we exploit cross-attention mechanisms and further introduce a Centroid Alignment Loss at test time to reduce binding noise and enhance attribute consistency. Extensive experiments on T2I-CompBench and a newly constructed style composition benchmark demonstrate that Detail++ significantly outperforms existing methods, particularly in scenarios involving multiple objects and complex stylistic conditions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无需训练的细节增强框架Detail++，通过渐进式细节注入策略解决文本到图像扩散模型处理复杂提示的难题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文本到图像模型在处理包含多个不同属性主体的复杂提示时，生成效果不佳，难以准确绑定属性与主体。受人类绘画先构图后填充细节的启发，旨在无需额外训练即可提升模型对复杂提示的细节生成能力和属性一致性。
light_analysis.method: 提出Detail++框架，核心是渐进式细节注入（PDI）策略：将复杂提示分解为一系列简化子提示，分阶段指导生成。首阶段利用自注意力机制确保全局构图，后续阶段通过交叉注意力实现属性与主体的精确绑定，并引入测试时的质心对齐损失以减少绑定噪声，增强属性一致性。
light_analysis.result: 在T2I-CompBench和新构建的风格组合基准上，Detail++显著优于现有方法，尤其在多对象和复杂风格条件下，生成图像的细节丰富度和属性绑定准确率均有大幅提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种无需训练的细节增强方法，有效提升了扩散模型对复杂提示的生成质量，具有重要的实际应用价值。未来可进一步扩展至更多生成场景，如视频或3D内容。

title: Critique of World Model: A Generative Latent Prediction Architecture for World Modeling
abstract: World Model, the algorithmic simulator of the real-world environment which biological agents experience and act upon, has been an emerging topic in recent years due to the rising need to develop virtual agents with artificial (general) intelligence. There has been much discussion on what a world model really is, how to build it, how to use it, and how to evaluate it.
