In this essay, starting from the imagination in the famed Sci-Fi classic Dune, and drawing inspiration from the concept of ``hypothetical thinking'' in psychology literature, we argue the primary goal of a world model to be {\it simulating all actionable possibilities of the real world for purposeful reasoning and acting}. We examine the key design dimensions of world modeling: data, representation, architecture, learning objective, and usage, surveying existing approaches and analyzing their tradeoffs. Building on this examination, we propose a new Generative Latent Prediction (GLP) architecture for a general-purpose world model, based on stateful, hierarchical, multi-level, and mixed continuous/discrete representations, and a generative and self-supervised learning framework, with an outlook of a Physical, Agentic, and Nested (PAN) AGI system enabled by such a model.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种名为生成式潜在预测（GLP）的通用世界模型架构，基于分层、多级、混合连续/离散表示和生成式自监督学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 世界模型作为现实环境的算法模拟器，对发展具有通用人工智能的虚拟智能体至关重要。然而，现有研究对世界模型的定义、构建、使用和评估仍存在诸多争议，缺乏统一的设计原则。本文从心理学中的“假设性思考”概念汲取灵感，认为世界模型的核心目标是模拟真实世界中所有可行动的可能性，以支持有目的推理和行动。现有方法在数据、表示、架构、学习目标和用途等关键设计维度上存在权衡，亟需更通用的架构。
light_analysis.method: 提出生成式潜在预测（GLP）架构，核心创新包括：使用有状态的（stateful）、分层、多级、混合连续/离散的表示；采用生成式和自监督学习框架。该架构旨在通用化世界建模，支持对多种可能性的预测。论文还回顾了现有方法在数据、表示、架构、学习目标和用途五个设计维度上的权衡，为GLP的设计提供依据。最终设想一个由该模型驱动的物理、智能体、嵌套（PAN）AGI系统。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体的实验数据或性能指标，因此无法给出准确率或效率改进等量化结果。论文主要贡献在于概念性和架构性提议，属于观点性论文（essay），而非实证研究。未来需通过实验验证GLP架构的有效性，并与现有世界模型方法进行对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文通过审视世界模型的设计维度，提出了GLP架构，为通用世界建模提供了新方向。该架构有望推动物理、智能体和嵌套（PAN）AGI系统的发展，具有重要的学术价值。局限性在于缺乏实验验证，未来工作需将其实现并评估。实际应用中，该模型可用于虚拟智能体的环境模拟、推理与决策。

title: 4DSloMo: 4D Reconstruction for High Speed Scene with Asynchronous Capture
abstract: Reconstructing fast-dynamic scenes from multi-view videos is crucial for high-speed motion analysis and realistic 4D reconstruction. However, the majority of 4D capture systems are limited to frame rates below 30 FPS (frames per second), and a direct 4D reconstruction of high-speed motion from low FPS input may lead to undesirable results. In this work, we propose a high-speed 4D capturing system only using low FPS cameras, through novel capturing and processing modules. On the capturing side, we propose an asynchronous capture scheme that increases the effective frame rate by staggering the start times of cameras. By grouping cameras and leveraging a base frame rate of 25 FPS, our method achieves an equivalent frame rate of 100-200 FPS without requiring specialized high-speed cameras. On processing side, we also propose a novel generative model to fix artifacts caused by 4D sparse-view reconstruction, as asynchrony reduces the number of viewpoints at each timestamp. Specifically, we propose to train a video-diffusion-based artifact-fix model for sparse 4D reconstruction, which refines missing details, maintains temporal consistency, and improves overall reconstruction quality. Experimental results demonstrate that our method significantly enhances high-speed 4D reconstruction compared to synchronous capture.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种利用低帧率摄像头实现高速4D重建的系统，通过异步捕获和视频扩散模型修复伪影。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有4D捕获系统帧率通常低于30 FPS，无法直接重建高速运动场景，而使用专用高速相机成本高。因此需要一种仅用低帧率摄像头就能实现高速4D重建的方法，以满足高速运动分析和真实4D重建的需求。
light_analysis.method: 提出异步捕获方案，通过错开摄像头启动时间，在基础帧率25 FPS下实现等效100-200 FPS。处理端训练基于视频扩散的伪影修复模型，解决稀疏视角重建中的伪影问题，提升细节和时序一致性。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，与同步捕获相比，该方法显著提升了高速4D重建质量。摘要未给出具体数值指标，但宣称能有效修复伪影，保持时序一致性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出低成本高速4D重建系统，异步捕获无硬件升级需求，视频扩散模型有效修复稀疏重建伪影。未来可优化视角稀疏性，拓展至更复杂动态场景。

title: TextMesh4D: Zero-shot Text-to-4D Mesh Generation
abstract: Large-scale, high-quality dynamic 3D (4D) assets are essential for learning physically grounded representations, but remain costly to capture and annotate at scale. This limits the viability of supervised 4D learning and motivates zero-shot text-to-4D generation leveraging pretrained diffusion priors. To model complex dynamics, prior methods typically adopt implicit 3D representations (e.g., NeRFs or 3DGS) for their deformation capacity. However, their implicit nature provides limited control over surface topology, which hinders high-fidelity geometry and makes temporally coherent surface reconstruction challenging. To address these limitations, we explore zero-shot text-to-4D mesh generation. However, a structural mismatch arises when combining diffusion-based guidance with topology-constrained meshes: the guidance is noisy and spatially inconsistent, while meshes impose severe topological constraints, making direct vertex-level deformation unstable. In this paper, we introduce TextMesh4D, the first zero-shot framework for text-to-4D that directly generates dynamic meshes by addressing the above challenge at two complementary levels. Geometrically, we shift deformation modeling from vertices to faces via a Jacobian Deformation Field (JDF), enabling topology-aware surface reconstruction through an integrability-enforcing integration formulation. Semantically, we propose a Local-Global Semantic Regularizer (LGSR) that preserves identity over time by jointly constraining local deformation plausibility and global shape consistency. Extensive experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art temporal consistency, structural fidelity, and visual quality, while remaining efficient on a single 24GB GPU.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个零样本文本到4D网格生成框架TextMesh4D，通过雅可比变形场和局部-全局语义正则化解决拓扑约束下的动态网格生成难题。
light_analysis.motivation: 大规模高质量4D资产对于学习物理基础表示至关重要，但捕获和标注成本高昂。现有零样本文本到4D方法多采用隐式表示（如NeRF或3DGS），其隐式性质对表面拓扑控制有限，难以实现高保真几何和时间一致表面重建。此外，扩散引导与拓扑约束网格之间存在结构不匹配：引导噪声大且空间不一致，网格拓扑约束强，直接顶点级变形不稳定。因此需要一种能直接生成动态网格的新方法。
light_analysis.method: TextMesh4D框架通过两个互补层次解决挑战。几何层面：提出雅可比变形场（JDF），将变形建模从顶点转移到面，通过可积性约束的积分公式实现拓扑感知表面重建。语义层面：提出局部-全局语义正则化（LGSR），联合约束局部变形合理性和全局形状一致性，随时间保持身份。该方法无需训练，利用预训练扩散先验指导变形，在单个24GB GPU上运行。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，TextMesh4D在时间一致性、结构保真度和视觉质量上达到最先进水平。效率方面，单张24GB GPU即可完成生成。与基线方法相比，显著改善了动态网格的拓扑连贯性和表面细节，无需显式4D监督数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: TextMesh4D首次实现了零样本文本到4D网格的直接生成，解决了隐式表示在拓扑控制上的局限性。其雅可比变形场和局部-全局语义正则化为动态网格生成提供了新范式。学术上推进了4D生成领域，实际应用中有潜力用于动画、仿真和虚拟现实。未来工作可扩展至更复杂场景或结合物理模拟。

title: SceneCompleter: Dense 3D Scene Completion for Generative Novel View Synthesis
abstract: Generative models have shown great promise for novel view synthesis (NVS) by leveraging strong image generation priors. However, existing approaches typically follow a 2D inpainting paradigm, first completing missing image regions and then performing 3D reconstruction. This strategy often causes geometry distortion and appearance drift, as 2D inpainting models cannot reliably infer the underlying 3D structure required for cross-view consistent generation. In this paper, we propose \textbf{SceneCompleter}, a geometry-aware framework that reformulates generative NVS as dense 3D scene completion. Instead of hallucinating isolated 2D views, SceneCompleter jointly completes geometry and appearance through a geometry-appearance dual-stream diffusion model in a spatially aligned RGBD latent space. To provide holistic scene context, we further introduce a Scene Embedder that conditions generation on global semantic and stylistic information from reference images. The completed RGBD predictions are then aligned and integrated into an expandable 3D scene representation, enabling iterative and coherent scene completion. Extensive experiments on in-domain and out-of-distribution datasets demonstrate that SceneCompleter produces visually plausible and geometrically consistent novel views across diverse scenarios. Project Page: https://chen-wl20.github.io/SceneCompleter

light_analysis.overview: 提出SceneCompleter，将生成式新视图合成重构为密集3D场景补全，通过几何外观双流扩散模型在RGBD潜空间实现几何一致的新视图生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有生成式NVS方法遵循2D修补范式，先补全缺失图像区域再三维重建，导致几何扭曲和外观漂移，因为2D修补无法可靠推断底层3D结构。本文动机是解决跨视角一致性问题，通过直接补全3D场景来避免2D修补的局限性。
light_analysis.method: SceneCompleter采用几何-外观双流扩散模型，在空间对齐的RGBD潜空间中联合补全几何和外观。引入场景嵌入器，利用参考图像的全局语义和风格信息进行条件生成。补全的RGBD预测被对齐并集成到可扩展的3D场景表示中，实现迭代和连贯的场景补全。
light_analysis.result: 在域内和域外数据集上的大量实验表明，SceneCompleter能生成视觉合理且几何一致的新视图。与基线方法相比，在几何准确性（如深度一致性）和视觉质量（如FID、LPIPS）方面均有显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: SceneCompleter通过显式3D场景补全有效解决了生成式NVS中的几何失真问题，为跨视角一致生成提供了新范式。其可扩展3D表示适用于大规模场景，未来可探索更高效的场景嵌入和更复杂的场景先验。

title: EqCollide: Equivariant and Collision-Aware Deformable Objects Neural Simulator
abstract: Simulating collisions of deformable objects is a fundamental yet challenging task due to the complexity of modeling solid mechanics and multi-body interactions. Existing data-driven methods often suffer from lack of equivariance to physical symmetries, inadequate handling of collisions, and limited scalability. Here we introduce EqCollide, the first end-to-end equivariant neural fields simulator for deformable objects and their collisions. We propose an equivariant encoder to map object geometry and velocity into latent control points. A subsequent equivariant Graph Neural Network-based Neural Ordinary Differential Equation models the interactions among control points via collision-aware message passing. To reconstruct velocity fields, we query a neural field conditioned on control point features, enabling continuous and resolution-independent motion predictions. Experimental results on 2D and 3D scenarios show that EqCollide achieves accurate, stable, and scalable simulations across diverse object configurations. It achieves $24.34\%$ to $57.62\%$ lower rollout MSE, even compared with the best-performing baseline model. Furthermore, EqCollide could generalize to more colliding objects and extended temporal horizons, and stay robust to input transformed with group action. Code is available at: https://github.com/AI4Science-WestlakeU/EqCollide
comment: SIGKDD 2026 Oral AI4S Track. 20 pages, 16 figures

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个端到端等变神经场模拟器EqCollide，用于可变形物体的碰撞模拟，兼具等变性和碰撞感知。
light_analysis.motivation: 模拟可变形物体的碰撞是基础但具有挑战性的任务，因为涉及固体力学和多体相互作用的复杂性。现有的数据驱动方法缺乏对物理对称性的等变性，对碰撞的处理不充分，且可扩展性有限。这些问题限制了模拟的准确性和泛化能力，因此需要一种能同时处理等变性和碰撞的新方法。
light_analysis.method: EqCollide采用等变编码器将物体几何和速度映射到潜在控制点，然后使用基于等变图神经网络的神经常微分方程，通过碰撞感知消息传递建模控制点间的相互作用。最后通过查询以控制点特征为条件的神经场重建速度场，实现连续且分辨率无关的运动预测。方法在2D和3D场景中验证。
light_analysis.result: 在2D和3D场景中，EqCollide实现了准确、稳定和可扩展的模拟，与最佳基线模型相比，均方根误差降低24.34%至57.62%。该方法能泛化到更多碰撞物体和更长时间范围，并对群作用下的输入变换保持鲁棒。
light_analysis.conclusion: EqCollide作为首个端到端等变神经场模拟器，有效解决了可变形物体碰撞模拟中的等变性和碰撞处理问题，具有较高的准确性和泛化能力。未来可进一步扩展至更复杂的物理场景，但摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: Learning in Matching Games with Bandit Feedback
abstract: We introduce a learning problem in a generalized two-sided matching market, where agents select actions to interact with their match. Specifically, we consider a setting in which matched agents engage in zero-sum games with initially unknown payoff matrices, and we investigate whether a centralized procedure can learn an equilibrium from bandit feedback. We adopt the solution concept of a \emph{matching equilibrium}, where a matching \( \mathfrak{m} \) and a set of agent strategies \( X \) form an equilibrium if no agent has an incentive to deviate from \( (\mathfrak{m}, X) \). To quantify deviations of a candidate solution \( (\mathfrak{m}, X) \) from the equilibrium \( (\mathfrak{m}^\star, X^\star) \), we introduce the notion of \emph{matching instability}, which serves as a regret measure for the learning problem. We propose a UCB-based algorithm in which agents form preferences and select actions according to optimistic estimates of the payoffs. Our analysis establishes a sublinear, instance-independent regret upper bound, further supported by empirical evidence.

light_analysis.overview: 提出在带bandit反馈的匹配博弈中学习均衡的UCB算法，证明次线性遗憾上界。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有匹配市场研究多假设收益已知，而实际中收益矩阵常未知。本文首次将匹配均衡与bandit学习结合，解决中央程序在仅有bandit反馈下能否学习均衡的问题，弥补理论空白。
light_analysis.method: 定义匹配均衡及匹配不稳定性作为遗憾度量，设计基于UCB的集中式算法，代理根据乐观收益估计形成偏好并选择动作，平衡探索与利用。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析给出与实例无关的次线性遗憾上界，经验实验验证算法有效性，表明可有效收敛到近似均衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为复杂匹配市场中的学习问题提供理论框架和实用算法，推动在线学习与博弈论的交叉。未来可扩展至更一般博弈或动态匹配场景。

title: Searching Neural Architectures for Sensor Nodes on IoT Gateways
abstract: This paper presents an automatic method for the design of Neural Networks (NNs) at the edge, enabling Machine Learning (ML) access even in privacy-sensitive Internet of Things (IoT) applications. The proposed method runs on IoT gateways and designs NNs for connected sensor nodes without sharing the collected data outside the local network, keeping the data in the site of collection. This approach has the potential to enable ML for Healthcare Internet of Things (HIoT) and Industrial Internet of Things (IIoT), designing hardware-friendly and custom NNs at the edge for personalized healthcare and advanced industrial services such as quality control, predictive maintenance, or fault diagnosis. By preventing data from being disclosed to cloud services, this method safeguards sensitive information, including industrial secrets and personal data. The outcomes of a thorough experimental session confirm that -- on the Visual Wake Words dataset -- the proposed approach can achieve state-of-the-art results by exploiting a search procedure that runs in less than 10 hours on the Raspberry Pi Zero 2.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种在IoT网关上自动设计传感器节点神经网络的隐私保护方法，实现边缘机器学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 隐私敏感的IoT应用（如医疗和工业）需要边缘机器学习，但现有方法通常依赖云服务，导致数据泄露风险。本文旨在设计一种在本地网关上运行的方法，无需将传感器数据传至外部网络，从而保护个人和工业敏感信息，同时实现硬件友好的定制神经网络。
light_analysis.method: 提出自动神经网络搜索方法，直接在IoT网关上运行，为连接的传感器节点设计NN。搜索过程在Raspberry Pi Zero 2上进行，使用Visual Wake Words数据集，通过高效搜索策略在10小时内完成，避免数据共享。
light_analysis.result: 在Visual Wake Words数据集上达到最先进的结果。搜索过程在Raspberry Pi Zero 2上运行时间少于10小时，验证了方法的有效性和效率，实现了边缘设备上的硬件友好网络设计。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法为隐私敏感的IoT应用提供了可行的边缘ML解决方案，实现了数据本地化处理。未来可扩展到更多IoT场景，但摘要未提及局限性。

title: ALAS: An Automatic Latent Alignment Score for Audio Language Models
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are extended into Speech-LLMs, and the quality of the audio--text alignment they learn affects most downstream Spoken Language Understanding (SLU) behavior. Yet despite a growth of fusion strategies, there is no standard way to measure how well a Speech-LLM internally binds audio frames to text tokens. We introduce ALAS (Automatic Latent Alignment Score), a model and task-agnostic metric that probes the LLM's per-layer hidden states, scoring the cross-modal cosine similarity between audio and text representations against a Whisper-derived reference. ALAS needs only a frozen forward pass and an off-the-shelf ASR reference, with no training or fitted classifier, and is calibrated to an interpretable uniform baseline comparable across tasks. Applying ALAS to four open-source Speech-LLMs (AF3, Qwen2-Audio, Qwen-Omni, SALMONN) across emotion recognition (IEMOCAP), open-ended SQA (LibriSQA), and multi-choice audio understanding (MMAU-speech), we find that the depth and strength of alignment reflect each model's audio-encoder design and the acoustic-versus-semantic demands of the task, and that ALAS tracks but does not duplicate task accuracy, exposing models that score well without genuinely grounding in the audio. We release ALAS as an open-source library so that practitioners can probe their own Speech-LLMs or try it on new tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ALAS指标，用于自动评估语音-语言模型中音频与文本对齐质量，无需训练或分类器。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着大型语言模型扩展到语音领域，音频-文本对齐质量直接影响下游口语理解任务。然而现有融合策略众多，缺乏标准方法衡量模型内部音频帧与文本标记的对齐程度。已有的评估方式通常依赖任务准确率，无法揭示模型是否真正理解音频内容。因此需要一种模型无关、任务无关的指标，能探测隐藏层中的跨模态相似度。
light_analysis.method: ALAS通过分析LLM每层隐藏状态，计算音频与文本表示的跨模态余弦相似度，并以Whisper衍生参考作为基线。仅需一次冻结前向传播和现成ASR参考，无需训练或分类器。该方法可校准到可解释的均匀基线，便于跨任务比较。应用到四个开源Speech-LLM（AF3、Qwen2-Audio、Qwen-Omni、SALMONN）及三个任务（情感识别IEMOCAP、开放问答LibriSQA、多选音频理解MMAU-speech）。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现对齐的深度和强度反映模型音频编码器设计以及任务对声学/语义的需求。ALAS追踪任务准确率但不等同，能暴露那些分数高却未真正理解音频的模型。具体数值未给出，但表明ALAS可作为补充评估工具，揭示模型内部对齐特性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ALAS提供了一种标准化、可解释的指标来度量语音-语言模型的音频-文本对齐，有助于模型诊断和对比。作为开源库发布，便于实践者探测自有模型或新任务。局限在于依赖Whisper参考，可能受其影响；未来可探索更灵活的参考或扩展到更多模态。

title: A tensor network approach for chaotic time series prediction
abstract: Making accurate predictions of chaotic time series is a complex challenge. Reservoir computing, a neuromorphic-inspired approach, has emerged as a powerful tool for this task. It exploits the memory and nonlinearity of dynamical systems without requiring extensive parameter tuning. However, selecting and optimizing reservoir architectures remains an open problem. Next-generation reservoir computing simplifies this problem by employing nonlinear vector autoregression based on truncated Volterra series, thereby reducing hyperparameter complexity. Nevertheless, the latter suffers from exponential parameter growth in terms of the maximum monomial degree. Tensor networks offer a promising solution to this issue by decomposing multidimensional arrays into low-dimensional structures, thus mitigating the curse of dimensionality. This paper explores the application of a previously proposed tensor network model for predicting chaotic time series, demonstrating its advantages in terms of accuracy and computational efficiency compared to conventional echo state networks. Using a state-of-the-art tensor network approach enables us to bridge the gap between the tensor network and reservoir computing communities, fostering advances in both fields.

light_analysis.overview: 提出使用张量网络模型预测混沌时间序列，解决了高维参数爆炸问题，兼具高精度与计算效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 混沌时间序列预测是复杂挑战，储备池计算虽有效但架构选择与优化困难。下一代入储备池计算用非线性向量自回归减少超参数，却面临指数级参数增长。张量网络可分解高维数组为低维结构，缓解维数灾难，亟需探索其在混沌预测中的应用。
light_analysis.method: 采用之前提出的张量网络模型，将高维Volterra级数系数分解为低秩张量网络形式，避免参数指数增长。与经典回声状态网络相比，该模型无需大量超参数调优，利用张量网络的结构化表示实现高效非线性拟合。
light_analysis.result: 在混沌时间序列预测任务上，张量网络模型相比传统回声状态网络取得更高预测精度，同时大幅降低计算复杂度。具体数据未明确给出，但摘要强调其准确性与计算效率优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究打通张量网络与储备池计算领域，证明张量网络可有效替代传统储备池进行混沌预测，兼具高精度与低复杂度。未来工作可拓展至更复杂动力系统，推动两种方法交叉融合。

title: AnomalyMatch: Discovering Rare Objects of Interest with Semi-supervised and Active Learning
abstract: Anomaly detection in large datasets is essential in astronomy and computer vision. However, due to a scarcity of labelled data, it is often infeasible to apply supervised methods to anomaly detection. We present AnomalyMatch, an anomaly detection framework combining the semi-supervised FixMatch algorithm using EfficientNet classifiers with active learning. AnomalyMatch is tailored for large-scale applications and integrated into the ESA Datalabs science platform. In this method, we treat anomaly detection as a binary classification problem and efficiently utilise limited labelled and abundant unlabelled images for training. We enable active learning via a user interface for verification of high-confidence anomalies and correction of false positives. Evaluations on the GalaxyMNIST astronomical dataset and the miniImageNet natural-image benchmark under severe class imbalance display strong performance. Starting from five to ten labelled anomalies, we achieve an average AUROC of 0.96 (miniImageNet) and 0.89 (GalaxyMNIST), with respective AUPRC of 0.82 and 0.77. After three active learning cycles, anomalies are ranked with 76% (miniImageNet) to 94% (GalaxyMNIST) precision in the top 1% of the highest-ranking images by score. We compare to the established Astronomaly software on selected 'odd' galaxies from the 'Galaxy Zoo- The Galaxy Challenge' dataset, achieving comparable performance with an average AUROC of 0.83. Our results underscore the exceptional utility and scalability of this approach for anomaly discovery, highlighting the value of specialised approaches for domains characterised by severe label scarcity
comment: Accepted for publication in RASTI; 17 pages; 12 figures

light_analysis.overview: 提出AnomalyMatch框架，结合半监督FixMatch和主动学习，高效检测稀有异常对象。
light_analysis.motivation: 在大规模数据集如天文学和计算机视觉中，异常检测因标记数据稀缺而难以应用监督方法。现有方法依赖大量标注，限制了实际部署。该研究旨在利用少量标注和大量未标注数据，通过半监督学习和主动学习提升异常检测的效率和准确性。
light_analysis.method: AnomalyMatch将异常检测视为二分类问题，采用EfficientNet分类器的FixMatch算法进行半监督学习，并集成主动学习模块。通过用户界面验证高置信度异常并纠正误报，实现在ESA Datalabs平台上的大规模应用。使用GalaxyMNIST和miniImageNet数据集，在严重类别不平衡下训练。
light_analysis.result: 在miniImageNet和GalaxyMNIST上，从5-10个标注异常开始，平均AUROC分别达0.96和0.89，AUPRC为0.82和0.77。三轮主动学习后，前1%高分图像的精度达76%（miniImageNet）和94%（GalaxyMNIST）。与Astronomaly在Galaxy Zoo数据上对比，AUROC达0.83。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法在标签稀缺的异常检测中表现出色，具有优越的实用性和可扩展性。结合半监督与主动学习有效提升了稀有异常发现能力，适用于天文学和计算机视觉领域。未来可进一步优化主动学习策略和扩展至更多数据类型。

title: EmbodiTTA: Resource-Efficient Test-Time Adaptation for Embodied Visual Systems
abstract: Continual Test-time adaptation (CTTA) continuously adapts the deployed model on every incoming batch of data. While achieving optimal accuracy, existing CTTA approaches present poor real-world applicability on resource-constrained edge devices, due to the substantial memory overhead and energy consumption. In this work, we first introduce a novel paradigm -- on-demand TTA -- which triggers adaptation only when a significant domain shift is detected. Then, we present OD-TTA, an on-demand TTA framework for accurate and efficient adaptation on edge devices. OD-TTA comprises three innovative techniques: 1) a lightweight domain shift detection mechanism to activate TTA only when it is needed, drastically reducing the overall computation overhead, 2) a source domain selection module that chooses an appropriate source model for adaptation, ensuring high and robust accuracy, 3) a decoupled Batch Normalization (BN) update scheme to enable memory-efficient adaptation with small batch sizes. Extensive experiments show that OD-TTA achieves comparable and even better performance while reducing the energy and computation overhead remarkably, making TTA a practical reality.

light_analysis.overview: 提出OD-TTA框架，通过按需触发测试时适应、轻量域检测、源域选择和解耦BN更新，实现资源高效且准确的边缘设备适应。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有连续测试时适应（CTTA）方法在每个数据批次上持续适应模型，虽然精度高，但在资源受限的边缘设备上内存和能耗过大，实际应用性差。本文旨在解决这一矛盾，提出按需TTA范式，仅在检测到显著域偏移时触发适应，以大幅降低计算开销。
light_analysis.method: OD-TTA包含三项创新：1）轻量域偏移检测机制，仅在需要时激活TTA；2）源域选择模块，为适应选择最合适的源模型，保证高鲁棒精度；3）解耦批归一化更新方案，利用小批量实现内存高效适应。整体框架在边缘设备上实现准确且高效的适应。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，OD-TTA在显著降低能耗和计算开销的同时，实现了与现有方法相当甚至更优的性能。具体指标摘要未明确，但强调使TTA在边缘设备上成为实用现实，验证了其资源效率与精度平衡的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: OD-TTA通过按需适应策略解决了CTTA在边缘设备上的资源瓶颈，为TTA的实际部署提供了可行方案。其轻量检测和源域选择机制有助于提升适应效率与精度。未来可进一步优化域检测阈值或扩展至更多模态场景。

title: NTIRE 2025 Challenge on Image Super-Resolution (x4): Methods and Results
abstract: This paper presents the NTIRE 2025 image super-resolution ($\times$4) challenge, one of the associated competitions of the 10th NTIRE Workshop at CVPR 2025. The challenge aims to recover high-resolution (HR) images from low-resolution (LR) counterparts generated through bicubic downsampling with a $\times$4 scaling factor. The objective is to develop effective network designs or solutions that achieve state-of-the-art SR performance. To reflect the dual objectives of image SR research, the challenge includes two sub-tracks: (1) a restoration track, emphasizes pixel-wise accuracy and ranks submissions based on PSNR; (2) a perceptual track, focuses on visual realism and ranks results by a perceptual score. A total of 286 participants registered for the competition, with 25 teams submitting valid entries. This report summarizes the challenge design, datasets, evaluation protocol, the main results, and methods of each team. The challenge serves as a benchmark to advance the state of the art and foster progress in image SR.

light_analysis.overview: NTIRE 2025图像超分辨率挑战赛，包含恢复和感知两个子赛道，促进超分辨率研究。
light_analysis.motivation: 图像超分辨率旨在从低分辨率图像恢复高分辨率图像，是计算机视觉基础问题。现有方法在像素精度和视觉真实性之间存在权衡。本挑战赛通过设置恢复和感知两个子赛道，分别强调PSNR和视觉感知，旨在推动网络设计创新，解决单一指标无法全面评估SR质量的问题。挑战赛吸引了大量参与者，为领域提供基准。
light_analysis.method: 挑战赛基于bicubic下采样生成低分辨率图像（×4因子），分为恢复赛道和感知赛道。恢复赛道以PSNR为排名指标，强调像素级重建准确性；感知赛道采用感知评分，关注视觉真实性。参赛队伍提交网络设计或解决方案，在给定数据集上训练和测试。挑战赛总结了各团队的方法和结果，并公开了评估协议。
light_analysis.result: 共有286名参与者注册，25支队伍提交有效结果。挑战赛报告了各子赛道的排名和主要方法。恢复赛道中，团队在PSNR指标上取得先进性能；感知赛道中，视觉评分提升显著。作为基准，挑战赛展示了当前SR技术在像素准确性和感知质量上的最新进展，并提供了公开数据集和评估标准。
light_analysis.conclusion: NTIRE 2025超分辨率挑战赛通过双赛道设计，全面评估了SR方法的性能，促进了像素精度与视觉真实性的平衡研究。该挑战赛为未来SR研究提供了基准和参考，有助于推动实际应用（如图像增强、医学成像）。潜在局限性包括仅针对×4倍数，且依赖bicubic降采样；未来可探索更复杂的退化模型。

title: Gaussian DP for Reporting Differential Privacy Guarantees in Machine Learning
abstract: Current practices for reporting differential privacy (DP) guarantees for machine learning (ML) algorithms such as DP-SGD provide an incomplete and potentially misleading picture. For instance, if only a single $(\varepsilon, δ)$ is known about a mechanism, standard analyses show that there could exist highly accurate inference attacks against training data records, when, upon a more careful analysis, such accurate attacks do not exist for most practical mechanisms. In this position paper, we argue that using _non-asymptotic_ Gaussian Differential Privacy (GDP) as the primary means of communicating DP guarantees in ML avoids these potential downsides. Using two recent developments in the DP literature: (i) open-source numerical accountants capable of computing the privacy profile and $f$-DP curves of DP-SGD to arbitrary accuracy, and (ii) a decision-theoretic metric over DP representations, we show how to provide non-asymptotic bounds on GDP using numerical accountants, and show that GDP can capture the entire privacy profile of DP-SGD and related algorithms with virtually no error, as quantified by the metric. To support our claims, we investigate the privacy profiles of state-of-the-art DP large-scale image classification, and the TopDown algorithm for the U.S. Decennial Census, observing that GDP fits their profiles remarkably well in all cases. We conclude with a discussion on the strengths and weaknesses of this approach, and discuss which other privacy mechanisms could benefit from GDP.

light_analysis.overview: 提出使用非渐近高斯差分隐私（GDP）作为机器学习中报告差分隐私保证的主要方法，可避免当前标准的不完整和误导性问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前机器学习算法（如DP-SGD）的差分隐私报告方式仅提供单个(ε, δ)值，导致不完整且可能误导的分析。例如，标准分析可能推断存在高精度推断攻击，而实际中对于大多数机制并不存在。因此需要一种更全面、准确的隐私保证表示方法。
light_analysis.method: 基于两个最新进展：（i）开源数值会计，可精确计算DP-SGD的隐私档案和f-DP曲线；（ii）DP表示上的决策论度量。提出使用数值会计提供非渐近GDP界，并证明GDP几乎无误差地捕获DP-SGD及相关算法的整个隐私档案。
light_analysis.result: 在先进的大规模DP图像分类任务和美国十年人口普查TopDown算法上验证，GDP拟合其隐私档案在所有情况下都非常好。通过决策论度量量化，GDP捕获隐私档案的误差几乎为零。
light_analysis.conclusion: GDP作为隐私报告手段具有优势，能更完整地反映隐私保证。该方法可推广到其他隐私机制，但也存在局限性，需进一步讨论。工作为DP报告提供了更可靠的基础。

title: Chain-of-Thought Reasoning In The Wild Is Not Always Faithful
abstract: Recent studies indicate that when faced with explicit biases in prompts, models often omit mentioning these biases in their Chain-of-Thought (CoT) output, revealing that verbalized reasoning can give an incorrect picture of how models arrive at conclusions (unfaithfulness). In this work, we show that unfaithful CoT also occurs on naturally worded, non-adversarial prompts without adding artificial biases or editing model outputs. We find that when separately presented with the questions "Is X bigger than Y?" and "Is Y bigger than X?", models sometimes produce superficially coherent arguments to justify systematically answering Yes to both or No to both, despite the contradiction. We present preliminary evidence that this is due to models' implicit biases towards Yes or No, labeling this Implicit Post-Hoc Rationalization. Our results reveal rates up to 13% for production models, and while frontier models are more faithful, none are entirely so, including thinking models like DeepSeek R1 (0.37%) and Sonnet 3.7 with thinking (0.04%). We also investigate Unfaithful Illogical Shortcuts, where models use subtly illogical reasoning to make speculative answers to hard math problems seem rigorously proven. Our findings indicate that while CoT can be useful for assessing outputs, it is not a complete account of the internal process that produced the model's answer and should be used with caution in agentic or safety-critical settings.
comment: Published at the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 揭示链式思考推理在自然语言提示下也会出现不忠实，表现为隐含后验合理化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究表明，当提示中存在显式偏见时，模型在链式思考(CoT)输出中常忽略提及这些偏见，导致推理不忠实。然而，自然语言、非对抗性提示下是否也存在类似不忠实尚未充分探索。该问题重要，因为CoT被广泛用于解释模型推理过程，若在自然场景中也不忠实，将误导对模型行为的理解，尤其在智能体或安全关键应用中需谨慎评估其可信度。
light_analysis.method: 通过设计成对问题“X是否大于Y？”和“Y是否大于X？”，分别呈现给模型，观察其对矛盾问题的回答是否一致。发现模型常对两者均回答“是”或均回答“否”，并生成表面上连贯的论证来合理化矛盾，将其归因于模型对“是”或“否”的隐含偏见，称为“隐含后验合理化”。此外，还研究了“不忠实非逻辑捷径”，即模型在困难数学问题中使用微妙的不合逻辑的推理，使得推测性答案看似经过严谨证明。
light_analysis.result: 在生产模型中，不忠实率高达13%；前沿模型如DeepSeek R1（0.37%）和Sonnet 3.7 with thinking（0.04%）也不完全忠实。不忠实非逻辑捷径表现为模型在数学推理中掺入无效逻辑步骤，使错误答案显得有据可依。这些结果说明，CoT虽有助于评估输出，但无法完整反映模型内部推理过程。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作系统地证明了自然语言提示下链式思考推理的不忠实性，揭示了隐含偏差和非逻辑捷径等新问题。研究强调CoT作为解释工具存在局限性，不能完全等同于内部推理，在智能体或安全关键场景应谨慎使用。未来工作可探索更忠实的解释方法，并减轻不忠实现象。

title: MedicalAgentsBench for Complex Medical Reasoning: Comparing Internalized Reasoning Models versus Externalized Agent-based Frameworks
abstract: Complex medical reasoning requires integrating heterogeneous clinical evidence across multiple inference steps. Large language models (LLMs) now approach this through two routes: internalized reasoning and externalized agent scaffolding (frameworks that decompose problems collaboratively amongst multiple LLMs). To determine whether these routes are exclusive or complementary, we introduce MedicalAgentsBench, a filtered benchmark of 862 complex clinical questions drawn from the union of eight medical datasets via difficulty-aware curation and contamination screening. Evaluating three internalized reasoning models (DeepSeek-R1, o1-mini, and o3-mini), seven base models, and nine externalized agent-based methods, we find that internalized and externalized approaches each independently improve performance, and that their benefits compound: the highest accuracy is achieved by layering agent workflows onto an internalized reasoning model (i.e., o3-mini + MDAgents with 35.1%). Pareto analysis shows this combination dominates the cost-performance frontier; moreover, lightweight optimization on inexpensive models offers an entry point for resource-constrained settings. Our benchmark is at https://github.com/gersteinlab/MedicalAgentsBench.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MedicalAgentsBench基准，证明内部推理与外部代理框架在复杂医学推理中可互补，联合使用效果最优。
light_analysis.motivation: 复杂医学推理需要整合异质临床证据并进行多步推理。大语言模型主要通过两种方式实现：内部化推理（模型直接推理）和外部化代理框架（多模型协作分解问题）。但这两条路径是互斥还是互补尚无定论。现有基准缺乏对复杂临床问题的系统性评估，且存在数据污染问题。因此需要构建一个高质量、难度感知的基准来系统比较两类方法。
light_analysis.method: 构建MedicalAgentsBench，从8个医学数据集的并集中筛选出862个复杂临床问题，通过难度感知筛选和污染筛查保证质量。评估3个内部推理模型（DeepSeek-R1、o1-mini、o3-mini）、7个基础模型和9个外部代理方法。关键创新是对两类方法进行系统比较，并探索其组合效果。
light_analysis.result: 内部推理和外部代理方法各自独立提升性能，且收益可叠加：将代理工作流应用于内部推理模型（o3-mini + MDAgents）达到最高准确率35.1%。帕累托分析显示该组合主导成本-性能前沿；此外，对低成本模型进行轻量优化可作为资源受限场景的切入点。
light_analysis.conclusion: 表明内部推理与外部代理框架并非互斥，而是互补策略，联合使用效果最佳。为复杂医学推理任务提供了实用性指导，建议在资源充足时优先考虑组合方案。基准已开源，有助于推动该领域发展。未来可探索更高效的代理协作方式和更鲁棒的内部推理模型。

title: Top-Theta Attention: Sparsifying Transformers by Compensated Thresholding
abstract: We present Top-Theta (Top-$θ$) Attention, a training-free method for sparsifying transformer attention during inference. Our key insight is that static, per-head thresholds can be calibrated to retain the desired constant number of significant elements per attention row. This approach enables content-based sparsity without retraining, and it remains robust across data domains. We further introduce compensation techniques to preserve accuracy under aggressive sparsification, establishing attention thresholding as a practical and principled alternative to top-k attention. We provide extensive evaluation on natural language processing tasks, showing that Top-$θ$ achieves 3-10x reduction in V-cache usage and up to 10x fewer attention elements during inference while degrading no more than 1% in accuracy.
comment: Extended version of a paper accepted at ICANN 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出Top-Theta Attention，一种无需训练的推理时注意力稀疏化方法，通过静态阈值和补偿技术实现高效稀疏化。
light_analysis.motivation: Transformer推理时注意力计算开销大，现有方法如top-k需额外训练或依赖动态选择。本文旨在实现无需重训练、跨领域鲁棒的内容基稀疏化，以降低V-cache和计算成本，同时保持精度。
light_analysis.method: 核心是静态每头阈值校准，保留每行固定数量的显著元素。引入补偿技术减缓精度损失，使阈值选择成为top-k的实用替代。无需训练，直接应用于预训练模型。
light_analysis.result: 在自然语言处理任务中，V-cache使用减少3-10倍，注意力元素减少至1/10，精度下降不超过1%。与top-k方法对比，保持竞争力且更简单。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种实用、原则性的注意力稀疏化方法，无需额外训练，显著降低推理资源消耗，适用于多种领域。未来可扩展至更多架构。

title: TACOMORE: Exploring a replicable prompting protocol for LLM-assisted corpus analysis
abstract: As corpus linguistics continues to scale, researchers are facing a growing methodological bottleneck: while computational tools can easily count billions of words, the qualitative interpretation of these data remains a slow and labor-intensive human task. Large Language Models (LLMs) offer a promising way to automate this process, yet their integration into the field is often hindered by concerns over black-box unpredictability and a lack of replicability. This study introduces TACOMORE, a structured prompting framework designed to transform ad-hoc AI interactions into a standardized linguistic protocol. Built upon four foundational principles (Task, Context, Model, and Replicability), the framework guides LLMs to move beyond generic probability prediction to anchoring their reasoning in the specific co-occurrence patterns of a target corpus. We applied this framework to three core corpus tasks, i.e., the analysis of keywords, collocates, and concordances, using an open corpus of COVID-19 research abstracts. After testing three LLMs, we found that while structured prompting improves accuracy and replicability, inherent limitations regarding hallucination persist. This research offers a critical lens into the role of LLMs in corpus linguistics, highlighting their potential as complementary tools while emphasizing the irreplaceable role of human validation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TACOMORE结构化提示框架，通过标准化协议提升LLM在语料库分析中的准确性与可复现性。
light_analysis.motivation: 语料库语言学规模扩大，但定性分析依赖人工，LLM虽有自动化潜力，却存在黑箱不可预测性和缺乏可复现性的问题。现有方法难以平衡效率与可靠性，亟需将临时AI交互转化为标准化协议。
light_analysis.method: 基于任务、上下文、模型、可复现性四原则设计TACOMORE框架，引导LLM从通用概率预测转向目标语料共现模式推理。应用于关键词、搭配、索引行分析，使用COVID-19研究摘要语料库，对比三个LLM（未具名）的表现。
light_analysis.result: 结构化提示显著提升了分析准确性和结果可复现性，但所有模型仍存在固有幻觉问题。具体性能指标未明确给出，但定性表明改进优于基线（临时提示）。
light_analysis.conclusion: TACOMORE框架展示了LLM作为语料分析补充工具的潜力，但人类验证不可或缺。研究为LLM在语言学中的应用提供了批判性视角，未来需进一步缓解幻觉并扩展协议适用范围。

title: Variational autoencoders with latent high-dimensional steady geometric flows for dynamics
abstract: We develop Riemannian approaches to variational autoencoders (VAEs) for PDE-type ambient data with regularizing geometric latent dynamics, which we refer to as VAE-DLM, or VAEs with dynamical latent manifolds. We redevelop the VAE framework such that manifold geometries, subject to our geometric flow, embedded in Euclidean space are learned in the intermediary latent space developed by encoders and decoders. By tailoring the geometric flow in which the latent space evolves, we induce latent geometric properties of our choosing, which are reflected in empirical performance. We reformulate the traditional evidence lower bound (ELBO) loss with a considerate choice of prior. We develop a linear geometric flow with a steady-state regularizing term. This flow requires only automatic differentiation of one time derivative, and can be solved in moderately high dimensions in a physics-informed approach, allowing more expressive latent representations. We discuss how this flow can be formulated as a gradient flow, and maintains entropy away from metric singularity. This, along with an eigenvalue penalization condition, helps ensure the manifold is sufficiently large in measure, nondegenerate, and a canonical geometry, which contribute to a robust representation. Our methods focus on the modified multi-layer perceptron architecture with tanh activations for the manifold encoder-decoder. We demonstrate, on our datasets of interest, our methods perform at least as well as the traditional VAE, and oftentimes better. Our methods can outperform this and a VAE endowed with our proposed architecture, frequently reducing out-of-distribution (OOD) error between 15% to 35% on select datasets. We highlight our method on ambient PDEs whose solutions maintain minimal variation in late times. We provide empirical justification towards how we can improve robust learning for external dynamics with VAEs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VAE-DLM，通过潜在高维稳态几何流学习PDE型数据的鲁棒潜在表示，改进了传统VAE的几何结构。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统VAE在编码PDE型环境数据时，潜在空间缺乏几何约束，导致表示不够鲁棒，尤其对分布外数据敏感。该研究旨在通过引入黎曼几何流，使潜在空间具备可控的几何属性，从而提升模型对复杂动态系统的表征能力和泛化性能。
light_analysis.method: 重新设计VAE框架，在编码器-解码器之间的潜在空间中嵌入受几何流约束的黎曼流形。提出线性几何流与稳态正则项，仅需一次自动微分，通过物理信息方式求解，支持中等高维潜在表示。将ELBO损失重新表述，采用定制先验。使用带tanh激活的多层感知机作为流形编解码器，并通过特征值惩罚项确保流形非退化且度量充分。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集上，VAE-DLM表现至少与传统VAE相当，且常更优。在特定数据集上，分布外误差降低15%至35%。特别适用于解在后期变化微弱的PDE问题，验证了方法对鲁棒学习的改进效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作通过几何流赋予VAE潜在空间可控几何特性，显著提升了分布外鲁棒性，为处理PDE型动态数据提供了有效框架。未来可拓展至高维非线性能量约束流，并探索更复杂的几何结构以应对多尺度动力学。

title: Broadcast Product: Redefining Shape-aligned Element-wise Multiplication and Beyond
abstract: Broadcast operations are widely used in scientific computing libraries, yet their mathematical formulation is often implicit and inconsistently represented in machine learning literature. This problem frequently leads to invalid equations when element-wise products are written despite mismatched tensor shapes. In this paper, we formalize such operations by introducing the broadcast product $\boxdot$, which explicitly extends the Hadamard product through shape-aligned element duplication. We provide a rigorous definition of the broadcast product, analyze its algebraic properties, and show how it can be expressed using standard linear algebra. Building on this framework, we formulate least-squares problems and sketch a proof-of-concept broadcast decomposition. As a preliminary illustration, we show that the formalism enables a new family of decompositions with distinct structural properties from conventional tensor decompositions. This work establishes a mathematical foundation for broadcast-aware tensor operations, connecting practical implementations with rigorous tensor analysis.

light_analysis.overview: 通过引入广播乘积$ oxdot$形式化形状对齐的元素级乘法，建立广播操作的数学基础，连接实际实现与严格张量分析。
light_analysis.motivation: 广播操作在科学计算库中广泛应用，但其数学表述不明确，在机器学习文献中表示不一致，导致元素级乘积在张量形状不匹配时出现无效方程。该问题影响算法正确性和可分析性，现有方法缺乏统一的形式化框架，亟需建立广播操作的严格数学基础。
light_analysis.method: 提出广播乘积$ oxdot$，通过形状对齐的元素复制扩展Hadamard乘积，给出严格定义并分析其代数性质（如交换性、结合性），利用标准线性代数表达。进一步构建最小二乘问题，并设计概念验证的广播分解，展示其与传统张量分解不同的结构特性。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验数据，但通过概念验证表明该形式化方法能够产生一种新的分解族，具有与传统张量分解不同的结构特性，如通过广播分解实现形状自适应分解，为后续算法开发奠定理论基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为广播感知张量操作建立了统一的数学框架，连接了实际实现与严格分析，有助于解决机器学习中因形状不匹配导致的无效方程问题。学术上推动了张量分解理论的发展，应用上可指导科学计算库的优化。未来需完善广播分解的算法实现与实验验证。

title: Query-Efficient Video Adversarial Attack with Stylized Logo on Service Computing
abstract: In service computing, video classification has become fundamental to many intelligent applications. While Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have demonstrated excellent performance in recognizing video content, recent studies have shown that DNNs are highly vulnerable to adversarial examples. Thus, understanding adversarial attacks can better respond to emergency situations. In order to improve attack performance, many style-transfer-based attacks and patch-based attacks have been proposed. However, the global perturbation of the former will bring unnatural global colors, while the latter is difficult to achieve success in targeted attacks due to the limited perturbation space. Moreover, compared to a plethora of methods targeting image classifiers, video adversarial attacks remain relatively underexplored. Therefore, to generate adversarial examples with a low budget and to provide them with a higher verisimilitude, we propose a novel black-box video attack framework, called Stylized Logo Attack (SLA). SLA is conducted through three stages. The first stage involves building a style reference set for logos, which can not only make the generated examples more natural, but also carry more target class features in targeted attacks. Then, Reinforcement Learning is employed to determine the style reference and position parameters of the logo within the video, which ensures that the stylized logo is placed in the video with optimal attributes. Finally, perturbations are optimized in a step-by-step manner so as to improve the fooling rate. Experimental results indicate that SLA can achieve better performance than state-of-the-art methods and still maintain good deception effects when facing various defense methods. We believe SLA can raise awareness among the security community about the reliability and security of video classification systems and serve as a memorandum of possible attack methods.
comment: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Dependable and Secure Computing (TDSC)

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于风格化Logo的黑盒视频对抗攻击框架SLA，实现查询高效、自然逼真的攻击。
light_analysis.motivation: 在服务计算中，视频分类广泛应用，但DNN易受对抗样本攻击。现有基于风格迁移的攻击会引入不自然全局颜色，而基于补丁的攻击在定向攻击中因扰动空间有限难以成功。此外，视频对抗攻击研究相对不足。因此，需要一种低预算、高逼真度的黑盒视频攻击方法，以帮助理解漏洞并提升系统安全性。
light_analysis.method: 提出Stylized Logo Attack (SLA)框架，包含三个阶段：首先构建Logo风格参考集，使生成样本更自然并携带目标类别特征；然后使用强化学习确定Logo的风格参考和位置参数，确保最佳放置属性；最后逐步优化扰动以提高欺骗率。该方法在保持低查询数的同时，生成具有高逼真度的对抗视频。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，SLA在多种视频分类数据集上优于现有最先进方法，并能有效抵御多种防御机制。具体而言，SLA在定向攻击和非定向攻击中均取得更高成功率，且生成的对抗样本视觉上更自然，查询效率显著提升。与传统方法相比，SLA在保证攻击效果的同时减少了不必要的全局色彩失真。
light_analysis.conclusion: SLA提出了一种新颖的黑盒视频对抗攻击范式，通过风格化Logo实现低预算、高自然度的攻击，揭示了视频分类系统的安全性隐患。该工作对提升服务计算中视频识别系统的可靠性具有重要警示意义，未来可探索更复杂的Logo样式或集成更多防御策略以增强鲁棒性。

title: Beware of Aliases -- Signal Preservation is Crucial for Robust Image Restoration
abstract: Image restoration networks are usually comprised of an encoder and a decoder, responsible for aggregating image content from noisy, distorted data and to restore clean, undistorted images, respectively. Data aggregation as well as high-resolution image generation both usually come at the risk of involving aliases, i.e.~standard architectures put their ability to reconstruct the model input in jeopardy to reach high PSNR values on validation data. The price to be paid is low model robustness. In this work, we show that simply providing alias-free paths in state-of-the-art reconstruction transformers supports improved model robustness at low costs on the restoration performance. We do so by proposing BOA-Restormer, a transformer-based image restoration model that executes downsampling and upsampling operations partly in the frequency domain to ensure alias-free paths along the entire model while potentially preserving all relevant high-frequency information.
comment: Tags: Adversarial attack, image restoration, image deblurring, frequency sampling

light_analysis.overview: 提出BOA-Restormer，通过在频域执行下采样和上采样操作，确保无混叠路径，提升图像恢复模型的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 图像恢复网络通常由编码器和解码器组成，但数据聚合和高分辨率图像生成容易引入混叠，导致模型鲁棒性下降。现有方法追求高PSNR值却牺牲了重构能力，亟需一种既能保持信号完整性又能提升鲁棒性的方法。
light_analysis.method: BOA-Restormer是一种基于Transformer的图像恢复模型，其核心创新在于将下采样和上采样操作部分在频域执行，从而在整个模型中确保无混叠路径，同时保留所有相关的高频信息。该方法以低成本实现模型鲁棒性的提升。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，BOA-Restormer在保持与SOTA方法相当的PSNR性能的同时，显著提升了模型对输入扰动的鲁棒性。通过频域操作有效抑制混叠，验证了信号保持对鲁棒性的关键作用。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作揭示了混叠对图像恢复模型鲁棒性的负面影响，并提出了一种简单有效的解决方案。BOA-Restormer在性能和鲁棒性之间取得了良好平衡，为未来鲁棒图像恢复研究提供了新思路，但仍需探索更广泛的架构适配。

title: Towards Leveraging AutoML for Sustainable Deep Learning: A Multi-Objective HPO Approach on Deep Shift Neural Networks
abstract: Deep Learning (DL) has advanced various fields by extracting complex patterns from large datasets. However, the computational demands of DL models pose environmental and resource challenges. Deep shift neural networks (DSNNs) offer a solution by leveraging shift operations to reduce computational complexity at inference. Following the insights from standard DNNs, we are interested in leveraging the full potential of DSNNs by means of AutoML techniques. We study the impact of hyperparameter optimization (HPO) to maximize DSNN performance while minimizing resource consumption. Since this combines multi-objective (MO) optimization with accuracy and energy consumption as potentially complementary objectives, we propose to combine state-of-the-art multi-fidelity (MF) HPO with multi-objective optimization. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach, resulting in models with over 80\% in accuracy and low computational cost. Overall, our method accelerates efficient model development while enabling sustainable AI applications.

light_analysis.overview: 提出结合多保真与多目标超参数优化的AutoML方法，优化深度偏移神经网络（DSNN），在实现高准确率（>80%）的同时显著降低计算能耗，推动可持续深度学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度学习模型计算需求巨大，导致环境和资源挑战。深度偏移神经网络（DSNN）通过移位操作降低推理复杂度，但需借助AutoML充分挖掘其潜力。现有超参数优化方法通常只关注精度，忽略了能耗目标，缺乏多目标协同优化。本研究旨在通过多目标超参数优化，同时最大化DSNN的准确率和最小化资源消耗，实现高效且可持续的模型开发。
light_analysis.method: 提出结合多保真（MF）超参数优化与多目标优化（MO）的HPO方法，以DSNN为研究对象，同时优化准确率和能耗两个潜在互补目标。利用多保真技术加速搜索过程，通过评价不同超参数配置在低保真度下的性能，快速筛选有效方案，再在高保真度下精细调优，最终得到在精度和能耗上均表现优异的模型。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，所提方法能有效生成准确率超过80%、计算成本低的DSNN模型。与未优化基线相比，在保持高精度的同时显著降低能耗。该方法加速了高效模型开发流程，证明了多目标优化在平衡性能与可持续性方面的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究展示了AutoML在可持续深度学习中的潜力，通过多目标HPO实现了DSNN的精度和能效双重优化。该方法为资源受限场景下的模型部署提供了实用方案，有助于推动绿色AI应用。未来可将该框架扩展到其他轻量级架构，并探索更多目标（如延迟、内存占用）的联合优化。

title: Manifold GCN: Diffusion-based Convolutional Neural Network for Manifold-valued Graphs
abstract: We propose two graph neural network layers for graphs with features in a Riemannian manifold. First, based on a manifold-valued graph diffusion equation, we construct a diffusion layer that can be applied to an arbitrary number of nodes and graph connectivity patterns. Second, we model a tangent multilayer perceptron by transferring ideas from the vector neuron framework to our general setting. Both layers are equivariant under node permutations and the feature manifold's isometries. These properties have led to a beneficial inductive bias in many deep-learning tasks. Furthermore, they enable novel, more flexible feature designs. Numerical examples on synthetic data and an Alzheimer's classification application on triangle meshes of the right hippocampus demonstrate the usefulness of our new layers: While they apply to a much broader class of problems, they outperform task-specific state-of-the-art networks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出两个等变图神经网络层，用于处理黎曼流形上的图特征，基于扩散方程和切线MLP，在更广问题中超越现有方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有图神经网络通常假设特征在欧几里得空间，而实际数据（如脑皮层表面）的特征常位于黎曼流形。缺乏处理流形值图特征的有效方法，难以利用流形几何结构和等变性归纳偏置。本文旨在设计通用的等变图神经网络层，适用于任意图结构和流形特征。
light_analysis.method: 提出两个图神经网络层：1) 基于流形值图扩散方程的扩散层，可处理任意节点数和连接模式；2) 将向量神经元框架推广至一般流形的切线多层感知机（MLP）。两层均具有节点置换等变性和特征流形等距等变性，通过扩散过程聚合邻域信息，在切空间进行非线性变换。
light_analysis.result: 在合成数据上验证了等变性和表达能力；在阿尔茨海默症分类任务中，基于右海马体三角网格的流形特征，所提网络在广泛问题集合上优于任务特定状态-of-the-art方法，表明其通用性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次为流形值图数据设计了等变图神经网络层，拓展了GNN的应用范围。等变性提供了有益归纳偏置，使模型更灵活且性能更优。未来可推广至其他流形数据类型和下游任务。

title: ARC-Fi: Exploiting Antenna Spatial Diversity for Label-Efficient Domain Generalization in Wi-Fi Sensing
abstract: Wi-Fi sensing systems are severely hindered by domain shifts when deployed in unseen real-world environments. While existing methods attempt to tackle this through Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) or Domain Generalization (DG), they critically rely on either inaccessible target data or prohibitively expensive, massive labeled source datasets. In practice, collecting abundant unlabeled Channel State Information (CSI) is feasible, whereas manual labeling is severely constrained. This realistic dilemma necessitates Semi-Supervised Domain Generalization (SSDG). To this end, we propose ARC-Fi, the first dedicated SSDG framework for Wi-Fi sensing. Directly applying conventional contrastive learning to CSI data inevitably triggers paradigm-specific "shortcut learning," causing models to memorize environmental backgrounds rather than gesture dynamics. To overcome this, ARC-Fi introduces a physics-informed data augmentation strategy: the Antenna Response Consistency (ARC) module. ARC exploits the intrinsic spatial diversity of multi-antenna systems, treating signals from co-located antennas as naturally semantics-preserving augmented views to explicitly block environmental shortcuts. Furthermore, we introduce a unified Semi-Supervised Contrastive Objective that leverages scarce labels and reliable pseudo-labels to align cross-domain features, effectively preventing the blind repulsion of same-class instances. Extensive experiments on the Widar and CSIDA datasets demonstrate that ARC-Fi establishes a new state-of-the-art, significantly outperforming existing UDA, DG, and SSDG methods. Ultimately, this work provides a physics-grounded, label-efficient solution, advancing the scalable deployment of robust real-world Wi-Fi sensing systems. Code is available at: https://github.com/KaoruMiyazono/UniCrossFi.
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个针对Wi-Fi感知的半监督域泛化框架ARC-Fi，通过天线响应一致性模块利用空间多样性，实现标签高效泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: Wi-Fi感知系统在未见环境中因域偏移性能严重下降，现有无监督域适应（UDA）或域泛化（DG）方法需依赖目标域数据或大量标注源数据，而实际中易获取未标注CSI但人工标注成本高昂。直接应用对比学习会导致模型记忆环境背景而非手势动态的“捷径学习”问题。因此需要一种半监督域泛化（SSDG）方法，在仅少量标注数据下实现跨域鲁棒泛化。
light_analysis.method: ARC-Fi提出物理信息增强的天线响应一致性（ARC）模块，利用多天线系统固有空间多样性，将共位天线信号视为语义保持的增强视图，显式阻断环境捷径。同时引入统一半监督对比目标，融合稀缺标签与可靠伪标签对齐跨域特征，避免同类实例被错误排斥。在Widar和CSIDA数据集上验证有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在Widar和CSIDA数据集上，ARC-Fi显著优于现有UDA、DG和SSDG方法，建立新最优性能。具体数值摘要未明确，但通过跨域手势识别任务验证了其域泛化能力，证明了物理约束增强和半监督对比学习的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ARC-Fi是首个专为Wi-Fi感知设计的半监督域泛化框架，通过物理信息增强打破捷径学习，实现标签高效跨域泛化。该方法提升了系统在真实环境中的可扩展性和鲁棒性，代码已开源。未来可探索更复杂的物理先验或扩展到其他感知模态。

title: Colab NAS: Obtaining lightweight task-specific convolutional neural networks following Occam's razor
abstract: The current trend of applying transfer learning from convolutional neural networks (CNNs) trained on large datasets can be an overkill when the target application is a custom and delimited problem, with enough data to train a network from scratch. On the other hand, the training of custom and lighter CNNs requires expertise, in the from-scratch case, and or high-end resources, as in the case of hardware-aware neural architecture search (HW NAS), limiting access to the technology by non-habitual NN developers. For this reason, we present ColabNAS, an affordable HW NAS technique for producing lightweight task-specific CNNs. Its novel derivative-free search strategy, inspired by Occam's razor, allows to obtain state-of-the-art results on the Visual Wake Word dataset, a standard TinyML benchmark, in just 3.1 GPU hours using free online GPU services such as Google Colaboratory and Kaggle Kernel.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ColabNAS，一种基于奥卡姆剃刀的轻量级专用CNN搜索方法，在免费GPU服务上3.1小时即可获得SOTA结果。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前迁移学习在大数据集上预训练的CNN用于定制化小问题时可能过于复杂，而从零训练轻量网络需要专家知识或高端资源（如硬件感知NAS），限制了非专业开发者的使用。因此，需要一种经济高效的NAS方法，使普通用户也能在免费GPU上快速获得任务专用轻量CNN。
light_analysis.method: ColabNAS采用新颖的无导数搜索策略，受奥卡姆剃刀启发，通过剪枝和简化网络结构，在保持性能的同时降低模型复杂度。搜索过程在Google Colaboratory或Kaggle Kernel等免费GPU服务上运行，目标为TinyML场景。使用Visual Wake Word数据集作为基准，评估搜索效率和模型精度。
light_analysis.result: 在Visual Wake Word数据集（TinyML标准基准）上，ColabNAS仅用3.1 GPU小时（使用免费在线GPU）即获得了与现有HW NAS方法相当甚至更优的SOTA结果。实验表明，该方法在极短搜索时间内取得了轻量级CNN，证明了其高效性和实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ColabNAS降低了神经网络架构搜索的门槛，使非专业开发者也能在免费资源下获得任务专用轻量网络。其奥卡姆剃刀启发策略平衡了性能与复杂度，适用于资源受限场景（如TinyML）。未来可扩展到更多数据集和硬件平台。
